---
title: "Identification of Seed Metabolites and Microbiota members associated with Germination and Emergence in Common Bean"
author: "Louna Colaert-Sentenac"
date: "2025-10-22"
output: html_document
---
# Context

*Project*: Identification of Seed Metabolites and Microbiota members associated with Germination and Emergence in Common Bean

*Research Questions*: 

Comparison of mature seeds of 8 common bean /P. vulgaris/ varieties (seeds were harvested from plants grown in the same field at the same period).
(i) how do mature seed morphological, metabolic, and microbiota-related parameters relate to seed germination speed and seedling emergence percentage, and can we therefore identify quality biomarkers?
(ii) are such biomarkers valid across different bean varieties?

*Plant varieties*: Phaseolus vulgaris var. Caprice, Linex, Vanilla, Deezer, Vezer, Flavert, Contender, and Facila
*Developmental stages*: mature seeds, and for emergence: seedlings at 7 days after sowing
*sample storage*: seeds were store dried at 4°C in a dark room
*authors*:
Louna Colaert-Sentenac¹, Élisabeth Planchet¹, Cyril Abadie4, Julie Lalande1,  Sherif Hamdy2, Coralie Marais¹, Pascale Satour¹, Audrey Dupont2, Anne Préveaux¹, Aurélie Charrier2, Laurence Le Corre2, Didier Demilly2, Claude-Emmanuel Koutouan3, Marie-Hélène Wagner2, Matthieu Barret¹, Guillaume Tcherkez¹, Béatrice Teulat¹*, Marie Simonin¹


# Setup
## Libraries import

```{r install packages, eval = FALSE}
# CRAN packages
install_if_missing_cran <- function(pkgs) {
  to_install <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
  if (length(to_install) > 0) {
    message("Installing from CRAN: ", paste(to_install, collapse = ", "))
    #install.packages(to_install, dependencies = TRUE)
  } else {
    message("All CRAN packages already installed.")
  }
}

# Bioconductor packages
bioc_packages <- c(
  "BiocGenerics", "metacoder", "taxa", "microbiome", "Biostrings",
  "DESeq2", "phyloseq", "decontam", "mixOmics", "edgeR", "KEGGREST",
  "ComplexHeatmap", "ropls", "EnhancedVolcano", "DAtest"
)

install_if_missing_bioc <- function(pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
  to_install <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
  if (length(to_install) > 0) {
    message("Installing from Bioconductor: ", paste(to_install, collapse = ", "))
    BiocManager::install(to_install, ask = FALSE)
  } else {
    message("All Bioconductor packages already installed.")
  }
}

cran_packages <- setdiff(packages, bioc_packages)

install_if_missing_cran(cran_packages)
install_if_missing_bioc(bioc_packages)

# Install depreciated/remote
install.packages("remotes")  # if not already installed
remotes::install_url("https://cran.r-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/HMP/HMP_2.0.tar.gz")
library(devtools)
install_github("pmartinezarbizu/pairwiseAdonis/pairwiseAdonis")
install_github("zdk123/SpiecEasi")
```

Colors setup/groups

```{r Chose variable to use for graph color, eval=START, echo=TRUE}
choice_color <- "FEP" 
                #"FGP" 
                #"t50germ"
# to set graph axis order according to chosen variable
choice_order <- choice_color
                #"FEP"
                ##"t50germ"
```
```{r Set color scales, eval=START, echo=TRUE}
genotypes = c("Caprice", "Linex", "Vanilla", "Deezer", "Vezer","Flavert", "Contender", "Facila")

# Final Emergence Percentage
color_by_emergence = c("Vanilla" = "#000066", "Linex"= "#0066FF", "Caprice"= "#88CCEE", "Vezer"= "#B2DF8A",
                       "Deezer"= "#f7cb44ff", "Facila"=  "#FE9929", "Flavert"=  "#E31A1C", "Contender" = "#990000")

#color_by_germination_speed = c("Flavert"= "#404040","Facila" = "#B2DF8A","Deezer"= "#95D840FF","Vezer"= "#29AF7FFF", "Contender"=  "#cc6a70ff","Linex"="#f68f46ff","Caprice" ="#f7cb44ff","Vanilla"= "#FDE725FF")

# t50germ
color_by_germination_kin = c("Vezer"="#404040", "Flavert"= "#29AF7FFF", "Deezer"=  "#95D840FF", "Facila" = "#B2DF8A", "Vanilla"= "#FDE725FF", "Caprice" ="#f7cb44ff", "Linex"= "#f68f46ff", "Contender"= "#cc6a70ff") #t50Germ&TMGR&MGT

# t50tot
color_by_germination_kin_tot = c("Vezer"="#404040", "Flavert" = "#29AF7FFF", "Deezer" = "#95D840FF", "Facila" = "#B2DF8A", "Caprice" = "#FDE725FF", "Contender" = "#f7cb44ff","Linex" = "#f68f46ff", "Vanilla" = "#cc6a70ff")

# seed color
# color_by_testae = c("Caprice" =  "navajowhite3","Linex" = "bisque3","Vanilla" = "oldlace","Deezer" = "ivory2","Vezer" = "seashell2","Flavert" = "palegreen2", "Contender" = "coral3", "Facila" = "black")
```
```{r Assign color scale, eval=START, echo=TRUE}
if(choice_color == "FEP"){
  color = color_by_emergence}
if(choice_color == "t50germ"){
  color = color_by_germination_kin}
if(choice_color == "t50tot"){
  color = color_by_germination_kin_tot
}
```

```{r test colorblind-friendliness, eval=START, eval=FALSE}
colorblindcheck::palette_plot(color_by_emergence)

```
Colors by genus for metabarcoding
```{r colors by genus for metabarcoding, eval=START, echo=FALSE}
tax_colors_core_ITS <- c(
  # Dothideomycetes
  'Alternaria' = '#9089B7',
  'Cladosporium' = '#60D394',
  'Epicoccum' = '#CAF0F8',
  'Stemphylium' = 'darkorange',
  'Verticillium' = '#7DAF6E',

  # Sordariomycetes
  'Acremonium' = '#ECDBD2',
  'Fusarium' = 'lightgreen',
  'Gibberella' = '#AB4F5F',
  'Plectosphaerella' = '#B29E54',
  'Sarocladium' = '#EF476F',

  # Leotiomycetes
  'Sclerotinia' = 'blue',

  # Eurotiomycetes
  'Penicillium' = '#B76C3B',
  'Iodophanus' = '#CF7773',

  # Basidiomycetes — Tremellomycetes
  'Cystofilobasidium' = '#FCC875',
  'Naganishia' = 'pink',
  'Rhodotorula' = '#82E4DE',
  'Vishniacozyma' = '#FFBB94',

  # Basidiomycetes — Pucciniomycetes
  'Sporobolomyces' = '#FFD60A',
  'Itersonilia' = 'purple',

  # Saccharomycetes
  'Hanseniaspora' = '#E99787',
  'Pichia' = '#D4C8D1',

  # Non classifiés
  'unidentified' = 'gray',
  'Other' = 'black'
)

tax_colors_core_gyrB <- c(
  # Gammaproteobacteria — Enterobacteriales
  'Enterobacter' = '#ACD0C0',
  'Erwinia' = '#4F6457',
  'Pantoea' = 'orange',
  'Klebsiella' = '#C05805',
  'Serratia' = '#EF476F',
  'Cedecea' = '#F4CC95',
  'Kosakonia' = '#E8A87C',

  # Gammaproteobacteria — Pseudomonadales
  'Pseudomonas' = '#90639F',
  'Pseudomonas_E' = '#7B5EA7',
  'Acinetobacter' = '#CFA7DA',
  'Stenotrophomonas' = '#B29E54',

  # Betaproteobacteria — Burkholderiales
  'Achromobacter' = '#FFBB94',
  'Herbaspirillum' = '#6FFFE9',
  'Duganella' = 'red',
  'Massilia' = '#D4E79C',
  'Variovorax' = '#60D394',

  # Alphaproteobacteria — Rhizobiales
  'Agrobacterium' = 'yellow',
  'Rhizobium' = 'lightgreen',
  'Neorhizobium' = '#C8E6A0',
  'Microvirga' = '#A8D5A2',
  'Paracoccus' = '#82E4DE',

  # Alphaproteobacteria — Sphingomonadales
  'Sphingomonas' = '#CF7773',
  'Sphingomicrobium' = '#E8A0B4',

  # Alphaproteobacteria — Caulobacterales
  'Brevundimonas' = 'blue',

  # Actinobacteria
  'Arthrobacter' = '#6A4C93',
  'Agromyces' = '#B39DDB',
  'Cutibacterium' = '#9B72CF',
  'Plantibacter' = 'purple',
  'Rhodococcus' = '#0582CA',
  'Tsukamurella' = '#CAF0F8',

  # Firmicutes
  'Bacillus' = '#547DAE',
  'Paenibacillus' = '#5FA8D3',
  'Staphylococcus' = '#FFD60A',

  # Non classifiés
  'unclassified' = 'grey',
  'Other' = 'black'
)
```

Theme choice
```{r Set graphs theme, eval=START}
verbose = FALSE
custom_theme <- theme_classic() + 
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(color="black", size=14, face="bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(color="black", size=12, face="bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(colour="black", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(colour="black", size=14, face="bold"))
        #axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
        
        # center y-axis title
  #theme(
  #  axis.title.y = element_text(
  #    angle = 90,        # Keep the title vertical
  #    hjust = 0, # Align title to the bottom of the axis       
  #    margin = margin(t = 20)
  #  ))

transparent_theme <- theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), #transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill='transparent', color=NA), #transparent background
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), #remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), #remove minor gridlines
    legend.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), #transparent legend background
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill='transparent') #transparent legend panel
  )
```
```{r Function to order graph legends, eval=START}
Order_legends <- function(choice_order, dataframe){
  if (choice_order == "FGP"){
    order_var = c("Flavert", "Facila", "Contender", "Deezer", "Vezer", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vanilla")
  }
  if (choice_order == "t50germ"){
    order_var = c("Vezer", "Flavert", "Deezer","Facila", "Vanilla", "Caprice", "Linex", "Contender")
  }
  if (choice_order == "t50tot"){
    order_var = c("Vezer","Flavert","Deezer","Facila","Caprice","Contender","Linex","Vanilla")
  }
  if (choice_order == "FEP"){
    order_var = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer", "Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")
    #"Contender", "Flavert", "Facila", "Deezer", "Vezer", "Caprice", "Linex", "Vanilla" # Reverse FEP
  }
  if (choice_order == "FEP_col"){
    order_var = c("Vanilla","Deezer", "Linex","Facila", "Caprice","Flavert", "Vezer","Contender")
    #"Contender", "Flavert", "Facila", "Deezer", "Vezer", "Caprice", "Linex", "Vanilla" # Reverse FEP
  }
  if (choice_order == "t50germ_col"){
    order_var = c("Vezer", "Vanilla", "Flavert", "Caprice", "Deezer", "Linex", "Facila", "Contender")}
    
  if (choice_order == "Metabar_richness"){
    dataframe <- dataframe[order(dataframe$Richness),]
    order_var = as.vector(dataframe$Varieties)
  }
  dataframe$Varieties <- factor(dataframe$Varieties,
                                levels = order_var, labels = order_var)
  dataframe <- dataframe %>% 
    arrange(factor(Varieties, levels = order_var)) %>% 
  reorder_levels(Varieties, order = order_var)
            
  return(dataframe)
}
```
```{r Function to add letters for scatter plots, eval=START}
TestGroupsToLetters <- function(test_df) {
  alphabet <- letters  # 'letters' is a built-in R vector containing 'a', 'b', 'c', ..., 'z'
  # Convert a numeric group to corresponding letter(s)
  convert_group_to_letters <- function(group) {
    # Split the group into individual digits, convert to numeric, and map to letters
    group_clean <- trimws(group)  # Remove leading/trailing spaces
    digits <- strsplit(group_clean, "")[[1]]
    letters_vec <- alphabet[as.numeric(digits)]
    paste(letters_vec, collapse = "")  # Combine letters into a single string
  }
  # Apply the conversion to the .group column
  test_df %>%
    mutate(
      Groups = sapply(as.character(.group), convert_group_to_letters)
    ) %>%
    select(Varieties, Groups)
}
```
```{r Function to add labels to ggarrange plots}
add_labels <- function(plot, label, x_loc, y_loc, leftright, bottomtop, font_size = 20) {
  plot + annotation_custom(
    grob = textGrob(label, 
                    x = unit(x_loc, "npc"), 
                    y = unit(y_loc, "npc"), 
                    just = c(leftright, bottomtop),
                    gp = gpar(fontsize = font_size, fontface = "bold")), 
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf
  )
}
```

# ______________________________________________________________________________
# 1_Seed Germination and Emergence by Variety
## 1.0_Germination data loading and pre-processing
```{r load and pre-process individual data, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
# load data
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "GermEmerg/3_GEVES_Cumulated_percentages_16lots_4x24seeds_pleatedpaper_20°C.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 3,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)

# select Gers lot seeds
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[stringr::str_which(
  GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Echantillon,
  pattern = " 32"),]
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Echantillon <- stringr::str_extract(
  GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Echantillon,
  pattern = "[:alpha:]+(?= 32)")

# rename Varieties
names(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper) == "Echantillon"] <- "Varieties"
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Varieties[GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Varieties=="BEAVEZER"] <-"Vezer"
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Varieties <-
  str_to_title(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Varieties)
# as.factor
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Varieties <-
  as.factor(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Varieties)

# mutate percentages to count
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(4:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper),
                .fns = ~.x*24/100))
# convert to integers
GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[,4:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper)]  <- GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[,4:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper)] %>%
  mutate_all(.funs = as.integer)
```
## 1.1_Suppl_Final Germination Percentage
```{r select only final germination rate, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- 
  GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[, c(1:2,ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper))]

colnames(GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper) <- c("Varieties", "Replicate", "Final_Germ_Percentage") # Germination % at final time (156h)
```
```{r test Germination, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
GermEmerg_Germ_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
                     measurevar = c("Final_Germ_Percentage"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)

```
```{r test Germination, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
# Gaussian or Gamma (continuous data) - choose Gamma because distribution is skewed
model.nb<-lm(Final_Germ_Percentage ~ Varieties,  data=GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper)
summary(model.nb)
ggpubr::ggqqplot(residuals(model.nb))
# check if model fits the data P>0.05 is good
shapiro_test(residuals(model.nb))
plot(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
Anova(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
fit <- aov(Final_Germ_Percentage ~ Varieties,  data=GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper)# analyse de variance
fit

# posthoc tests
warp.emm <- emmeans(model.nb, ~ Varieties)
GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_test <- multcomp::cld(warp.emm)

# add letters to GermEmerg_Germ_stat
GroupLetters <- TestGroupsToLetters(GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_test)
GermEmerg_Germ_stat <- left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat, GroupLetters, by = "Varieties")

# clean
rm(model.nb, fit, warp.emm, GroupLetters, GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_test)
```
```{r plot FigSuppl1a_FGP Scatterplot, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper)


GermEmerg_Fig_FGP <- ggplot(GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
                                    aes(x=Varieties,y=Final_Germ_Percentage)) +
  geom_jitter(aes( x = Varieties,y=Final_Germ_Percentage, color=Varieties), size=5,
              position = position_jitter(width = .1), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_crossbar(data=GermEmerg_Germ_stat, 
                aes(ymin = Final_Germ_Percentage, ymax = Final_Germ_Percentage),
                size=1,col="black", width = .3) +
  theme_classic()+
  xlab("Varieties") + ylab("Final Germination Percentage_144h") +
  scale_color_manual(values=color)+
  custom_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(30, 110))
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(20, 110, by = 20)) +
  geom_text(data=GermEmerg_Germ_stat,
            aes(label=Groups, x=Varieties, y=Final_Germ_Percentage),
            vjust = -0.7, hjust = -0.5)
  
GermEmerg_Fig_FGP
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "GermEmerg/Fig_GermEmerg_FGP_pleatedpaper.png"), plot = GermEmerg_Fig_FGP)
}
```

## 1.2_Cumulative Germination Percentage curves
```{r prepare model curves, mean for all varieties, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
# compute mean and sd
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb <- GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 4:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper),
               names_to = "Germination_time_hour",
               values_to = "Germination_cum_number")


GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb %>%
  group_by(Varieties, Germination_time_hour) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_cum_germ_nb = mean(Germination_cum_number),
            sd_cum_germ_nb = sd(Germination_cum_number))
```
```{r plot Fig1A_KinGerm Exact mean curves with sd intervals, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats <- Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats)

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats$Germination_time_hour <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats$Germination_time_hour)
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats %>% arrange(Germination_time_hour)

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$Germination_time_hour <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$Germination_time_hour)
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb %>% arrange(Germination_time_hour)
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$Répétition <- as.factor(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$Répétition)

# Add jitter only to points with same coordinates
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$jitter_needed <- 
  duplicated(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb[, c("Germination_time_hour", "Germination_cum_number")]) |
  duplicated(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb[, c("Germination_time_hour", "Germination_cum_number")], 
             fromLast = TRUE)


# Plot
GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_raw_meanVar <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Germination_time_hour, group = Varieties)) +
  # mean curves
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_cum_germ_nb, color = Varieties), size = 1) + 
  # replicates points
  geom_point(data = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb[GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$jitter_needed,],
             aes(x = Germination_time_hour, y= Germination_cum_number, color = Varieties, shape = Répétition),
             size = 1, alpha=0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.1)) +
  geom_point(data = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb[!GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb$jitter_needed,],
             aes(x = Germination_time_hour, y= Germination_cum_number, color = Varieties, shape = Répétition),
             size = 1, alpha=0.3) +
  # Sd intervals
  geom_ribbon(aes(y = mean_cum_germ_nb, ymin = mean_cum_germ_nb - sd_cum_germ_nb, ymax = mean_cum_germ_nb + sd_cum_germ_nb, fill = Varieties), alpha = .2) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values=color)+ 
  scale_color_manual(values=color)+ 
  guides(shape = "none") + # Remove shape legend
  ylab("Cumulative Germination Percentage\n(n=4x24seeds)") +
  xlab("Imbibition duration (hours)") +
  custom_theme +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, 25))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))#+
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Bean varieties"))

GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_raw_meanVar
if(choice_save_fig_all == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig_GermEmerg_KinGerm_raw_meanVar_pleatedpaper.png"),
         plot = GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_raw_meanVar)
}
```

## 1.3_Emergence data loading and pre-processing
```{r load metadata Temperature-light-humidity, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
# read file and subset it ####
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- readxl::read_excel(path = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "GermEmerg/ReglageM51CinEm_marsavril2024.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        col_names=TRUE,
                        col_types = c("date", "date",  "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "text", "date"))
colnames(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions) <- c("Date", "Hour", "measured_Temp", "set_Temp", "Humidity", "LightOnOff", "Cumul_LightOn")
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions[
        GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Date >= as.POSIXct("2024-04-10") & #J0
        GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Date <= as.POSIXct("2024-04-16"),] #J6
# Keep only hours not false date ####
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Hour <-
  format(as.POSIXct(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Hour), format = "%H:%M")
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Cumul_LightOn <- 
  format(as.POSIXct(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Cumul_LightOn), format = "%H:%M")
# subset to hours 23,01,03,05,… ####
times_to_keep <- seq(from = as.POSIXct("01:00", "%H:%M", tz = "UTC"),
              to = as.POSIXct("23:00", "%H:%M", tz = "UTC"),
              by = "2 hours")
times_to_keep <- format(as.POSIXct(times_to_keep), format = "%H:%M")
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions[
        GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Hour %in% times_to_keep,]

# correct LightOnOff with natural light ####
light_hours <- seq(from = as.POSIXct("09:00", "%H:%M", tz = "UTC"),
                                      to = as.POSIXct("19:00", "%H:%M", tz = "UTC"),
                                      by = "2 hours")
light_hours <- format(as.POSIXct(light_hours), format = "%H:%M")
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions %>% 
  mutate(Light = ifelse(Hour %in% light_hours,
                        "Oui",
                        LightOnOff))
rm(times_to_keep, light_hours)
# Compute DayNumber-HourAfterSowing code as for GermEmerg_CinEm_allData ####
# DayNumber (2024-04-10 = 0, 2024-04-11 = 1,… 2024-04-16 = 6) , "-", HourAfterSowing (2024-04-10 17:00 = 00, 2024-04-10 18:00 = 01, …,)
## convert Hour to numeric
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$HourNum <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Hour %>%
  gsub(pattern = "[:]",
       replacement = ".")
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$HourNum <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$HourNum)
## convert Day to NumDay
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions %>% 
  mutate(DayNum = str_extract(Date,
                     pattern = "(?<=^[:digit:]{4}[-][:digit:]{2}[-])[:digit:]{2}"),
         .after = Date)
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$DayNum <- (as.numeric(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$DayNum) - 10)
## compute HourAfterSowing
Hour_sowing_D0 = 17
GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions %>%
  dplyr::mutate(HourAfterSowing = ((DayNum-1)*24+ 24-Hour_sowing_D0) + HourNum)

GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions[GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$HourAfterSowing >= 0,
                                                                 c("HourAfterSowing",
                                                                     "Date", "Hour",
                                                                     "measured_Temp",
                                                                     "Humidity",
                                                                     "Light")]
# compute vector of night-hours start and end #####
night_hours <- GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions[GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions$Light == "Non",]$HourAfterSowing

runs <- split(seq_along(night_hours), # seq_along : indices of night_hours
              cumsum(c(0, diff(night_hours) > 2)))  # adds 1 at each index where night_hours "jumps"
# split: divides in sublists of night_hours indexes of for following values (with step = 2)
night_hours_startend_indices <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind,
                                                      lapply(runs[lengths(runs) > 1], range)))
                                # indices of start and end of consecutives values
names(night_hours_startend_indices) <- c("start", "end")
night_hours_startend <- night_hours_startend_indices
night_hours_startend <- night_hours_startend %>% mutate(start = night_hours[start],
                                                        end = night_hours[end])
night_hours_startend <- rbind(night_hours_startend, c(night_hours[length(night_hours)], (night_hours[length(night_hours)] + 6))) # fill in absent data based on previous
rm(night_hours, night_hours_startend_indices, runs)

names(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions)[names(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions) == 'Hour'] <- 'DigitalHour'
names(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions)[names(GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions) == 'HourAfterSowing'] <- 'Hour'
```
```{r extract emergence data for graph, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
force_bind = function(df1, df2) {
    colnames(df2) = colnames(df1)
    bind_rows(df1, df2)
}


GermEmerg_CinEm_perRep <- function(Excel_path){
  GermEmerg_CinEm_allData <- data.frame("Plant" = c(), "Em_delay" = c(), "Varieties" = c(), "Repl" = c(), "Tray" = c())
  Varieties_repl_tray <- as.list(readxl::excel_sheets(Excel_path)) # list of sheets name from the excel file
  
  for (num_Varieties_repl in 1:length(Varieties_repl_tray)){ #length(Varieties_repl_tray)
    # Sheet opening
    single_Varieties_repl <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = Excel_path,
                            sheet = num_Varieties_repl,
                            colNames=FALSE,
                            na.strings = "N/A",
                            sep.names = ".",
                            )
    # Table delimitation
    single_Varieties_repl  <-  single_Varieties_repl[1:5, 1:16]
    single_Varieties_repl <- single_Varieties_repl %>% dplyr::mutate_at(vars(paste0("X", seq(1, 16, 2))), as.numeric)
    # Pivot table with Plant_id, Time_Em, Varieties, Repl
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl[,1:2], single_Varieties_repl[,3:4])
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl_long, single_Varieties_repl[,5:6])
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl_long, single_Varieties_repl[,7:8])
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl_long, single_Varieties_repl[,9:10])
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl_long, single_Varieties_repl[,11:12])
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl_long, single_Varieties_repl[,13:14])
    single_Varieties_repl_long <- force_bind(single_Varieties_repl_long, single_Varieties_repl[,15:16])
    
    colnames(single_Varieties_repl_long) <- c("Plant", "Em_delay")
    single_Varieties_repl_long$Plant <- as.factor(single_Varieties_repl_long$Plant)
    current <- c(as.character(Varieties_repl_tray[num_Varieties_repl]))
    single_Varieties_repl_long$Varieties <- as.factor(rep_len(str_extract(current, "[:alpha:]+(?=[:punct:])"), 40))
    single_Varieties_repl_long$Repl <- as.factor(rep_len(str_extract(current, "(?<=[:punct:])[:digit:]+(?=[:punct:])"), 40))
    single_Varieties_repl_long$Tray <- as.factor(rep_len(str_extract(current, "(?<=-)[:digit:]+$"), 40))
    # Add to GermEmerg_CinEm_allData
    GermEmerg_CinEm_allData <- bind_rows(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData, single_Varieties_repl_long)
    print(paste0(num_Varieties_repl,":  ", current))
  }
  return(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData)
}
rm(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData,
   current, num_Varieties_repl, single_Varieties_repl, single_Varieties_repl_long)

GermEmerg_CinEm_allData <- GermEmerg_CinEm_perRep(paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "GermEmerg/Table_Trays.xlsx"))
```
```{r preprocess data, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
# Experiment was started 2024-04-10 at 17:00. In GermEmerg_CinEm_allData, Day is encoded as Day number (2024-04-10 = 0, 2024-04-11 = 1,… 2024-04-16 = 6) , "-", Hour (01:00 = 01, …, 23:00 = 23).
# Convert Em_delay from Day-hour to Hour format
Hour_sowing_D0 = 17

GermEmerg_CinEm_allData$Day <- as.numeric(str_extract(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData$Em_delay, "[:digit:]+(?=[:punct:])"))
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData$HourofDay <- as.numeric(str_extract(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData$Em_delay, "(?<=[:punct:])[:digit:]+"))
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData <- GermEmerg_CinEm_allData %>% dplyr::mutate(Hour = ((Day-1)*24+ 24-Hour_sowing_D0) + HourofDay)

GermEmerg_CinEm_allData <- setorder(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData, "Hour")
# recode varieties
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData$Varieties <- recode_factor(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData$Varieties, CAP="Caprice", CON="Contender", DEE="Deezer", FAC="Facila", FLA="Flavert", 'FLA®_comm'="Flavert comm", LIN="Linex", VAN="Vanilla", VEZ ='Vezer')

GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis <- GermEmerg_CinEm_allData
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis$Plant <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis$Plant)
#GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis$Hour <- as.character(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis$Hour)

# remove non-germinated
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis <- GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis[GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis$Hour != "151",]

# Replace all NA values par 0
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_wide <- pivot_wider(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis[,c(1,3:5, 8)], names_from = Hour, values_from = Plant, values_fn = list(Plant = length))
GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_wide[is.na(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_wide)] <- 0
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count <- pivot_longer(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_wide, cols = 4:ncol(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_wide), names_to = "Hour", values_to = "Em_nb")

# sort and rm
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count$Hour <- as.integer(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count$Hour)
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count <- setorder(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count, "Hour")
rm(GermEmerg_CinEm_allData, GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_bis, GermEmerg_CinEm_allData_wide)
# count per tray if no long->wide->long
#GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count_sd <- GermEmerg_CinEm_allData %>%  group_by(Var, Repl, Hour) %>%  dplyr::summarise(Em_nb = n())

# cumulative Emerged seedling number 
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count %>% group_by(Varieties, Repl) %>% dplyr::mutate(Cum_EmHour = cumsum(Em_nb))
rm(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_count)
# percentage
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum %>% dplyr::mutate(Final_Em_Percentage = Cum_EmHour/40*100)

# aggregate by variety with sd error bars
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum %>%
  group_by(Varieties, Hour) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_cum_Em_nb = mean(Final_Em_Percentage),
            sd_cum_Em_nb = sd(Final_Em_Percentage))

GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd$Hour <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd$Hour)
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd %>% arrange(Hour)

GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$Hour <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$Hour)
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum %>% arrange(Hour)
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$Repl <- as.factor(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$Repl)

# Add jitter only to points with same coordinates
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$jitter_needed <- 
  duplicated(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum[, c("Hour", "Em_nb")]) |
  duplicated(GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum[, c("Hour", "Em_nb")], 
             fromLast = TRUE)
GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum %>% dplyr::mutate(VarRepl = paste0(Varieties, "_", Repl))

```
## 1.4_Cumulative Emergence Percentage curves
```{r plot Fig1C_KinEm Exact mean curves with sd intervals, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
color_Em <- c(color, "Flavert comm"="green")
#c("Caprice" = "#000066", "Linex"= "#0000CC", "Vanilla"= "#0066FF", "Deezer"="#88CCEE", "Vezer"= "#f7cb44ff", "Flavert"=  "#FE9929", "Contender"=  "#E31A1C", "Facila" = "#990000")###########

# Plot
GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Hour)) + #, group = Varieties
  # mean curves ####
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_cum_Em_nb, group = Varieties, color = Varieties), size = 1) + 
  # replicates points
  geom_point(data = GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum[GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$jitter_needed,],
             aes(x = Hour, y= Final_Em_Percentage, group = Varieties, color = Varieties, shape = Repl),
             size = 1, alpha=0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.1)) +
  geom_point(data = GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum[!GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$jitter_needed,],
             aes(x = Hour, y= Final_Em_Percentage, group = Varieties, color = Varieties, shape = Repl),
             size = 1, alpha=0.3) +
  # Sd intervals ####
  geom_ribbon(aes(y = mean_cum_Em_nb, ymin = mean_cum_Em_nb - sd_cum_Em_nb, ymax = mean_cum_Em_nb + sd_cum_Em_nb, fill = Varieties, group = Varieties), alpha = .1) +
  # Colors ####
  scale_fill_manual(values=color_Em)+ 
  scale_color_manual(values=color_Em)+ 
  guides(shape = "none", color = "none") +  # Remove shape legend
  
  # grey zones for night ####
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = night_hours_startend$start, xmax = night_hours_startend$end, 
           ymin = -10, ymax = -5, 
           alpha = .2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -10) + geom_hline(yintercept = -5) +
  #theme(plot.margin=unit(c(1,3,1,1),"cm"))+
  #theme(legend.position = c(1.1,.6), legend.direction = "vertical") +
  #theme(legend.title = element_blank()) + 
    #ggtitle("Emination rate according to imbibition duration") +
    theme_ipsum() +
    ylab("Cumulative Emergence Percentage\n(n=4x40seeds)") +
    xlab("Time After Sowing (hours)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, 25)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +   ## Adjust space between y-axis "0" and x-axis line: Set expand to 0 to reduce space
  custom_theme
  

GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm
```
```{r plot Fig1C_KinEm Exact mean curves with sd intervals and temperature, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=FALSE}
GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm2 <- 
  GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm +
  geom_line( data = GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions, 
             aes(x = Hour, y = measured_Temp),
             color = "black", size = 0.5)
  
GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm2

if(choice_save_fig_all == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig_GermEmerg_CinGerm_KinEm_meanCurves_withsd.png"),
         plot = GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm)
}
```
## 1.5_Final Emergence Percentage
```{r preprocess data, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP <- GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum[GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum$Hour == 140, - c(5)]
GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP <- Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP)
GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP <- GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP[!is.na(GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP$Varieties),]
```
```{r test Emergence, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_Emerg_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP,
                     measurevar = c("Final_Em_Percentage"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
names(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat)[names(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat) == 'percentage'] <- "Final_Em_Percentage"
```
```{r test Emergence, eval=GERMEMERG}
# Gaussian or Gamma (continuous data) - choose Gamma because distribution is skewed
model.nb<-lm(Final_Em_Percentage ~ Varieties,  data=GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP)
summary(model.nb)
ggpubr::ggqqplot(residuals(model.nb))
# check if model fits the data P>0.05 is good
shapiro_test(residuals(model.nb))
plot(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
Anova(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
fit <- aov(Final_Em_Percentage ~ Varieties,  data=GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP)# analyse de variance
fit

# posthoc tests
warp.emm <- emmeans(model.nb, ~ Varieties)
GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP_test <- multcomp::cld(warp.emm)

# add letters to GermEmerg_Germ_stat
GroupLetters <- TestGroupsToLetters(GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP_test)
GermEmerg_Emerg_stat <- left_join(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat, GroupLetters, by = "Varieties")

# clean
rm(model.nb, fit, warp.emm, GroupLetters, GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP_test)
```
```{r plot Fig1D_FEP CinEm scatterplot, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_Fig_FEP <- ggplot(GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP[GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP$Varieties != "FLARcomm",],
                                    aes(x=Varieties,y=Final_Em_Percentage)) +
  geom_jitter(aes( x = Varieties,y=Final_Em_Percentage, color=Varieties), size=5,
              position = position_jitter(width = .1), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_crossbar(data=GermEmerg_Emerg_stat, 
                aes(ymin = Final_Em_Percentage, ymax = Final_Em_Percentage),
                size=1,col="black", width = .5) +
  theme_classic()+
  xlab("Varieties") + ylab("Final Emergence Percentage_140h") +
  scale_color_manual(values=color)+ 
  custom_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1)) +
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 50, show.legend = FALSE, size = 0.2, color = "red")# +
  #guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Bean varieties"))
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(20, 110, by = 20)) +
  geom_text(data=GermEmerg_Emerg_stat,
            aes(label=Groups, x=Varieties, y=Final_Em_Percentage),
            vjust = -0.7, hjust = -0.5)

GermEmerg_Fig_FEP
if(choice_save_fig_all == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig_GermEmerg_FEP_CinEm.png"), plot = GermEmerg_Fig_FEP)
}
```
## 1.1B & Suppl1A_Cumulative Germination Percentage model & t50 test
```{r preprocess data for Germinationmetrics, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
# remove Echantillon_Repetition column
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[, c(1:2,4:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper))]

# add Total seed number column
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Total_seed_number = 
  rep(24, #nb seeds per replicate
      times = nrow(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper))
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper %>% dplyr::mutate(Répétition = str_c(Varieties, Répétition, sep = "_"))
```
```{r load package, eval=GERMEMERG, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE, }
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(germinationmetrics))
```
```{r compute mean cumulative germinated seeds number per varieties, eval=GERMEMERG}
# compute mean and sd
Number_long_for_mean <- GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 4:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper),
               names_to = "Germination_time_hour",
               values_to = "Germination_cum_number")

Number_long_for_mean <- Number_long_for_mean %>%
  group_by(Varieties, Germination_time_hour) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_cum_germ_nb = mean(Germination_cum_number),
            sd_cum_germ_nb = sd(Germination_cum_number))

# mean and sd, in numeric order
GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- pivot_wider(
  Number_long_for_mean[, c(1:3)],
  names_from = Germination_time_hour,
  values_from = mean_cum_germ_nb)
col_order <- c("Varieties", mixedsort(colnames(GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[2:ncol(GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper)]),
                       decreasing = FALSE,
                       na.last = TRUE, blank.last = FALSE,
                       numeric.type = c("decimal", "roman"),
                       roman.case = "upper", scientific = FALSE))
GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[, col_order]

GermEmerg_KinGerm_sd_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- pivot_wider(
  Number_long_for_mean[, c(1:2, 4)],
  names_from = Germination_time_hour,
  values_from = sd_cum_germ_nb)
GermEmerg_KinGerm_sd_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_sd_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[, col_order]

# Total seed number
GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper$Total_seed_number = 
  rep(24,  times = nrow(GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper))

# convert to integers
GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper)]  <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper)] %>%
  mutate_all(.funs = as.integer)

# clean
rm(Number_long_for_mean)
```
```{r plot Fig 1SupplB_Curves all Varieties mean per rep, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- FourPHFfit.bulk(data = GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
                    total.seeds.col = "Total_seed_number",
                    counts.intervals.cols = as.character(as.vector(seq(0, 144, by=2))),
                    intervals = as.vector(seq(0, 144, by = 2)),
                    partial = FALSE,
                    fix.y0 = TRUE,
                    fix.a = TRUE,
                    #xp = c(10,60),
                    tmax = 144,
                    tries = 10)  
GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_meanVar <- plot(Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel), group.col = "Varieties",
                    show.points = TRUE,
                    annotate = "t50.total") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = color)+
  ylab("Modelled Cumulative Germination Percentage") +
  xlab("Imbibition time")

GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_meanVar
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "GermEmerg/Fig1supplA_GermEmerg_KinGerm_meanVar_pleatedpaper_by", choice_color, ".png"),
         plot = GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_meanVar)
}
write_xlsx(x = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel, 
           path= paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_meanVar_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"))
```
```{r save all Varieties all replicates for permutations, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_indices_perRepl <- germination.indices(data = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
                    total.seeds.col = "Total_seed_number",
                    counts.intervals.cols = as.character(as.vector(seq(0,144, by=2))),
                    intervals = as.vector(seq(0, 144, by = 2)),
                    partial = FALSE,
                    max.int = 100)  

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- FourPHFfit.bulk(data = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
                    total.seeds.col = "Total_seed_number",
                    counts.intervals.cols = as.character(as.vector(seq(0, 144, by=2))),
                    intervals = as.vector(seq(0, 144, by = 2)),
                    partial = FALSE,
                    fix.y0 = TRUE,
                    fix.a = TRUE,
                    #xp = c(10,60),
                    tmax = 144,
                    tries = 10)  
GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_allRepl <- plot(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel, group.col = "Varieties",
                    show.points = FALSE,rog = FALSE,t50.total = FALSE,t50.germ = TRUE, 
                    tmgr=FALSE, mgt = FALSE, uniformity = FALSE, limits = FALSE
                    #annotate = "t50.total"
                    )
GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_allRepl <- GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_allRepl + scale_colour_manual(values = color)
GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_allRepl

# save data and figure
if(choice_path_fig_all == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_rep_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig_GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_pleatedpaper.png"),
         plot = GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_allRepl)
}

write_xlsx(x = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel, 
           path= paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"))
write_xlsx(x = GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,c(1,2,str_which(colnames(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel), "t50.Germinated"),str_which(colnames(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel),"t50.total"))], 
           path= paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl.xlsx"))
# clean
rm(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_indices_perRepl, GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)         
```

```{r extract model parameters for tests, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- read.xlsx(
  xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"),
                           sheet = 1,
                           colNames=TRUE,
                           rowNames = FALSE)

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[, c("Varieties",
                                                                         "t50.total",
                                                                         "t50.Germinated",
                                                                         "TMGR", 
                                                                         "MGT")]
# t50.total: 

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] %>%mutate_all(.funs = as.numeric)
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] %>%mutate_all(~ifelse(is.nan(.), NA, .))

GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("t50.Germinated"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat_tot <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("t50.total"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r test t50germ, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=FALSE}
# Gaussian or Gamma (continuous data) - choose Gamma because distribution is skewed
model.nb<-lm(t50.Germinated ~ Varieties,  data=GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)
summary(model.nb)
ggpubr::ggqqplot(residuals(model.nb))
# check if model fits the data P>0.05 is good
shapiro_test(residuals(model.nb))
plot(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
Anova(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
fit <- aov(t50.Germinated ~ Varieties,  data=GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)# analyse de variance
fit

# posthoc tests
warp.emm <- emmeans(model.nb, ~ Varieties)
GermEmerg_KinGerm_t50germ_test <- multcomp::cld(warp.emm)

# add letters to GermEmerg_Germ_stat
GroupLetters <- TestGroupsToLetters(GermEmerg_KinGerm_t50germ_test)
GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat <- left_join(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat, GroupLetters, by = "Varieties")

# clean
rm(model.nb, fit, warp.emm, GroupLetters, GermEmerg_KinGerm_t50germ_test)
```
```{r stats lag first to last, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=FALSE}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- read.xlsx(
  xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"),
                           sheet = 1,
                           colNames=TRUE,
                           rowNames = FALSE)

# Dataframe preparation ####
# Create an empty data frame to store the result
GermEmerg_GermLag <- data.frame(Varieties = character(),
                        Repetition = integer(),
                        First_Germ_Hour = character(),
                        Last_Germ_Hour = character(),
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Identify hour columns (all numeric, excluding 'Varieties' and 'Répétition')
hour_cols <- names(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)[sapply(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel, is.numeric) & 
                                                 !names(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel) %in% c("Répétition")]

# Loop through each row of the dataframe
for (i in 1:nrow(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)) {
  
  # Extract the variety and repetition
  variety <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[i, "Varieties"]
  repetition <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[i, "Répétition"]
  
  # Get the germination values (excluding 'Varieties' and 'Répétition' columns)
  cols_to_select = as.character(0:146) # Generates ["0", "1", ..., "144"]
  germ_values <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[i, ] %>%
  select(any_of(cols_to_select))
  
  # Find the first germination hour (first value > 0)
  first_germ_hour <- as.numeric(colnames(germ_values)[which(germ_values > 0)[1]])
  
  # Find the last germination hour (last value equal to the value of the last hour)
  last_value <- germ_values[[ncol(germ_values)]]  # Last value in the row
  last_germ_hour <- as.numeric(colnames(germ_values[which(germ_values == last_value)][1]))
  
  # Add the row to the result data frame
  GermEmerg_GermLag <- rbind(GermEmerg_GermLag, data.frame(Varieties = variety,
                                           Repetition = repetition,
                                           First_Germ_Hour = first_germ_hour,
                                           Last_Germ_Hour = last_germ_hour,
                                           stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
}

GermEmerg_GermLag <- GermEmerg_GermLag %>%
  mutate(LagFirst_to_Last = Last_Germ_Hour - First_Germ_Hour)



# Stats ####
GermEmerg_GermLag_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_GermLag,
                     measurevar = c("LagFirst_to_Last"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
GermEmerg_GermImbibitionTime_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_GermLag,
                     measurevar = c("First_Germ_Hour"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r stats t50germ - Timb, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=FALSE}
GermEmerg_t50germ_minus_Timb <- left_join(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat, GermEmerg_GermImbibitionTime_stat, suffix = c("_t50g", "_Timb"), by = c("Varieties", "N"))

GermEmerg_t50germ_minus_Timb <- GermEmerg_t50germ_minus_Timb %>%
  mutate(t50germ_minus_Timb = t50.Germinated - First_Germ_Hour)
```
```{r stats Uniformity, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=FALSE}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel$Uniformity <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel$Uniformity)

GermEmerg_GermUnif_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("Uniformity"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r extract model parameters for tests, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- read.xlsx(
  xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"),
                           sheet = 1,
                           colNames=TRUE,
                           rowNames = FALSE)

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[, c("Varieties",
                                                                         "t50.total",
                                                                         "t50.Germinated",
                                                                         "TMGR", 
                                                                         "MGT")]

```
```{r plot Fig1A_t50germ Scatterplot, eval=GERMEMERG, echo=TRUE}
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- Order_legends("FEP", GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel) #t50germ

GermEmerg_Fig_t50germ <- ggplot(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                                    aes(x=Varieties,y=t50.Germinated)) +
  geom_jitter(aes( x = Varieties,y=t50.Germinated, color=Varieties), size=5,
              position = position_jitter(width = .1), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_crossbar(data=GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat, 
                aes(ymin = t50.Germinated, ymax = t50.Germinated),
                size=1,col="black", width = .3) +
  theme_classic()+
  xlab("Varieties") + ylab("Time to reach 50% of total germination") +
  scale_color_manual(values= color_by_emergence)+ #color_by_germination_kin)+
  custom_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(30, 110))
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(20, 110, by = 20)) +
  geom_text(data=GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat,
            aes(label=Groups, x=Varieties, y=t50.Germinated),
            vjust = -0.7, hjust = -0.5)

GermEmerg_Fig_t50germ
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "GermEmerg/Fig_GermEmerg_t50germ_pleatedpaper.png"), plot = GermEmerg_Fig_t50germ)
}
```
### imbibition time before first germination
```{r Convert imbibition time from days-hours to hours, eval=GERMEMERG}
GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_meanVar_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = TRUE)
GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat[,1:48]
GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat$Varieties <- rownames(GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat)

GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- Order_legends("t50germ", GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat)


GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
rownames(GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat) <- GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat$Répétition
GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- Order_legends("t50germ", GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat)
GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat[,1:50]

GermEmerg_GermImbTime <- GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:ncol(GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat), 
               names_to = "Hour", 
               values_to = "CumCount")
# find the hour of the first germination for each variety and replicate
GermEmerg_GermImbTime <- GermEmerg_GermImbTime %>%
  group_by(Varieties, Répétition) %>%
  filter(CumCount > 0) %>%                # Filter for rows where seeds have germinated
  slice_min(as.numeric(Hour)) %>%      # Get the minimum hour where germination occurred
  select(Varieties, Répétition, Hour)   # Keep only the relevant columns
GermEmerg_GermImbTime$Hour <- as.numeric(GermEmerg_GermImbTime$Hour)

GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat <- summarySE(GermEmerg_GermImbTime,
                     measurevar = c("Hour"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)

```
## 1.Suppl1C_Correlation Germination-Emergence and Germination-t50
```{r correlation on final mean germination and emergence percentages, eval=TRUE}
# df of average 
GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats <- left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat, GermEmerg_Emerg_stat, by = c("Varieties"), suffix = c("_FGP", "_EP"))

names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="percentage_FGP"] <- "mean_FGP"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="percentage_EP"] <- "mean_EP"
#GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats[, c(2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats))] <- GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats[, c(2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats))] %>%mutate_all(.funs = ~round(as.numeric(.x), digits = 2))

cor_coef_FGP_EP <- stats::cor(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$Final_Germ_Percentage, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$Final_Em_Percentage)


GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mFGP <- ggplot(Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats), aes(x = Final_Em_Percentage, y = Final_Germ_Percentage)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Final_Germ_Percentage - sd_FGP, ymax = Final_Germ_Percentage + sd_FGP, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Final_Em_Percentage - sd_EP, xmax = Final_Em_Percentage + sd_EP, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Emergence Percentage", y = "Mean Final Germination Percentage") #+
  #geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_FGP_EP, 2))),
  #          x = max(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$Final_Em_Percentage),
  #          y = min(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$Final_Germ_Percentage), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mFGP


GermEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFGP_mFEP <- ggplot(Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats), aes(x = Final_Germ_Percentage, y = Final_Em_Percentage)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Final_Germ_Percentage - sd_FGP, xmax = Final_Germ_Percentage + sd_FGP, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Final_Em_Percentage - sd_EP, ymax = Final_Em_Percentage + sd_EP, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label..,  ..p.value.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R² and p-value
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Final Germination Percentage", y = "Mean Final Emergence Percentage")# +

  #geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_FGP_EP, 2))),
  #          x = max(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$Final_Germ_Percentage),
  #          y = min(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$Final_Em_Percentage), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient



GermEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFGP_mFEP

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/GermEmerg/Fig1suppl_correlation_MeanEmPercCinEM_MeanGermPerc_GRAINES.png"), 
         plot = GermEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFGP_mFEP, 
         width = 180, height = 100, units = "mm", limitsize = FALSE)
}
```
```{r correlation on final mean germination percentage and t50germ, eval=TRUE}
# df of average 
GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats <- left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat, GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat, by = c("Varieties"), suffix = c("_FGP", "_t50germ"))

names(GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats)[names(GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats)=="t50.Germinated"] <- "t50_germinated"

cor_coef_FGP_t50germ <- stats::cor(GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats$Final_Germ_Percentage, GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats$t50_germinated)


GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mt50germ <- ggplot(Order_legends(choice_order, GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats), aes(x = t50_germinated, y = Final_Germ_Percentage)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Final_Germ_Percentage - sd_FGP, ymax = Final_Germ_Percentage + sd_FGP, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = t50_germinated - sd_t50germ, xmax = t50_germinated + sd_t50germ, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label..,  ..p.value.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean t50germ Percentage", y = "Mean Final Germination Percentage") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_FGP_t50germ, 2))),
            x = max(GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats$Final_Em_Percentage),
            y = min(GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats$Final_Germ_Percentage), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mt50germ
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "GermEmerg/Fig1suppl_correlation_MeanGermPerc_t50germ_GRAINES.png"), 
         plot = GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mt50germ,
         width = 180, height = 100, units = "mm", limitsize = FALSE)
}
```

```{r data preparation mean germination VARIABLES and mean final emergence percentage, eval=FALSE}
# add germination values to GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- read.xlsx(
  xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper.xlsx"),
                           sheet = 1,
                           colNames=TRUE,
                           rowNames = FALSE)

GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[, c("Varieties",
                                                                         "t50.total",
                                                                         "t50.Germinated",
                                                                         "TMGR", 
                                                                         "Uniformity",
                                                                         "MGT")]


#GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[, c("Varieties", "t50.total", "t50.Germinated", "Uniformity", "TMGR")  ] #c(1, (144/2+5):ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel))]
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] %>%mutate_all(.funs = as.numeric)
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] <- GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel[,2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)] %>%mutate_all(~ifelse(is.nan(.), NA, .))
GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel <- as.data.frame(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel)
GermEmerg_Germ_stat_T50germ <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("t50.Germinated"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
GermEmerg_Germ_stat_T50tot <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("t50.total"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
GermEmerg_Germ_stat_Unif <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("Uniformity"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
GermEmerg_Germ_stat_TMGR <- summarySE(GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
                     measurevar = c("TMGR"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)

# df of average 
GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats <- left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat, GermEmerg_Emerg_stat, by = c("Varieties"), suffix = c("_FGP", "_EP")) %>%
  left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat_T50germ, by = "Varieties", suffix = c("", "_T50germ")) %>%
  left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat_T50tot, by = "Varieties", suffix = c("", "_T50tot")) %>%
  left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat_Unif, by = "Varieties", suffix = c("", "_Unif")) %>%
  left_join(GermEmerg_Germ_stat_TMGR, by = "Varieties", suffix = c("", "_TMGR"))

names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="Final_Germ_Percentage"] <- "mean_FGP"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="Germ_T50"] <- "mean_germT50"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="Final_Em_Percentage"] <- "mean_EP"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="t50.Germinated"] <- "mean_T50germ"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="t50.total"] <- "mean_T50tot"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="Uniformity"] <- "mean_Unif"
names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)[names(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)=="TMGR"] <- "mean_TMGR"

write_xlsx(x = GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats, path= paste0(choice_path_data, "GermEmerg_Germ_All_stats.xlsx"))
#GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats[, c(2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats))] <- GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats[, c(2:ncol(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats))] %>%mutate_all(.funs = ~round(as.numeric(.x), digits = 2))
```
```{r correlation plots on mean germination VARIABLES and mean final emergence percentage, eval=FALSE}
#
cor_coef_T50germ_EP <- stats::cor(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_T50germ, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP)
Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50germ <- ggplot(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats, aes(x = mean_EP, y = mean_T50germ)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_T50germ - sd, ymax = mean_T50germ + sd, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = mean_EP - sd_EP, xmax = mean_EP + sd_EP, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Emergence Percentage", y = "Mean time to reach 50% germination of germinated seeds") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_T50germ_EP, 2))),
            x = max(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP),
            y = min(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_T50germ), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
#
cor_coef_T50tot_EP <- stats::cor(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_T50tot, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP)
Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50tot <- ggplot(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats, aes(x = mean_EP, y = mean_T50germ)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_T50germ - sd_T50tot, ymax = mean_T50germ + sd_T50tot, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = mean_EP - sd_EP, xmax = mean_EP + sd_EP, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Emergence Percentage", y = "Mean time to reach  50% germination of total seeds") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_T50tot_EP, 2))),
            x = max(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP),
            y = min(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_T50germ), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
# mean_Unif
cor_coef_Unif_EP <- stats::cor(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_Unif, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP)
Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_Unif <- ggplot(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats, aes(x = mean_EP, y = mean_Unif)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_Unif - sd_Unif, ymax = mean_Unif + sd_Unif, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = mean_EP - sd_EP, xmax = mean_EP + sd_EP, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Emergence Percentage", y = "Time interval between times to reach 10% and 90% germination of germinated seeds") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_Unif_EP, 2))),
            x = max(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP),
            y = min(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_Unif), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
# mean_TMGR
cor_coef_TMGR_EP <- stats::cor(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_TMGR, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP)
Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_TMGR <- ggplot(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats, aes(x = mean_EP, y = mean_TMGR)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_TMGR - sd_TMGR, ymax = mean_TMGR + sd_TMGR, color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = mean_EP - sd_EP, xmax = mean_EP + sd_EP, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Emergence Percentage", y = "Time of Mean Germination Rate") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_TMGR_EP, 2))),
            x = max(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_EP),
            y = min(GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats$mean_TMGR), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient

Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_TMGR
if(choice_save_fig_all == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig1_correlation_MeanEmPerc_MeanTMGR_GRAINES.png"),
       plot = Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_TMGR)
}

Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_Unif
if(choice_save_fig_all == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig1_correlation_MeanEmPerc_MeanUnif_GRAINES.png"),
       plot = Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_Unif)
}

if(choice_save_fig_all == TRUE){
  Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50germ
ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig1_correlation_MeanEmPerc_MeanT50germ_GRAINES.png"),
       plot = Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50germ)
}

Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50tot

  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "GermEmerg/Fig1_correlation_MeanEmPerc_MeanT50tot_GRAINES.png"),
       plot = Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50tot)
```

```{r test Emergence, eval=FALSE}
#mean_GermVar_allgenot <- GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats[, c("Varieties", "mean_FGP", "mean_TMGR", "mean_T50tot", "mean_T50germ", "mean_Unif", "mean_EP")]
#mean_FGP + mean_TMGR + mean_T50tot + mean_T50germ + mean_Unif # only FGP significant.

### Run  the full model
#Gaussian or Gamma (continuous data) - choose Gamma because distribution is skewed
model.nb<-lm(mean_FGP ~ mean_EP,  data=GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)
summary(model.nb)
ggqqplot(residuals(model.nb))
#check if model fits the data P>0.05 is good
shapiro_test(residuals(model.nb))
plot(model.nb)
###Estimate P values for main effects and interactions
Anova(model.nb)
###Estimate P values for main effects and interactions
fit <- aov(mean_FGP ~ mean_EP,  data=GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats)# analyse de variance
fit
###Posthoc tests
warp.emm <- emmeans(model.nb, ~ mean_EP)
multcomp::cld(warp.emm)

```
## Fig 1
```{r Figure 1, eval=GERMEMERG}
#Prep
Fig1A <- GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_raw_meanVar +
  ylab("Cumulative Germination        \nPercentage") +
  xlab("Time after sowing (h)") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 150), breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 25))

Fig1B <- GermEmerg_Fig_t50germ + #GermEmerg_Fig_FGP 
  #geom_jitter(aes(x = Varieties, y = t50.Germinated, # Final_Germ_Percentage, 
  #                color = Varieties), size = 2,
  #            position = position_jitter(width = .1), alpha = 0.5) +
  #ylab("Final Germination\nPercentage")
  ylab("Time to reach 50%\nof final germination (h)")

Fig1C <- GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm +
  guides(shape = "none", color = "none") +
  ylab("Cumulative Emergence     \nPercentage") +
  xlab("Time after sowing (h)") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 150), breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 25))

Fig1D <- GermEmerg_Fig_FEP +
  xlab("Varieties") + ylab("Final Emergence\nPercentage") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1))

empty_plot <- ggplot() + theme_void()


# Arrange plots in a grid
Fig1_GRAINES <- ggarrange(
  Fig1A, empty_plot, Fig1B, 
  empty_plot, empty_plot, empty_plot,
  Fig1C, empty_plot, Fig1D,
  ncol = 3, nrow = 3,
  common.legend = TRUE, align = "hv",
  widths = c(5, 0.1, 3), heights = c(1, 0.05, 1),
  legend = "right",
  labels = c("A", "","B", "","","","C","", "D")
) + theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 10)) +
  scale_color_manual(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  scale_color_discrete(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(1,0.5,0.5,0.5, "cm")) #top-right-left-bottom margins
  

# Print the final arranged figure
Fig1_GRAINES

# Save
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "GermEmerg/Fig1_GermEmerg.png"),
         plot = Fig1_GRAINES,
         width = 300, height = 200, units = "mm", limitsize = FALSE)
}
```

## Fig Suppl 1
```{r Supplementary Figure 1, eval = GERMEMERG}
FigSupp1A <- GermEmerg_Fig_FGP +
  #geom_jitter(aes(x = Varieties, y = t50.Germinated, # Final_Germ_Percentage, 
  #                color = Varieties), size = 2,
  #            position = position_jitter(width = .1), alpha = 0.5) +
  ylab("Final Germination\nPercentage")

FigSupp1B <- GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_meanVar + #GermEmerg_Fig_KinGerm_allRepl +
  custom_theme +
  xlab("Time after sowing (h)") +
  ylab("Modelled Cumulative\nGermination Percentage with FPHF          ")

FigSupp1C <- GermEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFGP_mFEP +
  custom_theme +
  ylab("Mean Final Emergence\nPercentage") +
  xlab("Mean Final Germination Percentage")
  
FigSupp1D <- GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mt50germ +
  custom_theme +
  ylab("Mean Final Germination\nPercentage") +
  xlab("Mean Time to reach 50% of final Germination")
  
empty_plot <- ggplot() + theme_void()

# Arrange plots in a grid
FigSupp1_GRAINES <- ggarrange(
  FigSupp1A, empty_plot, FigSupp1B, 
  empty_plot, empty_plot, empty_plot,
  FigSupp1C, empty_plot, FigSupp1D,
  ncol = 3, nrow = 3,
  common.legend = TRUE, align = "hv",
  widths = c(4, 0.1, 4), heights = c(1, 0.05, 1),
  legend = "right",
  labels = c("A", "","B", "","","","C","", "D")
) + theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 10)) +
  scale_color_manual(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  scale_color_discrete(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(breaks = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer","Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender")) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(1,0.5,0.5,0.5, "cm")) #top-right-left-bottom margins
  

# Print the final arranged figure
FigSupp1_GRAINES

# Save
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "GermEmerg/FigSupp1_GermEmerg.png"),
         plot = FigSupp1_GRAINES,
         width = 300, height = 200, units = "mm", limitsize = FALSE)
}

```

## Cleaning
```{r clean Germination, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE}
rm(
  germ_values,
  GermEmerg_Germ_cum_percent_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
  GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
  #1.B_______________________

  ##GermEmerg_Germ_stat,

  #1.A1______________________
  GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_perRepl_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
  GermEmerg_KinGerm_mean_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
  GermEmerg_KinGerm_sd_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
  GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_FPHFmodel,
  #1.A2______________________

  ##GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats,
  #S1________________________
  GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mFGP,
  Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_TMGR,
  GernEmerg_Fig_correlation_mFEP_mt50germ,
  Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_T50tot,
  Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_TMGR,
  Fig1_corr_meanEmPerc_mean_Unif,
  Fig1_Emergence_Germination_percentage_GRAINES
  
  )
rm(GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_144h_4x24s_pleatedpaper, # GermEmerg_Germ_FGP
   GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP, # GermEmerg_Germ_TrayFinalPercentPercent???
   GermEmerg_Germ_cum_nb_time_radio_4x24s_pleatedpaper,
   Germination_indices,
   GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_indices_perRepl,
   Germination_time_hour, Hour_sowing_D0,
   Germination_indices_sqrt, germination_count_genot,
   #
   GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_cum, GermEmerg_CinEm_KinEm_MeanSd,
   GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_cumNb, #???? TODO rename
   GermEmerg_Germ_KinGerm_stats, 
   group_emergence_final_percentage,
   night_hours_startend,
   #GermEmerg_Germ_stat,
   GermEmerg_CinEm_climconditions,
   GermEmerg_CinEm_FEP_,
   GermEmerg_CinEm_FGP_,
   GermEmerg_Germ_stat_,
   GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_,
   GermEmerg_Emerg_stat_,
   GermEmerg_Fig_CinEm_KinEm2,
   GermEmerg_FGP_t50germ_stats,
   
   # Emergence in soil previous experiment
   GermEmerg_Emerg1_PA_tray, GermEmerg_Emerg1_PA_EmPercent, GermEmerg_Emerg1_FEP_tray_mean_sd,
   # PA/PN
   GermEmerg_PA_Em_stat, GermEmerg_Emerg1_PN_stat, GermEmerg_Emerg1_PN_stat_Em,
   # functions
   GermEmerg_CinEm_perRep, force_bind)

rm(GermEmerg_FGP_t50tot_stats, GermEmerg_Germ_Emerg_FinalPercent_stats, GermEmerg_Germ_stat_T50germ, GermEmerg_Germ_stat_T50tot, GermEmerg_Germ_stat_TMGR, GermEmerg_Germ_stat_Unif,
   GermEmerg_GermImbibitionTime_stat, GermEmerg_GermImbTime, GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat, GermEmerg_GermLag, GermEmerg_GermLag_stat, GermEmerg_GermUnif_stat, GermEmerg_t50germ_minus_Timb)
```
