# ______________________________________________________________________________
# 2_Seed Mass and Area
## 2.1_Seed weight distribution dataset
100 radiographed seeds: symptoms and morphological measures, then germination assay on flat paper.
### 2.0_Parameters radiographed seeds morphological measures
- area (mm²)
- perimeter (mm)
- length (mm)
- width (mm)
- histoMean: Mean of the histogram of intensity values within the seed (0-255)
- histoStddev: Standard deviation of the pixel intensities within the seed
- majority: The most represented pixel intensity value inside the seed. It uses the nearest value with the average intensity (HistoMeans) of the seed if several intensities met this criterion (0-255)
- circularity: Values of 1.0 indicate a perfect circle, and an elongated form is suggested to the extent that values tend to 0 (0.0-1.0, 1 = circle)

### 2.1_load and preprocess dataset
```{r load dataset weight 100 radiographed seeds, eval=Morpho}
# lire le fichier
Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Morpho/Weight_1000_seeds.xlsx"),
                           sheet = 1,
                           colNames=TRUE,
                           rowNames = TRUE)
Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds <- Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds[!rownames(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds) %in% c("Mean", "STD", "MIN", "MAX"),]

Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds <- Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds[, str_which(colnames(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds), ".32", negate = FALSE)]

# Rename
colnames(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds) <- str_to_title(str_extract(colnames(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds), "[:upper:]+(?=.32)"))

# Beadeezer, Beavezer
names(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds)[names(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds) == 'Beadeezer'] <- 'Deezer'
names(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds)[names(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds) == 'Beavezer'] <- 'Vezer'

# moyenne, médiane, écart-type
summary(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds)

# ajout numéro plaque et semence
num_plaque_semence <- expand.grid(list('semence'=c(1:25),'plaque' = c(1:4)), KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE)
Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds <- bind_cols(num_plaque_semence, Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds)

Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds_long <- pivot_longer(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds, cols = 3:ncol(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds), names_to = "Varieties", values_to = "weight")

rm(num_plaque_semence, Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds)
```
```{r load dataset morpho_measures, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Measures <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Morpho/Morphology_GEVES_Gers.xlsx"),
                    sheet = 1,
                    #na = "---" # if NAs are represented by something other than blank cells
                    colNames=TRUE)
Morpho_Measures$Area <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$Area)
Morpho_Measures$Length <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$Length)
Morpho_Measures$HistoMean <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$HistoMean)
Morpho_Measures$Majority <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$Majority)
Morpho_Measures$Circularity <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$Circularity)

# check columns data type
summary(Morpho_Measures)
Morpho_Measures$HistoMean <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$HistoMean)
Morpho_Measures$HistoStddev <- as.numeric(Morpho_Measures$HistoStddev)

# replace 'Beavezer' by 'Vezer'
names(Morpho_Measures)[names(Morpho_Measures) == 'Genotype'] <- 'Varieties'
Morpho_Measures$Varieties[Morpho_Measures$Varieties == "Beavezer"] <- "Vezer"
#Morpho_Measures$Varieties <- case_match(Morpho_Measures$Varieties, "Beavezer" ~ "Vezer", .default = Morpho_Measures$Varieties)
# long table
Morpho_Measures_long <- pivot_longer(Morpho_Measures,
                            cols = 4:ncol(Morpho_Measures),
                            names_to = "Variable",
                            values_to = "Value")
```
```{r preprocess data, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds_long$plaque <- as.factor(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds_long$plaque)
Morpho_Measures$Plaque <- as.factor(Morpho_Measures$Plaque)

Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- left_join(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds_long,
                                 Morpho_Measures,
                                 by= c(c("plaque" = "Plaque"), "semence", c("Varieties"="Varieties")))
rm(Morpho_Seed_weight_100seeds_long, Morpho_Measures)
```
## 2.2_Fig suppl 2.A&B: weight an area scatterplots
### 2.2.1_Seed weight distribution_scatterplot
```{r test Weight, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Weight_stat <- summarySE(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds,
                     measurevar = c("weight"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r test weight, eval=Morpho, echo=FALSE}
# Gaussian or Gamma (continuous data) - choose Gamma because distribution is skewed
model.nb<-lm(weight ~ Varieties,  data=Morpho_Parameters_100seeds)
summary(model.nb)
ggpubr::ggqqplot(residuals(model.nb))
# check if model fits the data P>0.05 is good
shapiro_test(residuals(model.nb))
plot(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
Anova(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
fit <- aov(weight ~ Varieties,  data=Morpho_Parameters_100seeds)# analyse de variance
fit

# posthoc tests
warp.emm <- emmeans(model.nb, ~ Varieties)
Morpho_weight_test <- multcomp::cld(warp.emm)

# add letters to GermEmerg_Germ_stat
GroupLetters <- TestGroupsToLetters(Morpho_weight_test)
Morpho_Weight_stat <- left_join(Morpho_Weight_stat, GroupLetters, by = "Varieties")

# clean
rm(model.nb, fit, warp.emm, GroupLetters, Morpho_weight_test)
```
```{r Fig Suppl 2A boxscatter Weight, eval=Morpho}
# simple scatter plot ####
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>% 
    arrange(factor(Varieties, levels = Morpho_Weight_stat[order(Morpho_Weight_stat$weight),]$Varieties))
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>% 
  reorder_levels(Varieties, order = Morpho_Weight_stat[order(Morpho_Weight_stat$weight),]$Varieties)
color_ord <- color[Morpho_Weight_stat[order(Morpho_Weight_stat$weight),]$Varieties]

Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x=Varieties, y=weight)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(x=Varieties, y= weight, color=Varieties), size=0.7, alpha=0.5) +
  #geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_crossbar(data=Morpho_Weight_stat, aes(ymin = weight, ymax = weight),
                size=1,col="black", width = .1, alpha=0.2) +
  geom_text(data =Morpho_Weight_stat, aes(label = Groups, y = weight), vjust = -3.5, hjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_manual(values=color_by_emergence) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
# weight Length Perimeter Circularity Width HistoMean
Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot


# load metabo seed size ####
Metabo_seed_size <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Metabo/Metabo_seed_weight_ReplComparts.xlsx"),
                         sheet = 1,
                         colNames = TRUE,
                         rowNames = FALSE)
# select compartment: whole seed
Metabo_seed_size <- Metabo_seed_size[str_detect(Metabo_seed_size$ReplCompart, "Gr"), ]
Metabo_seed_size <- Metabo_seed_size %>% mutate(Compartment = ifelse(str_detect(ReplCompart, 
                                         "Gr"), "Whole_seed", "Other"))

Metabo_seed_size$Weight <- as.numeric(Metabo_seed_size$Weight)
names(Metabo_seed_size)[names(Metabo_seed_size) == 'Genotypes'] <- 'Varieties'
Metabo_seed_size$Varieties <- as.factor(Metabo_seed_size$Varieties)
Metabo_seed_size$Size <- as.factor(Metabo_seed_size$Size)

# filter metabo seeds per weight ####
Metabo_seed_size_filtered <- Metabo_seed_size %>%
  left_join(Morpho_Weight_stat, by = "Varieties") %>%  # Merge the dataframes by 'Varieties'
  filter(Weight >= (weight - 1.5 * sd) & Weight <= (weight + 1.5 * sd))  # Filter based on the mean weight +/- one standard deviation

# add metabo seeds on scatterplot ####
Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot_metabo <- Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot +
  geom_point(data = Metabo_seed_size_filtered, aes(x=Varieties, y = Weight, alpha = 0.9)) +
  labs(alpha="") + scale_alpha(labels = "Metabolomics")
Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot_metabo


# save ####
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "/Morpho/Fig2B_Weight_scatterplot_GRAINES.png"), plot=Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot_metabo)
}
```
### 2.2.2_Seed area distribution_scatterplot
```{r test Area, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Area_stat <- summarySE(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds,
                     measurevar = c("Area"),
                     groupvars = "Varieties",
                     na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r test Area, eval=Morpho, echo=FALSE}
# Gaussian or Gamma (continuous data) - choose Gamma because distribution is skewed
model.nb<-lm(Area ~ Varieties,  data=Morpho_Parameters_100seeds)
summary(model.nb)
ggpubr::ggqqplot(residuals(model.nb))
# check if model fits the data P>0.05 is good
shapiro_test(residuals(model.nb))
plot(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
Anova(model.nb)
# estimate P values for main effects and interactions
fit <- aov(Area ~ Varieties,  data=Morpho_Parameters_100seeds)# analyse de variance
fit

# posthoc tests
warp.emm <- emmeans(model.nb, ~ Varieties)
Morpho_Area_test <- multcomp::cld(warp.emm)

# add letters to GermEmerg_Germ_stat
GroupLetters <- TestGroupsToLetters(Morpho_Area_test)
Morpho_Area_stat <- left_join(Morpho_Area_stat, GroupLetters, by = "Varieties")

# clean
rm(model.nb, fit, warp.emm, GroupLetters, GermEmerg_Germ_FGP_test)
```
```{r Fig Suppl 2B boxscatter Area, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>% 
    arrange(factor(Varieties, levels = Morpho_Area_stat[order(Morpho_Area_stat$Area),]$Varieties))
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>% 
  reorder_levels(Varieties, order = Morpho_Area_stat[order(Morpho_Area_stat$Area),]$Varieties)
color_ord <- color[Morpho_Area_stat[order(Morpho_Area_stat$Area),]$Varieties]

Morpho_Fig_Area_scatterplot <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds,
                      aes(x=Varieties, y=Area)) +
    geom_jitter(aes(x=Varieties, y= Area, color=Varieties), size=0.7, alpha=0.5) +
    #geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_crossbar(data=Morpho_Area_stat, 
                aes(ymin = Area, ymax = Area),
                size=1,col="black", width = .1, alpha=0.2) +
  geom_text(data =Morpho_Area_stat, aes(label = Groups, y = Area), vjust = -3.5, hjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_color_manual(values=color_ord) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
# Area Length Perimeter Circularity Width HistoMean

Morpho_Fig_Area_scatterplot

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "/Morpho/Fig2B_Area_scatterplot_GRAINES.png"), plot=Morpho_Fig_Area_scatterplot)
}
```
### 2.2.3 ggarrange
```{r Fig suppl 2. AB, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Fig_Suppl_WeightArea_scatterplots <- ggarrange(
    Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot_metabo,
    Morpho_Fig_Area_scatterplot,
    ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
    widths=c(1,1),
    common.legend = TRUE,
    align = "h",
    legend = "right",
    labels = c("A", "B"))
Morpho_Fig_Suppl_WeightArea_scatterplots

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2supplAB_weightArea_scatterplot.png"), 
         plot = Morpho_Fig_Suppl_WeightArea_scatterplots,
         width = 300, height = 125, unit = "mm")}
```
## 2.3_Fig 2: Seed weight vs area with side panels and Fig suppl 2.C: Facets per Variety
```{r Germination graines radiographiées papier plat, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Morpho/Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper_20degrees.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 2,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)

Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Morpho/Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper_20degrees.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 3,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
```
```{r germination data preparation, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- right_join(Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper[, c("Num_Echantillon","Genotype","Lot")],
           Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper,
           by=c("Num_Echantillon"="Echantillon"))

rm(Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper)
# select only rows from 32 Gers batch
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper[Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Lot == 32,]


# rename Varieties
names(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper)[names(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper) == 'Genotype'] <- 'Varieties'
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties[Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties=="BEA VEZER "] <-"Vezer "
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties <- str_extract(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties, "[:alnum:]+(?= )")
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties <-
  str_to_title(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties)
# as.factor
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties <-
  as.factor(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties)


Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper[, c("Varieties", "semence", "Répétition", "germination_lecteur_h")]

Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Répétition <- as.factor(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Répétition)
```
```{r join with Morpho from seeds radiographed flat paper, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- left_join(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper, Morpho_Parameters_100seeds,
                                 by = c("semence", c("Répétition"="plaque"), c("Varieties" = "Varieties")))
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- na.omit(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds)

Morpho_Parameters_100seeds$germination_lecteur_h[Morpho_Parameters_100seeds$germination_lecteur_h == "NaN"] <- 0
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds$germination_lecteur_h <- as.integer(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds$germination_lecteur_h)
# Create a new column indicating whether the seed germinated or not
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- dplyr::mutate(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds,germination_status = ifelse(germination_lecteur_h == 0, "Non-germinated", "Germinated"))

Morpho_Parameters_100seeds$germination_lecteur_h <- as.numeric(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds$germination_lecteur_h)
```
```{r Fig Supp. 2C Correlation mass-area all Varieties by facet, eval=Morpho}
# Calculate R2 for each variety
calculate_r2 <- function(df) {
  fit <- lm(weight ~ poly(Area, 2), data = df)
  r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
  return(r2)
}

# Calculate R2 and add a flag for each variety
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>%
  group_by(Varieties) %>%
  mutate(R2 = calculate_r2(cur_data_all()),
         show_line = R2 > 0.5)

# Plot with conditional regression lines
Morpho_Fig_Suppl_Weight_vs_Area_correlation_allgenot_facet <- ggplot(Order_legends("FEP_col", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds), aes(x = Area, y = weight, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = filter(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, show_line), 
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1, color = "black") + # Conditionally add regression line
  stat_poly_eq(data = Morpho_Parameters_100seeds,
               aes(label = paste(..rr.label..,  ..p.value.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3) + # Add R² value only for those with R² > 0.5
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties, nrow = 4, ncol = 2) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(#title = "Individual seed Weight vs Area",
       x = "Area (mm²)", y = "Weight (mg)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
  guides(color = "none")

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2supplC_weightArea_scatterplot.png"), 
         plot = Morpho_Fig_Suppl_Weight_vs_Area_correlation_allgenot_facet,
         width = 225, height = 125, unit = "mm")
  }
# Print the plot
Morpho_Fig_Suppl_Weight_vs_Area_correlation_allgenot_facet

```
```{r Fig2 Correlation mass-area all Varieties : panels, eval=Morpho}
# Individual figures ####
Morpho_Fig_Weight_Density <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x=weight, fill=Varieties, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(scale = 100), #, limits = c(0,0.35), expand = c(0,0)
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color) +
  custom_theme +  # Set theme
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  +
  labs(x=NULL) +
  labs(y = "Number of seeds")  +
  #geom_vline() +
  coord_flip() +
  transparent_theme +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.margin = margin(10,0,0,0, "pt"), panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0,"pt"))
Morpho_Fig_Weight_Density

Morpho_Fig_AreaDensity <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x=Area, fill=Varieties, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(scale = 100), 
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color) +
  custom_theme +  # Set theme
  theme(legend.position = "right")  +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  labs(y = "Number of Seeds", x=NULL) +
  transparent_theme +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10,0,0,0, "pt"), panel.spacing = unit(0, "null"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0,"pt"))
Morpho_Fig_AreaDensity

Morpho_Fig_Weight_Area_correlation <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x = Area, y = weight, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm")+ #geom="polygon", aes(fill=Varieties), alpha=0.25) + #95% CI for multivariate t-distribution
  custom_theme +  # Set theme
  labs(x = "Area (mm²)", y = "Weight (mg)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color) +
  guides(fill = "none", color = "none") + 
  transparent_theme +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1) ,
        plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0), panel.spacing = unit(0, "null"))

Morpho_Fig_Weight_Area_correlation

legend_plot <- ggplot(Order_legends(choice_order, Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
                      aes(x= weight, color = Varieties, fill = Varieties)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0, linewidth = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color) +
  custom_theme +
  #theme_void() +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.5,0.5),
        legend.key.size = unit(1,"cm"),
        legend.text = element_text(colour="black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(colour="black", size=12, face="bold"),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(1, "pt")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol=2, 
                             #override.aes = list(size=3), #size of the symbols
                             byrow = FALSE,
                             override.aes = list(alpha = 0.5,
                                                 linewidth = 1,
                                                 linetype = 1) #solid
                               )) +
  transparent_theme +
  theme(axis.line=element_blank(),axis.text.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text.y=element_blank(),axis.ticks=element_blank(),
          axis.title.x=element_blank(),
          axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        #legend.position="none",
          panel.background=element_blank(),panel.border=element_blank(),panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),plot.background=element_blank())  +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 0, 0, 0,"pt"), panel.spacing = unit(0, "null"))
  #scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) + #discrete scale
  #lims(x = c(0,0.1), y = c(0,0.1))  # continuous scale
legend_plot
```
```{r Fig2 Correlation mass-area all Varieties with panels, eval=Morpho}
# Label on panels ####
Fig2A <- add_labels(Morpho_Fig_AreaDensity, "A", x_loc = 0.03, y_loc = 0.85,"right", "bottom")
Fig2B <- add_labels(Morpho_Fig_Weight_Area_correlation, x_loc = 0.03, y_loc = 0.92, "B", "right", "bottom")
Fig2C  <- add_labels(Morpho_Fig_Weight_Density, "C", x_loc = 0.90, y_loc = 0.92,"left", "bottom")

# ggarrange ####
Fig2_WeightvsArea <- ggarrange(Fig2A,  ggplot() + theme_void(), legend_plot,
                                           ggplot() + theme_void(), ggplot() + theme_void(), ggplot() + theme_void(),
                                     Fig2B,  ggplot() + theme_void(),
                                     Fig2C,
        
        ncol = 3, nrow = 3,
        widths=c(4, -0.18, 1.1), heights=c(1.5,-0.35,4),
        common.legend = FALSE,
        align = "hv"
        #labels = c("A", "","", "B", "C")
        #legend = "none"
        ) + theme(plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1))
Fig2_WeightvsArea

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2_weightArea_wholeplot.png"), 
         plot = Fig2_WeightvsArea,
         width = 350, height = 200, unit = "mm")}
```

```{r Fig2 Correlation mass-area all Varieties with panels_color by t50germ, eval=FALSE}
Morpho_Fig_Weight_Density <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x=weight, fill=Varieties, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(scale = 100), #, limits = c(0,0.35), expand = c(0,0)
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_by_germination_kin) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_by_germination_kin) +
  custom_theme +  # Set theme

  theme(legend.position = "none")  +
  labs(x=NULL) +
  labs(y = "Number of seeds")  +
  #geom_vline() +
  coord_flip() +
  transparent_theme +

        plot.margin = margin(10,0,0,0, "pt"), panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0,"pt"))

Morpho_Fig_AreaDensity <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x=Area, fill=Varieties, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(scale = 100),

  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  theme(plot.margin = margin(10,0,0,0, "pt"), panel.spacing = unit(0, "null"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0,"pt"))

Morpho_Fig_Weight_Area_correlation <- ggplot(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, aes(x = Area, y = weight, color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm")+ #geom="polygon", aes(fill=Varieties), alpha=0.25) + #95% CI for multivariate t-distribution
  custom_theme +  # Set theme
  labs(x = "Area (mm²)", y = "Weight (mg)") +

        plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0), panel.spacing = unit(0, "null"))

Morpho_Fig_Weight_Area_correlation

legend_plot <- ggplot(Order_legends("t50germ", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
                      aes(x= weight, color = Varieties, fill = Varieties)) +

                             #override.aes = list(size=3), #size of the symbols

legend_plot
```

## 2.4_Fig Supp 2FG: Correlation Seed weight or area to Mean Emergence Percentage or mean t50germ
```{r Fig Supp 2FG Correlation plots Seed weight or area to Mean Final Emergence Percentage, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP <- left_join(left_join(left_join(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat, GermEmerg_Germ_stat,
                                                      by = "Varieties",
                                                      suffix = c("_FEP", "_FGP")),
                                            Morpho_Weight_stat,
                                            by = "Varieties",
                                            suffix = c("", "_Weight")),
                                  Morpho_Area_stat,
                                  by = "Varieties",
                                  suffix = c("", "_Area"))

Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Size <- ifelse(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Varieties %in% c("Deezer", "Caprice", "Linex", "Contender"), "2","1") # for facets

cor_coef_weight_FEP <- stats::cor(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$weight, Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Final_Em_Percentage)
cor_coef_area_FEP <- stats::cor(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Area, Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Final_Em_Percentage)

Morpho_Figsuppl2C_corr_meanWeightmeanFEP <- ggplot(Order_legends(choice_order, Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP), aes(x = weight, y = Final_Em_Percentage)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Final_Em_Percentage - sd_FEP,
                    ymax = Final_Em_Percentage + sd_FEP,
                    color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = weight - sd, xmax = weight + sd, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Seed Weight", y = "Mean Final Emergence Percentage")
  #geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_weight_FEP, 2))),
  #          x = max(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$weight),
  #          y = min(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Final_Em_Percentage), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
Morpho_Figsuppl2C_corr_meanWeightmeanFEP

Morpho_Figsuppl2D_corr_meanAreameanFEP <- ggplot(Order_legends(choice_order, Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP), aes(x = Area, y = Final_Em_Percentage)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Final_Em_Percentage - sd_FEP,
                    ymax = Final_Em_Percentage + sd_FEP,
                    color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = Area - sd_Area, xmax = Area + sd_Area, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color) +
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Seed Area", y = "Mean Final Emergence Percentage")
  #geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_area_FEP, 2))),
  #          x = max(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Area),
  #          y = min(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_FEP$Final_Em_Percentage), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
Morpho_Figsuppl2D_corr_meanAreameanFEP

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2supplC_Correlation_Weight_FEP.png"), plot = Morpho_Figsuppl2C_corr_meanWeightmeanFEP)
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2supplD_Correlation_Area_FEP.png"), plot = Morpho_Figsuppl2D_corr_meanAreameanFEP)
}
```
```{r Fig Supp 2DE Correlation plots Seed weight or area to Mean t50germ _ log regression, eval=Morpho}
regr = "log"
Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ <- left_join(left_join(left_join(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat, GermEmerg_Germ_stat,
                                                      by = "Varieties",
                                                      suffix = c("_t50germ", "_FGP")),
                                            Morpho_Weight_stat,
                                            by = "Varieties",
                                            suffix = c("", "_Weight")),
                                  Morpho_Area_stat,
                                  by = "Varieties",
                                  suffix = c("", "_Area"))
Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ <- Order_legends("FEP", Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ) #"t50germ"

cor_coef_weight_t50germ <- stats::cor(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$weight, Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$t50.Germinated)
cor_coef_area_t50germ <- stats::cor(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$Area, Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$t50.Germinated)

Morpho_Figsuppl2A_corr_meanWeightmeant50germ <- ggplot(Order_legends("t50germ", Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ), aes(x = weight, y = t50.Germinated)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = t50.Germinated - sd_t50germ,
                    ymax = t50.Germinated + sd_t50germ,
                    color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = weight - sd, xmax = weight + sd, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values= color_by_emergence) + #color_by_germination_kin
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, formula = y~log(x)) +  # Add a logarithmic regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y~log(x), parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Seed Weight", y = "Mean t50germ") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_weight_t50germ, 2))),
            x = max(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$weight),
            y = min(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$t50.Germinated), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
Morpho_Figsuppl2A_corr_meanWeightmeant50germ

Morpho_Figsuppl2B_corr_meanAreameant50germ <- ggplot(Order_legends("t50germ", Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ), aes(x = Area, y = t50.Germinated)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = t50.Germinated - sd_t50germ,
                    ymax = t50.Germinated + sd_t50germ,
                    color = Varieties), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = Area - sd_Area, xmax = Area + sd_Area, color = Varieties), height = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values=color_by_emergence) + #color_by_germination_kin
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, formula = y~log(x)) +  # Add a linear regression line
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), formula = y~log(x), parse = TRUE, size = 3)+# R²
  labs(title = "",
       x = "Mean Seed Area", y = "Mean t50germ") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(cor_coef_area_t50germ, 2))),
            x = max(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$Area),
            y = min(Morpho_Weight_Morpho_Area_stat_t50germ$t50.Germinated), hjust = 1, vjust = 0)# correlation coefficient
Morpho_Figsuppl2B_corr_meanAreameant50germ

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2supplE_Correlation_Weight_t50germ_logreg.png"), plot = Morpho_Figsuppl2A_corr_meanWeightmeant50germ)
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2supplF_Correlation_Area_t50germ_logreg.png"), plot = Morpho_Figsuppl2B_corr_meanAreameant50germ)
  }
```
```{r Fig suppl 2.ABCD, eval=FALSE}
Morpho_Fig_Suppl_WeightArea_corrFEPt50_GRAINES <- ggarrange(
  ggarrange(Morpho_Figsuppl2A_corr_meanWeightmeant50germ,
            Morpho_Figsuppl2B_corr_meanAreameant50germ,
            ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
            widths=c(1,1),
            common.legend = TRUE,
            align = "h",
            legend = "right",
            labels = c("A", "B")),
  ggarrange(Morpho_Figsuppl2C_corr_meanWeightmeanFEP,
            Morpho_Figsuppl2D_corr_meanAreameanFEP,
            ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
            widths=c(1,1),
            common.legend = TRUE,
            align = "h",
            legend = "right",
            labels = c("C", "D")),
  
        ncol = 1, nrow = 2,
        widths=c(1,1), heights=c(1,1),
        common.legend = FALSE,
        align = "v"
        ) #+ theme(plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1))


if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Fig2suppl_weightArea_corrFEPt50germ_log",regr,".png"), 
         plot = Morpho_Fig_Suppl_WeightArea_corrFEPt50_GRAINES,
         width = 300, height = 180, unit = "mm")}
Morpho_Fig_Suppl_WeightArea_corrFEPt50_GRAINES

rm(regr)
```
## 2.5_Correlation individual seed weight or area to individual germination/imbibition time
```{r Correlation plots Seed weight or area to Imbibition time_color by FEP, eval=FALSE}
germinated_seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>%
  filter(germination_status == "Germinated")

# Weight vs Germination Time
Morpho_Figsuppl5AWeight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggplot(Order_legends("FEP_col", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
                                                                   aes(x = weight, y = germination_lecteur_h,
                                                                       color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = germinated_seeds, ###
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) + # Conditionally add regression line
  stat_poly_eq(data = germinated_seeds,
               aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3) + # Add R² value only for those with R² > 0.5
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties, nrow = 4, ncol = 2) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(title = "weight - Imbibition Time",
       x = "weight (mm²)", y = "Imbibition Time (h)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
  guides(color = "none")

Morpho_Figsuppl5AWeight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES

# Area vs Germination Time
Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggplot(Order_legends("FEP_col", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
                                                                   aes(x = Area, y = germination_lecteur_h,
                                                                       color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = germinated_seeds, ###
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) + # Conditionally add regression line
  stat_poly_eq(data = germinated_seeds,
               aes(label = paste(..rr.label..,  ..p.value.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3) + # Add R² value only for those with R² > 0.5
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties, nrow = 4, ncol = 2) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(title = "Area - Imbibition Time",
       x = "Area (mm²)", y = "Imbibition Time (h)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
  guides(color = "none")

Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES


Figsuppl2HI_WeightorArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggarrange(
  Morpho_Figsuppl5AWeight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES,
  Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES,
  ncol = 1,
  nrow = 2,
  common.legend = TRUE,
  align = "v"
)

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                "/Morpho/Figsuppl2HI_Area_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES.png"), plot = Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES,
         width = 300, height = 400, unit = "mm")
  
}
Figsuppl2HI_WeightorArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES
```
```{r Correlation plots Seed weight or area to Imbibition time_color by t50germ, eval=FALSE}
germinated_seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>%
  filter(germination_status == "Germinated")

# Weight vs Germination Time
Figsuppl2D_Weight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggplot(Order_legends("t50germ_col", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
                                                                   aes(x = weight, y = germination_lecteur_h,
                                                                       color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = germinated_seeds, ###
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) + # Conditionally add regression line
  stat_poly_eq(data = germinated_seeds,
               aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3) + # Add R² value only for those with R² > 0.5
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties, nrow = 4, ncol = 2) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(title = "weight - Imbibition Time",
       x = "weight (mm²)", y = "Imbibition Time (h)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_by_germination_kin) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_by_germination_kin) +
  guides(color = "none")

Figsuppl2D_Weight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES

# Area vs Germination Time
Figsuppl2E_Area_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggplot(Order_legends("t50germ_col", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
                                                                   aes(x = Area, y = germination_lecteur_h,
                                                                       color = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = germinated_seeds, ###
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) + # Conditionally add regression line
  stat_poly_eq(data = germinated_seeds,
               aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3) + # Add R² value only for those with R² > 0.5
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties, nrow = 4, ncol = 2) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(title = "Area - Imbibition Time",
       x = "Area (mm²)", y = "Imbibition Time (h)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_by_germination_kin) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_by_germination_kin) +
  guides(color = "none")

Figsuppl2E_Area_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES

                "/Figsuppl2D_Correlation_Weight_GermTime.png"), plot = Figsuppl2D_Weight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES)
```

```{r Correlation plots Seed weight or area to Imbibition time_color by FEP, eval=Morpho}
germinated_seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>%
  filter(germination_status == "Germinated")
Morpho_Parameters_100seeds <- Order_legends("t50germ", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds)
# Weight vs Germination Time
rsq_data <- germinated_seeds %>%
  group_by(Varieties) %>%
  summarize(r_squared = summary(lm(germination_lecteur_h ~ weight))$r.squared,,
            max_y = max(germination_lecteur_h, na.rm = TRUE))  # Get the maximum y

Morpho_Figsuppl5AWeight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggplot(
  Order_legends("t50germ", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
  aes(x = weight, y = germination_lecteur_h,  color = Varieties, fill = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = germinated_seeds, ###
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) + # Conditionally add regression line
  geom_text(data = rsq_data, aes(x = Inf, y = max_y * 0.95, label = paste("R² =", round(r_squared, 2))), 
            hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties,  ncol = 1) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(title = "weight - Imbibition Time",
       x = "weight (mm²)", y = "Imbibition Time (h)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_by_emergence) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_by_emergence) +
  guides(color = "none")

Morpho_Figsuppl5AWeight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES

# Area vs Germination Time
rsq_data <- germinated_seeds %>%
  group_by(Varieties) %>%
  summarize(r_squared = summary(lm(germination_lecteur_h ~ Area))$r.squared,
            max_y = max(germination_lecteur_h, na.rm = TRUE))  # Get the maximum y

Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggplot(
  Order_legends("t50germ", Morpho_Parameters_100seeds),
  aes(x = Area, y = germination_lecteur_h,color = Varieties, fill = Varieties)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  custom_theme +
  geom_smooth(data = germinated_seeds, ###
              method = "rlm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, aes(group = Varieties), 
              linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.5) + # Conditionally add regression line
  geom_text(data = rsq_data, aes(x = Inf, y = max_y * 0.95, label = paste("R² =", round(r_squared, 2))), 
            hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Varieties, ncol = 1) +  # Facet plot by Varieties
  labs(title = "Area - Imbibition Time",
       x = "Area (mm²)", y = "Imbibition Time (h)") + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_by_emergence) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_by_emergence) +
  guides(color = "none")

Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES


Morpho_Figsuppl5_ABWeightorArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES <- ggarrange(
  Morpho_Figsuppl5AWeight_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES,
  Morpho_Figsuppl5BArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES,

                "/Morpho/Morpho_Figsuppl5_ABWeightorArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES.png"), plot = Morpho_Figsuppl5_ABWeightorArea_vs_GermTime_correlation_allgenot_facet_GRAINES,
         width = 250, height = 250, unit = "mm")

```
## 2.6_Within-variety individual seed correlations
whether the weight-t50germ relationship holds at the individual seed level within varieties, or only emerges as a between-variety pattern
```{r Spearman correlation within variety}
# Keep only germinated seeds for imbibition time analysis
germinated_seeds <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>%
  dplyr::filter(germination_status == "Germinated",
                !is.na(germination_lecteur_h),
                germination_lecteur_h > 0)

print(table(germinated_seeds$Varieties))

# Compute within-variety Spearman rho for each morphological variable
morph_vars <- c("weight", "Area", "Perimeter", "Length", "Width",
                "Circularity", "HistoMean", "HistoStddev", "Majority")

within_var_corr <- germinated_seeds %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Varieties) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    dplyr::across(
      all_of(morph_vars),
      list(
        rho = ~ suppressWarnings(
          cor.test(.x, germination_lecteur_h,
                   method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)$estimate
        ),
        pval = ~ suppressWarnings(
          cor.test(.x, germination_lecteur_h,
                   method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)$p.value
        )
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Summary table: all variables x all varieties
sig_summary <- within_var_corr %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Varieties, n),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(.+)_(rho|pval)"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(pval < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rho = round(rho, 3),
                pval = round(pval, 4)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(variable, Varieties)

if(nrow(sig_summary) == 0){
  cat("No significant within-variety correlations (p < 0.05)\n")
} else {
  print(sig_summary, width = Inf)
}

# Save
write_xlsx(
  list(
    full_results = within_var_corr %>%
      dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4))),
    significant = sig_summary
  ),
  path = paste0(choice_path,
                "/2_Analyses_results/Morpho/",
                "Within_variety_Spearman_morpho_imbibition.xlsx")
)
```
## 2.7_All correlations
```{r correlation with all morphological variables}
# Compute variety-level means for all morphological variables 
variety_morpho_means <- Morpho_Parameters_100seeds %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Varieties) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_weight = mean(weight,      na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_area = mean(Area,        na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_perimeter = mean(Perimeter,   na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_length = mean(Length,      na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_width = mean(Width,       na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_circ = mean(Circularity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_histoMean = mean(HistoMean,   na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_histoSD = mean(HistoStddev, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_majority = mean(Majority,    na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_weight = sd(weight,        na.rm = TRUE),
    cv_weight = sd(weight,        na.rm = TRUE) / mean(weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    cv_area = sd(Area,          na.rm = TRUE) / mean(Area,   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# Join with germination trait means 
# Adjust column names to match your germination stats objects
variety_morpho_germ <- variety_morpho_means %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat %>%
      dplyr::select(Varieties, t50germ = t50.Germinated, sd_t50germ = sd),
    by = "Varieties"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    GermEmerg_Emerg_stat %>%
      dplyr::select(Varieties, FEP = Final_Em_Percentage, sd_FEP = sd),
    by = "Varieties"
  )

# Spearman correlations — all morpho variables vs t50germ and FEP 
morpho_trait_vars <- c("mean_weight", "mean_area", "mean_perimeter",
                       "mean_length", "mean_width", "mean_circ",
                       "mean_histoMean", "mean_histoSD", "mean_majority",
                       "cv_weight", "cv_area")

corr_results <- lapply(morpho_trait_vars, function(var){
  r_t50  <- suppressWarnings(
    cor.test(variety_morpho_germ[[var]], variety_morpho_germ$t50germ,
             method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  r_FEP  <- suppressWarnings(
    cor.test(variety_morpho_germ[[var]], variety_morpho_germ$FEP,
             method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  data.frame(
    variable = var,
    rho_t50germ = round(r_t50$estimate, 3),
    p_t50germ = round(r_t50$p.value,  4),
    rho_FEP = round(r_FEP$estimate, 3),
    p_FEP = round(r_FEP$p.value,  4)
  )
}) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sig_t50 = dplyr::case_when(
      p_t50germ < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_t50germ < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_t50germ < 0.05  ~ "*",
      p_t50germ < 0.10  ~ ".",
      TRUE              ~ "ns"
    ),
    sig_FEP = dplyr::case_when(
      p_FEP < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_FEP < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_FEP < 0.05  ~ "*",
      p_FEP < 0.10  ~ ".",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_t50germ)

# Visualise texture variables vs germination traits 
texture_vars <- c("mean_histoMean", "mean_histoSD",
                  "mean_circ", "cv_weight")

plots_texture <- list()
for(var in texture_vars){
  for(trait in c("t50germ", "FEP")){

    rho_val <- corr_results$rho_t50germ[corr_results$variable == var]
    p_val   <- corr_results$p_t50germ[corr_results$variable == var]
    sig_val <- corr_results$sig_t50[corr_results$variable == var]

    if(trait == "FEP"){
      rho_val <- corr_results$rho_FEP[corr_results$variable == var]
      p_val   <- corr_results$p_FEP[corr_results$variable == var]
      sig_val <- corr_results$sig_FEP[corr_results$variable == var]
    }

    sd_col <- ifelse(trait == "t50germ", "sd_t50germ", "sd_FEP")

    # Axis labels
    x_label <- dplyr::case_when(
      var == "mean_histoMean" ~ "Mean X-ray intensity (HistoMean)",
      var == "mean_histoSD"   ~ "SD of X-ray intensity (HistoStddev)",
      var == "mean_circ"      ~ "Mean circularity",
      var == "cv_weight"      ~ "CV of seed weight (intravariety variability)",
      TRUE                    ~ var
    )
    y_label <- ifelse(trait == "t50germ",
                      "Mean t50germ (days)",
                      "Mean final emergence (%)")

    # Title color based on significance
    title_col <- ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "#E53935",
                        ifelse(p_val < 0.10, "#FF8C00", "grey40"))

    p <- ggplot(variety_morpho_germ,
                aes_string(x = var, y = trait,
                           color = "Varieties")) +
      geom_errorbar(
        aes_string(ymin = paste0(trait, " - ", sd_col),
                   ymax = paste0(trait, " + ", sd_col)),
        width = 0, alpha = 0.5, color = "grey60"
      ) +
      geom_point(size = 4) +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        aes(label = Varieties),
        size = 2.8, color = "grey30"
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(values = color) +
      guides(color = "none") +
      annotate("text",
               x = Inf, y = Inf,
               hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
               label = paste0("ρ = ", rho_val,
                              "  p = ", p_val,
                              "  ", sig_val),
               size = 3, color = title_col) +
      labs(x = x_label,
           y = y_label,
           title = paste0(gsub("mean_|cv_", "", var),
                          " ~ ", trait)) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 9,
                                      hjust = 0.5,
                                      color = title_col))

    plots_texture[[paste0(var, "_", trait)]] <- p
  }
}

# Assemble 
Fig_texture_vs_germ <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  cowplot::ggdraw() +
    cowplot::draw_label(
      "Seed internal structure, shape and intravariety variability vs germination traits",
      fontface = "bold", size = 11
    ),
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plotlist = plots_texture,
    ncol = 4,
    nrow = 2,
    labels = "AUTO",
    label_size = 10
  ),
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(0.04, 1)
)

print(Fig_texture_vs_germ)

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
           "Morpho/FigSuppl_texture_vs_germination.png"),
    plot = Fig_texture_vs_germ,
    width = 400,
    height = 220,
    units = "mm",
    dpi = 300
  )
}
# Save full correlation table 
write_xlsx(
  list(
    variety_means = variety_morpho_germ,
    correlations = corr_results
  ),
  path = paste0(choice_path,
                "/2_Analyses_results/Morpho/",
                "Variety_morpho_germination_correlations.xlsx")
)
```
```{r Suppl Fig HI cv-weight}
# Compute Spearman correlation coefficients 
cor_cv_t50 <- suppressWarnings(
  cor.test(variety_morpho_germ$cv_weight,
           variety_morpho_germ$t50germ,
           method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
)
cor_cv_FEP <- suppressWarnings(
  cor.test(variety_morpho_germ$cv_weight,
           variety_morpho_germ$FEP,
           method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
)

cat("cv_weight ~ t50germ: rho =", round(cor_cv_t50$estimate, 3),
    "p =", round(cor_cv_t50$p.value, 4), "\n")
cat("cv_weight ~ FEP:     rho =", round(cor_cv_FEP$estimate, 3),
    "p =", round(cor_cv_FEP$p.value, 4), "\n")

# Panel 1: cv_weight vs t50germ 
Fig_cv_weight_t50germ <- ggplot(
  Order_legends("t50germ", variety_morpho_germ),
  aes(x = cv_weight, y = t50germ)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = t50germ - sd_t50germ,
        ymax = t50germ + sd_t50germ,
        color = Varieties),
    width = 0
  ) +
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm",
  #            se = FALSE,
  #            formula = y ~ x,
  #            color = "grey40",
  #            linetype = "dashed") +
  stat_poly_eq(
    aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
    formula = y ~ x,
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste("Spearman ρ =",
                      round(cor_cv_t50$estimate, 2),
                      "  p =",
                      round(cor_cv_t50$p.value, 3))),
    x = max(variety_morpho_germ$cv_weight),
    y = min(variety_morpho_germ$t50germ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 0,
    size = 3,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_by_emergence) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "CV of seed weight (intravariety variability)",
    y = "Mean t50germ (days)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Panel 2: cv_weight vs FEP 
Fig_cv_weight_FEP <- ggplot(
  Order_legends("FEP", variety_morpho_germ),
  aes(x = cv_weight, y = FEP)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Varieties), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = FEP - sd_FEP,
        ymax = FEP + sd_FEP,
        color = Varieties),
    width = 0
  ) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm",
              se = FALSE,
              formula = y ~ x,
              color = "#FF8C00",
              linetype = "solid") +
  stat_poly_eq(
    aes(label = paste(..rr.label..,  ..p.value.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
    formula = y ~ x,
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste("Spearman ρ =",
                      round(cor_cv_FEP$estimate, 2),
                      "  p =",
                      round(cor_cv_FEP$p.value, 3))),
    x = max(variety_morpho_germ$cv_weight),
    y = 40, #min(variety_morpho_germ$FEP),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 0,
    size = 3,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_by_emergence) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "CV of seed weight (intravariety variability)",
    y = "Mean final emergence (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Arrange side by side 
Fig_cv_weight_panels <- ggarrange(
  Fig_cv_weight_t50germ,
  Fig_cv_weight_FEP,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  common.legend = TRUE,
  legend = "right",
  labels = c("H", "I"),
  align = "h"
)

Fig_cv_weight_panels

# Save 
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
           "Morpho/FigSuppl_cvweight_vs_germination.png"),
    plot = Fig_cv_weight_panels,
    width = 300,
    height = 130,
    units = "mm",
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```
```{r spearman teste}
cor.test(variety_morpho_germ$mean_weight,
         variety_morpho_germ$cv_weight,
         method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
```
## 2.8_Seed defaults / defect rate per variety
```{r Germination graines radiographiées papier plat TOREMOVE, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path, "/1_Raw_data/GermEmerg/germination_assay.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 2,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
names(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper)[names(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper) == 'Genotype'] <- 'Varieties'

Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path, "/1_Raw_data/GermEmerg/germination_assay.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 3,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
names(Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper)[names(Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper) == 'Genotype'] <- 'Varieties'
```
```{r germination data preparation TOREMOVE, eval=Morpho}
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- right_join(Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper[, c("Num_Echantillon","Varieties","Lot")],
           Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper,
           by=c("Num_Echantillon"="Echantillon"))

rm(Morpho_Samples_num_4times25seeds_flatpaper)
# select only rows from 32 Gers batch
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper[Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Lot == 32,]


# rename Varieties
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties[Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties=="BEA VEZER "] <-"Vezer "
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties <- str_extract(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties, "[:alnum:]+(?= )")
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties <-
  str_to_title(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties)
# as.factor
Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties <-
  as.factor(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Varieties)


Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper <- Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper[, c("Varieties", "semence", "Répétition", "germination_lecteur_h")]

Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Répétition <- as.factor(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper$Répétition)
```
```{r load and prepare Symptoms dataset, eval=Morpho}
Indiv_seeds_symptoms <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path, "/1_Raw_data/Morphology_GEVES_Gers.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 3,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
Indiv_seeds_symptoms <- Indiv_seeds_symptoms[,1:8]

# supress blank spaces, extract _32, case
colnames(Indiv_seeds_symptoms) <- 
  c("Varieties", "plaque", "semence", "fissure", "protruding_tegument", "insect_damages", "spread_cotyledons", "any_symptoms")
# select only rows from 32 Gers batch
Indiv_seeds_symptoms <- Indiv_seeds_symptoms[stringr::str_which(Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties,
  pattern = "32"),]
Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties <- str_remove_all(Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties, " ")
Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties <- stringr::str_extract(Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties,
  pattern = "[:alpha:]+(?=_32)")
# rename Varieties
Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties[Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties=="BEAVEZER"] <-"Vezer"
Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties <-
  str_to_title(Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties)
# as.factor
Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties <- as.factor(Indiv_seeds_symptoms$Varieties)
Indiv_seeds_symptoms$plaque <- as.factor(Indiv_seeds_symptoms$plaque)
summary(Indiv_seeds_symptoms)
```
```{r join with Morpho graines radiographiées papier plat, eval=Morpho}
#All_Symptom_100_seeds <- left_join(Morpho_Parameters_100seeds, Indiv_seeds_symptoms, by = c("semence", "plaque", c("Varieties"="Varieties")))
#OR
All_Symptom_100_seeds <- left_join(Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper, Indiv_seeds_symptoms,
                                 by = c("semence", c("Répétition"="plaque"),"Varieties"))

All_Symptom_100_seeds$germination_lecteur_h[All_Symptom_100_seeds$germination_lecteur_h == "NaN"] <- 0
All_Symptom_100_seeds$germination_lecteur_h <- as.integer(All_Symptom_100_seeds$germination_lecteur_h)

All_Symptom_100_seeds <- pivot_longer(All_Symptom_100_seeds, cols = 5:(ncol(All_Symptom_100_seeds)-1), names_to = "Symptoms", values_to = "Obs")

# Keep only observed symptom when seeds is damaged
All_Symptom_100_seeds <- All_Symptom_100_seeds[All_Symptom_100_seeds$any_symptoms == All_Symptom_100_seeds$Obs,]
All_Symptom_100_seeds_dam <- All_Symptom_100_seeds[All_Symptom_100_seeds$any_symptoms == 1,]
# When seed is intact
All_Symptom_100_seeds_intact <- All_Symptom_100_seeds[All_Symptom_100_seeds$any_symptoms ==0 & All_Symptom_100_seeds$Symptoms == "fissure",]
All_Symptom_100_seeds_intact$Symptoms <- rep("intact", nrow(All_Symptom_100_seeds_intact))

All_Symptom_100_seeds <- dplyr::bind_rows(All_Symptom_100_seeds_dam, All_Symptom_100_seeds_intact)

# Create a new column indicating whether the seed germinated or not
All_Symptom_100_seeds <- dplyr::mutate(All_Symptom_100_seeds,germination_status = ifelse(germination_lecteur_h == 0, "Non-germinated", "Germinated"))
All_Symptom_100_seeds<- na.omit(All_Symptom_100_seeds)
```
```{r}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::chisq.test)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::fisher.test)

# Compute defect rates per variety ####
defect_summary <- All_Symptom_100_seeds %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Varieties, Symptoms) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_seeds = n(),
    n_defect = sum(Obs == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    defect_rate = mean(Obs == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(defect_pct = round(defect_rate * 100, 1))

cat("Defect rates per variety and symptom type:\n")
print(defect_summary, width = Inf)

# Total defect rate per variety (any defect) ####
total_defect_summary <- All_Symptom_100_seeds %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Varieties) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_any_defect = sum(any_symptoms == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    rate_any = mean(any_symptoms == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pct_any = round(rate_any * 100, 1))

cat("\nTotal defect rate per variety:\n")
print(total_defect_summary)

# Join with germination traits ####
defect_germ <- total_defect_summary %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat %>%
      dplyr::select(Varieties, t50germ = t50.Germinated, sd_t50germ = sd),
    by = "Varieties"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    GermEmerg_Emerg_stat %>%
      dplyr::select(Varieties, FEP = Final_Em_Percentage, sd_FEP = sd),
    by = "Varieties"
  )

# Per symptom type joined with germination traits
defect_germ_bytype <- defect_summary %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat %>%
      dplyr::select(Varieties, t50germ = t50.Germinated, sd_t50germ = sd),
    by = "Varieties"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    GermEmerg_Emerg_stat %>%
      dplyr::select(Varieties, FEP = Final_Em_Percentage, sd_FEP = sd),
    by = "Varieties"
  )

```
## 2.9_Supplementary Figure
```{r Supplementary Figure 2, eval=Morpho}
# Plots individuels (sans légende) 
A <- Morpho_Fig_Weight_scatterplot_metabo + custom_theme  +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) + theme(legend.position = "none")
B <- Morpho_Fig_Area_scatterplot          + custom_theme  +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) + theme(legend.position = "none")
C <- Morpho_Fig_Suppl_Weight_vs_Area_correlation_allgenot_facet + 
       theme(legend.position = "none")
D <- Morpho_Figsuppl2A_corr_meanWeightmeant50germ + custom_theme +theme(legend.position = "none")
E <- Morpho_Figsuppl2B_corr_meanAreameant50germ   + custom_theme +theme(legend.position = "none")
F_ <- Morpho_Figsuppl2C_corr_meanWeightmeanFEP    + custom_theme +theme(legend.position = "none")
G <- Morpho_Figsuppl2D_corr_meanAreameanFEP        + custom_theme +theme(legend.position = "none")
H <- Fig_cv_weight_t50germ + custom_theme +theme(legend.position = "none")
I <- Fig_cv_weight_FEP + custom_theme +theme(legend.position = "none")

# Assemblage avec patchwork 
# Ligne 1 : A et B (chacun occupe 1 colonne sur 2)
# Ligne 2 : C (occupe les 2 colonnes)
# Lignes 3-4 : D|E puis F|G (chacun occupe 1 colonne sur 2)
#
# Layout en caractères : chaque lettre = 1 cellule de grille
# 2 colonnes x 5 rangées (C et DEFG occupent 2 rangées chacun pour la hauteur)

# TRANSPOSE
layout <- "
A#C#DEH
B#C#FGI
"

FigSupp2_GRAINES <- A + B + C + D + E + F_ + G + H + I +
  plot_layout(design = layout,
              widths = c(1, 0.1, 1, 0.1, 1, 1,1)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G", "H", "I"))) &
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 10),
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

# Sauvegarde 
if (choice_save_fig_article == TRUE) {
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Morpho/FigSupp2_Morpho.png"),
    plot = FigSupp2_GRAINES,
    width = 700,
    height = 300,
    units = "mm",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
}

```

```{r cleaning, eval=false, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
   All_Symptom_100_seeds, All_Symptom_100_seeds_dam, All_Symptom_100_seeds_intact, Morpho_Germ_indiv_time_radio_4times25seeds_flatpaper, Indiv_seeds_symptoms,
   Morpho_Fig_AreaDensity,    GermEmerg_GermImbTime, GermEmerg_GermImbTime_stat, legend_plot, Morpho_Area_test, Morpho_weight_test, #Morpho_Weight_stat,
```

# ______________________________________________________________________________
# 3_Metabolites biomarkers
```{r Set parameters, eval = TRUE}
# remove Alcans after check
remove_alcans <- TRUE
# filter samples according to seed size
filter_seed_weight <- TRUE
# outliers from PCA
RemovePCAOutliers <- TRUE #FALSE
# filter analytes according to prevalence in samples
choice_prev_thresh = 0.2 #20%
RelAb_thresh = 0#

mean_duplicate = FALSE
rename_metabo = TRUE

##__________________ TOREMOVE
# unevently integrated fragments across samples
removefragments <- TRUE
# dataset transformation
centscale <- FALSE
removemachinesignal <- TRUE
# Filter outliers on PCA
to_remove_outliers = TRUE # TRUE #remove a list of outliers
norm_seed_weight = FALSE #TRUE

metadata_cols = c("Varieties","Compartment", "Size", "Replicate")
```
## 3.0_Functions for metabolomic analyses
```{r Function to rename metabolites, eval=START}
# Function to clean metabolite names by removing derivatives
# Change metabolite names
Newnames_metabolites <- function(metabolites_names_vect){
  metabolites_names <- data.frame(Rownames = metabolites_names_vect,
                                  New_name = str_replace(metabolites_names_vect,
                                                            ", [:digit:]*TMS derivative| [:digit:]*TMS|, \\([:digit:]*TMS\\)| \\([:digit:]*TMS\\)", ""))
  metabolites_names <- metabolites_names  %>% mutate(Case_name = str_to_lower(New_name))
  #duplicated_metabolites <- metabolites_names[metabolites_names$New_name %in% metabolites_names[duplicated(metabolites_names$New_name),]$New_name,]
  
  #
  #_____________________________________
  # Check if Sample_ (new, accurate name) is duplicated
    metabolites_names <- metabolites_names %>% group_by(Case_name) %>%
      mutate(Duplicated = ifelse(n_distinct(Rownames) > 1,
                                dense_rank(Rownames), NA)) %>% ungroup()
      #data.table::setorder(Duplicated, na.last=TRUE)
    # if duplicated add index
    metabolites_names <- metabolites_names %>%
        mutate(suffix = ifelse(! is.na(Duplicated), as.character(dense_rank(Rownames)), ""))
    metabolites_names <- metabolites_names %>%
        group_by(New_name) %>%  # identify duplicates across Taxa
        mutate(Suffix = ifelse(Duplicated == 1 & n_distinct(suffix) > 1,  # Check if Taxa_name is duplicated across Taxa
                               as.character(dense_rank(suffix)),
                               "")) %>% ungroup()
      metabolites_names <- as.data.frame(metabolites_names) %>%
        mutate(New_name = ifelse(Suffix != "", paste0(New_name, "_", Suffix), New_name)) %>%
        select(-Duplicated, -suffix, -Suffix, -Case_name)
  metabolites_names$New_name <- ifelse(is.na(metabolites_names$New_name), metabolites_names$Rownames, metabolites_names$New_name)
    # affect new names
    row.names(metabolites_names) <- metabolites_names$New_name
  #______________________________________
  
  # add D1/D2/D3
  #metabolites_names$New_name <- ifelse(metabolites_names$New_name %in% duplicated(metabolites_names$New_names),
  #                                     str_c(metabolites_names$Rownames,
  #                                           ifelse(is.na(
  #                                             str_extract(metabolites_names$Rownames, "D[:digit:]$"))==0,
  #                                             str_extract(metabolites_names$Rownames, "D[:digit:]$"),
  #                                             str_extract(metabolites_names$Rownames,"(?<=[:punct:]{2})[:graph:]+"))),
  #                                     metabolites_names$New_name)
  #metabolites_names$New_name <- str_replace_all(metabolites_names$New_name, "\\.", " ")
  return(metabolites_names)}
```
```{r Function to load pre-processed dataset and remove outliers and add permuted t50germ, t50tot and FEP values, eval=START}
# GCMS_df_allComp RemovedXylOutliers NormIS SortandTranspose RemoveCheckedFragments JoinedallComp RemoveAlcans RemoveQC filterSamplebySeedWeight CentScaledallComp OR CentScaledperComp
Select_Metabo_dataframe <- function(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allCompandExudats = FALSE,
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy, # allComp OR perComp OR not
                                    RemovePCAOutliers,
                                    allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = FALSE,
                                    allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = FALSE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = 0,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                   rename_metabo = "FALSE",
                                   verbose = FALSE){
  # if not already provided ####
  if (ncol(Metabo_selected_dataset) == 0){
    path_Metabo_dataset <- paste0(
                                    "GCMS_df",
                                    ifelse(allCompandExudats, "_AllCompandExudates", ""),
                                    ifelse(allComp && !allCompandExudats, "_allComp", ""),
                                    ifelse(removemachinesignal && !allCompandExudats,"_removemachinesignal",""),
                                    ifelse(RemovedXylOutliers,"_RemovedXylOutliers",""),
                                    ifelse(NormIS, "_NormIS", ""),
                                    ifelse(SortandTranspose && !allCompandExudats, "_SortandTranspose", ""),
                                    ifelse(RemoveCheckedFragments, "_RemoveCheckedFragments", ""),
                                    ifelse(JoinedallComp && !allCompandExudats, "_JoinedallComp", ""),
                                    ifelse(RemoveAlcans,"_RemoveAlcans", ""),
                                    ifelse(RemoveQC, "_RemoveQC", ""),
                                    ifelse(filterSamplebySeedWeight, "_filterSamplebySeedWeight",""),
                                    ifelse(norm_seed_weight_ && !allCompandExudats, "_norm_seed_weight_", ""),
                                    ifelse(CenteredAndScaledBy != "" & RemovePCAOutliers, "_RemovePCAOutliers", ""),
                                    ifelse(allCompandExudats, "",
                                           ifelse(CenteredAndScaledBy == "allComp", "_CentScaledallComp",
                                                   ifelse(CenteredAndScaledBy == "perComp", "_CentScaledperComp", 
                                                          ifelse(CenteredAndScaledBy == "not", "_notCentScaled", "")))),
                                    ifelse(RemovePCAOutliers & CenteredAndScaledBy == "", "_RemovePCAOutliers", ""),
                                    ifelse(as.numeric(prev_thresh_) !=0, paste0("_PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh_,2)), ""),
                                    ifelse(as.numeric(RelAb_thresh_) !=0, paste0("_RelAbThresh", RelAb_thresh_),  ""),
                                    ifelse(allCompandExudats_RenameMetab, "_RenameMetab", ""),
                                    ifelse(allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy == "allComp", "_CentScaledallComp",
                                           ifelse(allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy == "perComp", "_CentScaledperComp", 
                                                  ifelse(allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy == "not", "_notCentScaled", ""))),
                                    ".xlsx")
    if(verbose == TRUE){print(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/", path_Metabo_dataset))}
    
    Metabo_selected_dataset <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/", path_Metabo_dataset),
                                         sheet = 1,
                                         colNames=TRUE,
                                         rowNames = FALSE)
    
  colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset) <- str_replace_all(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), "\\.", " ")
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- as.data.frame(Metabo_selected_dataset)
  rownames(Metabo_selected_dataset) <- Metabo_selected_dataset$Sample
  
  
  # As.factor ####
  Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment)
  Metabo_selected_dataset$Size <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Size)
  Metabo_selected_dataset$Varieties <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Varieties)
  }
  
  # remove outlier samples ####
  #if (removOutliersPCA_ == TRUE){# & "Facila_T3_C2" %in% Metabo_selected_dataset$Sample){
  #  outliers <-  c("Facila_T3_E5", "Facila_T3_C5",
  #                 "Flavert_T1_E5", "Facila_T2_E4",
  #                 "Facila_T2_E3")
  #  Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset[! Metabo_selected_dataset$Sample %in% outliers,]
  # }

  # compute mean on metabolites with multiple residuals ####
  metabolites_names_vect <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), c("Varieties",
                                                                         "t50germ",
                                                                         "t50tot",
                                                                         "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                                         "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                                         "Size",
                                                                         "Replicate",
                                                                         "Compartment",
                                                                         "Weight",
                                                                         "Sample",
                                                                         "Labels"
                                                                         ))
  analysis <- as.vector(unlist(str_split(str_replace(path_Metabo_dataset, ".xlsx", ""), pattern = "_")))
  # compute mean on metabolites with multiple analytes, replace in Metabo_selected_dataset
  if(mean_duplicate == TRUE | rename_metabo == TRUE){
    Metabolites_names_test <- Newnames_metabolites(metabolites_names_vect)  # dataframe of Row_names vs New_names
    Metabolites_names_test <- Metabolites_names_test[order(Metabolites_names_test$New_name),]
    
    Metabolites_names_duplicated <- Metabolites_names_test[Metabolites_names_test$New_name %in%                                                             Metabolites_names_test[duplicated(Metabolites_names_test$New_name),]$New_name,]
    
  }
  if(mean_duplicate == "TRUE"){
    for (newname_dupl in unique(Metabolites_names_duplicated$New_name)){
      # list of corresponding Rownames (metabolite columns) for current New_name
      rownames_from_newname <- Metabolites_names_duplicated[Metabolites_names_duplicated$New_name == newname_dupl,]$Rownames
      # df of mean on the corresponding columns
      newname_dupl_col <- Metabo_selected_dataset[,colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset) %in% rownames_from_newname]
      newname_dupl_col$mean <- rowMeans(Metabo_selected_dataset[, rownames_from_newname, drop = FALSE])
      newname_dupl_col <- select(newname_dupl_col, -all_of(rownames_from_newname))
      newname_dupl_col$Sample <- rownames(newname_dupl_col)
      # Select the original dataset without the duplicated columns
      remaining_Metabo_selected_dataset <- select(Metabo_selected_dataset, -all_of(rownames_from_newname))
      # Bind the new mean column dataframe with the remaining dataframe
      Metabo_selected_dataset <- left_join(remaining_Metabo_selected_dataset, newname_dupl_col, by = "Sample")
    }
    analysis <- c(analysis, "meanDuplicateMetab")
  }
  # Clean metabolite names ####
  if(rename_metabo == "TRUE"){
    for (row_metabnames in 1:nrow(Metabolites_names_test)){
      names(Metabo_selected_dataset)[names(Metabo_selected_dataset) == Metabolites_names_test[row_metabnames,]$Rownames] <- Metabolites_names_test[row_metabnames,]$New_name
    }
    analysis <- c(analysis, "RenameMetab")
  }
  
  # Add metadata PERMUTATION - Final Emergence Percentage #####
  # Rename 'Varieties' in GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl to avoid confusion
  GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_ <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl
  names(GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_)[names(GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_) == 'Varieties'] <- 'Varieties_GermEmerg'
  
  # Shuffle "Final_Em_Percentage" within each Varieties_GermEmerg group in GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl
  GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_grouped <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_ %>%
    group_by(Varieties_GermEmerg) %>%
    mutate(FEP_shuffled = sample(Final_Em_Percentage, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # For each Varieties group in Metabo_selected_dataset, assign FEP_shuffled from GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl
  Metabo_selected_dataset_permuted <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>%
    group_by(Varieties, Compartment) %>%
    mutate(Final_Em_Percentage = {
      # Filter shuffled FEP values from the corresponding Varieties group in GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl
      FEP_values <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_grouped %>%
        filter(Varieties_GermEmerg == dplyr::first(Varieties)) %>%
        pull(FEP_shuffled)
      
      # Ensure we sample exactly the number of rows in the current Varieties x Compartment group
      sample(FEP_values, size = n(), replace = ifelse(length(FEP_values) >= n(), FALSE, TRUE))
    },
    .after = Varieties) %>%
    ungroup()
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset_permuted
  
  # Add metadata PERMUTATION - t50germ #####
  # Rename 'Varieties' in GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl to avoid confusion
  GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
  names(GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_)[names(GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_) == 'Varieties'] <- 'Varieties_GermEmerg'
  
  # Shuffle "t50.Germinated" within each Varieties_GermEmerg group in GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
  GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ %>%
    group_by(Varieties_GermEmerg) %>%
    mutate(t50germ_shuffled = sample(t50.Germinated, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # For each Varieties group in Metabo_selected_dataset, assign t50germ_shuffled from GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
  Metabo_selected_dataset_permuted <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>%
    group_by(Varieties, Compartment) %>%
    mutate(t50germ = {
      # Filter shuffled t50germ values from the corresponding Varieties group in GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
      t50germ_values <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped %>%
        filter(Varieties_GermEmerg == dplyr::first(Varieties)) %>%
        pull(t50germ_shuffled)
      
      # Ensure we sample exactly the number of rows in the current Varieties x Compartment group
      sample(t50germ_values, size = n(), replace = ifelse(length(t50germ_values) >= n(), FALSE, TRUE))
    },
    .after = Varieties) %>%
    ungroup()
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset_permuted
  
  # Add metadata PERMUTATION - t50tot #####
  # Shuffle "t50.total" within each Varieties_GermEmerg group in GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
  GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ %>%
    group_by(Varieties_GermEmerg) %>%
    mutate(t50tot_shuffled = sample(t50.total, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # For each Varieties group in Metabo_selected_dataset, assign t50tot_shuffled from GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
  Metabo_selected_dataset_permuted <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>%
    group_by(Varieties, Compartment) %>%
    mutate(t50tot = {
```
