```{r Function to load pre-processed dataset and remove outliers and add permuted t50germ, t50tot and FEP values, eval=START}
      # Filter shuffled t50germ values from the corresponding Varieties group in GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl
      t50tot_values <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped %>%
        filter(Varieties_GermEmerg == dplyr::first(Varieties)) %>%
        pull(t50tot_shuffled)
      
      # Ensure we sample exactly the number of rows in the current Varieties x Compartment group
      sample(t50tot_values, size = n(), replace = ifelse(length(t50tot_values) >= n(), FALSE, TRUE))
    },
    .after = Varieties) %>%
    ungroup()
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset_permuted
  
  # Give back sample names as rownames ####
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- as.data.frame(Metabo_selected_dataset)
  rownames(Metabo_selected_dataset) <- Metabo_selected_dataset$Sample
  
  return(list(analysis, Metabo_selected_dataset))
}

```

PCA, OPLS, univariate tests, Volcano functions
```{r Function PCA Metabo by size, by compartments, eval=START}
# per_comp: plot only chosen compartment, if *chosen_compart* is selected (among "Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis")
# per_size: plot only chosen seed size, if *chosen_size* is selected (among "1","2","3")
# shape_per: shape the dot according to seed size ("Size") or compartment ("Compartment")
# color_plot: color graph according to Compartments ("byComp") or Varieties ("byVar")
# choice_color: color scale to be attributed to Varieties according to "FEP", "FGP", "t50" or other seed attribute. see setup Color choice.
# to_detect_outliers: if TRUE, will add labels to dots
# vectors: if TRUE, will add metadata vectors from columns in Metabo_selected_dataset with names listed in "metadata_vars" to the plot.
# Metabo_selected_dataset : dataframe of Metabolomic data, with metadata columns in 
# save_fig : Boolean. If TRUE, will save the figure in directory choice_path_fig_all, under name *name_fig* with infos on the representation choices (Compartment and Size choices.)

PCA_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor = function(per_comp = TRUE, chosen_compart = c(),
                                             per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                             color_plot,
                                             choice_color,
                                             Metabo_selected_dataset,
                                             to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
                                             shape_per = "", #"Compartment","Size",
                                             save_fig = choice_save_fig_all,
                                             ellipse_per = "",
                                             name_fig = "",
                                             vectors = FALSE, metadata_vars = c(), additional_metadata = c(),
                                             ThreeD = FALSE)
{
  # filter dataset per size and compartment ####
  if(per_comp == TRUE){
    # prcomp preparation
    Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset[Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment %in% chosen_compart,]
  }
  if(per_size == TRUE){
    # prcomp preparation
    Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset[Metabo_selected_dataset$Size == chosen_size,]
  }
  print(head(Metabo_selected_dataset[,1:10]))
  
  # remove non-metabolites columns #####
  metadata_cols <- c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Germ_Percentage",  "Final_Em_Percentage", "Size", "Replicate", "Compartment", "Weight",
                        #"Sample", 
                        "Labels")
  if(length(metadata_vars)!=0 | length(additional_metadata) !=0){
    metadata_cols <-  unique(c(metadata_cols,
                        metadata_vars,
                        additional_metadata)
                        )
  }
  
  Metabo_columns_PCA <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), metadata_cols)
  Metabo_selected_PCA <- column_to_rownames(Metabo_selected_dataset[, Metabo_columns_PCA], loc = 1) #Sample
  Metabo_selected_PCA <- Metabo_selected_PCA %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
  # remove empty columns ####
  Metabo_selected_PCA <- Metabo_selected_PCA %>% mutate_all(.funs = as.numeric)
  Metabo_selected_PCA <- Metabo_selected_PCA[, colSums(Metabo_selected_PCA != 0) > 0]
  Metabo_selected_PCA <- Metabo_selected_PCA[, colSums(Metabo_selected_PCA) != 0]
  #anyNA(Metabo_selected_PCA)
  #na_positions <- which(is.na(Metabo_selected_PCA), arr.ind = TRUE)
  # PCA ####
  Metabo_PCA <- prcomp(Metabo_selected_PCA[,])
       #scale = TRUE, # scale variable to have unit variance before the analysis takes place
       #center = TRUE) #
  # visualize eigenvalues (scree plot) ####
  print(fviz_eig(Metabo_PCA,
                 addlabels = TRUE,
                 ylim = c(0,40)
                 ))
  
  # PCA all size, by compartments_dataframe preparation ####
  ## dataframe from prcomp object
  Metabo_PCA_ <- data.frame(Metabo_PCA$x) # creates PCs as columns, samples as rows
  ## Principal Components
  Metabo_PCA_$PC1 <- Metabo_PCA_[,1] #PC1
  Metabo_PCA_$PC2 <- Metabo_PCA_[,2] #PC2
  Metabo_PCA_$PC2 <- Metabo_PCA_[,3] #PC3
  Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_[, c(1:5)]
  # add 
  Metabo_PCA_$Samples <- row.names(Metabo_PCA_)
  Metabo_PCA_$Compartment <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment)
  Metabo_PCA_$Size <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Size)
  Metabo_PCA_$Varieties <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Varieties)
  Metabo_PCA_$Replicate <- as.factor(Metabo_selected_dataset$Replicate)
  # retrieve eigenvalues
  Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues <- get_eigenvalue(Metabo_PCA) #Eigenvalues
  # View the proportion of variance explained (R2X) by each component
  R2X <- cumsum(Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues$variance.percent[1:2]) #percentage of variance explained by each principal component
  #Metabo_PCA_Metabolites <- get_pca_var(Metabo_PCA) #Variables
  #Metabo_PCA_Samples <- get_pca_ind(Metabo_PCA) #Samples
  
  # compute correlations between PCs and metadata
  if(vectors == TRUE){
    metadata_coords <- data.frame(
    Dim.1 = sapply(metadata_vars, function(var) {
      cor(Metabo_PCA$x[, "PC1"], Metabo_selected_dataset[[var]], use = "complete.obs")
    }),
    Dim.2 = sapply(metadata_vars, function(var) {
      cor(Metabo_PCA$x[, "PC2"], Metabo_selected_dataset[[var]], use = "complete.obs")
    }),
    variable = metadata_vars
    )
    write_xlsx(metadata_coords, path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/PCAcorrelation", chosen_compart,"_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"), ".xlsx"))
  }
  # rename for display
  label_lookup <- c(
  "meant50germ" = "t50germ",
  "meanFEP" = "FEP",
  "weight_Whole_seed" = "weight_Whole_seed",
  "weight_Cotyledon" = "weight_Cotyledon",
  "weight_HRaxis" = "weight_HRaxis",
  "weight_Plumule" = "weight_Plumule"
  )
  
  metadata_coords$display_label <- dplyr::recode(
  metadata_coords$variable,
  "t50germ" = "meant50germ",
  "Final_Em_Percentage" = "meanFEP",
  "weight_Whole_seed" = "weight_Whole_seed",
  "weight_Cotyledon" = "weight_Cotyledon",
  "weight_HRaxis" = "weight_HRaxis",
  "weight_Plumule" = "weight_Plumule"
)
  
  # reorder Varieties for legend #####
  if (choice_color == "FEP"){
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% 
      dplyr::arrange(factor(Varieties, levels =
                            GermEmerg_Emerg_stat[order(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat$Final_Em_Percentage),]$Varieties,
                            labels =
                            GermEmerg_Emerg_stat[order(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat$Final_Em_Percentage),]$Varieties))
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% 
      reorder_levels(Varieties, order =
                       GermEmerg_Emerg_stat[order(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat$Final_Em_Percentage),]$Varieties)
  }
  if (choice_color == "t50germ"){
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% 
      dplyr::arrange(factor(Varieties, levels =
                            GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.Germinated),]$Varieties,
                            labels =
                            GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.Germinated),]$Varieties))
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% 
      reorder_levels(Varieties, order =
                       GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.Germinated),]$Varieties)
  }
  if (choice_color == "t50tot"){
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% 
      dplyr::arrange(factor(Varieties, levels =
                            GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.total),]$Varieties,
                            labels =
                            GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.total),]$Varieties))
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% 
      reorder_levels(Varieties, order =
                       GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.total),]$Varieties)
  }
  
  # Labels and Shapes #####
  if(to_detect_outliers == TRUE){
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% mutate(Labels = str_c(str_sub(Varieties, start = 1, end = 3), "_T", Size,"_",Replicate))
  } else{Metabo_PCA_$Labels <- NA}
  Metabo_PCA_$Labels <- as.character(Metabo_PCA_$Labels)
  
  # plot PCA #####
    # Define color, fill, and shape mappings outside of aes() using conditional logic
color_mapping <- if (color_plot == "byComp") {"Compartment"} else if (color_plot == "byVar") {"Varieties"} else {NULL}
fill_mapping <- color_mapping  # You may want to use the same mapping for fill as well
shape_mapping <- if (shape_per == "Compartment") {"Compartment"} else if (shape_per == "Size") {"Size"} else {NULL}
ellipse_mapping <- if (ellipse_per == "Compartment") {"Compartment"} else if (ellipse_per == "Size") {"Size"} else if (ellipse_per == "Varieties") {"Varieties"} else {NULL}
label_mapping <- if (to_detect_outliers == TRUE) {"Labels"} else {NULL}

# Now use the correct aesthetic mappings in ggplot aes()
Metabo_Fig_PCA <- ggplot(Metabo_PCA_, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2))
# Add conditional aesthetic mappings for color, fill, and shape
if (!is.null(color_mapping)) {Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + aes(color = !!sym(color_mapping))}
if (!is.null(fill_mapping)) {Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + aes(fill = !!sym(fill_mapping))}
if (!is.null(shape_mapping)) {Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + aes(shape = !!sym(shape_mapping))}
if (!is.null(label_mapping)) {Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + aes(label = !!sym(label_mapping))}
Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA +
  geom_point(alpha = ifelse(shape_per == "", 0.5, 1)) +
  ggtitle(paste0("PCA ",
                 ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                        ifelse(length(chosen_compart) == 1, chosen_compart,
                               paste0(chosen_compart, collapse = "_vs_")),
                        "all compartments"),
                 " ", 
                 ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0(", size ", chosen_size), "all size"))) +
  
  xlab(paste0("PC1, ", 
              round(Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues$variance.percent[1], digits = 2), "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2, ",
              round(Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues$variance.percent[2], digits = 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  custom_theme +
      #ggplot2::annotate("text", x = (max(Metabo_PCA_$PC1)), y = min(Metabo_PCA_$PC2+5), label = paste0("R2X: ", round(R2X, 2), "  "),
       #      hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, 
        #     size = 4, color = "black", position = "identity") +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1, panel.grid = element_blank())

# Draw ellipses based on the choice_ellipse parameter
if (!is.null(ellipse_mapping)) {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA +
    stat_ellipse(aes(group = !!sym(ellipse_mapping)), data = Metabo_PCA_)
}
# Apply color scale based on conditions
if (color_plot == "byComp") {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + scale_color_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Plumule" = "lightgreen", "Exudate" = "lightblue"))
} else if (color_plot == "byVar") {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA +
    scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color)
}
# Apply shape scale based on conditions
if (shape_per == "Size") {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("1" = 1, "2" = 10, "3" = 16))
} else if (shape_per == "Compartment") {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = 1, "Plumule" = 2, "HRaxis" = 3, "Exudate" = 0))
} else if (shape_per == "") {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + guides(shape = "none")
}
# Add outlier detection labels if needed
if (to_detect_outliers == TRUE) {
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = Labels), show.legend = FALSE, max.iter = 10000)
}

# Add metadata vectors
if (vectors == TRUE){
  color_metadata_arrows <- c("t50germ" = "grey", "Final_Em_Percentage" = "grey", "weight_Whole_seed" = "darkcyan", "weight_Cotyledon" = "brown", "weight_HRaxis" = "orange", "weight_Plumule" = "lightgreen"
)
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA + new_scale_color()
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- Metabo_Fig_PCA +
  geom_segment(data = metadata_coords,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, 
                   xend = Dim.1 * 10, yend = Dim.2 * 10,
                   color = variable),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")),
               linewidth = 0.5,
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text_repel(data = metadata_coords,
                  aes(x = Dim.1 * 10.5, y = Dim.2 * 10.5, 
                      label = display_label,
                      color = variable),
                  size = 3.5, 
                  fontface = "bold",
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                  box.padding = 0.5,
                  point.padding = 0.3,
                  segment.color = "grey50",
                  segment.size = 0.3,
                  max.overlaps = 20) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Metadata",
                     values = color_metadata_arrows,
                     labels = c(
                     "t50germ" = "meant50germ",
                     "Final_Em_Percentage" = "meanFEP",
                     "weight_Whole_seed" = "Whole seed weight",
                     "weight_Cotyledon" = "Cotyledon weight",
                     "weight_HRaxis" = "HRaxis weight",
                     "weight_Plumule" = "Plumule weight"
                   )
                     )
}

# Print the plot
Metabo_Fig_PCA

  # save figure ####
  if(save_fig == TRUE){
  ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, 
                name_fig,
                paste0(ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"), 
                       "_",
                       ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                       ifelse(length(chosen_compart) == 1, chosen_compart,
                              paste0(chosen_compart, collapse = "_vs_")), 
                       "all compartments"),
                       "_", color_plot),
                ".png"),
    plot = Metabo_Fig_PCA)}
#save PCA by size, by compartments_preparation
if(per_comp == TRUE & length(chosen_compart)>1){
  if(all(c("Cotyledon", "Plumule") %in% chosen_compart)) {
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_Compartison_Cotyledon_Plumule_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
  } else if(all(c("Cotyledon", "HRaxis") %in% chosen_compart)) {
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_Compartison_Cotyledon_HRaxis_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
  } else if(all(c("HRaxis", "Plumule") %in% chosen_compart)) {
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_Compartison_Plumule_HRaxis_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
  } else if(all(c("Exudate", "HRaxis") %in% chosen_compart)) {
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_Compartison_Exudates_HRaxis_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
  } else if(all(c("Exudate", "Cotyledon") %in% chosen_compart)) {
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_Compartison_Exudates_Cotyledon_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
  } else {
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_Compartison_Exudates_Plumule_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
  }
} else {
  if(per_size == FALSE){ # per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
    if(per_comp == TRUE){
      if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Cotyledon_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else if(chosen_compart == "HRaxis") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_HRaxis_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else if(chosen_compart == "Plumule") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Plumule_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Exudates_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      }
    } else {
      Metabo_Fig_PCA_allComp_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
    }
  }
  
  if(per_size == TRUE){
    if (chosen_size == "1"){
      if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Cotyledon_S1 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else if(chosen_compart == "HRaxis") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_HRaxis_S1 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Plumule_S1 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      }
    }
    
    if (chosen_size == "2"){
      if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Cotyledon_S2 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else if(chosen_compart == "HRaxis") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_HRaxis_S2 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Plumule_S2 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      }
    }
    
    if (chosen_size == "3"){
      if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Cotyledon_S3 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else if(chosen_compart == "HRaxis") {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_HRaxis_S3 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      } else {
        Metabo_Fig_PCA_Plumule_S3 <- Metabo_Fig_PCA
      }
    }
  }
}

# 3D PCA
if(ThreeD == TRUE){
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_3D <- plot_ly(Metabo_PCA_, x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3,
                               type = "scatter3d", mode = "markers",
                               color = ~ Compartment,
                               text = ~paste("Sample:", Labels, "<br>PC1:", round(PC1, 2),
                                             "<br>PC2:", round(PC2, 2),
                                             "<br>PC3:", round(PC3, 2)),
                               hoverinfo = "text",
                               colors = c("Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Plumule" = "lightgreen", "Exudate" = "lightblue"))
  print(Metabo_Fig_PCA_3D)
  return(Metabo_Fig_PCA_3D)
}

  return(Metabo_Fig_PCA)
}
```
```{r Improved Robust univariate correlation tests, eval = START}
#' Test de corrélation univarié amélioré avec détection d'outliers
#' 
#' @param metabolite Vecteur des abondances du métabolite
#' @param response Vecteur de la variable de réponse
#' @param response_type "continuous" ou "categorical"
#' @param display_all Sauvegarder tous les plots (défaut: FALSE)
#' @param display_significant Sauvegarder seulement les plots significatifs (défaut: FALSE)
#' @param p_value_threshold Seuil de significativité (défaut: 0.05)
#' @param name_fig_test Suffix pour le nom de fichier
#' @param metabolite_name Nom du métabolite
#' @param Metab "Metabo" ou "Metabar"
#' @param path_fig_article Chemin de sauvegarde des figures
#' @param detect_outliers Détecter et signaler les outliers influents (défaut: TRUE)
#' @param cook_threshold Seuil Cook's distance (défaut: 4/n)
#' @param Error_OP Mode debug (défaut: FALSE)

normality_test_and_correlation <- function(
    metabolite, response, response_type, 
    display_all = FALSE, 
    display_significant = FALSE, 
    p_value_threshold = 0.05, 
    name_fig_test, 
    metabolite_name, 
    Metab, 
    path_fig_article,
    detect_outliers = TRUE,
    cook_threshold = NULL,
    Error_OP = FALSE) {
  
  if(Error_OP) {
    message("Processing: ", metabolite_name)
  }
  
  # Remove NA values (ne PAS remplacer par 0 !)
  complete_cases <- complete.cases(metabolite, response)
  metabolite_clean <- metabolite[complete_cases]
  response_clean <- response[complete_cases]
  
  # Check minimum sample size
  if(length(metabolite_clean) < 3) {
    if(Error_OP) message("Skipping ", metabolite_name, ": insufficient data (n < 3)")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check variance (éviter les métabolites constants)
  if(var(metabolite_clean) == 0) {
    if(Error_OP) message("Skipping ", metabolite_name, ": zero variance")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # CONTINUOUS RESPONSE #
  if (response_type == "continuous") {
    
    # TOUJOURS utiliser Spearman pour la robustesse (recommandation)
    # Pearson suppose linéarité ET normalité bivariée
    correlation_test <- tryCatch({
      cor.test(metabolite_clean, response_clean, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      if(Error_OP) message("Spearman failed for ", metabolite_name, ", trying Kendall")
      cor.test(metabolite_clean, response_clean, method = "kendall", exact = FALSE)
    })
    
    if(is.null(correlation_test)) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    test_type <- correlation_test$method
    correlation_value <- correlation_test$estimate
    p_value <- correlation_test$p.value
    
    # Detect influential outliers
    outlier_info <- NULL
    if(detect_outliers) {
      model <- lm(metabolite_clean ~ response_clean)
      cooks_d <- cooks.distance(model)
      
      if(is.null(cook_threshold)) {
        cook_threshold_use <- 4 / length(response_clean)
      } else {
        cook_threshold_use <- cook_threshold
      }
      
      influential <- cooks_d > cook_threshold_use
      n_influential <- sum(influential)
      
      # Correlation without outliers
      if(n_influential > 0 && sum(!influential) >= 3) {
        cor_without <- cor(metabolite_clean[!influential], 
                          response_clean[!influential], 
                          method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
        delta_cor <- abs(correlation_value - cor_without)
        
        outlier_info <- list(
          n_influential = n_influential,
          influential_indices = which(influential),
          cor_with_outliers = correlation_value,
          cor_without_outliers = cor_without,
          delta_correlation = delta_cor,
          is_robust = delta_cor < 0.2  # Corrélation stable si delta < 0.2
        )
      }
    }
    
    # Save plot if requested
    if (display_all || (display_significant && p_value < p_value_threshold)) {
      
      plot_data <- data.frame(
        metabolite = metabolite_clean,
        response = response_clean,
        influential = if(!is.null(outlier_info)) influential else FALSE
      )
      
      # Enhanced plot with outlier detection
      p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = response, y = metabolite)) +
        geom_point(aes(color = influential, size = influential), alpha = 0.7) +
        scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"),
                          labels = c("Normal", "Influential")) +
        scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 2, "TRUE" = 4), guide = "none") +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue", linetype = "solid") +
        {if(!is.null(outlier_info) && outlier_info$n_influential > 0)
          geom_smooth(data = subset(plot_data, !influential),
                     method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "darkgreen", linetype = "dashed")} +
        labs(
          title = metabolite_name,
          subtitle = paste0(
            test_type, " r = ", round(correlation_value, 3), 
            ", p = ", format(p_value, scientific = TRUE, digits = 2),
            if(!is.null(outlier_info) && outlier_info$n_influential > 0) {
              paste0("\n⚠ ", outlier_info$n_influential, " influential point(s), Δr = ", 
                    round(outlier_info$delta_correlation, 3))
            } else ""
          ),
          x = "Response",
          y = "Metabolite abundance"
        ) +
        theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
        theme(legend.position = "bottom")
      
      # Create directory if needed
      output_dir <- file.path(path_fig_article, Metab)
      dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      
      # Save
      output_file <- file.path(output_dir, 
                              paste0("Fig_UnivTest_", metabolite_name, name_fig_test, ".png"))
      ggsave(output_file, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    }
    
    # Return results
    return(list(
      test = correlation_test,
      p.value = p_value,
      method = test_type,
      correlation = correlation_value,
      n = length(metabolite_clean),
      outlier_info = outlier_info
    ))
    
  # CATEGORICAL RESPONSE #
  } else if (response_type == "categorical") {
    
    # Use non-parametric tests by default (more robust)
    n_groups <- length(unique(response_clean))
    
    if(n_groups == 2) {
      # Mann-Whitney U test (non-parametric alternative to t-test)
      test_result <- wilcox.test(metabolite_clean ~ response_clean, exact = FALSE)
      test_type <- "Mann-Whitney U"
      p_value <- test_result$p.value
      
    } else if(n_groups > 2) {
      # Kruskal-Wallis test (non-parametric alternative to ANOVA)
      test_result <- kruskal.test(metabolite_clean ~ response_clean)
      test_type <- "Kruskal-Wallis"
      p_value <- test_result$p.value
    } else {
      if(Error_OP) message("Skipping ", metabolite_name, ": only one group")
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    # Save plot if requested
    if (display_all || (display_significant && p_value < p_value_threshold)) {
      
      plot_data <- data.frame(
        metabolite = metabolite_clean,
        response = as.factor(response_clean)
      )
      
      p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = response, y = metabolite, fill = response)) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
        geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
        labs(
          title = metabolite_name,
          subtitle = paste0(test_type, ", p = ", format(p_value, scientific = TRUE, digits = 2)),
          x = "Group",
          y = "Metabolite abundance"
        ) +
        theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
        theme(legend.position = "none")
      
      output_dir <- file.path(path_fig_article, Metab)
      dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      
      output_file <- file.path(output_dir, 
                              paste0("Fig_UnivTest_", metabolite_name, name_fig_test, ".png"))
      ggsave(output_file, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    }
    
    # Return results
    return(list(
      test = test_result,
      p.value = p_value,
      method = test_type,
      n = length(metabolite_clean),
      n_groups = n_groups
    ))
  }
}


#' Fonction principale de tests univariés améliorée
Robust_Univariate_test <- function(
    Metab_selected_dataset,
    per_comp = TRUE, 
    chosen_compart = c(),
    per_size = FALSE, 
    chosen_size = 0,
    chosen_response,
    name_fig, 
    replicate = "",
    display_all = FALSE,
    display_sign = FALSE,
    p_value_threshold = 0.05,
    name_fig_test, 
    Metab, 
    gene_choice = "",
    detect_outliers = TRUE,
    cook_threshold = NULL,
    Error_OP = FALSE,
    path_fig_article = choice_path_fig_article) {
  
  if(Error_OP) print("Entered Univariate Test")
  
  # Filter dataset by size and compartment
  if (per_comp && Metab == "Metabo") {
    Metab_selected_dataset <- Metab_selected_dataset[Metab_selected_dataset$Compartment %in% chosen_compart,]
    Metab_selected_dataset$Compartment <- droplevels(Metab_selected_dataset$Compartment)
  }
  if (per_size) {
    Metab_selected_dataset <- Metab_selected_dataset[Metab_selected_dataset$Size == chosen_size,]
    Metab_selected_dataset$Size <- droplevels(Metab_selected_dataset$Size)
  }
  
  # Define metadata columns
  if(Metab == "Metabo"){
    metadata_columns <- c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Germ_Percentage","Final_Em_Percentage",
                         "Size","Replicate","Compartment", "Weight","Sample","Labels")
  } else {
    metadata_columns <- c("Sample","Replicate", "Varieties", "t50germ","t50tot",
                         "Final_Em_Percentage", "Labels")
  }
  
  # Extract metabolite columns
  Metabo_columns <- setdiff(colnames(Metab_selected_dataset), metadata_columns)
  
  # Prepare data (NE PAS REMPLACER LES NA PAR 0 !)
  Metabo_data <- Metab_selected_dataset[, c(chosen_response, Metabo_columns)]
  
  # Remove constant metabolites
  metab_variances <- apply(Metabo_data[, -1], 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
  Metabo_data <- Metabo_data[, c(TRUE, metab_variances > 0)]
  
  if(Error_OP) print("Dataset prepared")
  
  # Determine response type
  if (chosen_response %in% c("Compartment", "Size")) {
    response_type <- "categorical"
    response <- as.factor(Metabo_data[[chosen_response]])
  } else if (chosen_response %in% c("t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage")) {
    response_type <- "continuous"
    response <- Metabo_data[[chosen_response]]
  } else {
    stop("Invalid response variable: ", chosen_response)
  }
  
  # Initialize results
  results <- data.frame(
    Metabs = character(),
    p_value = numeric(),
    Test = character(),
    correlation = numeric(),
    n_samples = integer(),
    n_influential = integer(),
    delta_correlation = numeric(),
    is_robust = logical(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  if(Error_OP) print(paste("Starting analysis for", ncol(Metabo_data) - 1, "metabolites"))
  
  # Loop through metabolites
  metabolite_names <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_data), chosen_response)
  
  for (metabolite_name in metabolite_names) {
    metabolite <- Metabo_data[[metabolite_name]]
    
    # Skip if no variance
    if(length(unique(metabolite[!is.na(metabolite)])) <= 1) {
      if(Error_OP) message("Skipping ", metabolite_name, ": constant or single value")
      next
    }
    
    # Perform test
    test_result <- normality_test_and_correlation(
      metabolite = metabolite,
      response = response,
      response_type = response_type,
      display_all = display_all,
      display_significant = display_sign,
      p_value_threshold = p_value_threshold,
      name_fig_test = name_fig_test,
      metabolite_name = metabolite_name,
      Metab = Metab,
      path_fig_article = path_fig_article,
      detect_outliers = detect_outliers,
      cook_threshold = cook_threshold,
      Error_OP = Error_OP
    )
    
    # Store results
    if(!is.null(test_result)) {
      new_row <- data.frame(
        Metabs = metabolite_name,
        p_value = test_result$p.value,
        Test = test_result$method,
        correlation = if(!is.null(test_result$correlation)) test_result$correlation else NA,
        n_samples = test_result$n,
        n_influential = if(!is.null(test_result$outlier_info)) test_result$outlier_info$n_influential else 0,
        delta_correlation = if(!is.null(test_result$outlier_info)) test_result$outlier_info$delta_correlation else NA,
is_robust = if(!is.null(test_result$outlier_info)) test_result$outlier_info$is_robust else TRUE,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      results <- rbind(results, new_row)
    }
  }
  
  if(Error_OP) print("Individual analyses completed")
  
  # FDR correction
  results$Pval_BH <- p.adjust(results$p_value, method = "BH")
  results$log_Pval_BH <- -log10(results$Pval_BH)
  
  # Add significance flags
  results$is_significant <- results$Pval_BH < p_value_threshold
  results$is_significant_and_robust <- results$is_significant & results$is_robust
  
  # Categories for file naming
  if(chosen_response == "Compartment"){Cat <- chosen_compart
  }else if(chosen_response == "Size"){Cat <- chosen_size
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFEP", "HighFEP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){Cat <- c("Lowt50germ", "Hight50germ")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50tot"){Cat <- c("Lowt50tot", "Hight50tot")}
  
  # Save results
  path_UnivTest_data <- paste0(
    choice_path_data, Metab, "/PvalBH_univTest_", Metab, "_",
    "per", chosen_response, "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
    name_fig, "_",
    ifelse(per_size, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"),
    ifelse(per_comp,
           ifelse(chosen_response != "Compartment" & Metab == "Metabo",
                  paste0("_", chosen_compart),""),
           "allcomparts"),
    "_", as.character(replicate),
    ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "", paste0("", gene_choice)), 
    ".xlsx"
  )
  
  write_xlsx(as.data.frame(results), path = path_UnivTest_data)
  
  if(Error_OP) print(paste0("Saved results for replicate ", replicate))
  
  # Print summary
  cat("\n UNIVARIATE TEST SUMMARY \n")
  cat(paste0("Total metabolites tested: ", nrow(results), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Significant (p < ", p_value_threshold, "): ", sum(results$is_significant), "\n"))
  if(detect_outliers) {
    cat(paste0("Significant AND robust: ", sum(results$is_significant_and_robust, na.rm = TRUE), "\n"))
    cat(paste0("Metabolites with influential outliers: ", sum(results$n_influential > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n"))
  }
  
  return(results)
}
```
tests non-paramétriques par défaut (continu: Spearman > Pearson, catégoriel: Mann-Whitney / Kruskal-Wallis > t-test / ANOVA)
Dataframe de résultats contient :
 - correlation : valeur de corrélation
 - n_samples : nombre d'échantillons utilisés
 - n_influential : nombre de points influents
 - delta_correlation : impact des outliers
 - is_robust : flag si corrélation stable
 - is_significant_and_robust : significatif ET robuste
```{r Function to check stability of metabolite-variable correlation}
Calculate_Significance_Frequency <- function(Metab, 
                                             per_comp = TRUE, chosen_compart = c(),
                                             per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                             chosen_response,
                                             replicates,
                                             pq1_threshold = 0.05, 
                                             p_threshold = 0.05, 
                                             vip_threshold = 1,
                                             name_fig = "",
                                             datatyp = "raw", prev_thresh = 0, 
                                             RelAb_thresh = 0, chosen_gene = "") {
  
  if(Metab == "Metabar"){name_fig = paste0("_", datatyp, "_PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh,2), "_RelAbThresh", RelAb_thresh, "_Hell")}
  
  # assign Categories for data names
  if(chosen_response == "Compartment"){Cat <- chosen_compart
  }else if(chosen_response == "Size"){Cat <- chosen_size
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFEP", "HighFEP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Germ_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFGP", "HighFGP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){Cat <- c("Lowt50germ", "Hight50germ")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50tot"){Cat <- c("Lowt50tot", "Hight50tot")}
  
  # Open ALL OPLS pq1 dataframes
  OPLS_allpq1 = data.frame()
  for (replicate in c(1:replicates)){
    path_OPLS_data <- paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/OPLS_VIP_Loadings_", Metab, "_",
                           "per", as.character(chosen_response), "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                           name_fig,
                           ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                                  chosen_compart,
                                  paste0("_", chosen_gene)),
                           "_", as.character(replicate),".xlsx")
    if(verbose == TRUE){print(path_OPLS_data)}
    OPLS_pq1_df <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = path_OPLS_data,
                            sheet = 1, colNames=TRUE, rowNames = FALSE)
    OPLS_pq1_df$Replicate <- rep(replicate, nrow(OPLS_pq1_df))
    
    if(ncol(OPLS_allpq1) == 0){OPLS_allpq1 <- OPLS_pq1_df
    }else{OPLS_allpq1 <- bind_rows(OPLS_allpq1, OPLS_pq1_df)}
  }
  
  # Open ALL UnivariateTest dataframes
  UnivarTest_allPval = data.frame()
  for (replicate in c(1:replicates)){
    path_UnivTest_data = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/PvalBH_univTest_", Metab, "_",
                             "per", chosen_response, "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                             name_fig, "_",
                             ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"),
                             ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                                  ifelse(chosen_response != "Compartment" & Metab == "Metabo",
                                         paste0("_", chosen_compart),""),
                                  "allcomparts"),
                           "_", as.character(replicate),
                           ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                                  "",
                                  paste0("", chosen_gene)), ".xlsx")
    if(verbose == TRUE)(print(path_UnivTest_data))
    UnivarTest <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = path_UnivTest_data,
                            sheet = 1, colNames=TRUE, rowNames = FALSE)
    UnivarTest$Replicate <- rep(replicate, nrow(UnivarTest))
    
    if(ncol(UnivarTest_allPval) == 0){UnivarTest_allPval <- UnivarTest
    }else{UnivarTest_allPval <- bind_rows(UnivarTest_allPval, UnivarTest)}
  }
  
  # Calculate FREQUENCY of significance for each metabolite
  freq_results <- OPLS_allpq1 %>%
    left_join(UnivarTest_allPval, by = c("Metabs", "Replicate")) %>%
    group_by(Metabs) %>%
    summarise(
      # Frequency metrics
      freq_pq1_signif = sum(abs(pq1) > pq1_threshold) / n(),
      freq_pval_signif = sum(Pval_BH < p_threshold) / n(),
      freq_VIP_signif = sum(VIP > vip_threshold) / n(),
      freq_both_signif = sum(abs(pq1) > pq1_threshold & Pval_BH < p_threshold) / n(),
      
      # Direction consistency (proportion going in same direction)
      direction_consistency = sum(sign(pq1) == sign(pq1[1])) / n(),
      
      # Mean values (for reference)
      meanpq1 = mean(pq1, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_pq1 = sd(pq1, na.rm = TRUE),
      meanVIP = mean(VIP, na.rm = TRUE),
      meanPvalBH = mean(Pval_BH, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_PvalBH = sd(Pval_BH, na.rm = TRUE),
      
      # Stability metrics
      cv_pq1 = sd(pq1, na.rm = TRUE) / abs(mean(pq1, na.rm = TRUE)),
      cv_pval = sd(Pval_BH, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(Pval_BH, na.rm = TRUE),
      
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  # Add log-transformed mean p-value
  freq_results$log_meanPval_BH <- -log10(freq_results$meanPvalBH)
  
  # Classify metabolites based on FREQUENCY (not mean)
  freq_results <- freq_results %>%
    mutate(
      # Robust classification: significant in at least 70% of permutations
      diffexpressed = case_when(
        freq_both_signif >= 0.7 & direction_consistency >= 0.8 & meanpq1 > 0 ~ Cat[2],
        freq_both_signif >= 0.7 & direction_consistency >= 0.8 & meanpq1 < 0 ~ Cat[1],
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      
      # Stability flag
      is_stable = (cv_pq1 < 0.5 & cv_pval < 0.5),
      
      # Label for plotting (only stable & significant metabolites)
      Label = ifelse(diffexpressed != "Not significant" & is_stable & 
                      meanVIP > vip_threshold, Metabs, ""),
      
      # VIP size for plotting
      VIPsize = ifelse(meanVIP > vip_threshold, 1, 0)
    )
  
  return(freq_results)
}

# Sauvegarder le rapport complet
save_stability_report <- function(stability_test, output_dir, prefix) {
  
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  write_xlsx(
    list(
      Summary = stability_test$summary_by_nperm,
      Details = stability_test$stability_summary,
      CV_Comparison = stability_test$cv_comparison
    ),
    path = file.path(output_dir, paste0(prefix, "_StabilityTest.xlsx"))
  )
  
  writeLines(
    stability_test$recommendation$text,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(prefix, "_Recommendation.txt"))
  )
  ggsave(
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(prefix, "_StabilityPlots.png")),
    plot = stability_test$plots$combined,
    width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 300
  )
  
  cat(paste0("\nRapport sauvegardé dans: ", output_dir, "\n"))
}

```
```{r Function "mean" Volcano plot corrected error bars, eval = TRUE}
Volcano_plot <- function(Metab,
                         per_comp = TRUE, chosen_compart = c(),
                         per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                         chosen_response,
                         replicates,
                         pq1_threshold = 0.05, log_p_threshold = -log10(0.05), vip_threshold = 1,
                         color_plot, choice_color,
                         save_fig = choice_save_fig_all, label_plot = TRUE,
                         name_fig = "",
                         datatyp = "raw", prev_thresh = 0, RelAb_thresh = 0, chosen_gene = "",
                         just_plot_from_VolSign = FALSE,
                         use_frequency = TRUE,
                         show_error_bars = TRUE
                         ){
  
  if(Metab == "Metabar"){
    name_fig = paste0("_", datatyp, "_PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh,2), "_RelAbThresh", RelAb_thresh, "_Hell")
  }
  
  # assign Categories for data names
  if(chosen_response == "Compartment"){Cat <- chosen_compart
  }else if(chosen_response == "Size"){Cat <- chosen_size
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFEP", "HighFEP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Germ_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFGP", "HighFGP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){Cat <- c("Lowt50germ", "Hight50germ")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50tot"){Cat <- c("Lowt50tot", "Hight50tot")}
  
  if(just_plot_from_VolSign == FALSE){
    
    if(use_frequency == TRUE) {
      # NOUVELLE APPROCHE: FRÉQUENCE DE SIGNIFICATIVITÉ
      volcano_df <- Calculate_Significance_Frequency(
        Metab = Metab,
        per_comp = per_comp, chosen_compart = chosen_compart,
        per_size = per_size, chosen_size = chosen_size,
        chosen_response = chosen_response,
        replicates = replicates,
        pq1_threshold = pq1_threshold,
        p_threshold = 10^(-log_p_threshold),
        vip_threshold = vip_threshold,
        name_fig = name_fig,
        datatyp = datatyp, prev_thresh = prev_thresh,
        RelAb_thresh = RelAb_thresh, chosen_gene = chosen_gene
      )
      
    } else {
      # ANCIENNE APPROCHE: MOYENNES
      # [Ton code original - je le garde tel quel]
      OPLS_allpq1 = data.frame()
      for (replicate in c(1:replicates)){
        path_OPLS_data <- paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/OPLS_VIP_Loadings_", Metab, "_",
                               "per", as.character(chosen_response), "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                               name_fig,
                               ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                                      chosen_compart,
                                      paste0("_", chosen_gene)),
                               "_", as.character(replicate),".xlsx")
        if(verbose == TRUE){print(path_OPLS_data)}
        OPLS_pq1_df <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = path_OPLS_data,
                                sheet = 1, colNames=TRUE, rowNames = FALSE)
        OPLS_pq1_df$Replicate <- rep(replicate, nrow(OPLS_pq1_df))
        
        if(ncol(OPLS_allpq1) == 0){OPLS_allpq1 <- OPLS_pq1_df
        }else{OPLS_allpq1 <- bind_rows(OPLS_allpq1, OPLS_pq1_df)}
      }
      
      OPLS_meanpq1 <- summarySE(OPLS_allpq1,
                         measurevar = c("pq1"),
                         groupvars = "Metabs",
                         na.rm = TRUE)
      OPLS_meanVIP <- summarySE(OPLS_allpq1,
                         measurevar = c("VIP"),
                         groupvars = "Metabs",
                         na.rm = TRUE)
      names(OPLS_meanpq1)[names(OPLS_meanpq1) == 'sd'] <- 'sd_pq1'
      names(OPLS_meanpq1)[names(OPLS_meanpq1) == 'pq1'] <- 'meanpq1'
      OPLS_meanpq1_df <- left_join(OPLS_meanpq1[, c("Metabs","meanpq1","sd_pq1")], 
                                   OPLS_meanVIP[, c("Metabs","VIP")], by = "Metabs")
      names(OPLS_meanVIP)[names(OPLS_meanVIP) == 'VIP'] <- 'meanVIP'
      
      UnivarTest_allPval = data.frame()
      for (replicate in c(1:replicates)){
        path_UnivTest_data = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/PvalBH_univTest_", Metab, "_",
                                 "per", chosen_response, "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                                 name_fig, "_",
                                 ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"),
                                 ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                                      ifelse(chosen_response != "Compartment" & Metab == "Metabo",
                                             paste0("_", chosen_compart),""),
                                      "allcomparts"),
                               "_", as.character(replicate),
                               ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                                      "",
                                      paste0("", chosen_gene)), ".xlsx")
        if(verbose == TRUE)(print(path_UnivTest_data))
        UnivarTest <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = path_UnivTest_data,
                                sheet = 1, colNames=TRUE, rowNames = FALSE)
        UnivarTest$Replicate <- rep(replicate, nrow(UnivarTest))
        
        if(ncol(UnivarTest_allPval) == 0){UnivarTest_allPval <- UnivarTest
        }else{UnivarTest_allPval <- bind_rows(UnivarTest_allPval, UnivarTest)}
      }
      
      UnivarTest_meanPval <- summarySE(UnivarTest_allPval,
                         measurevar = c("Pval_BH"),
                         groupvars = "Metabs",
                         na.rm = TRUE)
      names(UnivarTest_meanPval)[names(UnivarTest_meanPval) == 'sd'] <- 'sd_PvalBH'
      names(UnivarTest_meanPval)[names(UnivarTest_meanPval) == 'Pval_BH'] <- 'meanPvalBH'
      UnivarTest_meanPval_df <- UnivarTest_meanPval[, c("Metabs","meanPvalBH", "sd_PvalBH")]
      
      volcano_df <- left_join(OPLS_meanpq1_df, UnivarTest_meanPval_df, by = c("Metabs"))
      volcano_df$log_meanPval_BH <- -log10(volcano_df$meanPvalBH)
      volcano_df <- volcano_df %>% drop_na(meanpq1, log_meanPval_BH)
      volcano_df$VIPsize <- ifelse(volcano_df$meanVIP> vip_threshold, 1, 0)
      
      volcano_df$diffexpressed <- "Not significant"
      volcano_df$diffexpressed[volcano_df$log_meanPval_BH > log_p_threshold & volcano_df$meanpq1 > pq1_threshold] <- Cat[2]
      volcano_df$diffexpressed[volcano_df$log_meanPval_BH > log_p_threshold & volcano_df$meanpq1 < -(pq1_threshold)] <- Cat[1]
      
      volcano_df$Label <- ifelse(volcano_df$diffexpressed == "Not significant" | volcano_df$VIPsize < vip_threshold,
                                 "", volcano_df$Metabs)
    }
    
    # VÉRIFICATION DES COLONNES SD
    has_sd_columns <- all(c("sd_PvalBH", "sd_pq1") %in% colnames(volcano_df))
    
    if(!has_sd_columns) {
      if(use_frequency) {
        cat("Mode fréquence : Les SD ne sont pas calculées (barres d'erreur désactivées)\n")
      }
      # Créer colonnes vides pour éviter erreurs
      volcano_df$sd_PvalBH <- 0
      volcano_df$sd_pq1 <- 0
      show_error_bars <- FALSE
    }
    
    # NETTOYAGE DES SD
    # Remplacer NA par 0
    volcano_df$sd_PvalBH[is.na(volcano_df$sd_PvalBH)] <- 0
    volcano_df$sd_pq1[is.na(volcano_df$sd_pq1)] <- 0
    
    # Diagnostic
    if(show_error_bars && has_sd_columns) {
      n_nonzero_sd_pval <- sum(volcano_df$sd_PvalBH > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
      n_nonzero_sd_pq1 <- sum(volcano_df$sd_pq1 > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      cat(paste0("Barres d'erreur p-value : ", n_nonzero_sd_pval, "/", nrow(volcano_df), 
                 " métabolites avec SD > 0\n"))
      cat(paste0("Barres d'erreur pq1 : ", n_nonzero_sd_pq1, "/", nrow(volcano_df), 
                 " métabolites avec SD > 0\n"))
    }
    
    # Write volcano dataframe
    path_Volcano_data <- paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/VolSign", 
                               ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "Metabolites_", "MicrobiotaTaxa_"),
                                 "per", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                                 name_fig, "_",
                                 ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"),
                                 ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                                      ifelse(chosen_response != "Compartment" & Metab == "Metabo",
                                             paste0("_", chosen_compart),
                                             paste0("_", chosen_gene)),
                                      "allcomparts"),
                               "_", as.character(replicates),
                               ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "", paste0("", chosen_gene)),
                               ifelse(use_frequency, "_FreqBased", "_MeanBased"),
                               ".xlsx")
    write_xlsx(x = as.data.frame(volcano_df), path = path_Volcano_data)
    
  } else {
    # Load from VolSignMetabolites
    path_Volcano_data <- paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/VolSign", 
                                 ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "Metabolites_", "MicrobiotaTaxa_"),
                                   "per", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                                   name_fig, "_",
                                   ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"),
                                   ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                                        ifelse(chosen_response != "Compartment" & Metab == "Metabo",
                                               paste0("_", chosen_compart),
                                               paste0("_", chosen_gene)),
                                        "allcomparts"),
                                 "_", as.character(replicates),
                                 ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "", paste0("", chosen_gene)),
                                 ifelse(use_frequency, "_FreqBased", "_MeanBased"),
                                 ".xlsx")
     volcano_df <- read_xlsx(path_Volcano_data)
     
     # Vérifier si les colonnes SD existent
     has_sd_columns <- all(c("sd_PvalBH", "sd_pq1") %in% colnames(volcano_df))
     if(!has_sd_columns) {
       volcano_df$sd_PvalBH <- 0
       volcano_df$sd_pq1 <- 0
       show_error_bars <- FALSE
     }
  }
  
  # VOLCANO PLOT 
  if(label_plot == FALSE){volcano_df$Label <- ""}
  
  # Adjust plot based on whether using frequency or mean
  x_label <- if(use_frequency) "mean OPLS pq1 value (freq-based selection)" else "mean OPLS pq1 value"
  plot_title <- if(use_frequency) {
    paste0(Cat[1], " vs ", Cat[2]," Volcano plot (Frequency-based, ≥70% perms)")
  } else {
    paste0(Cat[1], " vs ", Cat[2]," Volcano plot (Mean-based)")
  }
  
  # Base plot
  Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- ggplot(data = volcano_df, 
                               aes(x = meanpq1, y = log_meanPval_BH,
                                   col = diffexpressed,
                                   fill = diffexpressed,
                                   label = Label,
                                   size = VIPsize)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-pq1_threshold, pq1_threshold), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    geom_hline(yintercept = log_p_threshold, col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed')
  
  # BARRES D'ERREUR (SI ACTIVÉES)
  if(show_error_bars && has_sd_columns) {
    
    # Filtrer seulement les métabolites significatifs AVEC SD > 0
    sig_with_sd <- volcano_df %>%
      filter(diffexpressed != "Not significant",
             sd_PvalBH > 0 | sd_pq1 > 0)
    
    if(nrow(sig_with_sd) > 0) {
      
      # Barres d'erreur VERTICALES (p-value) - CORRIGÉES
      if(any(sig_with_sd$sd_PvalBH > 0)) {
        
        # Calculer les limites en gérant la transformation -log10
        sig_with_sd <- sig_with_sd %>%
          mutate(
            # ✅ CORRECTION : Inverser pour -log10
            pval_lower = pmin(1, meanPvalBH + sd_PvalBH),  # Plus grande p-value
            pval_upper = pmax(1e-10, meanPvalBH - sd_PvalBH),  # Plus petite p-value
            
            # Transformation -log10 (maintenant dans le bon ordre)
            y_errorbar_min = -log10(pval_lower),  # Plus petit -log10
            y_errorbar_max = -log10(pval_upper)   # Plus grand -log10
          )
        
        Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
          geom_errorbar(
            data = sig_with_sd %>% filter(sd_PvalBH > 0),
            aes(ymin = y_errorbar_min, ymax = y_errorbar_max),
            color = "black",
            linewidth = 0.5,
            width = 0.15,  # Largeur des caps
            alpha = 0.7,
            inherit.aes = FALSE  # Important !
          )
      }
      
      # Barres d'erreur HORIZONTALES (pq1)
      if(any(sig_with_sd$sd_pq1 > 0)) {
        Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
          geom_errorbarh(
            data = sig_with_sd %>% filter(sd_pq1 > 0),
            aes(y = log_meanPval_BH,  # Position Y
                xmin = meanpq1 - sd_pq1, 
                xmax = meanpq1 + sd_pq1),
            color = "black",
            linewidth = 0.5,
            height = 0.2,  # Hauteur des caps
            alpha = 0.7,
            inherit.aes = FALSE
          )
      }
    } else {
      cat("Aucun métabolite significatif avec SD > 0\n")
    }
  }
  
  # Points (après les barres pour qu'ils soient au-dessus)
  Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(color = '', 
         x = x_label,
         y = expression("-Log"[10]*"(mean corrected p-value)")) + 
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-3, 3, 1)) + 
    ggtitle(plot_title) +
    xlim(ifelse(label_plot, (min(volcano_df$meanpq1, na.rm = TRUE) - 1), min(volcano_df$meanpq1, na.rm = TRUE)),
         ifelse(label_plot, (max(volcano_df$meanpq1, na.rm = TRUE) + 1), max(volcano_df$meanpq1, na.rm = TRUE))) + 
    ylim(-1, (max(volcano_df$log_meanPval_BH[is.finite(volcano_df$log_meanPval_BH)], na.rm = TRUE) + 1))
  
  # Labels
  if(label_plot) {
    Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
      geom_text_repel(
        data = subset(volcano_df, Label != ""),
        aes(label = Label),
        min.segment.length = 0.1,
        na.rm = TRUE,
        size = 8 / .pt,
        force = 2,
        direction = "both",
        nudge_x = ifelse(volcano_df$meanpq1[volcano_df$Label != ""] < 0, -0.5, +0.5),
        max.overlaps = Inf
      )
  }
  
  # Theme
  Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
    theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    guides(shape = "none", size = "none", alpha = "none", legend = "none", fill = "none")
  
  # Colors
  if (chosen_response == "Compartment") {
    Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", 
                                    "Plumule" = "lightgreen", "Exudate" = "lightblue", 
                                    "Not significant" = "darkgrey"))
  } else if (chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage") {
    Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("LowFEP" = "#CC79A7", "HighFEP" = "#0072B2", 
                                    "Not significant" = "darkgrey"))
  } else if (chosen_response == "t50germ") {
    Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Lowt50germ" = "#009E73", "Hight50germ" = "#E69F00", 
                                    "Not significant" = "darkgrey"))
  } else if (chosen_response == "t50tot") {
    Metabo_Fig_Volcano <- Metabo_Fig_Volcano +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Lowt50tot" = "#009E73", "Hight50tot" = "#E69F00", 
                                    "Not significant" = "darkgrey"))
  }
  print(Metabo_Fig_Volcano)
  
    # Save individual plots to global environment and to file ####
  if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){
    if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon"){
      Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <<- Metabo_Fig_Volcano}
    if(chosen_compart == "HRaxis"){
      Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_HRaxis_allSize <<- Metabo_Fig_Volcano}
    if(chosen_compart == "Plumule"){
      Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Plumule_allSize <<- Metabo_Fig_Volcano}
  }
  if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){
    if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon"){
      Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <<- Metabo_Fig_Volcano}
    if(chosen_compart == "HRaxis"){
      Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_HRaxis_allSize <<- Metabo_Fig_Volcano}
    if(chosen_compart == "Plumule"){
      Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Plumule_allSize <<- Metabo_Fig_Volcano}
  }
  
  if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
    ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, Metab, "/Fig_VolcanoPlot_", Metab, "_",
                  "per", chosen_response, "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                  ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S",chosen_size), "allSizes"),
                  ifelse(per_comp == TRUE & chosen_response != "Compartment", paste0("_", chosen_compart), "allcomparts"),
                  "_", color_plot, ifelse(color_plot == "byVar", paste0("_", choice_color),""),
                  "_", replicates,
                  ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "", paste0("", chosen_gene)),
                  ifelse(use_frequency, "_FreqBased", "_MeanBased"),
                  ".png"),
           plot = Metabo_Fig_Volcano,
           width = 300, height = 250, units = "mm",
           dpi = "print")
  }
  
  return(Metabo_Fig_Volcano)
}
```

```{r Function to recommand permutation number in relation with p-values stability CHECK}
#' Test de stabilité des p-values entre différents nombres de permutations
#' 
#' @param Metab_selected_dataset Dataset métabolomique complet
#' @param chosen_compart Compartiment à tester
#' @param chosen_response Variable de réponse (t50germ, Final_Em_Percentage, etc.)
#' @param Metab "Metabo" ou "Metabar"
#' @param n_tests Nombre de répétitions pour chaque nombre de permutations (défaut: 3)
#' @param perm_numbers Vecteur des nombres de permutations à tester (défaut: c(50, 100, 150, 200))
#' @param n_metabolites_test Nombre de métabolites à tester (défaut: 10 plus variables)
#' @param ... Autres paramètres passés aux fonctions OPLS et UnivTest
#' 
#' @return Liste contenant:
#'   - stability_summary: Résumé de la stabilité par nombre de permutations
#'   - cv_comparison: Matrice de comparaison des CV entre différents n_perm
#'   - recommendation: Nombre de permutations recommandé
#'   - plots: Liste de plots de diagnostic:
#'      stability_result$plots$cv_pval           # Boxplot CV p-values vs n_perm
#'      stability_result$plots$cv_pq1            # Boxplot CV pq1 vs n_perm
#'      stability_result$plots$direction         # Boxplot cohérence direction
#'      stability_result$plots$by_metabolite     # Points par métabolite
#'      stability_result$plots$combined          # Combinaison des 4 ci-dessus
#'   
Test_Pvalue_Stability <- function(
    # Dataset parameters
    chosen_compart,
    chosen_response,
    Metab = "Metabo",
    
    # Test parameters
    use_frequency = TRUE,
    n_tests = 3,
    perm_numbers = c(50, 100, 150, 200),
    n_metabolites_test = 10,
    max_trials = 200,
    
    # Analysis parameters
    color_plot_ = "byVar",
    choice_color_ = "FEP",
    pq1_threshold_ = 0.05,
    log_p_threshold_ = -log10(0.05),
    vip_threshold_ = 1,
    univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = 0.05,
    
    # Dataset selection parameters
    allCompandExudats = FALSE,
    allComp = TRUE,
    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
    NormIS = TRUE,
    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
    RemoveQC = TRUE,
    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp", # allComp OR perComp
    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
   prev_thresh_ = 0,
   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
   Size = "All",
   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
   rename_metabo = "TRUE",
    allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = FALSE,
    allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = FALSE,
    chosen_gene = "",
   
   # Tests
   Error_OP = FALSE,
  check_path = FALSE
) {
  # Open dataframe
  temp_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
    allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
    allComp = allComp,
    removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
    RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
    NormIS = NormIS,
    SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
    RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
    JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
    RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
    RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
    filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
    norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
    CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy, # allComp OR perComp
    RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
    prev_thresh_ = prev_thresh_ ,
    RelAb_thresh_ = RelAb_thresh_,
    Size = Size,
    mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
    rename_metabo = rename_metabo,
    allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
    allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy
  )
  analysis <- temp_dataset[[1]]
  name_fig_correct <- paste(analysis[(length(analysis)-2):(length(analysis))], collapse="_")
  Metab_selected_dataset <- temp_dataset[[2]]
  rm(temp_dataset)
  
  cat("\n DÉMARRAGE DU TEST DE STABILITÉ DES P-VALUES \n")
  cat(paste0("Compartiment: ", chosen_compart, "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Réponse: ", chosen_response, "\n"))
  # AJOUT: VÉRIFICATION DU DATASET
  if(is.null(Metab_selected_dataset)) {
    stop("ERREUR: Metab_selected_dataset est NULL. Vous devez fournir un dataset valide.")
  }
  if(!is.data.frame(Metab_selected_dataset)) {
    stop("ERREUR: Metab_selected_dataset doit être un data.frame.")
  }
  if(nrow(Metab_selected_dataset) == 0) {
    stop("ERREUR: Metab_selected_dataset est vide (0 lignes).")
  }
  cat(paste0("Dataset chargé: ", nrow(Metab_selected_dataset), " échantillons, ",
             ncol(Metab_selected_dataset), " colonnes\n"))
  #_
  cat(paste0("Nombres de permutations testés: ", paste(perm_numbers, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Répétitions par test: ", n_tests, "\n\n"))
  
  # Identify test metabolites
  if(Metab == "Metabo"){
    metadata_columns <- c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Germ_Percentage","Final_Em_Percentage","Size",
                          "Replicate","Compartment", "Weight","Sample", "Labels")
  } else {
    metadata_columns <- c("Sample", "Replicate", "Varieties", "Labels",
                          "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage")
  }
  
  metabolite_columns <- setdiff(colnames(Metab_selected_dataset), metadata_columns)
  metabolite_vars <- apply(Metab_selected_dataset[, metabolite_columns], 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
  test_metabolites <- names(sort(metabolite_vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_metabolites_test, length(metabolite_vars))])
  
  cat(paste0("Métabolites testés (", length(test_metabolites), "):\n"))
  cat(paste(test_metabolites, collapse = "; "), "\n\n")
  
  # Initialize results storage
  all_results <- list()
  

  
  # Loop over different permutation numbers
  for(n_perm in perm_numbers) {
    cat(paste0("\n--- Test avec ", n_perm, " permutations ---\n"))
    
    # Storage for this n_perm
    pvals_all_tests <- vector("list", n_tests)
    pq1_all_tests <- vector("list", n_tests)
    
    # Repeat the analysis n_tests times
    for(test_iter in 1:n_tests) {
      cat(paste0("  Itération ", test_iter, "/", n_tests, "...\n"))
      
      # CORRECTION: Wrapper avec tryCatch pour capturer toutes les erreurs
      test_success <- tryCatch({
        # Run complete analysis with n_perm permutations
        test_result <- Plot_OPLS_and_Volcano_for_n_permutations(
          Comparison = "perCompart",
          chosen_response = chosen_response,
          nb_permutations = n_perm,
          use_frequency = use_frequency,
          color_plot_ = color_plot_,
          choice_color_ = choice_color_,
          save_fig_indiv = FALSE,
          save_fig_final = FALSE,  # IMPORTANT: ne pas sauvegarder les figures
          label_plot = FALSE,
          pq1_threshold_ = pq1_threshold_,
          log_p_threshold_ = log_p_threshold_,
          vip_threshold_ = vip_threshold_,
          univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = univ_test_normality_pvalthresh,
          max_trials = max_trials,
          display_sign = FALSE,
          Metab = Metab,
          allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
          allComp = allComp,
          removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
          RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
          NormIS = NormIS,
          SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
          RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
          JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
          RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
          RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
          filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
          norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
          CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy,
          RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
          allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
          allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy,
          prev_thresh = prev_thresh_,
          RelAb_thresh = RelAb_thresh_,
          Size = "All",
          mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
          rename_metabo = rename_metabo,
          ChosenCompartsVect = c(chosen_compart),
          chosen_gene = chosen_gene,
          OPLS_UnivTest = TRUE,
          just_plot_from_VolSign = FALSE,
          Error_OP = Error_OP
        )
        
        # Read the results files for test metabolites
        if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFEP", "HighFEP")
        }else if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){Cat <- c("Lowt50germ", "Hight50germ")
        }else if(chosen_response == "t50tot"){Cat <- c("Lowt50tot", "Hight50tot")}
        
        # Load volcano results
        path_Volcano_data <- paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/VolSign", 
                                   ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "Metabolites_", "MicrobiotaTaxa_"),
                                   "per", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                                   name_fig_correct,
                                   "_allSizes_", chosen_compart, "_", n_perm,
                                   ifelse(Metab == "Metabo", "", paste0("", chosen_gene)),
                                   "_FreqBased.xlsx")
        if(check_path == TRUE){path_Volcano_data <- validate_path(path_Volcano_data)} # check from user
        
        volcano_data <- read_xlsx(path_Volcano_data)
        
        # VÉRIFICATION: Les colonnes nécessaires existent-elles ?
        required_cols <- c("Metabs", "meanPvalBH", "meanpq1", "freq_both_signif", "is_stable")
        missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(volcano_data))
        if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
          cat(paste0("    ATTENTION: Colonnes manquantes dans volcano: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
          return(FALSE)
        }
        
        # do names correspond between test_metabolites$Metabs and volcano_data?
        test_metab_data <- volcano_data %>%
          filter(Metabs %in% test_metabolites)
            
        if (nrow(test_metab_data) == 0){
          if(verbose){print("not the same name format between volcano significantly different metabolites and abundance dataframe")}
          # check if metabolites are renamed, and if not, homogeneize between volcano_data and test_metabolites$Metabs
          Newnames_metabs <- Newnames_metabolites(test_metabolites$Metabs) 
            already_renamed <- Newnames_metabs %>% 
              filter(Rownames != New_name)
          is_subset_rownames <- all(volcano_data %in% Newnames_metabs$Rownames)
          is_subset_newname <- all(volcano_data %in% Newnames_metabs$New_name)
          # case not recognized at all
          if (!is_subset_rownames && !is_subset_newname) {
              # subset of none: error
              if(nrow(already_renamed) == 0){
                stop("test_metabolites already renamed and metabolites names in volcano_data are not recognized")
              } else {
                stop("test_metabolites not renamed and metabolites names in volcano_data are not recognized")
              }
        
            } else if(nrow(already_renamed) > 0 && is_subset_rownames){
            # volcano_data is a subset of New_name -> replace by Rownames values
            if(verbose){print("test_metabolites not already renamed, volcano_data has renamed metabolites. unrename volcano_data")}
            mapping <- setNames(Newnames_metabs$Rownames, Newnames_metabs$New_name)
            volcano_data <- mapping[volcano_data]
          } else if (nrow(already_renamed) == 0) {
            if(verbose){print("test_metabolites already renamed, volcano_data has unrenamed metabolites. remame volcano_data from correspondance with another notrenamed dataframe")}
            temp_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
              allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
              allComp = allComp,
              removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
              RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
              NormIS = NormIS,
              SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
              RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
              JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
              RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
              RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
              filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
              norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
              CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy, # allComp OR perComp
              RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
              prev_thresh_ = 0 , ##
              RelAb_thresh_ = 0, ##
              Size = Size,
              mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
              rename_metabo = FALSE, ##
              allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
              allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy
            )
            raw_names_metabs <- setdiff(colnames(temp_dataset[[2]]), metadata_columns)
            Newnames_metabs2 <- Newnames_metabolites(raw_names_metabs)
            already_renamed2 <- Newnames_metabs2 %>% 
              filter(Rownames != New_name)
            is_subset_newname2 <- all(volcano_data %in% Newnames_metabs2$New_name)
            mapping <- setNames(Newnames_metabs2$New_name, Newnames_metabs2$Rownames)
            volcano_data <- mapping[volcano_data]
          }
        }
        # Check if successful
        test_metab_data <- volcano_data %>%
          filter(Metabs %in% test_metabolites)
        if (nrow(test_metab_data) == 0){
          print(volcano_data)
          stop("names in volcano significantly different metabolites are not recognized")}
            
        
        # Extract p-values and pq1 for test metabolites
        test_metab_data %>%
          select(Metabs, meanPvalBH, meanpq1, freq_both_signif, is_stable)
        
        # VÉRIFICATION: Y a-t-il des données ?
        if(nrow(test_metab_data) == 0) {
          cat("    ATTENTION: Aucun métabolite test trouvé dans les résultats\n")
          FALSE
        }
        
        test_metab_data_meanPvalBH <- test_metab_data %>%
          select(Metabs, meanPvalBH) %>%
          rename(!!paste0("Test_", test_iter) := meanPvalBH)
        pvals_all_tests[[test_iter]] <- test_metab_data_meanPvalBH
        
        test_metab_data_meanpq1 <- test_metab_data %>%
          select(Metabs, meanpq1) %>%
          rename(!!paste0("Test_", test_iter) := meanpq1)
        pq1_all_tests[[test_iter]] <- test_metab_data_meanpq1
        
        cat("    Itération réussie\n")
        TRUE
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(paste0("    ✗ ERREUR dans itération ", test_iter, ": ", e$message, "\n"))
        FALSE
      })
      
      # Si l'itération a échoué, on continue quand même
      if(!test_success) {
        cat(paste0("    Itération ", test_iter, " ignorée\n"))
      }
    }
    
    print("test1________________________________________________________________________")
    
    # Combine results for this n_perm (uniquement si on a au moins une itération réussie)
    if(length(pvals_all_tests) > 0) {
      
      cat(paste0("  Combinaison des résultats (", length(pvals_all_tests), " itérations réussies)...\n"))
      
      pvals_combined <- pvals_all_tests %>%
        reduce(full_join, by = "Metabs")
      
      pq1_combined <- pq1_all_tests %>%
        reduce(full_join, by = "Metabs")
      
      # Calculate stability metrics
      pvals_matrix <- as.matrix(pvals_combined[, -1])
      pq1_matrix <- as.matrix(pq1_combined[, -1])
      
      stability_metrics <- data.frame(
        Metabs = pvals_combined$Metabs,
        n_perm = n_perm,
        n_iterations_successful = ncol(pvals_matrix),  # AJOUT: nombre d'itérations réussies
        
        # P-value metrics
        mean_pval = rowMeans(pvals_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd_pval = apply(pvals_matrix, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
        cv_pval = apply(pvals_matrix, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE) / rowMeans(pvals_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
        range_pval = apply(pvals_matrix, 1, function(x) diff(range(x, na.rm = TRUE))),
        
        # pq1 metrics
        mean_pq1 = rowMeans(pq1_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd_pq1 = apply(pq1_matrix, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
        cv_pq1 = apply(pq1_matrix, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE) / abs(rowMeans(pq1_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)),
        
        # Direction consistency
        direction_consistency = apply(pq1_matrix, 1, function(x) {
          signs <- sign(x[!is.na(x)])
          if(length(signs) == 0) return(NA)
          sum(signs == signs[1]) / length(signs)
        }),
        
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      all_results[[as.character(n_perm)]] <- list(
        stability = stability_metrics,
        pvals_raw = pvals_combined,
        pq1_raw = pq1_combined
      )
      
      cat(paste0("  Stabilité moyenne (CV p-value): ", 
                 round(mean(stability_metrics$cv_pval, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Itérations réussies: ", length(pvals_all_tests), "/", n_tests, "\n"))
      
    } else {
      cat(paste0("  ✗ ÉCHEC COMPLET pour n_perm = ", n_perm, " (aucune itération réussie)\n"))
    }
  }
  
  # VÉRIFICATION: Avons-nous au moins un résultat ?
  if(length(all_results) == 0) {
    stop("ERREUR CRITIQUE: Aucun résultat n'a pu être généré pour aucun nombre de permutations.\n",
         "Vérifiez que Plot_OPLS_and_Volcano_for_n_permutations fonctionne correctement.")
  }
  
  # ANALYSIS & VISUALIZATION #
  
  # Combine all stability metrics
  stability_summary <- bind_rows(lapply(all_results, function(x) x$stability))
  
  # VÉRIFICATION: S'assurer que n_perm existe
  if(!"n_perm" %in% colnames(stability_summary)) {
    stop("ERREUR CRITIQUE: n_perm manquant dans stability_summary. Colonnes disponibles: ",
         paste(colnames(stability_summary), collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  # Calculate summary statistics by n_perm
  summary_by_nperm <- stability_summary %>%
    group_by(n_perm) %>%
    summarise(
      n_iterations_avg = mean(n_iterations_successful, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_cv_pval = mean(cv_pval, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_cv_pval = median(cv_pval, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75_cv_pval = quantile(cv_pval, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_cv_pq1 = mean(cv_pq1, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_cv_pq1 = median(cv_pq1, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_direction_consistency = mean(direction_consistency, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_stable_metabolites = sum(cv_pval < 0.5 & cv_pq1 < 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  cat("\n RÉSUMÉ PAR NOMBRE DE PERMUTATIONS \n")
  print(summary_by_nperm)
  
  # RECOMMENDATION #
  recommended_nperm <- summary_by_nperm %>%
    filter(median_cv_pval < 0.5, mean_direction_consistency > 0.8) %>%
    arrange(n_perm) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(n_perm)
  
  if(length(recommended_nperm) == 0) {
    recommended_nperm <- max(perm_numbers)
    recommendation_text <- paste0(
      "ATTENTION: Aucun nombre de permutations ne donne une stabilité suffisante (CV < 0.5).\n",
      "Recommandation: Utiliser ", recommended_nperm, " permutations (maximum testé) et ",
      "considérer augmenter à 300-500 permutations."
    )
  } else {
    recommendation_text <- paste0(
      "Recommandation: Utiliser ", recommended_nperm, " permutations.\n",
      "À ce nombre, le CV médian des p-values est < 0.5 et la cohérence de direction > 80%."
    )
  }
  
  cat("\n RECOMMANDATION \n")
  cat(recommendation_text, "\n\n")
  
  # PLOTS #
  
  # Créer un préfixe unique pour cette analyse
  file_prefix <- paste0(chosen_compart, "_", chosen_response, "_",
                       "nPerm", paste(perm_numbers, collapse = "-"), "_",
                       "nIter", n_tests)
  
  # Plot 1: CV vs n_perm
  plot_cv_vs_nperm <- ggplot(stability_summary, aes(x = factor(n_perm), y = cv_pval)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_point(data = summary_by_nperm, aes(y = median_cv_pval), 
               color = "darkblue", size = 3, shape = 18) +
    labs(title = "Stabilité des p-values selon le nombre de permutations",
         subtitle = paste0(chosen_compart, " - ", chosen_response, 
                          " | Ligne rouge: seuil CV = 0.5 | Losange: médiane"),
         x = "Nombre de permutations",
         y = "Coefficient de variation des p-values") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14)
  
  # Plot 2: CV pq1 vs n_perm
  plot_cv_pq1_vs_nperm <- ggplot(stability_summary, aes(x = factor(n_perm), y = cv_pq1)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    labs(title = "Stabilité des pq1 selon le nombre de permutations",
         subtitle = paste0(chosen_compart, " - ", chosen_response),
         x = "Nombre de permutations",
         y = "Coefficient de variation des pq1") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14)
  
  # Plot 3: Direction consistency
  plot_direction <- ggplot(stability_summary, aes(x = factor(n_perm), y = direction_consistency)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "lightyellow", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    labs(title = "Cohérence de direction selon le nombre de permutations",
         subtitle = paste0(chosen_compart, " - ", chosen_response, " | Ligne rouge: seuil 80%"),
         x = "Nombre de permutations",
         y = "Proportion de permutations avec même signe") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14)
  
  # Plot 4: Stability by metabolite
  plot_by_metabolite <- ggplot(stability_summary, 
                               aes(x = reorder(Metabs, cv_pval), y = cv_pval, 
                                   color = factor(n_perm))) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    labs(title = "Stabilité par métabolite",
         subtitle = paste0(chosen_compart, " - ", chosen_response),
         x = "Métabolite",
         y = "CV p-value",
         color = "N permutations") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  # Combine plots
  combined_plot <- (plot_cv_vs_nperm | plot_cv_pq1_vs_nperm) / 
                   (plot_direction | plot_by_metabolite)
  
  # Créer le dossier de sortie avec structure claire
  stability_output_dir <- file.path(choice_path_fig_article, Metab, "StabilityTests")
  dir.create(stability_output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Sauvegarder les plots avec indexation complète
  ggsave(file.path(stability_output_dir, paste0("StabilityTest_", file_prefix, ".png")),
         plot = combined_plot,
         width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  # Sauvegarder aussi les plots individuels
  ggsave(file.path(stability_output_dir, paste0("StabilityTest_CVpval_", file_prefix, ".png")),
         plot = plot_cv_vs_nperm,
         width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  ggsave(file.path(stability_output_dir, paste0("StabilityTest_CVpq1_", file_prefix, ".png")),
         plot = plot_cv_pq1_vs_nperm,
         width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  ggsave(file.path(stability_output_dir, paste0("StabilityTest_Direction_", file_prefix, ".png")),
         plot = plot_direction,
         width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  ggsave(file.path(stability_output_dir, paste0("StabilityTest_ByMetab_", file_prefix, ".png")),
         plot = plot_by_metabolite,
         width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  cat("\nPlots sauvegardés dans:", stability_output_dir, "\n")
```
