```{r Function to recommand permutation number in relation with p-values stability CHECK}
  cat("Préfixe des fichiers:", file_prefix, "\n\n")
  
  # RETURN RESULTS #
  
  return(list(
    stability_summary = stability_summary,
    summary_by_nperm = summary_by_nperm,
    cv_comparison = stability_summary %>%
      select(Metabs, n_perm, cv_pval) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = n_perm, values_from = cv_pval, names_prefix = "CV_"),
    recommendation = list(
      n_perm = recommended_nperm,
      text = recommendation_text
    ),
    plots = list(
      cv_pval = plot_cv_vs_nperm,
      cv_pq1 = plot_cv_pq1_vs_nperm,
      direction = plot_direction,
      by_metabolite = plot_by_metabolite,
      combined = combined_plot
    ),
    raw_results = all_results,
    file_prefix = file_prefix
  ))
}

```
```{r Function comprehensive test of number of permutation}
#' Test de stabilité complet sur toutes les combinaisons compartiment x réponse
#' 
#' @param chosen_comparts Vecteur de compartiments à tester (ex: c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis"))
#' @param chosen_responses Vecteur de réponses à tester (ex: c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage"))
#' @param ... Tous les autres paramètres de Test_Pvalue_Stability
#' 
#' @return Liste contenant:
#'   - all_results: Liste des résultats par combinaison
#'   - comparison_table: Tableau récapitulatif des recommandations
#'   - optimal_summary: Résumé des n_perm optimaux
#'   - combined_plots: Grille de plots comparatifs
#'   - recommendations: Liste des recommandations par condition
#' 
#' @examples
#' comprehensive_stability <- Test_Pvalue_Stability_Comprehensive(
#'   chosen_comparts = c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis"),
#'   chosen_responses = c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage"),
#'   n_tests = 3,
#'   perm_numbers = c(50, 100, 150, 200),
#'   n_metabolites_test = 10
#' )

Test_Pvalue_Stability_Comprehensive <- function(
    chosen_comparts,
    chosen_responses,
    
    # Test parameters
    Metab = "Metabo",
    use_frequency = TRUE,
    n_tests = 3,
    perm_numbers = c(50, 100, 150, 200),
    n_metabolites_test = 10,
    max_trials = 200,
    
    # Analysis parameters
    color_plot_ = "byVar",
    choice_color_ = "FEP",
    pq1_threshold_ = 0.05,
    log_p_threshold_ = -log10(0.05),
    vip_threshold_ = 1,
    univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = 0.05,
    
    # Dataset selection parameters
    allCompandExudats = FALSE,
    allComp = TRUE,
    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
    NormIS = TRUE,
    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
    RemoveQC = TRUE,
    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
    prev_thresh_ = 0,
    RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
    Size = "All",
    mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
    rename_metabo = "TRUE",
    allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = FALSE,
    allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = FALSE,
    chosen_gene = "",
    
    # Tests
    Error_OP = FALSE,
    check_path = FALSE,
    
    # Output
    save_individual_results = TRUE,
    output_dir = NULL
) {
  
  
  # SETUP #
  
  cat("TEST DE STABILITÉ COMPLET - MULTI-CONDITIONS\n")
  
  # Valider les inputs
  if(length(chosen_comparts) == 0) {
    stop("Vous devez fournir au moins un compartiment dans chosen_comparts")
  }
  
  if(length(chosen_responses) == 0) {
    stop("Vous devez fournir au moins une réponse dans chosen_responses")
  }
  
  # Créer toutes les combinaisons
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    Compartment = chosen_comparts,
    Response = chosen_responses,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  n_combinations <- nrow(combinations)
  
  cat(paste0("Compartiments testés : ", paste(chosen_comparts, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Réponses testées     : ", paste(chosen_responses, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Nombre de combinaisons : ", n_combinations, "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Permutations testées : ", paste(perm_numbers, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Répétitions par test : ", n_tests, "\n\n"))
  
  # Estimer le temps
  estimated_time_per_combo <- length(perm_numbers) * n_tests * 2  # ~2 min par itération
  total_estimated_time <- n_combinations * estimated_time_per_combo
  
  cat(paste0("⏱️  Temps estimé : ~", round(total_estimated_time / 60, 1), " heures\n"))
  cat(paste0("   (", round(estimated_time_per_combo / 60, 1), " h par combinaison)\n\n"))
  
  # Demander confirmation
  cat("Voulez-vous continuer ? (o/n) : ")
  response <- readline()
  
  if(!tolower(trimws(response)) %in% c("o", "oui", "y", "yes", "")) {
    cat("\nAnalyse annulée.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  # Setup output directory
  if(is.null(output_dir)) {
    output_dir <- file.path(choice_path_fig_article, Metab, "StabilityTests", "Comprehensive")
  }
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Initialize results storage
  all_results <- list()
  comparison_data <- list()
  failed_combinations <- list()
  
  # LOOP OVER ALL COMBINATIONS #
  
  start_time_total <- Sys.time()
  
  for(i in 1:n_combinations) {
    
    current_comp <- combinations$Compartment[i]
    current_resp <- combinations$Response[i]
    
    cat(paste0("COMBINAISON ", i, "/", n_combinations, "\n"))
    cat(paste0("Compartiment : ", current_comp, "\n"))
    cat(paste0("Réponse      : ", current_resp, "\n"))
    
    combo_key <- paste0(current_comp, "_", current_resp)
    
    start_time_combo <- Sys.time()
    
    # Run stability test for this combination
    stability_result <- tryCatch({
      
      Test_Pvalue_Stability(
        chosen_compart = current_comp,
        chosen_response = current_resp,
        
        Metab = Metab,
        use_frequency = use_frequency,
        n_tests = n_tests,
        perm_numbers = perm_numbers,
        n_metabolites_test = n_metabolites_test,
        max_trials = max_trials,
        
        color_plot_ = color_plot_,
        choice_color_ = choice_color_,
        pq1_threshold_ = pq1_threshold_,
        log_p_threshold_ = log_p_threshold_,
        vip_threshold_ = vip_threshold_,
        univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = univ_test_normality_pvalthresh,
        
        allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
        allComp = allComp,
        removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
        RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
        NormIS = NormIS,
        SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
        RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
        JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
        RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
        RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
        filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
        norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
        CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy,
        RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
        prev_thresh_ = prev_thresh_,
        RelAb_thresh_ = RelAb_thresh_,
        Size = Size,
        mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
        rename_metabo = rename_metabo,
        allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
        allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy,
        chosen_gene = chosen_gene,
        
        Error_OP = Error_OP,
        check_path = check_path
      )
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(paste0("\n✗ ERREUR pour ", combo_key, ": ", e$message, "\n"))
      failed_combinations[[combo_key]] <<- e$message
      return(NULL)
    })
    
    end_time_combo <- Sys.time()
    elapsed_combo <- difftime(end_time_combo, start_time_combo, units = "mins")
    
    if(!is.null(stability_result)) {
      
      # Store results
      all_results[[combo_key]] <- stability_result
      
      # Extract comparison data
      comparison_data[[combo_key]] <- stability_result$summary_by_nperm %>%
        mutate(
          Compartment = current_comp,
          Response = current_resp,
          Combination = combo_key
        ) %>%
        relocate(Compartment, Response, Combination)
      
      cat(paste0("\nCombinaison ", combo_key, " terminée en ", 
                 round(elapsed_combo, 1), " minutes\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Recommandation : ", stability_result$recommendation$n_perm, " permutations\n"))
      
      # Save individual results if requested
      if(save_individual_results) {
        individual_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "Individual_Results")
        dir.create(individual_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
        
        # Save RDS
        saveRDS(stability_result, 
                file.path(individual_dir, paste0("Stability_", combo_key, ".rds")))
        
        # Save summary
        write_xlsx(list(
          Summary = stability_result$summary_by_nperm,
          Recommendation = data.frame(
            n_perm = stability_result$recommendation$n_perm,
            text = stability_result$recommendation$text
          )
        ), file.path(individual_dir, paste0("Stability_", combo_key, ".xlsx")))
      }
      
    } else {
      cat(paste0("\n✗ Combinaison ", combo_key, " a échoué\n"))
    }
    
    # Progress update
    remaining <- n_combinations - i
    avg_time <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time_total, units = "mins") / i
    estimated_remaining <- remaining * avg_time
    
    cat(paste0("\n⏱️  Progression : ", i, "/", n_combinations, " (", 
               round(100 * i / n_combinations, 1), "%)\n"))
    cat(paste0("   Temps restant estimé : ~", round(estimated_remaining, 1), " minutes\n"))
  }
  
  # POST-PROCESSING #
  cat("COMPILATION DES RÉSULTATS\n")
  
  if(length(all_results) == 0) {
    stop("ERREUR : Aucune combinaison n'a réussi. Vérifiez les paramètres et les données.")
  }
  
  # Combine all comparison data
  comparison_table <- bind_rows(comparison_data)
  
  # Create optimal summary table
  optimal_summary <- comparison_table %>%
    group_by(Compartment, Response) %>%
    filter(median_cv_pval < 0.5, mean_direction_consistency > 0.8) %>%
    arrange(n_perm) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(Compartment, Response, 
           Optimal_n_perm = n_perm,
           CV_median = median_cv_pval,
           CV_mean = mean_cv_pval,
           Direction_consistency = mean_direction_consistency,
           Stable_metabolites = n_stable_metabolites)
  
  # If some combinations don't reach stability
  missing_combos <- combinations %>%
    anti_join(optimal_summary, by = c("Compartment", "Response"))
  
  if(nrow(missing_combos) > 0) {
    cat("\nATTENTION : Les combinaisons suivantes n'atteignent pas les critères de stabilité :\n")
    print(missing_combos)
    
    # Add them with max tested n_perm and warning
    for(i in 1:nrow(missing_combos)) {
      comp <- missing_combos$Compartment[i]
      resp <- missing_combos$Response[i]
      combo_key <- paste0(comp, "_", resp)
      
      if(combo_key %in% names(all_results)) {
        max_nperm_data <- all_results[[combo_key]]$summary_by_nperm %>%
          arrange(desc(n_perm)) %>%
          slice(1)
        
        optimal_summary <- bind_rows(
          optimal_summary,
          data.frame(
            Compartment = comp,
            Response = resp,
            Optimal_n_perm = max_nperm_data$n_perm,
            CV_median = max_nperm_data$median_cv_pval,
            CV_mean = max_nperm_data$mean_cv_pval,
            Direction_consistency = max_nperm_data$mean_direction_consistency,
            Stable_metabolites = max_nperm_data$n_stable_metabolites,
            Warning = "Instable même au max"
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  cat("\n RÉSUMÉ DES RECOMMANDATIONS \n")
  print(optimal_summary)
  
  # COMPARATIVE VISUALIZATIONS #
  
  cat("\n\n CRÉATION DES VISUALISATIONS COMPARATIVES \n")
  
  # Plot 1: Heatmap of optimal n_perm by compartment x response
  plot_heatmap_optimal <- ggplot(optimal_summary, 
                                 aes(x = Response, y = Compartment, fill = Optimal_n_perm)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_text(aes(label = Optimal_n_perm), size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "green", mid = "yellow", high = "red",
                        midpoint = median(perm_numbers),
                        name = "N permutations\noptimal") +
    labs(title = "Nombre de permutations optimal par condition",
         subtitle = "Plus vert = moins de permutations nécessaires",
         x = "Variable de réponse",
         y = "Compartiment") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  # Plot 2: CV median comparison
  plot_cv_comparison <- ggplot(comparison_table, 
                               aes(x = factor(n_perm), y = median_cv_pval, 
                                   color = Compartment, group = Combination)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~ Response, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
    labs(title = "Évolution de la stabilité selon le nombre de permutations",
         subtitle = "Ligne rouge = seuil de stabilité (CV = 0.5)",
         x = "Nombre de permutations",
         y = "CV médian des p-values",
         color = "Compartiment") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  # Plot 3: Direction consistency
  plot_direction_comparison <- ggplot(comparison_table,
                                     aes(x = factor(n_perm), y = mean_direction_consistency,
                                         color = Compartment, group = Combination)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~ Response, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(title = "Cohérence de direction selon le nombre de permutations",
         subtitle = "Ligne rouge = seuil acceptable (80%)",
         x = "Nombre de permutations",
         y = "Cohérence de direction (proportion)",
         color = "Compartiment") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  # Plot 4: Stable metabolites count
  plot_stable_count <- ggplot(comparison_table,
                             aes(x = factor(n_perm), y = n_stable_metabolites,
                                 color = Compartment, group = Combination)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    facet_wrap(~ Response, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
    labs(title = "Nombre de métabolites stables",
         subtitle = "Métabolites avec CV < 0.5",
         x = "Nombre de permutations",
         y = "Nombre de métabolites stables",
         color = "Compartiment") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  # Plot 5: Barplot of recommendations
  plot_recommendations <- ggplot(optimal_summary,
                                aes(x = Compartment, y = Optimal_n_perm, fill = Response)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = Optimal_n_perm), 
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), 
             vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    labs(title = "Recommandations finales par condition",
         subtitle = "Nombre de permutations optimal",
         x = "Compartiment",
         y = "Nombre de permutations recommandé",
         fill = "Réponse") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  # Combined overview plot
  combined_overview <- (plot_heatmap_optimal | plot_recommendations) /
                       (plot_cv_comparison) /
                       (plot_direction_comparison)
  
  # SAVE RESULTS
  
  cat("\n SAUVEGARDE DES RÉSULTATS \n")
  
  # Save plots
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Heatmap_Optimal.png"),
         plot = plot_heatmap_optimal,
         width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("Heatmap sauvegardée\n")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_CV_Comparison.png"),
         plot = plot_cv_comparison,
         width = 14, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("Comparaison CV sauvegardée\n")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Direction_Comparison.png"),
         plot = plot_direction_comparison,
         width = 14, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("Comparaison direction sauvegardée\n")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Stable_Count.png"),
         plot = plot_stable_count,
         width = 14, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("Compte des métabolites stables sauvegardé\n")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Recommendations.png"),
         plot = plot_recommendations,
         width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("Recommandations sauvegardées\n")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Overview.png"),
         plot = combined_overview,
         width = 18, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("Vue d'ensemble sauvegardée\n")
  
  # Save tables
  write_xlsx(list(
    Optimal_Summary = optimal_summary,
    Full_Comparison = comparison_table,
    Combinations_Tested = combinations,
    Failed_Combinations = if(length(failed_combinations) > 0) {
      data.frame(
        Combination = names(failed_combinations),
        Error = unlist(failed_combinations)
      )
    } else {
      data.frame(Message = "All combinations succeeded")
    }
  ), file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Stability_Results.xlsx"))
  cat("Tableaux Excel sauvegardés\n")
  
  # Save full results as RDS
  saveRDS(list(
    all_results = all_results,
    comparison_table = comparison_table,
    optimal_summary = optimal_summary,
    plots = list(
      heatmap = plot_heatmap_optimal,
      cv_comparison = plot_cv_comparison,
      direction = plot_direction_comparison,
      stable_count = plot_stable_count,
      recommendations = plot_recommendations,
      overview = combined_overview
    )
  ), file.path(output_dir, "Comprehensive_Stability_Complete.rds"))
  cat("Résultats complets sauvegardés (RDS)\n")
  
  # SUMMARY REPORT #
  
  end_time_total <- Sys.time()
  total_elapsed <- difftime(end_time_total, start_time_total, units = "mins")
  
  cat("RAPPORT FINAL\n")
  
  cat(paste0("Combinaisons testées : ", n_combinations, "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Réussies : ", length(all_results), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Échouées : ", length(failed_combinations), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("\nTemps total : ", round(total_elapsed, 1), " minutes (", 
             round(total_elapsed / 60, 2), " heures)\n"))
  cat(paste0("Temps moyen par combinaison : ", 
             round(total_elapsed / n_combinations, 1), " minutes\n\n"))
  
  cat("RECOMMANDATIONS PAR CONDITION \n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(optimal_summary)) {
    cat(paste0(optimal_summary$Compartment[i], optimal_summary$Response[i], ":\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Utiliser ", optimal_summary$Optimal_n_perm[i], " permutations\n"))
    cat(paste0("  CV médian : ", round(optimal_summary$CV_median[i], 3), "\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Direction : ", round(optimal_summary$Direction_consistency[i] * 100, 1), "%\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Métabolites stables : ", optimal_summary$Stable_metabolites[i], "\n\n"))
  }
  
  cat(paste0("\nRésultats sauvegardés dans :\n", output_dir, "\n\n"))
  
  # RETURN #
  
  return(invisible(list(
    all_results = all_results,
    comparison_table = comparison_table,
    optimal_summary = optimal_summary,
    recommendations = setNames(
      optimal_summary$Optimal_n_perm,
      paste0(optimal_summary$Compartment, "_", optimal_summary$Response)
    ),
    plots = list(
      heatmap_optimal = plot_heatmap_optimal,
      cv_comparison = plot_cv_comparison,
      direction_comparison = plot_direction_comparison,
      stable_count = plot_stable_count,
      recommendations = plot_recommendations,
      overview = combined_overview
    ),
    failed_combinations = failed_combinations,
    output_directory = output_dir,
    execution_time_minutes = as.numeric(total_elapsed)
  )))
}
```

```{r OPLS byCompart bySizes chosencolor}
OPLS_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor <- function(Metab_selected_dataset,
                                               analysis = "",
                                               chosen_response,
                                               Metab = "Metabo",
                                               gene_choice = "",
                                               per_comp = TRUE, chosen_compart = c(),
                                               per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                               color_plot,
                                               choice_color,
                                               shape_per = "",
                                               to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
                                               ellipse_per = "",
                                               name_fig = "",
                                               save_fig = choice_save_fig_all,
                                               replicate = "",
                                               ThreeD = FALSE){
  
  # categories for name ####
  if(chosen_response == "Compartment"){Cat <- chosen_compart
  }else if(chosen_response == "Size"){Cat <- chosen_size
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFEP", "HighFEP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "Final_Germ_Percentage"){Cat <- c("LowFGP", "HighFGP")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){Cat <- c("Lowt50germ", "Hight50germ")
  }else if(chosen_response == "t50tot"){Cat <- c("Lowt50tot", "Hight50tot")}
  
  # filter dataset per size and compartment ####
  if(Metab == "Metabo"){
    if(per_comp == TRUE){
      Metab_selected_dataset <- Metab_selected_dataset[
        Metab_selected_dataset$Compartment %in% chosen_compart, ]
    }
    if(per_size == TRUE){
      Metab_selected_dataset <- Metab_selected_dataset[
        Metab_selected_dataset$Size == chosen_size, ]
    }
  }
  
  # remove non-metabolite columns and build OPLS input ####
  if(Metab == "Metabo"){
    metadata_columns <- c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Germ_Percentage",
                          "Final_Em_Percentage","Size","Replicate","Compartment",
                          "Weight","Sample","Labels")
    Metab_columns_OPLS <- setdiff(colnames(Metab_selected_dataset), metadata_columns)
    Metab_selected_OPLS <- Metab_selected_dataset[, c("Sample", chosen_response,
                                                       Metab_columns_OPLS)]
    rownames(Metab_selected_OPLS) <- Metab_selected_OPLS$Sample
    Metab_selected_OPLS$Sample    <- NULL
    Metab_selected_OPLS           <- Metab_selected_OPLS %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
  }
  
  if(Metab == "Metabar"){
    metadata_columns <- c("SampleID", "Replicate", "Varieties", "t50germ",
                          "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage", "Labels")
    Metab_columns_OPLS <- setdiff(colnames(Metab_selected_dataset), metadata_columns)
    Metab_selected_OPLS <- Metab_selected_dataset[, c("Sample", chosen_response,
                                                       Metab_columns_OPLS)]
    rownames(Metab_selected_OPLS) <- Metab_selected_OPLS$Sample
    Metab_selected_OPLS <- Metab_selected_OPLS[, -1]
    Metab_selected_OPLS <- Metab_selected_OPLS %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
  }
  
  # Convert to numeric matrix safely ####
  sample_names_opls   <- rownames(Metab_selected_OPLS)
  Metab_selected_OPLS <- as.data.frame(apply(Metab_selected_OPLS, 2, as.numeric))
  rownames(Metab_selected_OPLS) <- sample_names_opls
  Metab_selected_OPLS[is.nan(as.matrix(Metab_selected_OPLS))] <- 0
  Metab_selected_OPLS[is.na(Metab_selected_OPLS)]             <- 0
  
  # Filter empty columns safely ####
  cols_nonzero <- colSums(Metab_selected_OPLS != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
  cols_nonzero[is.na(cols_nonzero)] <- FALSE
  Metab_selected_OPLS <- Metab_selected_OPLS[, cols_nonzero, drop = FALSE]
  
  cols_nonzero2 <- colSums(abs(Metab_selected_OPLS), na.rm = TRUE) > 0
  cols_nonzero2[is.na(cols_nonzero2)] <- FALSE
  Metab_selected_OPLS <- Metab_selected_OPLS[, cols_nonzero2, drop = FALSE]
  
  cat("OPLS input:", nrow(Metab_selected_OPLS), "×",
      ncol(Metab_selected_OPLS), "| NA:", anyNA(as.matrix(Metab_selected_OPLS)),
      "| NaN:", any(is.nan(as.matrix(Metab_selected_OPLS))), "\n")
  
  # Split response and predictors ####
  response_col <- which(colnames(Metab_selected_OPLS) == chosen_response)
  if(length(response_col) == 0){
    stop(paste0("Response column '", chosen_response,
                "' not found in OPLS matrix after filtering"))
  }
  response             <- Metab_selected_OPLS[, response_col]
  Metab_selected_OPLS_ <- Metab_selected_OPLS[, -response_col, drop = FALSE]
  
  # OPLS ####
  opls_model <- opls(Metab_selected_OPLS_,
                     y = response,
                     predI = 1,
                     orthoI = NA,
                     log10L = FALSE,
                     permI = 1000,
                     fig.pdfC = FALSE)
  plot(opls_model)
  
  if(identical(opls_model@vipVn, numeric(0))){
    return("no OPLS model")
  }
  
  # Extract statistics ####
  t1_percentage <- opls_model@modelDF$R2X[1] * 100
  t2_percentage <- opls_model@modelDF$R2Y[1] * 100
  R2X           <- opls_model@summaryDF$R2X[1]
  R2Y           <- opls_model@summaryDF$R2Y[1]
  Q2Y           <- opls_model@summaryDF$Q2[1]
  RMSEE         <- opls_model@summaryDF$RMSEE[1]
  pq1_values    <- opls_model@loadingMN[, 1]
  
  # Save model quality
  model_quality <- data.frame(
    Compartment = chosen_compart,
    Response = chosen_response,
    Replicate = replicate,
    R2X = R2X,
    R2Y = R2Y,
    Q2Y = Q2Y,
    RMSEE = RMSEE
  )
  write_xlsx(model_quality,
             path = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab,
                           "/OPLS_ModelQuality_", Metab, "_per",
                           chosen_response, "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                           name_fig, chosen_compart, "_",
                           as.character(replicate), ".xlsx"))
  
  # Extract scores ####
  predictive_scores <- as.data.frame(opls_model@scoreMN)
  orthogonal_scores <- as.data.frame(opls_model@orthoScoreMN)
  scores <- cbind(predictive_scores, orthogonal_scores)
  if(ThreeD == TRUE){
    colnames(scores) <- c("t1", "to1", "to2", colnames(scores)[-c(1:3)])
  } else {
    colnames(scores) <- c("Predictive Component", "Orthogonal Component",
                          colnames(scores)[-c(1:2)])
  }
  
  # Add metadata aligned by Sample name ####
  metadata_for_scores <- Metab_selected_dataset[
    Metab_selected_dataset$Sample %in% rownames(scores),
    names(Metab_selected_dataset) %in%
      c("Varieties", "Final_Germ_Percentage", "Final_Em_Percentage",
        "Size", "Replicate", "Compartment", "Sample")
  ]
  metadata_for_scores <- metadata_for_scores[
    match(rownames(scores), metadata_for_scores$Sample), ]
  scores_model <- cbind(metadata_for_scores, scores)
  
  # Extract VIP and pq1 ####
  Metab_OPLS_VIP <- opls_model@vipVn
  if(ThreeD == TRUE){
    Metab_OPLS_VIP_loadings <- data.frame(
      Metabs = names(Metab_OPLS_VIP),
      VIP = Metab_OPLS_VIP,
      orthoVIP = opls_model@orthoVipVn,
      pq1 = pq1_values,
      orthopq1 = opls_model@orthoLoadingMN)
  } else {
    Metab_OPLS_VIP_loadings <- data.frame(
      Metabs = names(Metab_OPLS_VIP),
      VIP = Metab_OPLS_VIP,
      pq1 = pq1_values)
  }
  
  # Save VIP & pq1 ####
  write_xlsx(x = as.data.frame(Metab_OPLS_VIP_loadings),
             path = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/OPLS_VIP_Loadings_", Metab, "_",
                           "per", as.character(chosen_response), "_",
                           Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                           name_fig,
                           ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                                  chosen_compart,
                                  paste0("_", gene_choice)),
                           "_", as.character(replicate), ".xlsx"))
  
  # Reorder Varieties for legend ####
  if(choice_color == "FEP"){
    scores_model <- scores_model %>%
      dplyr::arrange(factor(Varieties,
                            levels = GermEmerg_Emerg_stat[order(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat$Final_Em_Percentage),]$Varieties,
                            labels = GermEmerg_Emerg_stat[order(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat$Final_Em_Percentage),]$Varieties))
    scores_model <- scores_model %>%
      reorder_levels(Varieties, order = GermEmerg_Emerg_stat[order(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat$Final_Em_Percentage),]$Varieties)
  }
  if(choice_color == "t50germ"){
    scores_model <- scores_model %>%
      dplyr::arrange(factor(Varieties,
                            levels = GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.Germinated),]$Varieties,
                            labels = GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.Germinated),]$Varieties))
    scores_model <- scores_model %>%
      reorder_levels(Varieties, order = GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.Germinated),]$Varieties)
  }
  if(choice_color == "t50tot"){
    scores_model <- scores_model %>%
      dplyr::arrange(factor(Varieties,
                            levels = GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.total),]$Varieties,
                            labels = GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.total),]$Varieties))
    scores_model <- scores_model %>%
      reorder_levels(Varieties, order = GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat[order(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat$t50.total),]$Varieties)
  }
  
  Metab_OPLS_ <- scores_model
  
  # Labels ####
  if(to_detect_outliers == TRUE & Metab == "Metabo"){
    Metab_OPLS_ <- Metab_OPLS_ %>%
      mutate(Labels = str_c(str_sub(Varieties, start = 1, end = 3), "_T", Size, "_", Replicate))
  } else if(to_detect_outliers == TRUE & Metab == "Metabar"){
    Metab_OPLS_ <- Metab_OPLS_ %>%
      mutate(Labels = str_c(str_sub(Varieties, start = 1, end = 3), "_", Replicate))
  } else {
    Metab_OPLS_$Labels <- NA
  }
  Metab_OPLS_$Labels <- as.character(Metab_OPLS_$Labels)
  
  # Plot OPLS ####
  color_mapping   <- if(color_plot == "byComp") {"Compartment"
                     } else if(color_plot == "byVar") {"Varieties"} else {NULL}
  fill_mapping    <- color_mapping
  shape_mapping   <- if(shape_per == "Compartment") {"Compartment"
                     } else if(shape_per == "Size") {Size} else {NULL}
  ellipse_mapping <- if(ellipse_per == "Compartment") {"Compartment"
                     } else if(ellipse_per == "Size") {Size} else {NULL}
  label_mapping   <- if(to_detect_outliers == TRUE) {"Labels"} else {NULL}
  
  if(ThreeD == TRUE){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- ggplot(Metab_OPLS_, aes(x = t1, y = to1, z = to2))
  } else {
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- ggplot(Metab_OPLS_,
                             aes(x = `Predictive Component`, y = `Orthogonal Component`))
  }
  if(!is.null(color_mapping)){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS + aes(color = !!sym(color_mapping))}
  if(!is.null(fill_mapping)){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS + aes(fill = !!sym(fill_mapping))}
  if(!is.null(shape_mapping)){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS + aes(shape = !!sym(shape_mapping))}
  if(!is.null(label_mapping)){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS + aes(label = !!sym(label_mapping))}
  
  Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
    geom_point(alpha = ifelse(shape_per == "", 0.5, 1)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("OPLS score plot, ",
                   ifelse(per_comp == TRUE,
                          ifelse(length(chosen_compart) == 1, chosen_compart,
                                 paste0(chosen_compart, collapse = "_vs_")),
                          "all compartments"),
                   " ",
                   ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0(", size ", chosen_size), "all size"))) +
    xlab(paste0("Component1, ", round(t1_percentage, digits = 0), "%")) +
    ylab("Orthogonal Component") +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    custom_theme +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    ggplot2::annotate("text",
                      x = max(scores_model$`Predictive Component`),
                      y = min(scores_model$`Orthogonal Component`) + 5,
                      label = paste0("R2X: ", round(R2X, 2), "  ",
                                     "R2Y: ", round(R2Y, 2), "\n",
                                     "Q2Y: ", round(Q2Y, 2), "  ",
                                     "RMSEE: ", round(RMSEE, 2)),
                      hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1,
                      size = 4, color = "black", position = "identity")
  
  if(!is.null(ellipse_mapping)){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
      stat_ellipse(aes(group = !!sym(ellipse_mapping)), data = Metab_OPLS_)}
  if(color_plot == "byComp"){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange",
                                    "Plumule" = "lightgreen", "Exudate" = "lightblue"))
  } else if(color_plot == "byVar"){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color) +
      scale_color_manual(values = color)}
  if(shape_per == "Size"){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
      scale_shape_manual(values = c("1" = 1, "2" = 10, "3" = 16))
  } else if(shape_per == "Compartment"){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
      scale_shape_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = 1, "Plumule" = 2,
                                    "HRaxis" = 3, "Exudate" = 0))
  } else if(shape_per == ""){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS + guides(shape = "none")}
  if(to_detect_outliers == TRUE){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS <- Metab_Fig_OPLS +
      geom_text_repel(aes(label = Labels), show.legend = FALSE, max.iter = 10000)}
  
  print(Metab_Fig_OPLS)
  
  # 3D plot ####
  if(ThreeD == TRUE){
    Metab_Fig_OPLS_3D <- plot_ly(Metab_OPLS_,
                                 x = ~t1, y = ~to1, z = ~to2,
                                 color = ~Compartment,
                                 text = ~paste("Sample:", rownames(Metab_OPLS_),
                                               "<br>t1:", round(t1, 2),
                                               "<br>to1:", round(to1, 2),
                                               "<br>to2:", round(to2, 2)),
                                 hoverinfo = "text",
                                 type = "scatter3d", mode = "markers")
    print(Metab_Fig_OPLS_3D)
  }
  
  # Save ####
  if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
    ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "/", Metab, "/Fig_OPLS_", "_",
                  "per", chosen_response, "_", Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
                  ifelse(per_size == TRUE, paste0("S", chosen_size), "allSizes"),
                  ifelse(per_comp == TRUE & chosen_response != "Compartment",
                         paste0("_", chosen_compart), "allcomparts"),
                  "_", color_plot,
                  ifelse(color_plot == "byVar", paste0("_", choice_color), ""),
                  "_", replicate, name_fig, "_",
                  ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                         paste(analysis, collapse = "_"),
                         paste0("", gene_choice)),
                  "_", as.character(replicate), ".png"),
           plot = Metab_Fig_OPLS)
  }
  
  return(Metab_Fig_OPLS)
}
```
```{r Plot_OPLS_and_Volcano_for_n_permutations}
## ANALYSIS PARAMETERS
# Metab = Metabo or Metabar
# Comparison : "CompartCompar": compartment comparison in pairs, "perCompart" : each compartment is analysed separately.
# chosen_response : if Metab== Metabo, chosen_response is selected among "Compartment", "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage" #"Final_Germ_Percentage", "Size"
#                   if Metab=="Metabar", chosen_response is selected among "t50germ","t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage" #"Final_Germ_Percentage"
# nb_permutations : for t50germ, t50tot, and Final_Em_Percentage, analyses are based on permutations of germination and emergence assays results among the metabolites or metabarcoding samples of same Varieties. nb_permutations sets the number of such permutations to test. Volcano is then drawn on mean values.
# use_frequency : (default TRUE): if TRUE, the significance of the association between each metabolite and the variable (chosen_response) will be estimated from the frequency of significance of OPLS pq1 and univariate tests p-values on the various permutations. If FALSE, it will be estimated based on the mean OPLS pq1 and univariate tests p-values.
## DISPLAY PARAMETERS
# color_plot_: color graph according to Compartments ("byComp") or Varieties ("byVar")
# choice_color_: if color_plot="byVar", order in legend and color scale to be attributed to Varieties according to "FEP", "FGP", "t50germ", "t50tot", or other seed attribute. see setup Color choice.
## SAVE
# save_fig_indiv : boolean. save individual OPLS and volcano plots.
# save_fig_final : boolean. save final ggarrange figure.
## SIGNIFICANCE PARAMETERS (THRESHOLDS)
## DATASET CHOICE
# gene_choice = if Metab = "Metabar", name of the marker of provided dataset ("gyrB" or "ITS").
# prev_thresh : if Metab=="Metabar", select only taxa with prevalence > threshold
# RelAb_thresh : if Metab=="Metabar", select only taxa with total relative abundance across samples at least > threshold
# ChosenCompartsVect : if Metab=="Metabo", vector of the chosen compartments to analyse (ie to subset the dataset to)

## INTERNAL PARAMETERS
# per_comp: plot only chosen compartment, 
# chosen_compart: if Metab = Metabo, chosen_compart is selected among "Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis" and pair comparisons ("CotyledonvsPlumule",…). If Metab = Metabar, chosen_compart is affected to gene_choice.
# per_size: plot only chosen seed size, if chosen_size is selected (among "1","2","3")
# shape_per: shape the dot according to seed size ("Size") or compartment ("Compartment")
# to_detect_outliers: if TRUE, will add labels to dots


Plot_OPLS_and_Volcano_for_n_permutations <- function(
    # analysis parameters
    Comparison = "perCompart", #if Metab=="Metabo", {"CompartCompar", "perCompart"}. if Metab=="Metabar", {"perCompart"}
    chosen_response, #"Compartment", "Final_Em_Percentage", "t50germ", "t50tot"
    nb_permutations,
    use_frequency = TRUE,
    # display parameters
    color_plot_ , #"byComp",
    choice_color_,
    save_fig_indiv = choice_save_fig_all,
    save_fig_final = choice_save_fig_article,
    label_plot = TRUE,
    show_error_bars = FALSE,
    # significance parameters
    pq1_threshold_ = 0.05,
    log_p_threshold_ = -log10(0.05),
    vip_threshold_ = 1,
    univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = 0.05,
    max_trials = 30,
    display_sign = FALSE,
    # dataset parameters
    Metab, #"Metabo", "Metabar"
    allCompandExudats = FALSE,
    allComp = TRUE,
    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
    NormIS = TRUE,
    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
    RemoveQC = TRUE,
    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
    CenteredAndScaledBy, # allComp OR perComp
    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
    allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = FALSE,
    allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = FALSE,
    prev_thresh = 0, #if Metab=="Metabar", select only taxa with prevalence > threshold
    RelAb_thresh = 0, #if Metab=="Metabar", select only taxa with total relative abundance across samples at least > threshold
    Size = "All",
    mean_duplicate = FALSE,
    rename_metabo = FALSE,
    ChosenCompartsVect = c(),  # if Metab=="Metabar", {"ITS", "gyrB"}, if Metab=="Metabo", c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis", "Exudate")
    chosen_gene = "", # if Metab=="Metabar", {"ITS", "gyrB"}
    # TEST PARAMETERS
    OPLS_UnivTest = TRUE, # FALSE: bypass OPLS step for tests (if already done at least once)
    just_plot_from_VolSign = FALSE, # TRUE: bypass OPLS and UnivTest steps, only draws mean volcano plots
    Error_OP = FALSE # equivalent of verbose to test the function
    ){
  if(verbose == TRUE){print("enter_function")}
  # Per Compartment Comparison (by t50germ, "t50tot", or Final_Em_Percentage)#not Size nor FGP yet! ####
  if (Comparison == "perCompart" & chosen_response %in% c("Final_Em_Percentage", "t50germ", "t50tot")){
    if(verbose == TRUE){print("Comparison per Compartments ")}
    # color and compartments for loop ####
    if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){
      color <- color_by_emergence
      choice_color <- "FEP"
    }else if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){
      color <- color_by_germination_kin
      choice_color <- "t50germ"
    }else if(chosen_response == "t50tot"){
      color <- color_by_germination_kin_tot
      choice_color <- "t50tot"}
    if(Metab == "Metabo" & length(ChosenCompartsVect) == 0){
        ChosenCompartsVect <- c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis", "Exudate")
    }else if(Metab == "Metabar" & length(ChosenCompartsVect) == 0) {ChosenCompartsVect <- chosen_gene}
    
    # OPLS & UnivTest ####
    # OPLS & UnivTest ####
    for (chosen_comparts in ChosenCompartsVect){
      all_perms = data.frame()
      print(paste0("_______________________________________________________________________________", chosen_comparts))
      succ_perm = 0
      trials = 1
      
      if(just_plot_from_VolSign == FALSE){
        if(OPLS_UnivTest == TRUE){
          
          while(succ_perm < nb_permutations && trials <= max_trials){
            opls_succeeded <- FALSE
            
            if(verbose == TRUE){
          print(paste0("Trial ", trials, ", ", succ_perm,
                       " successful succ_perm(s) "))}
          result <- tryCatch({
  
  # Load dataset ####
  if(Metab == "Metabo"){
    cat("Starting Select_Metabo_dataframe for trial", trials, "\n")
    Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
      allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
      allComp = allComp,
      removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
      RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
      NormIS = NormIS,
      SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
      RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
      JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
      RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
      RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
      filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
      norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
      CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy,
      RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
      allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
      allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy,
      prev_thresh_ = prev_thresh,
      RelAb_thresh_ = RelAb_thresh,
      Size = Size,
      mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
      rename_metabo = rename_metabo
    )
    analysis                     <- Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS[[1]]
    name_fig_dataset             <- paste(analysis[(length(analysis)-2):length(analysis)],
                                          collapse = "_")
    Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS <- Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS[[2]]
    per_comp  <- TRUE
    shape_per <- "Compartment"
  }
  
  if(Error_OP == TRUE){
    print(paste0("Loaded dataset for trial ", trials, ". ",
                 (succ_perm-1), " successful succ_perms."))}
  
  # OPLS ####
  opls_result <- withCallingHandlers({
    fig <- OPLS_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor(
      per_comp = per_comp,
      chosen_compart = chosen_comparts,
      per_size = FALSE,
      chosen_size = 0,
      color_plot = color_plot_,
      choice_color = choice_color,
      Metab_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS,
      to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
      shape_per = shape_per,
      save_fig = save_fig_indiv,
      name_fig = name_fig_dataset,
      chosen_response = chosen_response,
      ellipse_per = "",
      replicate = succ_perm + 1,
      Metab = Metab,
      gene_choice = chosen_gene,
      analysis = name_fig_dataset
    )
    fig  # return figure as value of withCallingHandlers
  }) # end withCallingHandlers
  
  # Check result and update counters — plain <- reaches while loop scope ####
  if(inherits(opls_result, "gg")){
    
    succ_perm      <- succ_perm + 1
    opls_succeeded <- TRUE
    
    if(Error_OP == TRUE){
      print(paste0("done OPLS of trial ", trials, ". ", succ_perm,
                   " successful succ_perm(s)"))}
    
    # Save OPLS figure for ggarrange — <<- needed to reach function scope ####
    if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){
      if(chosen_comparts == "Cotyledon"){
        Metabo_Fig_OPLS_FEP_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <<- opls_result}
      if(chosen_comparts == "HRaxis"){
        Metabo_Fig_OPLS_FEP_compart_HRaxis_allSize <<- opls_result}
      if(chosen_comparts == "Plumule"){
        Metabo_Fig_OPLS_FEP_compart_Plumule_allSize <<- opls_result}
    }
    if(chosen_response == "t50germ" | chosen_response == "t50tot"){
      if(chosen_comparts == "Cotyledon"){
        Metabo_Fig_OPLS_t50_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <<- opls_result}
      if(chosen_comparts == "HRaxis"){
        Metabo_Fig_OPLS_t50_compart_HRaxis_allSize <<- opls_result}
      if(chosen_comparts == "Plumule"){
        Metabo_Fig_OPLS_t50_compart_Plumule_allSize <<- opls_result}
    }
    if(verbose == TRUE){print("saved OPLS plot")}
    
    # Update all_perms ####
    tryCatch({
      new_perm_col <- Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS[,
        colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset_OPLS) %in%
          c("Sample", chosen_response), drop = FALSE]
      if(ncol(all_perms) == 0){
        all_perms <- new_perm_col[, c("Sample", chosen_response)]
        colnames(all_perms)[colnames(all_perms) == chosen_response] <-
          paste0(chosen_response, "_Perm1")
      } else {
        new_col_name <- paste0(chosen_response, "_Perm", ncol(all_perms))  # this stays correct
        colnames(new_perm_col)[colnames(new_perm_col) == chosen_response] <- new_col_name
        all_perms <- left_join(all_perms, new_perm_col, by = "Sample")
      }
      cat("all_perms updated:", ncol(all_perms) - 1, "permutations stored\n")
    }, error = function(e){
      cat("all_perms update FAILED:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
    
  } else if(identical(opls_result, "no OPLS model")){
    cat("Trial", trials, ": OPLS returned no model\n")
  } else {
    cat("Trial", trials, ": OPLS returned unexpected result:", class(opls_result), "\n")
  }
  
}, error = function(e){
  # Error handler ####
  message(paste0("Error: ", conditionMessage(e)))
  if(grepl("objet 'Metab_Fig_response_compart' introuvable", conditionMessage(e))){
    trials <<- trials + 1
    if(Error_OP == TRUE){
      print(paste0("NO OPLS for trial ", trials-1, ". ",
                   succ_perm-1, " successful succ_perms."))}
    return(NULL)
  } else {
    message(paste0("Unspecific error: ", conditionMessage(e)))
  }
}) # end tryCatch

if(verbose == TRUE){
  print(paste0("Finished permutation trial ", trials, ". ",
               succ_perm, " successful succ_perm(s) "))}
trials <- trials + 1
            
          } # end while
          
          if(succ_perm == 0){
            print(paste0("No OPLS model was successfully built for ",
                         chosen_comparts, " - ", chosen_response))
            next
          } else if(succ_perm < nb_permutations){
            print(paste0("Completed ", succ_perm, " successful permutations out of ",
                         nb_permutations))
          }
          
          # Rename all_perms columns and save ####
          # Columns are already named _Perm1, _Perm2 etc from the loop
          # Just verify and save
          cat("Final all_perms dimensions:", nrow(all_perms), "×", ncol(all_perms), "\n")
          cat("Column names:", paste(colnames(all_perms), collapse = ", "), "\n")
          
          all_perms <- as.data.frame(all_perms)
          write_xlsx(x = all_perms,
                     path = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/allPermutations",
                                   chosen_response, "_", chosen_comparts, ".xlsx"))
          
        } # end OPLS_UnivTest
        
        if(OPLS_UnivTest == FALSE){
          all_perms <- read.xlsx(
            xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/allPermutations",
                              chosen_response, "_", chosen_comparts, ".xlsx"),
            sheet = 1, colNames = TRUE, rowNames = FALSE)
        }
        
        # Univariate Tests ####
        trials = 1
        for(perm in c(1:(ncol(all_perms)-1))){
          print(paste0("start Univariate test for permutation n°", perm))
          if(Metab == "Metabo"){
            Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
              allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
              allComp = allComp,
              removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
              RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
              NormIS = NormIS,
              SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
              RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
              JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
              RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
              RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
              filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
              norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
              CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy,
              RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
              allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
              allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy,
              prev_thresh_ = prev_thresh,
              RelAb_thresh_ = RelAb_thresh,
              Size = Size,
              mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
              rename_metabo = rename_metabo)
            analysis = Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest[[1]]
            Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest <- Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest[[2]]
            if(verbose == TRUE){print("permutate datasets for UnivTest")}
            name_fig_dataset <- paste(analysis[(length(analysis)-2):length(analysis)],
                                      collapse = "_")
            name_fig_test <- paste0("per", chosen_response, "_",
                                    chosen_comparts, "_", as.character(perm),
                                    name_fig_dataset)
          }
          
          # Correct response permutation ####
          Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest <- Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest %>%
            select(-all_of(chosen_response))
          perm_col_name <- paste0(chosen_response, "_Perm", perm)
          Perm <- all_perms[, c("Sample", perm_col_name), drop = FALSE]
          names(Perm) <- c("Sample", chosen_response)
          Perm$Sample <- as.character(Perm$Sample)  # ensure character type
          Perm[, 2]   <- as.numeric(Perm[, 2])
          Perm[, 2]   <- as.numeric(Perm[, 2])
          Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest <- right_join(
            Perm, Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest, by = "Sample")
          if(Error_OP == TRUE){
            print(head(Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest[, 1:10]))}
          
          # Univariate test ####
          Robust_Univariate_test(
            Metab_selected_dataset = Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest,
            per_comp = TRUE,
            chosen_compart = chosen_comparts,
            per_size = FALSE,
            chosen_size = 0,
            chosen_response = chosen_response,
            name_fig = name_fig_dataset,
            replicate = perm,
            display_all = FALSE,
            display_sign = display_sign,
            p_value_threshold = univ_test_normality_pvalthresh,
            name_fig_test = name_fig_test,
            Metab = Metab,
            gene_choice = chosen_gene,
            Error_OP = Error_OP,
            detect_outliers = TRUE)
          
          if(Error_OP == TRUE){
            print(paste0("Univariate test done on permutation ", perm, "."))}
          
        } # end univariate for loop
        } else {
        # just_plot_from_VolSign == TRUE branch
        all_perms <- read.xlsx(
          xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, Metab, "/allPermutations",
                            chosen_response, "_", chosen_comparts, ".xlsx"),
          sheet = 1, colNames = TRUE, rowNames = FALSE)
        if(Metab == "Metabo"){
          Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
            allCompandExudats = allCompandExudats,
            allComp = allComp,
            removemachinesignal = removemachinesignal,
            RemovedXylOutliers = RemovedXylOutliers,
            NormIS = NormIS,
            SortandTranspose = SortandTranspose,
            RemoveCheckedFragments = RemoveCheckedFragments,
            JoinedallComp = JoinedallComp,
            RemoveAlcans = RemoveAlcans,
            RemoveQC = RemoveQC,
            filterSamplebySeedWeight = filterSamplebySeedWeight,
            norm_seed_weight_ = norm_seed_weight_,
            CenteredAndScaledBy = CenteredAndScaledBy,
            RemovePCAOutliers = RemovePCAOutliers,
            allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = allCompandExudats_RenameMetab,
            allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy,
            prev_thresh_ = prev_thresh,
            RelAb_thresh_ = RelAb_thresh,
            Size = Size,
            mean_duplicate = mean_duplicate,
            rename_metabo = rename_metabo)
          analysis <- Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest[[1]]
          rm(Metab_selected_dataset_UnivTest)
          name_fig_dataset <- paste(analysis[(length(analysis)-2):length(analysis)],
                                    collapse = "_")
        }
      }
      
      # Mean Volcano for this compartment ####
      meanVolcanoplot <- Volcano_plot(
        show_error_bars = show_error_bars,
        Metab = Metab,
        per_comp = TRUE,
        chosen_compart = chosen_comparts,
        per_size = FALSE,
        chosen_size = 0,
        chosen_response = chosen_response,
        replicates = (ncol(all_perms)-1),
        pq1_threshold = pq1_threshold_,
        log_p_threshold = log_p_threshold_,
        vip_threshold = vip_threshold_,
        color_plot = color_plot_,
        choice_color = choice_color_,
        save_fig = save_fig_indiv,
        label_plot = label_plot,
        name_fig = name_fig_dataset,
        datatyp = "raw",
        prev_thresh = prev_thresh,
        RelAb_thresh = RelAb_thresh,
        chosen_gene = chosen_gene,
        just_plot_from_VolSign = just_plot_from_VolSign
      )
      
      if(verbose == TRUE){
        print(paste0("done mean Volcano and significant analysis on ",
                     (ncol(all_perms)-1), " permutations"))}
      
      # Save meanVolcanoplot for ggarrange ####
      if(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){
        if(chosen_comparts == "Cotyledon"){
          Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <- meanVolcanoplot
          print(chosen_comparts)}
        if(chosen_comparts == "HRaxis"){
          Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_HRaxis_allSize <- meanVolcanoplot
          print(chosen_comparts)}
        if(chosen_comparts == "Plumule"){
          Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Plumule_allSize <- meanVolcanoplot
          print(chosen_comparts)}
      }
      if(chosen_response == "t50germ"){
        if(chosen_comparts == "Cotyledon"){
          Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <- meanVolcanoplot
          print(chosen_comparts)}
        if(chosen_comparts == "HRaxis"){
          Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_HRaxis_allSize <- meanVolcanoplot
          print(chosen_comparts)}
        if(chosen_comparts == "Plumule"){
          Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Plumule_allSize <- meanVolcanoplot
          print(chosen_comparts)}
      }
      if(verbose == TRUE){print("saved mean volcano plot ")}
      
    } # end for chosen_comparts
    # ggarrange Volcano ####
    # VERSION ENCORE MEILLEURE

# ggarrange Volcano ####
if(Metab == "Metabo" && chosen_response %in% c("Final_Em_Percentage", "t50germ", "t50tot")){
  var_suffix <- ifelse(chosen_response == "Final_Em_Percentage", "FEP", "t50")
  compart_plot_list <- list()
  for(comp in ChosenCompartsVect) {
    # Construire le nom de la variable
    var_name <- paste0("Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_", var_suffix, "_compart_", comp, "_allSize")
    
    # Vérifier si elle existe
    if(exists(var_name, inherits = FALSE)) {
      plot_obj <- get(var_name)
      compart_plot_list[[comp]] <- plot_obj + ggtitle(comp)
    } else {
      if(verbose) {
        cat(paste0("⚠ Plot non trouvé: ", var_name, "\n"))
      }
    }
  }
  # Créer le ggarrange seulement s'il y a des plots
  if(length(compart_plot_list) > 0) {
    if(length(compart_plot_list) == 1) {
      # Si un seul plot, le retourner directement (pas besoin de ggarrange)
      Fig_Volcano_ggarrange <- compart_plot_list[[1]]
    } else {
      # Si plusieurs plots, faire le ggarrange
      Fig_Volcano_ggarrange <- ggarrange(
        plotlist = compart_plot_list,
        ncol = length(compart_plot_list), 
        nrow = 1,
        align = "hv", 
        common.legend = TRUE, 
        legend = "bottom"
      )
    }
  } else {
    # Aucun plot disponible
    Fig_Volcano_ggarrange <- NULL
    warning("Aucun plot volcano disponible pour ", chosen_response)
  }
}
  else if(Metab == "Metabar") {
  Fig_Volcano_ggarrange <- meanVolcanoplot
}

    # save final figure ####
    if(save_fig_final == TRUE){
    ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, Metab,
                  "/Fig_Volcano_ggarrange_",
                  Comparison,
                  "_per", chosen_response, "_",
                  ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
                         paste(analysis,collapse="_"),
                         paste0("_", datatyp, "_PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh,2), "_RelAbThresh", RelAb_thresh, "_Hell")),
                  ".png"), plot = Fig_Volcano_ggarrange, width = 4000, height = 1700, units = "px", dpi = "print")
      #ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, Metab,
      #            "/Fig_Volcano_ggarrange_allCompEx",
      #            Comparison,
      #            "_per", chosen_response, "_",
      #            ifelse(Metab == "Metabo",
      #                   paste(analysis,collapse="_"),
      #                   paste0("_", datatyp, "_PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh,2), "_RelAbThresh", RelAb_thresh, "_Hell")),
      #            ".png"), plot = Fig_Volcano_ggarrange_allEx, width = 4000, height = 1700, units = "px", dpi = "print")
      #     if(verbose == TRUE){print("saved figure volcano ")}
    }
  }
  
  # output ggarrange Volcano ####
  return(Fig_Volcano_ggarrange)
}

```

## 3.1_Spectra processing, Sheet preparation
```{r Create unique sample excel sheet from TraceFinder export, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Excel_path : character. path with name of the excel file (TraceFinder output)
# Reference_sample_num: sheet index (in the excel file) of the sample from which to order metabolites (in decreasing abundance)
# This function does not return anything. It adds two sheets in first and second position of the given excel file,
# containing the table of all samples values of Abundance (resp. relative abundance normalized with Internal Standard) of all analytes.

Create_all_samples_sheet <- function(Excel_path,
                                     Reference_sample_num){
  samples_name <- as.list(readxl::excel_sheets(Excel_path)) # list of sheet names from the excel file
  
  # initiate dataframe with shared metabolites informations
  all_samples_sheet <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = Excel_path,
                            sheet = Reference_sample_num,
                            colNames=TRUE,
                            na.strings = "N/A",
                            sep.names = ".",
                            )
  Cols_of_interest <- c(which(colnames(all_samples_sheet)=="Compound.Name"),
                        which(colnames(all_samples_sheet)=="m/z.(Expected)"),
                        which(colnames(all_samples_sheet)=="RT.(Expected)"),
                        which(colnames(all_samples_sheet)=="Measured.Area"))
  all_samples_sheet <- all_samples_sheet[, Cols_of_interest]
  print(all_samples_sheet)
  
  all_samples_sheet <- all_samples_sheet %>% replace_na(list("Measured.Area" = 100)) # replace NAs
  all_samples_sheet$Measured.Area <- as.numeric(all_samples_sheet$Measured.Area) # reformat
  # sort by decreasing Measured area for this Reference sample for analysis
  all_samples_sheet <- all_samples_sheet[order(dplyr::desc(all_samples_sheet$Measured.Area)),]
  
  # remove the Measured Area column (will be added with all samples Measured Area)
  all_samples_sheet <- all_samples_sheet[, 1:3]
  all_samples_sheet_ratio <- all_samples_sheet # only id columns for now
  
  # create dataframe with all samples Measured Area in named columns
  for (nb_sampl in c(1:length(samples_name))){
    # extract the Measured Area of the ith sample
    ith_sample <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = Excel_path,
                            sheet = nb_sampl,
                            #na = "---", # if NAs are represented by something other than blank cells
                            colNames=TRUE,
                            cols = Cols_of_interest[c(1,4)],
                            na.strings = "N/A",
                            sep.names = ".")
    # replace NaN by small value (1)
    ith_sample <- ith_sample %>% replace_na(list("Measured.Area" = 1))
    # reformat
    ith_sample$Measured.Area <- as.numeric(ith_sample$Measured.Area)
    # rename the Measured Area column with sample name
    names(ith_sample)[names(ith_sample) == "Measured.Area"] <- samples_name[[nb_sampl]]
    # add the column to the final dataframe in matching metabolite order
    all_samples_sheet <- left_join(all_samples_sheet, ith_sample, by= "Compound.Name")
  }
  print(all_samples_sheet) ###
  
  
  # Compute Relative Abundance standardized with Internal Standard (Measured_Area / Measured_Area(Xylitol))
    Xylitol_row <- which(all_samples_sheet$Compound.Name == "Xylitol, 5TMS derivative")
    all_samples_sheet_d <- all_samples_sheet[,4:ncol(all_samples_sheet)]
    all_samples_sheet_ratio <- bind_cols(all_samples_sheet_ratio,
                                         data.frame(lapply(all_samples_sheet_d,
                                                           function(X) X/X[Xylitol_row]))
                                         )
  
  print(all_samples_sheet_ratio) ###
  
  # save both dataframe as separate sheets in the excel file (with openxlsx rather than xlsx relying on Java)
  TraceFinderOut <- loadWorkbook(Excel_path)
  # Add some sheets to the workbook
  addWorksheet(TraceFinderOut, "All_MA_abs")
  addWorksheet(TraceFinderOut, "All_MA_rel_Xylitol")
  # Write the data to the sheets
  writeData(TraceFinderOut, sheet = "All_MA_abs", x= all_samples_sheet)
  writeData(TraceFinderOut, sheet = "All_MA_rel_Xylitol", x= all_samples_sheet_ratio)
  # Reorder worksheets
  worksheetOrder(TraceFinderOut) <- c((length(samples_name)+1),(length(samples_name)+2), 1:length(samples_name))
  # Export the file
  saveWorkbook(TraceFinderOut, Excel_path, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  return(all_samples_sheet_ratio)
}
```
```{r nan value, eval=TRUE}
nan_value = 0
```

```{r raw files path, eval=FALSE}
# list of excel paths
Metabo_list_excel_paths <- c(#Excel_path_and_name_QC_cot = paste0(choice_path_data, "QC_TraceFinder.xlsx"),
                      Excel_path_and_name_Cot = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Graines_Cotyledons_last.xlsx"),
                      #"CotSplitless_TraceFinder.xlsx"),
                      Excel_path_and_name_Embryo = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Graines_HRaxis_last.xlsx"),
                      #"Embryo_Splitless_notcorrected_withQCs.xlsx"),
                      Excel_path_and_name_Leaves = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Graines_Plumule_last.xlsx")
```

```{r run for all seed compartments, eval=FALSE}
for (compartment in c(1:length(Metabo_list_excel_paths))){
  Create_all_samples_sheet(Metabo_list_excel_paths[compartment],
```
