Bug:
 - if you get the error "Workbook has no worksheets", the program hasn't got writing access. Just open your .xlsx file, do a small modification, delete it and save the .xlsx.
 
## 3.2_Data preparation, Samples- and Features- Normalizations _IF NOT YET DONE
Removal of between-batch and within-batch variations and machine drifts
(due to use of different batches of chemicals, vials, GC liners,…)
```{r raw files path, eval = First_metab}
# list of excel paths
Metabo_list_excel_paths <- c(#Excel_path_and_name_QC_cot = paste0(choice_path_data, "QC_TraceFinder.xlsx"),
                      Excel_path_and_name_Cot = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Graines_Cotyledons_last.xlsx"),
                      #"CotSplitless_TraceFinder.xlsx"),
                      Excel_path_and_name_Embryo = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Graines_HRaxis_last.xlsx"),
                      #"Embryo_Splitless_notcorrected_withQCs.xlsx"),
                      Excel_path_and_name_Leaves = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Graines_Plumule_last.xlsx")
                      #"Leaves_Splitless_notcorrected_withQCs.xlsx"), # ref = 109 = VanillaT3F4
)

```
```{r Open per seed compartment raw data_ rename samples_ and add metadata columns, eval = First_metab}
# load  normIS data ####
chosen_sheet <- 
  "All_MA_abs"
# open All_MA_abs sheets for corresponding Compartments
GCMS_df_Cot <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = Metabo_list_excel_paths[1],
                        sheet = chosen_sheet,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
GCMS_df_HRaxis <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = Metabo_list_excel_paths[2],
                        sheet = chosen_sheet,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
GCMS_df_Plum <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = Metabo_list_excel_paths[3],
                        sheet = chosen_sheet,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)



# rename Coumpound.Names and Samples ####
for(compart in c("Cot", "Plum", "HRaxis")){
  # load dataframe ####
  print(compart)
    if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Cot}
    if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_HRaxis}
    if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Plum}
  
    row.names(GCMS_df) <- GCMS_df$Compound.Name
    GCMS_df_t <- as.data.frame(t(GCMS_df[, -c(1:3)]))
    GCMS_df_t$Sample <- row.names(GCMS_df_t)
    
    
    # replace NAs and default inferior values by 0 ####
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>% replace(1, 0) # default value set in sheet preparation
    GCMS_df_t[GCMS_df_t == 1] <- 0
      
    # add metadata ####
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>% 
     dplyr::mutate(Varieties = ifelse(str_detect(Sample, "QC"),
                                      "QC",
                                      ifelse(str_detect(Sample, "Hexane"),
                                             "Hex",
                                             ifelse(str_detect(Sample, "Vialvide"),
                                                    "NC",
                                                    ifelse(str_detect(Sample, "Blanc"),
                                                            "Blanc",
                                                           str_extract(Sample, 
                                                                       paste0("[:upper:][:lower:]+(?=T[:digit:]",
                                                                              ifelse(compart == "Cot", "C",
                                                                                     ifelse(compart == "Plum", "F", "E")),
                                                                              "[:digit:])")) )))),
                   Size = ifelse(Varieties %in% c("Blanc", "Hex", "QC", "NC"),
                                 # instead of Size, print Batch for non-Seed samples
                                 ifelse(str_detect(Sample, "CapVez|FacFla|VanLin|ConDee"),
                                        str_extract(Sample, "CapVez|FacFla|VanLin|ConDee"),
                                        "ConDee"),
                                 str_extract(Sample, "(?<=T)[:digit:]")),
                   Replicate = ifelse(Varieties %in% c("Blanc", "Hex", "QC", "NC"),
                                      # instead of Replicate, print position and replicate for QCs and Hexanes
                                      ifelse(Varieties == "QC",
                                             paste0(ifelse(compart == "Cot",
                                                           "C",
                                                           ifelse(compart == "Plum", "F", "E")),
                                                    str_extract(Sample, "[:digit:](?=_)")),
                                             ifelse(Varieties == "Hex",
                                                    paste0(str_extract(Sample, "fin|Fin|debut|Debut"),str_extract(Sample, "[:digit:]")),
                                                    "")),
                                      str_extract(Sample, paste0("(?<=",
                                                          ifelse(compart == "Cot", "C",
                                                                 ifelse(compart == "Plum", "F", "E")),
                                                          ")[:digit:]"))))
    GCMS_df_t$Varieties <- as.factor(GCMS_df_t$Varieties)
    GCMS_df_t$Varieties <- dplyr::recode(GCMS_df_t$Varieties,
                                              Contempler = "Contender",
                                              Beaverer = 'Vezer', 
                                              Beavezer = "Vezer",
                                              Flaver = "Flavert",
                                              Flavertt = "Flavert",
                                              Lirex = "Linex"
                                              )
    GCMS_df_t$Compartment <- rep(compart, times = nrow(GCMS_df_t))
    # rename samples ####
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>% mutate(Sample_ = # for Seed varieties: rename with [Variety]_T[Size]_[Compartment][Replicate]
                                                       paste0(Varieties, "_T", Size, "_", 
                                                              ifelse(compart == "Cot", "C", 
                                                                     ifelse(compart == "Plum", "F",
                                                                            "E")), Replicate))
    
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>% mutate(Sample_ = ifelse(Varieties %in% c("Blanc", "Hex", "QC", "NC"),
                                                       # for Blanc, Hex, QC, NC: rename with batch #CapVez, FacFla, VanLin, ConDee (ConDee if not found)
                                                       paste0(Varieties, "_", Size, "_", Replicate),
                                                       Sample_))
    # Check if Sample_ (new, accurate name) is duplicated
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>% group_by(Sample_) %>%
      mutate(Duplicated = ifelse(n_distinct(Sample) > 1,
                                dense_rank(Sample), NA)) %>% ungroup()
    # if duplicated add index
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>%
        mutate(suffix = ifelse(! is.na(Duplicated), as.character(dense_rank(Sample)), ""))
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t %>%
        group_by(Sample_) %>%  # identify duplicates across Taxa
        mutate(Suffix = ifelse(Duplicated == 1 & n_distinct(suffix) > 1,  # Check if Taxa_name is duplicated across Taxa
                               as.character(dense_rank(suffix)),
                               "")) %>% ungroup()
      GCMS_df_t <- as.data.frame(GCMS_df_t) %>%
        mutate(Sample_ = ifelse(Suffix != "", paste0(Sample_, "_", Suffix), Sample_)) %>%
        select(-Duplicated, -suffix, -Suffix, -Sample)
    # affect new names
    row.names(GCMS_df_t) <- GCMS_df_t$Sample_
    
    # reorder columns
    GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t[, c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate",
                               colnames(GCMS_df_t)[-which(colnames(GCMS_df_t) %in% c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate", "Sample_"))])]
  
    # rename dataframe
    if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df_Cot <- GCMS_df_t}
    if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df_HRaxis <- GCMS_df_t}
    if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df_Plum <- GCMS_df_t}
}
analysis <- c()

rm(GCMS_df_t, GCMS_df)
```
### Internal Standard Normalization
```{r Test xylitol distribution before IS normalization for seed compartments, eval = First_metab}
# print Xylitol variability
Xyl_Cot = GCMS_df_Cot[, c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate", "Xylitol, 5TMS derivative")]
Xyl_Plum = GCMS_df_Plum[, c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate", "Xylitol, 5TMS derivative")]
Xyl_HRaxis = GCMS_df_HRaxis[, c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate", "Xylitol, 5TMS derivative")]
colnames(Xyl_Cot) <- c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate","Cot")
colnames(Xyl_Plum) <- c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate","Plum")
colnames(Xyl_HRaxis) <- c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate","HRaxis")

list_Xyl_outliers <- c(rownames(Xyl_Cot[Xyl_Cot$Cot == 0,]),
                       rownames(Xyl_Plum[Xyl_Plum$Plum == 0,]),
                       rownames(Xyl_HRaxis[Xyl_HRaxis$HRaxis == 0,]))

Xyl = full_join(
  full_join(Xyl_Cot, Xyl_Plum, by = c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate")),
  Xyl_HRaxis, by = c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate"))

rm(Xyl_Cot, Xyl_HRaxis, Xyl_Plum)

Xyl[Xyl == 0] <- NA

Xyl <- mutate(Xyl, Sample = paste(Varieties, Size, Replicate, sep = "_"))
Xyl <- Xyl[, c("Varieties", "Sample", 
               "Cot", "Plum", "HRaxis")]
Xyl <- pivot_longer(Xyl, cols = 3:5, names_to = "Compart", values_to = "Rel_Ab")


# filter extrema
Xyl_filtered <- Xyl %>%
  #group_by(Varieties, Compart) %>%
  mutate(
    decile_10 = quantile(Rel_Ab, 0.1, na.rm = TRUE),
    decile_90 = quantile(Rel_Ab, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE),
    decile_flag = case_when(
      Rel_Ab < decile_10 ~ "below_10th",
      Rel_Ab > decile_90 ~ "above_90th",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(decile_flag)) #%>%
  #ungroup()

# All Xylitol values repartition
Test_Xyl <- ggplot(Xyl, aes(x = 1, y = Rel_Ab)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "grey", alpha = 0.2) +
  
  # Main jittered points
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Varieties),
              size = 2,
              position = position_jitter(width = 0.1),
              alpha = 0.6) +
  
  # Red-circled points from Xyl_filtered
  geom_point(data = Xyl_filtered,
             aes(x = 1, y = Rel_Ab),
             shape = 21, fill = NA, color = "red", size = 3,
             stroke = 1) +  # Adjust stroke width if needed
  
  theme_classic() +
  xlab("Varieties") +
  ylab("Xylitol Relative Abundance (raw)") +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("Cot" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Plum" = "lightgreen")) +
  custom_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

Test_Xyl

# Outliers per Variety
Test_Xyl <- ggplot(Xyl, aes(x = Varieties, y = Rel_Ab)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "grey", alpha = 0.2) +
  
  # Main jittered points
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Compart),
              size = 2,
              position = position_jitter(width = 0.1),
              alpha = 0.6) +
  
  # Red-circled points from Xyl_filtered
  geom_point(data = Xyl_filtered,
             aes(x = Varieties, y = Rel_Ab),
             shape = 21, fill = NA, color = "red", size = 3,
             stroke = 1) +  # Adjust stroke width if needed
  
  theme_classic() +
  xlab("Varieties") +
  ylab("Xylitol Relative Abundance (raw)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Cot" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Plum" = "lightgreen")) +
  custom_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))



Test_Xyl


rm(Test_Xyl, Xyl)
```
All "below 1st percentile" samples are Blanc or Hexans
```{r remove Xylitol outliers, eval = First_metab}
Xyl_outliers = list_Xyl_outliers
# remove Blanc, NC and Hex samples from outliers (it's normal if they don't contain Xylitol)
Xyl_outliers <- Xyl_outliers[!grepl("Blanc|Hex|NC", Xyl_outliers)]

print ("Samples removed because of their null Internal Standard abundance: ")
Xyl_outliers

GCMS_df_Cot <- GCMS_df_Cot[!(rownames(GCMS_df_Cot) %in% Xyl_outliers), ]
GCMS_df_Plum <- GCMS_df_Plum[!(rownames(GCMS_df_Plum) %in% Xyl_outliers), ]
GCMS_df_HRaxis <- GCMS_df_HRaxis[!(rownames(GCMS_df_HRaxis) %in% Xyl_outliers), ]

analysis <- c(analysis, "RemovedXylOutliers")
# save Xyl_outliers

```
```{r normalize to xylitol, eval = First_metab}
metadata_cols <- c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate")
for(compart in c("Cot", "Plum", "HRaxis")){
  # load dataframe ####
  print(compart)
    if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Cot}
    if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_HRaxis}
    if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Plum}
    if(compart == "Exudate"){
      GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_exsudats
      metadata_cols <- c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Replicate")}
  
    # remove Hex, Blanc, and NC samples
    if(compart != "Exudate"){
      Controls <- str_which(rownames(GCMS_df), "Blanc|NC|Hex")
      if (length(Controls != 0)){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df[-c(Controls),]}}
    # select only metabolites columns
    metabo_cols <- setdiff(names(GCMS_df), metadata_cols)
    GCMS_df_metabo <- GCMS_df %>% subset(select= metabo_cols)
    # normalize to Xylitol ####
    GCMS_df_normIS <- sweep(GCMS_df_metabo, 1, 
                        GCMS_df_metabo[[str_which(colnames(GCMS_df_metabo), "Xylitol, 5TMS derivative")]], 
                        FUN = "/")
    # remove Xylitol column
    GCMS_df_normIS <- GCMS_df_normIS[, -c(str_which(colnames(GCMS_df_normIS), "Xylitol, 5TMS derivative"))]
    GCMS_df_normIS <- bind_cols(GCMS_df[, metadata_cols], GCMS_df_normIS)
    
    # rename dataframe
    if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df_Cot <- GCMS_df_normIS}
    if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df_HRaxis <- GCMS_df_normIS}
    if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df_Plum <- GCMS_df_normIS}
    if(compart == "Exudate"){GCMS_df_exudates <- GCMS_df_normIS}
}
analysis <- c(analysis, "NormIS")
rm(GCMS_df_normIS, metabo_cols, compart, Controls)
rm(GCMS_df_exsudats)
```
```{r sort by metabolite name, eval = First_metab}
for(compart in c("Cot", "Plum", "HRaxis")){
  # load dataframe ####
  print(compart)
    if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Cot}
    if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_HRaxis}
    if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Plum}
    if(compart == "Exsudats"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_exudates}
  
  metabo_cols <- setdiff(names(GCMS_df), metadata_cols)
  GCMS_df_t <- as.data.frame(t(GCMS_df %>% subset(select= metabo_cols) ))
  GCMS_df_t$Compound.Name <- row.names(GCMS_df_t)
  GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t[, c("Compound.Name", colnames(GCMS_df_t[-which(colnames(GCMS_df_t) == "Compound.Name")]))]
  # Sort dataframes by metabolites alphabetic order
  GCMS_df_t <- GCMS_df_t[order(GCMS_df_t$Compound.Name),]
  #colnames(GCMS_df_t)[-which(colnames(GCMS_df_t) %in% c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate", "Sample_"))]
  
  if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df_Cot <- GCMS_df_t}
  if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df_HRaxis <- GCMS_df_t}
  if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df_Plum <- GCMS_df_t}
  if(compart == "Exudate"){GCMS_df_exudates <- GCMS_df_t}
}
analysis <- c(analysis, "SortandTranspose")
```
### Alcans and QCs distribution, filter dataset per seed weight
```{r remove badly integrated fragments, eval = First_metab}
# remove badly integrated fragments
GCMS_toremove <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/",""), "Metabo/Corrections-remarques-Louna.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
GCMS_toremove <- GCMS_toremove[GCMS_toremove$Toremove == 1,]
GCMS_toremove$Compound.Name[order(GCMS_toremove$Compound.Name)]
GCMS_list_removedMetabo <- GCMS_toremove$Compound.Name

for(compart in c("Cot", "Plum", "HRaxis")){
  # load dataframe ####
  print(compart)
    if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Cot}
    if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_HRaxis}
    if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_Plum}
  
  GCMS_df <- GCMS_df[!rownames(GCMS_df) %in% GCMS_toremove$Compound.Name,]
  
  if(compart == "Cot"){GCMS_df_Cot <- GCMS_df}
  if(compart == "HRaxis"){GCMS_df_HRaxis <- GCMS_df}
  if(compart == "Plum"){GCMS_df_Plum <- GCMS_df}
}
analysis <- c(analysis, "RemoveCheckedFragments")
```

writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df_Cot, path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_Cot", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df_Plum, path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_Plum", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df_HRaxis, path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_HRaxis", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))

```{r create global dataframe, eval = First_metab}
# group dataframes ####
# (check if need to) rename metabolites #####
#print if names are different
data.frame(Plumule = GCMS_df_Plum$Compound.Name[GCMS_df_Plum$Compound.Name != GCMS_df_HRaxis$Compound.Name],
              HRaxis = GCMS_df_HRaxis$Compound.Name[GCMS_df_Plum$Compound.Name != GCMS_df_HRaxis$Compound.Name])
data.frame(Plumule = GCMS_df_Plum$Compound.Name[GCMS_df_Plum$Compound.Name != GCMS_df_Cot$Compound.Name],
              Cot = GCMS_df_Cot$Compound.Name[GCMS_df_Plum$Compound.Name != GCMS_df_Cot$Compound.Name])

GCMS_df <- left_join(left_join(GCMS_df_Cot, GCMS_df_HRaxis, by = "Compound.Name"), GCMS_df_Plum, by = "Compound.Name")
GCMS_df <- column_to_rownames(GCMS_df, loc=1)
GCMS_df <- as.data.frame(t(GCMS_df))
analysis <- c(analysis, "JoinedallComp")
```
```{r add metadata, eval = First_metab}
# add metadata ####
GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
GCMS_df <- GCMS_df %>% 
     dplyr::mutate(Varieties = str_extract(Sample,"[:alnum:]+(?=_)") , #paste0("[:upper:][:lower:]+(?=_T[:digit:]_(C|F|E)[:digit:])")) ))),
                   Size = str_replace(str_extract(Sample, "(?<=_)[:alnum:]+(?=_)"), "T", ""), # "(?<=T)[:digit:]"),
                   Replicate = str_extract(Sample, paste0("(?<=C|F|E)[:digit:]")),
                   Compartment = str_extract(Sample, paste0("(?<=_)(C|F|E)(?=[:digit:])")),
                   Compartment = ifelse(Compartment == "C", "Cotyledon",
                                                                 ifelse(Compartment == "F", "Plumule", "HRaxis")),
                   .before = `1-Methyladenosine, 3TMS derivative`
                   )
analysis <- c(analysis, "addMetadata")
# remove Extraction solution
GCMS_df <- GCMS_df[! rownames(GCMS_df) %in% c("NA_TNA_FNA", "NA_TNA_ENA"),]
# convert Varieties to factor
GCMS_df$Varieties <- as.factor(GCMS_df$Varieties)
```

# remove metabolites that are not detected in any sample
GCMS_list_removedMetabonotdetected <- colnames(GCMS_df[, colSums(GCMS_df != 0, na.rm = TRUE) == 0])
GCMS_df <- GCMS_df[, colSums(GCMS_df != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0]
analysis <- c(analysis, "removeNonDetectedMetabo")

check alcans profiles and remove alcans
```{r check Alcans profiles between batches_raw CHECKED, eval=First_metab}
# histogram of IS abundance in samples, faceted by batch
# select Internal Standard column
df_Alc <- GCMS_df %>%
  select(matches("^C\\d+(?=[a-zA-Z]*)", perl = TRUE))
# add batch info
df_Alc <- bind_cols(GCMS_df[,metadata_cols], df_Alc)
batch = c("Caprice"="CapVez", "Vezer"="CapVez", "Deezer"="ConDee", "Contender"="ConDee", "Facila"="FacFla", "Flavert"="FacFla", "Vanilla"="VanLin", "Linex"="VanLin")
df_Alc <- df_Alc %>%  mutate(Batch = ifelse(Varieties %in% c("Blanc", "Hex", "QC", "NC"),
                                                  Size,
                                                  batch[match(Varieties, names(batch))]), 
                             Sample = rownames(df_Alc),
                                   .after = Replicate)
#df_Alc$Batch <- as.numeric(as.factor(df_Alc$Batch))
df_Alc$Compartment <- as.factor(df_Alc$Compartment)
df_Alc <- df_Alc[order(df_Alc$Batch, df_Alc$Compartment),]
df_Alc <- df_Alc %>%
  group_by(Batch) %>%
  mutate(RowNumber = row_number(),
         .after = Sample)
df_Alc_long <- pivot_longer(df_Alc, cols = (length(c(metadata_cols, "Batch","Sample", "Rownumber"))+1):ncol(df_Alc),
                       names_to = "Alcans", values_to = "Value")
# plot histogram by batch
# Assuming df_Alc_long is your data frame
batches <- unique(df_Alc_long$Batch)  # Get unique batches

# Loop through each batch
for (batch in batches) {
  # Subset data for the current batch
  df_batch <- df_Alc_long %>% filter(Batch == batch)
  
  # Create the plot for the current batch
  Alc_plot <- ggplot(df_batch, aes(x = Alcans,
                                   y = Value,
                                   fill = Compartment,
                                   color = Compartment)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = Alcans, xend = Alcans, y = 0, yend = Value), size = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    facet_wrap(~ Varieties, scales = "free_x") +  # Facet by 'Label' within the batch
    labs(title = paste("Alcans abundance by Sample - Batch", batch), 
         x = "Sample", 
         y = "Alcans abundance",
         color = "Compartment") +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = "orange", "HRaxis" = "yellow", 
                                  "Plumule" = "lightgreen")) +  # Customize fill colors
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Cotyledon" = "orange", "HRaxis" = "yellow", 
                                  "Plumule" = "lightgreen")) +  # Customize line colors
    theme(legend.position = "right", 
          strip.text = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.text.x = element_blank())
  
  # Save the plot to a .png file
  ggsave(filename = paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "Metabo/Preprocessing_Alcans_Batch_", batch, ".png"), 
         plot = Alc_plot, 
         width = 10, height = 6)
  
  plot(Alc_plot)
}
rm(batch, batches, df_Alc)
```
```{r remove alcans_raw CHECKED, eval=First_metab}
metabo_cols <- setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df), metadata_cols)
if(remove_alcans == TRUE){
  Alc_pattern <- "^C\\d+"
  # Get the column indices that match the pattern
  Alc_columns <- grep(Alc_pattern, names(GCMS_df))
  # Exclude the columns that match the pattern
  GCMS_df <- GCMS_df[, -Alc_columns]
  analysis <- c(analysis, "RemoveAlcans")
}
```
```{r write dataframe, eval = First_metab}
# write dataframe ####
GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df, path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
# clean ####
GCMS_df <- column_to_rownames(GCMS_df, loc = length(GCMS_df))
rm(Alc_columns, Alc_pattern, Alc_plot, df_Alc, df_Alc_long)
```

center-scale with QCs to check QCs distribution
```{r load normIS_noAlcan_QCandSamples dataset, eval = First_metab}
GCMS_df_b <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_addMetadata_removeNonDetectedMetabo_RemoveAlcans.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
analysis <- c("RemovedXylOutliers","NormIS","SortandTranspose","RemoveCheckedFragments","JoinedallComp","RemoveAlcans")
GCMS_df_b <- column_to_rownames(GCMS_df_b, loc = length(GCMS_df_b))
colnames(GCMS_df_b) <- str_replace_all(colnames(GCMS_df_b), "\\.", " ")

anyNA(GCMS_df_b)
#na_positions <- which(is.na(GCMS_df), arr.ind = TRUE)
#GCMS_df[293,]
#3-Iodo-L-tyrosine, 3TMS D2, Phosphonoacetic Acid, 3TMS derivative

metadata_cols <- c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate")
```
```{r center-scale analytes per compartment or all compartments (with QCs), eval = First_metab}
# centscale or not
#   if centscaled: by compartments or on whole dataframe
# add metadata
for(centscale in c(TRUE, FALSE)){
  for(centscale_allOrperCompart in c("all", "perCompart")){
    GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_b
    GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
    # Center-scale data ####
    Metabo_columns <- setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df), c("Varieties",
                                                   "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                   "Size",
                                                   #"Compartment",
                                                   "Varieties_Compartment",
                                                   "Labels",
                                                   "Replicate",
                                                   "Sample"
                                                         ))
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df[, Metabo_columns]
    #GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    # remove empty columns
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly[, colSums(GCMS_df_metabonly != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0]
    # center-scale by COLUMNS = metabo
    #GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>% mutate_all(.funs = as.numeric)
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly[, colSums(GCMS_df_metabonly != 0) > 0]
    
    if(centscale == TRUE){
      if(centscale_allOrperCompart == "all"){# on columns! by metabolites, mean on all samples
        # Exclude metadata columns from scaling
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>%
          select(-Compartment) %>%  # Exclude metadata columns
          compositions::scale(center = TRUE, scale = TRUE) %>%  # Scale the numeric columns
          as.data.frame() %>%  # Convert back to data.frame
          bind_cols(GCMS_df_metabonly["Compartment"])   # Add back metadata columns
        analysis <- c(analysis, "CentScaledallComp")
      }
  
      if(centscale_allOrperCompart == "perCompart"){
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>%
          group_by(Compartment) %>%
          mutate(across(
            .cols = setdiff(names(.), metadata_cols),
            .fns = ~ as.numeric(compositions::scale(.)),
            .names = "{.col}_scaled"
          )) %>%
          ungroup()
        analysis <- c(str_replace(analysis,"CentScaledallComp", ""), "CentScaledperComp")
        }}
    
    if(centscale == FALSE){GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly}
    
    # add Metadata ####
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled$Sample <- row.names(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
    
    anyNA(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
    any(is.infinite(as.matrix(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)))
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    
    GCMS_df_scaled <- left_join(GCMS_df[,  c("Varieties",
                                             "Size", 
                                             "Replicate",
                                             "Compartment",
                                             "Sample"
                                             )],
                                        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled,
                                        by = "Sample")
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled[, setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled), c("Sample", "Size", "Compound.Name"))]
    # write dataframe ####
    writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df_scaled,
                        path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
    
  }}

rm(GCMS_df, GCMS_df_metabonly, GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled, GCMS_df_scaled, GCMS_df_b, analysis)
```
```{r check QCs distribution and outliers on dataset center-scaled on all compartments, eval = First_metab}
GCMS_df <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_RemoveAlcans_CentScaledallComp.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
analysis <- c("RemovedXylOutliers","NormIS","SortandTranspose","RemoveCheckedFragments","JoinedallComp","RemoveAlcans", "CentScaledallComp")
GCMS_df <- GCMS_df %>%
  select(-Compartment.y)
names(GCMS_df)[names(GCMS_df) == 'Compartment.x'] <- 'Compartment'
#GCMS_df <- column_to_rownames(GCMS_df, loc = which(names(GCMS_df) == "Sample"))
rownames(GCMS_df) <- GCMS_df$Sample
colnames(GCMS_df) <- str_replace_all(colnames(GCMS_df), "\\.", " ")


to_define_outliers = TRUE

Metabo_columns <- setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df), c("Varieties",
                                               "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                               "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                               "Size",
                                               "Compartment",
                                               "Varieties_Compartment",
                                               "Labels",
                                               "Replicate",
                                               "Sample"
                                                     ))
GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df[, Metabo_columns]

if(to_define_outliers){
  # PCA ####
  Metabo_PCA <- prcomp(GCMS_df_metabonly, scale=FALSE, center = FALSE) # 
  #rm(Metabo_PCA, Metabo_PCA_)  
  # visualize eigenvalues (scree plot)
  print(fviz_eig(Metabo_PCA,
                 addlabels = TRUE,
                 ylim = c(0,40)
                 ))
  
    # PCA all size, by compartments_dataframe preparation
    ## dataframe from prcomp object
    Metabo_PCA_ <- data.frame(Metabo_PCA$x) # creates PCs as columns, samples as rows
    ## Principal Components
    Metabo_PCA_$PC1 <- Metabo_PCA_[,1] #PC1
    Metabo_PCA_$PC2 <- Metabo_PCA_[,2] #PC2
    Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_[, c(1:5)]
    # add 
    Metabo_PCA_$Samples <- row.names(Metabo_PCA_)
    Metabo_PCA_$Compartment <- as.factor(GCMS_df$Compartment)
    Metabo_PCA_$Size <- GCMS_df$Size
    Metabo_PCA_$Replicate <- GCMS_df$Replicate
    Metabo_PCA_$Size <- Metabo_PCA_$Size %>% replace(is.na(.), 4)
    Metabo_PCA_$Size <- as.factor(Metabo_PCA_$Size)
    Metabo_PCA_$Varieties <- as.factor(GCMS_df$Varieties)
    #Metabo_PCA_$Varieties_Compartment <- as.factor(GCMS_df$Varieties_Compartment)
    # retrieve eigenvalues
    Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues <- get_eigenvalue(Metabo_PCA) #Eigenvalues
    Metabo_PCA_$labelsQC <- ifelse(GCMS_df$Varieties == "QC", GCMS_df$Sample, "")
    #Metabo_PCA_Metabolites <- get_pca_var(Metabo_PCA) #Variables
    #Metabo_PCA_Samples <- get_pca_ind(Metabo_PCA) #Samples
    
   
  col_PCA_all <- c("Vanilla" = "#333333",
                                     "Linex"= "#505050",
                                     "Caprice"= "#6C6C6C",
                                     "Vezer"= "#A2A2A2",
                                     "Deezer"= "#A7A7A7",
                                     "Facila"= "#B4B4B4B4",
                                     "Flavert"= "#BDBDBDBD",
                                     "Contender"= "#CCCCCCCC",
                                      "QC" = "red")
  col_PCA_compart <- c("blue", "yellow", "green")
  Metabo_PCA_ <- Metabo_PCA_ %>% mutate(Alpha = ifelse(Varieties == "QC", 1, 0.7))
  Metabo_Fig_PCA <- ggplot(Metabo_PCA_,
                                           aes(x=PC1, y= PC2,
                                               color = Varieties,
                                               fill = Varieties,
                                               label = labelsQC,
                                               shape = Size
                                               ))+
    geom_point(alpha = Metabo_PCA_$Alpha)+
    ggtitle("PCA all including NC") +
    geom_text_repel(label = Metabo_PCA_$labelsQC, show.legend = FALSE, max.overlaps = Inf, max.iter = 10000, , min.segment.length = 0.5, size = 8/.pt, direction = "both",)+
    xlab(paste0("PC1, ", round(Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues$variance.percent[1], digits = 2), "%")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2, ", round(Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues$variance.percent[2], digits = 2), "%")) +
    #coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
    #stat_ellipse(#geom = "polygon", 
    #  data = Metabo_PCA_) +
    custom_theme +
    #theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = col_PCA_all) + #col_PCA_compart )+
    scale_color_manual(values = col_PCA_all)+
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("1" = 1, "2" = 10, "3" = 16, "4" = 22)) +
    guides(shape = "none", 
           alpha = "none")
  
  Metabo_Fig_PCA
  
  # Plot individuals
  outliers_fig <- fviz_pca_ind(Metabo_PCA, 
               geom.ind = "text",
               col.ind = Metabo_PCA_$Varieties,        # Color by the quality of representation
               palette = col_PCA_all #c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"), # Color gradient
               #,repel = TRUE              # Avoid text overlap
               )
  print(outliers_fig)
  }
```
```{r clean, eval = First_metab, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# clean ####
rm(GCMS_df_t, GCMS_df_metabonly, Metabo_columns, GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled, GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled, GCMS_df, GCMS_df_nooutl,Metabo_PCA, Metabo_PCA_, Metabo_PCA_eigenvalues, outliers)
rm(GCMS_df_removmachsign, chosen_sheet, col_PCA_all, col_PCA_compart, compart, GCMS_df_machine_signal, Metabo_PCA_labelsQC)
rm(GCMS_df, GCMS_df_scaled)
rm(batch, batches, Equiv, outliers_fig, Xyl_outliers)
#rm(GCMS_df_b)
```
remove QCs and filter by seed weight and center-scale and check outliers
```{r load normIS_noAlcan_QCandSamples dataset, eval = First_metab}
GCMS_df_b <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_addMetadata_removeNonDetectedMetabo_RemoveAlcans.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
analysis <- c("RemovedXylOutliers","NormIS","SortandTranspose","RemoveCheckedFragments","JoinedallComp","RemoveAlcans")
GCMS_df_b <- column_to_rownames(GCMS_df_b, loc = length(GCMS_df_b))
colnames(GCMS_df_b) <- str_replace_all(colnames(GCMS_df_b), "\\.", " ")

anyNA(GCMS_df_b)
#na_positions <- which(is.na(GCMS_df), arr.ind = TRUE)
#GCMS_df[293,]
#3-Iodo-L-tyrosine, 3TMS D2, Phosphonoacetic Acid, 3TMS derivative

metadata_cols <- c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate")
```
```{r remove QCs, eval=First_metab}
GCMS_df_b <- GCMS_df_b[!GCMS_df_b$Varieties == "QC",]
analysis <- c(analysis, "RemoveQC")
```
```{r filter by seed weight, eval=First_metab}
GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_b

Metabo_Seed_weight <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Metabo_seed_weight_ReplComparts.xlsx"),
                         sheet = 1,
                         colNames = TRUE,
                         rowNames = FALSE)
names(Metabo_Seed_weight)[names(Metabo_Seed_weight) == "ReplCompart"] <- "Sample"

 # Create compartments names for Metabo_seed_weight ####
Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_Seed_weight %>% 
  mutate(Compartment = ifelse(str_detect(Sample, 
                                         "Gr"),
                              "Whole_seed",
                              ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                "T[:digit:]E[:digit:]"),
                                     "HRaxis",
                                     ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                       "T[:digit:]C[:digit:]"),
                                            "Cotyledon",
                                            ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                       "T[:digit:]F[:digit:]"),
                                                   "Plumule",
                                                   ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                       "T[:digit:]T[:digit:]"),
                                                       "Tegument",
                                                       "na"
                                                       )
                                                   )
                                            )
                                     )
                              ))





# Filter samples by seed weight ####
if (filter_seed_weight == TRUE){
# filter metabo seeds per weight ####
# compute weight mean and sd per variety
  Metabo_seed_size_joined <- Metabo_Seed_weight %>%
    left_join(Morpho_weight_stat, by = "Varieties")  # Merge by 'Varieties' to get 'weight' and 'sd' columns

  # filter the rows where Whole_seed weight is within the mean ± 1 standard deviation
  Metabo_seed_size_filtered <- Metabo_seed_size_joined %>%
    group_by(Varieties, Size, Replicate) %>%  # Group by seed combination
    filter(any(Compartment == "Whole_seed" & 
               Weight >= (weight - 1.5 * sd) & 
               Weight <= (weight + 1.5 * sd)))%>%  # Check if Whole_seed compartment meets the condition
    ungroup()  # Remove grouping

  Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_seed_size_filtered

  rm(Metabo_seed_size_filtered, Metabo_seed_size_joined)
  Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_Seed_weight[, setdiff(colnames(Metabo_Seed_weight), c("N", "weight", "sd", "se", "ci", "Groups", "group_letters"))]

}

Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_Seed_weight[, colnames(Metabo_Seed_weight) != "Sample"]
Metabo_Seed_weight <- pivot_wider(Metabo_Seed_weight, names_from = c(Compartment),
                                  values_from = c(Weight))

Metabo_Seed_weight[, c("Whole_seed","Cotyledon","HRaxis","Plumule","Tegument")] <- Metabo_Seed_weight[, c("Whole_seed","Cotyledon","HRaxis","Plumule","Tegument")] %>% 
  mutate_all(.funs = as.double) 
#%>%      mutate_at(vars(-Whole_seed), ~as.double(./Whole_seed))

# Filter samples in GCMS_df from seeds with weight within the mean ± 1 standard deviation ####
GCMS_df$Replicate <- as.double(GCMS_df$Replicate)
Metabo_Seed_weight$Size <- as.double(Metabo_Seed_weight$Size)
GCMS_df$Size <- as.double(GCMS_df$Size)
GCMS_df$Varieties <- as.character(GCMS_df$Varieties)
Metabo_Seed_weight$Varieties <- as.character(Metabo_Seed_weight$Varieties)
GCMS_df$Compartment <- as.character(GCMS_df$Compartment)
GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
Metabo_Seed_weight_long <- pivot_longer(Metabo_Seed_weight,
                                       cols = c("Whole_seed","Cotyledon","HRaxis","Plumule","Tegument"),
                                       names_to = "Compartment",
                                       values_to = "Weight")
Metabo_Seed_weight_long$Compartment <- as.character(Metabo_Seed_weight_long$Compartment)
    
# Join the dataframes
GCMS_df_normSeedweight <- right_join(Metabo_Seed_weight_long,
                                                          GCMS_df,
                                                          by = c("Varieties", "Compartment", "Size", "Replicate"))
    
# Exclusion of samples of unknown mass and filtered
GCMS_df_normSeedweight <- GCMS_df_normSeedweight %>% drop_na(Weight)
GCMS_df_normSeedweight <- tibble::column_to_rownames(GCMS_df_normSeedweight, var = "Sample")


rm(GCMS_df, GCMS_df_b, Metabo_Seed_weight, Metabo_Seed_weight_long)
analysis <- c(analysis, "filterSamplebySeedWeight")
GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_normSeedweight
```
```{r write filtered dataset, eval=First_metab}
# write dataframe ####
GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df, path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
```

### Center-scale by compartments or on the whole dataset and add metadata
```{r load dataset, eval=First_metab}
GCMS_df_b <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_RemoveAlcans_RemoveQC_filterSamplebySeedWeight.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
analysis <- c("RemovedXylOutliers","NormIS","SortandTranspose","RemoveCheckedFragments","JoinedallComp","RemoveAlcans", "RemoveQC", "filterSamplebySeedWeight")
GCMS_df_b <- column_to_rownames(GCMS_df_b, loc = length(GCMS_df_b))
colnames(GCMS_df_b) <- str_replace_all(colnames(GCMS_df_b), "\\.", " ")

```
```{r center-scale on analytes per compartment or all compartments (without QCs, filtered samples), eval = First_metab}
# centscale or not
#   if centscaled on analytes: by compartments or on whole dataframe
# add metadata
for(centscale in c(TRUE, FALSE)){
  for(centscale_allOrperCompart in c("all", "perCompart")){
    GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_b
    GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
    # Center-scale data ####
    Metabo_columns <- setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df), c("Varieties",
                                                   "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                   "Size",
                                                   #"Compartment",
                                                   "Varieties_Compartment",
                                                   "Labels",
                                                   "Replicate",
                                                   "Sample",
                                                   "Weight"
                                                         ))
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df[, Metabo_columns]
    #GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    # remove empty columns
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly[, colSums(GCMS_df_metabonly != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0]
    # center-scale by COLUMNS = metabo
    #GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>% mutate_all(.funs = as.numeric)
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly[, colSums(GCMS_df_metabonly != 0) > 0]
    
    if(centscale == TRUE){
      if(centscale_allOrperCompart == "all"){# on columns! by metabolites, mean on all samples
        # Exclude metadata columns from scaling
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>%
          select(-Compartment) %>%  # Exclude metadata columns
          compositions::scale(center = TRUE, scale = TRUE) %>%  # Scale the numeric columns
          as.data.frame() %>% # Convert back to data.frame
          bind_cols(GCMS_df_metabonly["Compartment"])   # Add back metadata columns
        analysis <- c(analysis, "CentScaledallComp")
      }
  
      if(centscale_allOrperCompart == "perCompart"){
        GCMS_df_metabonly$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df_metabonly)
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>%
          select(-Sample) %>%
          group_by(Compartment) %>%
          mutate(across(
            .cols = setdiff(names(.), metadata_cols),
            .fns = ~ as.numeric(compositions::scale(.)),
            .names = "{.col}_scaled"
          )) %>%
          ungroup() %>%
          bind_cols(GCMS_df_metabonly["Sample"])
        analysis <- c(analysis[-length(analysis)], "CentScaledperComp")
        }}
    
    if(centscale == FALSE){
      GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly
      print(analysis)
      analysis <- c(analysis[-length(analysis)], "notCentScaled")}
    
    # add Metadata ####
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled$Sample <- row.names(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
    
    anyNA(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
    any(is.infinite(as.matrix(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)))
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    
    GCMS_df_scaled <- left_join(GCMS_df[,  c("Varieties",
                                             "Size", 
                                             "Replicate",
                                             "Compartment",
                                             "Sample"
                                             )],
                                        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled,
                                        by = c("Sample", "Compartment"))
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled[, setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled), c("Sample", "Size", "Compound.Name"))]
    # write dataframe ####
    writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df_scaled,
                        path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
    
  }}

rm(GCMS_df, GCMS_df_metabonly, GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled, GCMS_df_scaled, GCMS_df_normSeedweight, analysis)
```
center-scaling to compare metabolic profiles between samples, and each metabolite has its own abundance scale.

                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)

                                                   "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                   "Size",
                                                   "Compartment",
                                                   "Varieties_Compartment",
                                                   "Labels",
                                                   "Replicate",
                                                   "Sample",
                                                   "Weight"
                                                         ))
GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df[, Metabo_columns]

rowMeans(GCMS_df_metabonly)

### Remove sample outliers from PCA
```{r list of outliers from PCAs, eval=First_metab}
outliers <- c("Facila_T3_E5", "Flavert_T1_E5", "Facila_T3_C5",
              "Vezer_T2_F3", "Vezer_T1_C2",
              "Caprice_T2_F4", "Caprice_T3_F3", "Contender_T2_F1",
              "Vezer_T2_C2", "Vezer_T1_C4", "Caprice_T3_C3", "Caprice_T2_C1",
              "Facila_T3_C2", "Deezer_T2_C3", "Flavert_T1_C5", "Deezer_T2_C4", "Vanilla_T2_C4",
              "Facila_T2_E3", "Linex_T1_E2" # added after prevalence filter
                )
```
```{r remove Outliers with PCA Per Compart, eval = First_metab}
# per_comp: per compartment, if chosen_compart is selected (among "Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HR_axis")
# per_size: per seed size, if chosen_size is selected (among "1","2","3")
# color_plot: color graph according to Compartments ("byComp") or Varieties ("byVar")
# choice_color: color scale to be attributed to Varieties according to "FEP", "FGP" or other seed attribute. see setup Color choice.

Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = FALSE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = 0,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                   rename_metabo = "FALSE",
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)


if(RemovePCAOutliers){ #TESTS of outliers
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset[! Metabo_selected_dataset$Sample %in% outliers,]
  analysis <- c(analysis, "RemovePCAOutliers")
}

name_fig_dataset = paste0("Fig_PCA_Metabo", "_",
                          paste(analysis,collapse="_"))

# per compartment ####
for (chosen_compart in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule","HRaxis")){
  PCA <- PCA_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor(per_comp = TRUE, chosen_compart, 
                                   per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                   shape_per = "",
                                   color_plot = "byComp",
                                   choice_color = "FEP", 
                                   Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset, #Metabo_allCompart_normIS_normSeedweight_filtSeedweight_noAlcan,
                                   to_detect_outliers = TRUE,
                                   save_fig = TRUE,
                                  ellipse_per = "Compartment",
                                   name_fig = paste0(name_fig_dataset,ifelse(to_remove_outliers,"_removOutliers",""))
                                   )
  print(PCA)
}
```

GCMS_df <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"),

### Center-scale by compartments or on the whole dataset and add metadata, once PCA outliers are removed
```{r load dataset not centscaled and remove PCA outliers, eval = First_metab}
GCMS_df_b <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_RemoveAlcans_RemoveQC_filterSamplebySeedWeight_RemovePCAOutliers.xlsx"),
                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)
analysis <- c("RemovedXylOutliers","NormIS","SortandTranspose","RemoveCheckedFragments","JoinedallComp","RemoveAlcans", "RemoveQC", "filterSamplebySeedWeight", "RemovePCAOutliers")



rownames(GCMS_df_b)<- GCMS_df_b$Sample
  #column_to_rownames(GCMS_df_b, loc = length(GCMS_df_b)) #Sample
colnames(GCMS_df_b) <- str_replace_all(colnames(GCMS_df_b), "\\.", " ")

GCMS_df_b <- GCMS_df_b[! GCMS_df_b$Sample %in% outliers,]
### analysis <- c(analysis, "RemovePCAOutliers") (not yet)

```
```{r center-scale analytes per compartment or all compartments (without QCs, filtered samples), eval = First_metab}
# centscale or not
#   if centscaled: by compartments or on whole dataframe
# add metadata
for(centscale in c(TRUE, FALSE)){
  for(centscale_allOrperCompart in c("all", "perCompart")){
    GCMS_df <- GCMS_df_b
    GCMS_df$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df)
    # Center-scale data ####
    Metabo_columns <- setdiff(colnames(GCMS_df), c("Varieties",
                                                   "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                   "Size",
                                                   #"Compartment",
                                                   "Varieties_Compartment",
                                                   "Labels",
                                                   "Replicate",
                                                   "Sample",
                                                   "Weight"
                                                         ))
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df[, Metabo_columns]
    #GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    # remove empty columns
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly[, colSums(GCMS_df_metabonly != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0]
    # center-scale by COLUMNS = metabo
    #GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>% mutate_all(.funs = as.numeric)
    GCMS_df_metabonly <- GCMS_df_metabonly[, colSums(GCMS_df_metabonly != 0) > 0]
    metadata_cols <- c("Varieties","Size", "Replicate","Compartment",
                           "Weight", "Sample")
        
    if(centscale == TRUE){
      if(centscale_allOrperCompart == "all"){# on columns! by metabolites, mean on all samples
        if(verbose == TRUE){print("centscale jointly on all compartments")}
        # Exclude metadata columns from scaling
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly  %>%
          mutate(across(
            .cols = where(is.numeric) & !any_of(metadata_cols), 
            .fns = ~ as.numeric(scale(.x, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE))
          ))
        analysis_bis <- c(analysis, "CentScaledallComp")
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled$Sample <- row.names(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
      }

      if(centscale_allOrperCompart == "perCompart"){
        if(verbose == TRUE){print("centscale per compartments")}
        GCMS_df_metabonly$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df_metabonly)
        GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly %>%
          group_by(Compartment) %>%
          mutate(across(
            .cols = where(is.numeric) & !any_of(metadata_cols), 
            .fns = ~ as.numeric(scale(.x, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE))
          )) %>%
          ungroup()
        analysis_bis <- c(analysis, "CentScaledperComp")
        }}
    
    if(centscale == FALSE){
        if(verbose == TRUE){print("no centscale")}
      GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly
      GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled$Sample <- rownames(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
      print(analysis)
      analysis_bis <- c(analysis, "notCentScaled")}
    
    # add Metadata ####
    
    anyNA(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)
    any(is.infinite(as.matrix(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled)))
    GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled <- GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
    rownames(GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled) <- GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled$Sample
    # Keep only metadata columns from GCMS_df, else keeps metabolites unscaled and scaled
    metadata_to_keep <- c("Varieties", "Size", "Replicate", "Compartment", "Sample")
    
    
    GCMS_df_scaled <- left_join(
      GCMS_df[, metadata_to_keep],  # Seulement les métadonnées
      GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled,     # Les données centrées-réduites
      by = c("Compartment", "Sample")
    )
    
    # Retirer les colonnes en double si nécessaire
    GCMS_df_scaled <- GCMS_df_scaled %>%
      select(-matches("_center$|_scale$"))  # Retire les colonnes avec suffixes si présentes

    # write dataframe ####
    writexl::write_xlsx(GCMS_df_scaled,
                        path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_", paste(analysis_bis,collapse="_"),".xlsx"))
    
  }
  rm(GCMS_df, GCMS_df_metabonly, GCMS_df_metabonly_scaled, GCMS_df_scaled)
  }


```

                        sheet = 1,
                        colNames=TRUE,
                        rowNames = FALSE)

                                                   "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                   "Size",
                                                   "Compartment",
                                                   "Varieties_Compartment",

rowMeans(GCMS_df_metabonly)
