### Select analytes by prevalence and abundance in each compartment
```{r function to select by prevalence, eval = First_metab}
#' Select by prevalence PER COMPARTMENT
#' 
#' @param prevalence_threshold Prevalence threshold (0-1)
#' @param df Dataframe with "Compartment" column
#' @param by_compartment If TRUE, filter by compartment separately
#' @param zero_instead_of_remove If TRUE, set values to 0 instead of removing columns
#' 
#' @return List with $filtered_df and $removed_metabolites
#' 
Select_by_prevalence <- function(prevalence_threshold, 
                                 df, 
                                 by_compartment = FALSE,
                                 zero_instead_of_remove = FALSE) {
  
  # Identify metadata columns
  metadata_columns <- c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage", 
                       "Final_Germ_Percentage", "Sample", "Size", "Replicate", 
                       "Compartment", "Weight", "Labels")
  metadata_columns <- metadata_columns[metadata_columns %in% colnames(df)]
  
  metabolite_columns <- setdiff(colnames(df), metadata_columns)
  
  if(!by_compartment) {
    # Entire dataset
    prevalence <- colMeans(df[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    kept_metabolites <- names(prevalence)[prevalence >= prevalence_threshold]
    removed_metabolites <- names(prevalence)[prevalence < prevalence_threshold]
    
    if(zero_instead_of_remove) {
      # Set removed metabolites to 0 instead of removing columns
      filtered_df <- df
      filtered_df[, removed_metabolites] <- 0
      
      cat("Global filtering (zeroing mode):\n")
      cat(paste0("  Threshold: ", prevalence_threshold * 100, "%\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites kept: ", length(kept_metabolites), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites zeroed: ", length(removed_metabolites), "\n\n"))
      
    } else {
      # Remove columns
      filtered_df <- df[, c(metadata_columns, kept_metabolites)]
      
      cat("Global filtering (removal mode):\n")
      cat(paste0("  Threshold: ", prevalence_threshold * 100, "%\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites kept: ", length(kept_metabolites), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites removed: ", length(removed_metabolites), "\n\n"))
    }
    
    return(list(
      filtered_df = filtered_df,
      removed_metabolites = removed_metabolites,
      kept_metabolites = kept_metabolites,
      prevalence_by_metabolite = prevalence
    ))
    
  } else {
    # Per compartment ####
    
    if(!"Compartment" %in% colnames(df)) {
      stop("Column 'Compartment' is missing from dataframe. Cannot filter by compartment.")
    }
    
    compartments <- unique(df$Compartment)
    
    cat(paste0(" FILTERING BY COMPARTMENT (threshold: ", prevalence_threshold * 100, "%) \n\n"))
    
    # For each compartment, identify metabolites to keep
    metabolites_to_keep_by_comp <- list()
    metabolites_to_remove_by_comp <- list()
    prevalence_by_comp <- list()
    
    for(comp in compartments) {
      df_comp <- df %>% filter(Compartment == comp)
      
      # Calculate prevalence in this compartment
      prevalence_comp <- colMeans(df_comp[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      # Metabolites to keep in this compartment
      kept_in_comp <- names(prevalence_comp)[prevalence_comp >= prevalence_threshold]
      removed_in_comp <- names(prevalence_comp)[prevalence_comp < prevalence_threshold]
      
      metabolites_to_keep_by_comp[[comp]] <- kept_in_comp
      metabolites_to_remove_by_comp[[comp]] <- removed_in_comp
      prevalence_by_comp[[comp]] <- prevalence_comp
      
      cat(paste0(comp, ":\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Samples: ", nrow(df_comp), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites kept: ", length(kept_in_comp), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites ", ifelse(zero_instead_of_remove, "zeroed", "removed"), 
                 ": ", length(removed_in_comp), "\n\n"))
    }
    
    # Filter
    
    if(zero_instead_of_remove) {
      # set to 0 by compartment (keep all columns)
      filtered_df <- df
      
      for(comp in compartments) {
        # Get rows for this compartment
        comp_rows <- which(df$Compartment == comp)
        
        # Get metabolites to zero for this compartment
        metabs_to_zero <- metabolites_to_remove_by_comp[[comp]]
        
        # Set to 0
        if(length(metabs_to_zero) > 0) {
          filtered_df[comp_rows, metabs_to_zero] <- 0
        }
      }
      
      # Union of kept metabolites (for reporting)
      all_metabolites_kept <- unique(unlist(metabolites_to_keep_by_comp))
      
      # Metabolites zeroed in ALL compartments (truly unused)
      all_metabolites_removed <- Reduce(intersect, metabolites_to_remove_by_comp)
      
      cat("GLOBAL SUMMARY (ZEROING MODE) \n")
      cat(paste0("Metabolites kept in at least 1 compartment: ", 
                 length(all_metabolites_kept), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Metabolites zeroed in ALL compartments: ", 
                 length(all_metabolites_removed), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Total columns kept in dataset: ", 
                 length(metabolite_columns), " (all)\n\n"))
      
    } else {
      # REMOVE COLUMNS (union)
      all_metabolites_to_keep <- unique(unlist(metabolites_to_keep_by_comp))
      all_metabolites_intersection <- Reduce(intersect, metabolites_to_keep_by_comp)
      
      filtered_df <- df[, c(metadata_columns, all_metabolites_to_keep)]
      
      removed_metabolites <- setdiff(metabolite_columns, all_metabolites_to_keep)
      
      cat(" GLOBAL SUMMARY (REMOVAL MODE) \n")
      cat(paste0("Metabolites kept (union): ", length(all_metabolites_to_keep), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Metabolites kept (intersection): ", length(all_metabolites_intersection), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Metabolites removed globally: ", length(removed_metabolites), "\n\n"))
    }
    
    return(list(
      filtered_df = filtered_df,
      metabolites_to_zero_by_comp = if(zero_instead_of_remove) metabolites_to_remove_by_comp else NULL,
      kept_by_compartment = metabolites_to_keep_by_comp,
      removed_by_compartment = metabolites_to_remove_by_comp,
      prevalence_by_compartment = prevalence_by_comp,
      mode = ifelse(zero_instead_of_remove, "zeroing", "removal")
    ))
  }
}
```
```{r function to select by abundance, eval = First_metab}
#' Select by relative abundance PER COMPARTMENT
#' 
#' @param df Dataframe
#' @param metadata_columns Metadata column names
#' @param minRelAb_thresh Minimum threshold (centered-scaled values)
#' @param maxRelAb_thresh Maximum threshold (centered-scaled values)
#' @param by_compartment If TRUE, filter by compartment
#' @param zero_instead_of_remove If TRUE, set to 0 instead of removing columns
#' 
#' @return List with $filtered_df and filtering info
Select_by_centscaledRelAb <- function(df, 
                                      metadata_columns, 
                                      minRelAb_thresh, 
                                      maxRelAb_thresh,
                                      by_compartment = FALSE,
                                      zero_instead_of_remove = FALSE) {
  
  metabolite_columns <- setdiff(colnames(df), metadata_columns)
  
  if(!by_compartment) {
    # CLASSIC MODE: Entire dataset
    
    if(zero_instead_of_remove) {
      # Zero values within threshold range
      filtered_df <- df %>%
        mutate(across(all_of(metabolite_columns), 
                     ~ ifelse(. < maxRelAb_thresh & . > minRelAb_thresh, 0, .)))
      
      # Count metabolites that are completely zeroed
      completely_zeroed <- metabolite_columns[colSums(filtered_df[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
      kept_metabolites <- setdiff(metabolite_columns, completely_zeroed)
      
      cat("Global filtering by abundance (zeroing mode):\n")
      cat(paste0("  Threshold: [", minRelAb_thresh, ", ", maxRelAb_thresh, "]\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites with data: ", length(kept_metabolites), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites completely zeroed: ", length(completely_zeroed), "\n\n"))
      
      return(list(
        filtered_df = filtered_df,
        removed_metabolites = completely_zeroed,
        kept_metabolites = kept_metabolites
      ))
      
    } else {
      # Remove columns
      df_filtered <- df %>%
        mutate(across(all_of(metabolite_columns), 
                     ~ ifelse(. < maxRelAb_thresh & . > minRelAb_thresh, 0, .)))
      
      # Remove empty columns
      df_filtered <- df_filtered[, colSums(df_filtered[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0]
      
      removed_metabolites <- setdiff(colnames(df), colnames(df_filtered))
      kept_metabolites <- intersect(metabolite_columns, colnames(df_filtered))
      
      cat("Global filtering by abundance (removal mode):\n")
      cat(paste0("  Threshold: [", minRelAb_thresh, ", ", maxRelAb_thresh, "]\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites kept: ", length(kept_metabolites), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites removed: ", length(removed_metabolites), "\n\n"))
      
      return(list(
        filtered_df = df_filtered,
        removed_metabolites = removed_metabolites,
        kept_metabolites = kept_metabolites
      ))
    }
    
  } else {
    #  BY COMPARTMENT MODE 
    
    if(!"Compartment" %in% colnames(df)) {
      stop("Column 'Compartment' is missing from dataframe.")
    }
    
    compartments <- unique(df$Compartment)
    
    cat(" FILTERING BY ABUNDANCE BY COMPARTMENT \n")
    cat(paste0("Threshold: [", minRelAb_thresh, ", ", maxRelAb_thresh, "]\n\n"))
    
    metabolites_to_keep_by_comp <- list()
    metabolites_to_zero_by_comp <- list()
    
    for(comp in compartments) {
      df_comp <- df %>% filter(Compartment == comp)
      
      # For each metabolite, check if it exceeds thresholds in this compartment
      metabolites_abundant <- c()
      metabolites_not_abundant <- c()
      
      for(metab in metabolite_columns) {
        values <- df_comp[[metab]]
        
        # Keep if at least ONE value exceeds thresholds
        if(any(values > maxRelAb_thresh | values < minRelAb_thresh, na.rm = TRUE)) {
          metabolites_abundant <- c(metabolites_abundant, metab)
        } else {
          metabolites_not_abundant <- c(metabolites_not_abundant, metab)
        }
      }
      
      metabolites_to_keep_by_comp[[comp]] <- metabolites_abundant
      metabolites_to_zero_by_comp[[comp]] <- metabolites_not_abundant
      
      cat(paste0(comp, ":\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites kept: ", length(metabolites_abundant), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("  Metabolites ", ifelse(zero_instead_of_remove, "zeroed", "removed"), 
                 ": ", length(metabolites_not_abundant), "\n\n"))
    }
    
    #  APPLY FILTERING 
    
    if(zero_instead_of_remove) {
      # ✅ SET TO 0 BY COMPARTMENT
      filtered_df <- df
      
      for(comp in compartments) {
        comp_rows <- which(df$Compartment == comp)
        metabs_to_zero <- metabolites_to_zero_by_comp[[comp]]
        
        if(length(metabs_to_zero) > 0) {
          filtered_df[comp_rows, metabs_to_zero] <- 0
        }
      }
      
      all_metabolites_kept <- unique(unlist(metabolites_to_keep_by_comp))
      all_metabolites_zeroed_everywhere <- Reduce(intersect, metabolites_to_zero_by_comp)
      
      cat(" GLOBAL SUMMARY (ZEROING MODE) \n")
      cat(paste0("Metabolites with data in at least 1 compartment: ", 
                 length(all_metabolites_kept), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Metabolites zeroed in ALL compartments: ", 
                 length(all_metabolites_zeroed_everywhere), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Total columns kept: ", length(metabolite_columns), " (all)\n\n"))
      
    } else {
      # REMOVE COLUMNS
      all_metabolites_to_keep <- unique(unlist(metabolites_to_keep_by_comp))
      all_metabolites_intersection <- Reduce(intersect, metabolites_to_keep_by_comp)
      
      filtered_df <- df[, c(metadata_columns, all_metabolites_to_keep)]
      
      removed_metabolites <- setdiff(metabolite_columns, all_metabolites_to_keep)
      
      cat(" GLOBAL SUMMARY (REMOVAL MODE) \n")
      cat(paste0("Metabolites kept (union): ", length(all_metabolites_to_keep), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Metabolites kept (intersection): ", length(all_metabolites_intersection), "\n"))
      cat(paste0("Metabolites removed: ", length(removed_metabolites), "\n\n"))
    }
    
    return(list(
      filtered_df = filtered_df,
      metabolites_to_zero_by_comp = if(zero_instead_of_remove) metabolites_to_zero_by_comp else NULL,
      kept_by_compartment = metabolites_to_keep_by_comp,
      removed_by_compartment = metabolites_to_zero_by_comp,
      mode = ifelse(zero_instead_of_remove, "zeroing", "removal")
    ))
  }
}

```
```{r filter by prevalence (TODO and by relative abundance on non-centered-scaled dataframes), eval = First_metab}
# list analytes that are not prevalent in the not-centered dataset ####
if(prev_thresh != 0){
  Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                      allComp = TRUE,
                                      removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                      RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                      NormIS = TRUE,
                                      SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                      RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                      JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                      RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                      RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                      filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                      norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                      CenteredAndScaledBy = "not", # allComp OR perComp OR not
                                      RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                     prev_thresh_ = 0,
                                     RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                     Size = "All",
                                     mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                     rename_metabo = "FALSE",
                                     verbose = TRUE)
  analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
  Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
  rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
  Metabo_selected_dataset[is.na(Metabo_selected_dataset)] <- 0

  Metabo_selected_dataset_prevthresh <- Select_by_prevalence(prev_thresh, Metabo_selected_dataset)
  
  list_prev_thresh_rm <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset_prevthresh))
  rm(Metabo_selected_dataset, Metabo_selected_dataset_prevthresh)
}

# list analytes that are not abundant enough in all compartments ####
if(RelAb_thresh !=0){
  Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                      allComp = TRUE,
                                      removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                      RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                      NormIS = TRUE,
                                      SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                      RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                      JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                      RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                      RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                      filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                      norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                      CenteredAndScaledBy = "not", # allComp OR perComp OR not
                                      RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                     prev_thresh_ = 0,
                                     RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                     Size = "All",
                                     mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                     rename_metabo = "FALSE",
                                     verbose = TRUE)
  analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
  Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
  rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
  Metabo_selected_dataset[is.na(Metabo_selected_dataset)] <- 0

  Metabo_selected_dataset_RelAb <- Select_by_centscaledRelAb(Metabo_selected_dataset,
                                                       metadata_columns = c("Varieties", "t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage", "Sample","Size","Replicate", "Compartment"), 
                                                       minRelAb_thresh = -RelAb_thresh, 
                                                       maxRelAb_thresh = RelAb_thresh)
    #remove empty columns
    Metabo_selected_dataset_RelAb <- Metabo_selected_dataset_RelAb[, colSums(Metabo_selected_dataset_RelAb != 0) > 0]
    
    list_RelAb_rm <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset_RelAb))
  }

# filter those analytes in all datasets ####
if(prev_thresh !=0 | RelAb_thresh !=0){
  for(centscale in c("allComp", "perComp", "not")){
    # load dataset
    Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                      allComp = TRUE,
                                      removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                      RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                      NormIS = TRUE,
                                      SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                      RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                      JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                      RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                      RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                      filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                      norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                      CenteredAndScaledBy = centscale, # allComp OR perComp
                                      RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                     prev_thresh_ = 0,
                                     RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                     Size = "All",
                                     mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                     rename_metabo = "FALSE",
                                     verbose = TRUE)
    analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
    Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
    rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
    #Metabo_selected_dataset[is.na(Metabo_selected_dataset)] <- 0
  
    if(prev_thresh != 0){
      Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>% select(-all_of(list_prev_thresh_rm))
      analysis <- c(analysis, paste0("PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh, 2)))
    }
    if(RelAb_thresh !=0){
      Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>% select(-all_of(list_RelAb_rm))
      analysis <- c(analysis, paste0("RelAbThresh", round(RelAb_thresh, 2)))
    }
  
  # write dataframe ####
    writexl::write_xlsx(Metabo_selected_dataset, path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/", paste(analysis,collapse="_"), ".xlsx"))
  }}


rm(Metabo_selected_dataset_prevthresh, Metabo_selected_dataset, Metabo_selected_dataset_RelAb, list_prev_thresh_rm, list_RelAb_rm, analysis)
```
```{r run filtering, eval = First_metab}
#  Prevalence filtering

if(prev_thresh != 0) {
  # Load non-centered-scaled dataset
  Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
    Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
    allComp = TRUE,
    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
    NormIS = TRUE,
    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
    RemoveQC = TRUE,
    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
    CenteredAndScaledBy = "not",
    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
    prev_thresh_ = 0,
    RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
    Size = "All",
    mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
    rename_metabo = "FALSE",
    verbose = TRUE
  )
  
  analysis <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
  Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
  rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
  
  Metabo_selected_dataset[is.na(Metabo_selected_dataset)] <- 0
  
  # Filter by prevalence (BY COMPARTMENT with zeroing)
  prevalence_results <- Select_by_prevalence(
    prevalence_threshold = prev_thresh,
    df = Metabo_selected_dataset,
    by_compartment = by_compartment,
    zero_instead_of_remove = zero_instead_of_remove  # ← KEY PARAMETER
  )
  
  # Store which metabolites to zero for each compartment
  metabolites_to_zero_prev <- prevalence_results$metabolites_to_zero_by_comp
  
  # Save detailed summary
  if(by_compartment && zero_instead_of_remove) {
    
    # Create summary dataframe
    summary_list <- list()
    
    for(comp in names(metabolites_to_zero_prev)) {
      summary_list[[comp]] <- data.frame(
        Compartment = comp,
        Metabolite = metabolites_to_zero_prev[[comp]],
        Reason = "Below_prevalence_threshold"
      )
    }
    
    prevalence_summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_list)
    
    # Save to Excel
    write_xlsx(list(
      Summary_by_compartment = prevalence_summary_df,
      Kept_by_compartment = data.frame(
        Compartment = rep(names(prevalence_results$kept_by_compartment), 
                         sapply(prevalence_results$kept_by_compartment, length)),
        Metabolite = unlist(prevalence_results$kept_by_compartment)
      )
    ), paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/Prevalence_Filtering_Zeroed_ByCompartment.xlsx"))
    
    cat("Detailed filtering saved to Prevalence_Filtering_Zeroed_ByCompartment.xlsx\n")
  }
  
  # Keep the filtered dataset for next step
  Metabo_selected_dataset_prev <- prevalence_results$filtered_df
  
  rm(Metabo_selected_dataset, prevalence_results)
  
  cat("\nPrevalence filtering completed\n\n")
}

#  Relative abundance filtering

if(RelAb_thresh != 0) {
  # Use previously filtered dataset or load new one
  if(exists("Metabo_selected_dataset_prev")) {
    Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset_prev
    rm(Metabo_selected_dataset_prev)
  } else {
    Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
      Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
      allComp = TRUE,
      removemachinesignal = FALSE,
      RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
      NormIS = TRUE,
      SortandTranspose = TRUE,
      RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
      JoinedallComp = TRUE,
      RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
      RemoveQC = TRUE,
      filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
      norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
      CenteredAndScaledBy = "not",
      RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
      prev_thresh_ = 0,
      RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
      Size = "All",
      mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
      rename_metabo = "FALSE",
      verbose = TRUE
    )
    
    analysis <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
    Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
    rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
    
    Metabo_selected_dataset[is.na(Metabo_selected_dataset)] <- 0
  }
  
  # Filter by abundance (BY COMPARTMENT with zeroing)
  abundance_results <- Select_by_centscaledRelAb(
    df = Metabo_selected_dataset,
    metadata_columns = c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage",
                        "Final_Germ_Percentage", "Sample", "Size", "Replicate", 
                        "Compartment", "Weight", "Labels"),
    minRelAb_thresh = -RelAb_thresh,
    maxRelAb_thresh = RelAb_thresh,
    by_compartment = by_compartment,
    zero_instead_of_remove = zero_instead_of_remove  # ← KEY PARAMETER
  )
  
  # Store which metabolites to zero for each compartment
  metabolites_to_zero_abund <- abundance_results$metabolites_to_zero_by_comp
  
  # Save detailed summary
  if(by_compartment && zero_instead_of_remove) {
    
    summary_list <- list()
    
    for(comp in names(metabolites_to_zero_abund)) {
      summary_list[[comp]] <- data.frame(
        Compartment = comp,
        Metabolite = metabolites_to_zero_abund[[comp]],
        Reason = "Below_abundance_threshold"
      )
    }
    
    abundance_summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_list)
    
    write_xlsx(list(
      Summary_by_compartment = abundance_summary_df,
      Kept_by_compartment = data.frame(
        Compartment = rep(names(abundance_results$kept_by_compartment), 
                         sapply(abundance_results$kept_by_compartment, length)),
        Metabolite = unlist(abundance_results$kept_by_compartment)
      )
    ), paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/Abundance_Filtering_Zeroed_ByCompartment.xlsx"))
    
    cat("Detailed filtering saved to Abundance_Filtering_Zeroed_ByCompartment.xlsx\n")
  }
  
  # Keep filtered dataset
  Metabo_selected_dataset_filtered <- abundance_results$filtered_df
  
  rm(Metabo_selected_dataset, abundance_results)
  
  cat("\nAbundance filtering completed\n\n")
}

#  apply

if(prev_thresh != 0 | RelAb_thresh != 0) {
  
  
  cat("APPLYING FILTERS TO ALL DATASETS\n")
  
  
  for(centscale in c("allComp", "perComp", "not")) {
    
    cat(paste0("\n--- CenteredScaledBy: ", centscale, " ---\n"))
    
    # Load dataset
    Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
      Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
      allComp = TRUE,
      removemachinesignal = FALSE,
      RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
      NormIS = TRUE,
      SortandTranspose = TRUE,
      RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
      JoinedallComp = TRUE,
      RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
      RemoveQC = TRUE,
      filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
      norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
      CenteredAndScaledBy = centscale,
      RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
      prev_thresh_ = 0,
      RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
      Size = "All",
      mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
      rename_metabo = "FALSE",
      verbose = FALSE
    )
    
    analysis <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
    Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
    rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
    
    # Get metadata columns
    metadata_columns <- c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage",
                         "Final_Germ_Percentage", "Sample", "Size", "Replicate", 
                         "Compartment", "Weight", "Labels")
    metadata_columns <- metadata_columns[metadata_columns %in% colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset)]
    
    # Apply filters by compartment (ZEROING)
    if(prev_thresh != 0 && exists("metabolites_to_zero_prev")) {
      
      for(comp in names(metabolites_to_zero_prev)) {
        comp_rows <- which(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment == comp)
        metabs_to_zero <- metabolites_to_zero_prev[[comp]]
        
        # Check which metabolites exist in current dataset
        metabs_to_zero <- intersect(metabs_to_zero, colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset))
        
        if(length(metabs_to_zero) > 0) {
          Metabo_selected_dataset[comp_rows, metabs_to_zero] <- 0
        }
      }
      
      analysis <- c(analysis, paste0("PrevThresh", round(prev_thresh, 2)))
      analysis <- c(analysis, "ByCompartment", "Zeroed")
      
      cat(paste0("  Prevalence: Values zeroed by compartment\n"))
    }
    
    if(RelAb_thresh != 0 && exists("metabolites_to_zero_abund")) {
      
      for(comp in names(metabolites_to_zero_abund)) {
        comp_rows <- which(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment == comp)
        metabs_to_zero <- metabolites_to_zero_abund[[comp]]
        
        metabs_to_zero <- intersect(metabs_to_zero, colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset))
        
        if(length(metabs_to_zero) > 0) {
          Metabo_selected_dataset[comp_rows, metabs_to_zero] <- 0
        }
      }
      
      analysis <- c(analysis, paste0("RelAbThresh", round(RelAb_thresh, 2)))
      analysis <- c(analysis, "ByCompartment", "Zeroed")
      
      cat(paste0("  Abundance: Values zeroed by compartment\n"))
    }
    
    # Save dataset
    output_file <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/", paste(unique(analysis), collapse = "_"), ".xlsx")
    write_xlsx(Metabo_selected_dataset, path = output_file)
    
    cat(paste0("  Saved: ", basename(output_file), "\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Total columns: ", ncol(Metabo_selected_dataset), " (all metabolites kept)\n"))
  }
  
  cat("\nAll datasets filtered and saved\n")
}

# Cleanup
if(exists("metabolites_to_zero_prev")) rm(metabolites_to_zero_prev)
if(exists("metabolites_to_zero_abund")) rm(metabolites_to_zero_abund)
if(exists("Metabo_selected_dataset")) rm(Metabo_selected_dataset)
if(exists("Metabo_selected_dataset_filtered")) rm(Metabo_selected_dataset_filtered)
if(exists("analysis")) rm(analysis)


cat("FILTERING COMPLETED\n")

```

## 3.3_Between compartments analysis _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

### 3.3.1_Seed compartments_PCA comparison on dataset centered-scaled on all compartments
```{r load dataset centered-scale on all comp, no prev filter, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# load data centered-scaled on all Comparts ####
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "allComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                   prev_thresh_ = 0,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                   rename_metabo = "TRUE",
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)
```
```{r PERMANOVA on predictor Compartment, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# Guard: verify dataset contains all three compartments before proceeding
stopifnot(
  "Metabo_selected_dataset must contain all compartments" =
    all(c("Cotyledon", "HRaxis", "Plumule") %in%
          unique(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment))
)
cat("Compartments present:", 
    paste(unique(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Total samples:", nrow(Metabo_selected_dataset), "\n")

Metabo_selected_dataset <- Order_legends(choice_order, Metabo_selected_dataset)

# Build metabolite matrix
GCMS_heat_mat <- Metabo_selected_dataset
rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) <- GCMS_heat_mat$Sample
Metabo_columns_Htmp <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset),
                                c("Varieties", "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                  "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                  "Sample", "Size", "Replicate", "Weight",
                                  "Compartment", "Compound.Name", "CompVar"))
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[, Metabo_columns_Htmp]
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
GCMS_heat_mat <- apply(GCMS_heat_mat, 2, as.numeric)

# Second guard: matrix must not be degenerate
cat("Matrix dimensions:", nrow(GCMS_heat_mat), "×", ncol(GCMS_heat_mat), "\n")
cat("Sum of all values:", sum(GCMS_heat_mat), "\n")
stopifnot("Matrix appears empty or constant" = sum(abs(GCMS_heat_mat)) > 0)

GCMS_meta <- Metabo_selected_dataset[, c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot",
                                          "Final_Em_Percentage", "Sample",
                                          "Size", "Replicate", "Compartment")]

# PERMANOVA
dist_mat   <- stats::dist(GCMS_heat_mat, method = "euclidean")
adonis_res <- adonis2(dist_mat ~ Compartment, data = GCMS_meta,
                      permutations = 999)
adonis_res

# PERMANOVA on first two PCs
pca        <- prcomp(GCMS_heat_mat, scale. = FALSE)  # note: on matrix, not dist
scores     <- pca$x[, 1:2]
adonis_res_pca <- adonis2(scores ~ Compartment, data = GCMS_meta,
                           method = "euclidean", permutations = 999)
adonis_res_pca

# Betadisper + permutest
bd      <- betadisper(dist_mat, GCMS_meta$Compartment)
bd_test <- permutest(bd, permutations = 999, pairwise = TRUE)

bd_pval      <- bd_test$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"]
bd_F         <- bd_test$tab["Groups", "F"]
bd_pairwise  <- bd_test$pairwise
bd_distances <- bd$group.distances

cat("\n BETADISPER SUMMARY \n")
cat(paste0("F = ", round(bd_F, 3), ", p = ", round(bd_pval, 3), "\n"))
cat("Average distances to median:\n")
print(round(bd_distances, 3))
cat("\nPairwise tests:\n")
print(bd_pairwise)

# Save key values for figure annotation BEFORE rm()
permanova_R2  <- round(adonis_res$R2[1], 3)
permanova_F   <- round(adonis_res$F[1], 1)
permanova_p   <- adonis_res$`Pr(>F)`[1]
betadisper_F  <- round(bd_F, 1)
betadisper_p  <- round(bd_pval, 3)

rm(pca, scores, adonis_res_pca, dist_mat, GCMS_meta, adonis_res,
   GCMS_heat_mat, bd, bd_test)
```
```{r PCA 2D All compartments no labels, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
name_fig_dataset = paste0("Fig_PCA_Metabo_noLabels", "_",
                          paste(analysis,collapse="_"))

# All sizes all Compartments ####
# per_comp: per compartment, if chosen_compart is selected (among "Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HR_axis")
# per_size: per seed size, if chosen_size is selected (among "1","2","3")
# color_plot: color graph according to Compartments ("byComp") or Varieties ("byVar")
# choice_color: color scale to be attributed to Varieties according to "FEP", "FGP" or other seed attribute. see setup Color choice.

Fig3A <- PCA_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor(per_comp = FALSE,
                                  per_size = FALSE,
                                  shape_per = "",
                                  color_plot = "byComp",
                                  choice_color = "FEP",
                                  Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset,
                                  to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
                                  save_fig = TRUE,
                                  name_fig = paste0("Metabo/", name_fig_dataset,"ALL_"),
                                  ellipse_per = "Compartment"
                                   )

# Build annotation text
permanova_label <- paste0(
  "PERMANOVA: R² = ", permanova_R2,
  ", F = ", permanova_F,
  ", p = ", ifelse(permanova_p <= 0.001, "< 0.001",
                   paste0("= ", permanova_p)), "\n",
  "Betadisper: F = ", betadisper_F,
  ", p = ", ifelse(betadisper_p <= 0.001, "< 0.001",
                   paste0("= ", betadisper_p))
)

Fig3A <- Fig3A +
  annotate("text",
           x = -Inf,
           y = -Inf,
           label = permanova_label,
           hjust = -0.05,
           vjust = -0.3,
           size = 2.8,
           color = "grey30",
           fontface = "italic")

Fig3A
```

*PERMANOVA*
adonis2(formula = dist_mat ~ Compartment, data = GCMS_meta, permutations = 999)
          Df SumOfSqs      R2      F Pr(>F)    
Model      2     6657 0.19425 16.153  0.001 ***
Residual 134    27615 0.80575                  
Total    136    34272 1.00000                      

Compartment explains 19.4% of total variance (F = 16.2, p = 0.001) — highly significant, robust result.

*PERMANOVA on first two PCs*
adonis2(formula = scores ~ Compartment, data = GCMS_meta, permutations = 999, method = "euclidean")
          Df SumOfSqs      R2      F Pr(>F)    
Model      2   6024.7 0.57925 92.239  0.001 ***
Residual 134   4376.2 0.42075                  
Total    136  10400.9 1.00000       

Compartment explains 57.9% of PC1+PC2 variance (F = 92.2, p = 0.001) — compartment differences are concentrated in the major axes of variation, the PCA separation is real and not driven by noise dimensions.
* BETADISPER SUMMARY *
F = 13.572, p = 0.001

Average distances to median:
Cotyledon    HRaxis   Plumule 
    8.976    13.929    14.980  

bd_pairwise
$observed
 Cotyledon-HRaxis Cotyledon-Plumule    HRaxis-Plumule 
     1.334821e-04      1.633000e-08      4.002385e-01 

$permuted
 Cotyledon-HRaxis Cotyledon-Plumule    HRaxis-Plumule 
            0.001             0.001             0.424  
            
— dispersion does differ significantly across compartments. Cotyledon is substantially more homogeneous (mean distance to median = 8.98) than HRaxis (13.93) or Plumule (14.98). The pairwise tests show this is driven entirely by Cotyledon being different from both HRaxis (p = 0.001) and Plumule (p = 0.001), while HRaxis and Plumule do not differ from each other (p = 0.424).

### 3.3.2_Seed compartments_all metabolites total Heatmap on dataset centered-scaled on all Compartments, prevThresh = 0.2
```{r load dataset AllComp, scaled on all compartments, filtered by prevalence, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "allComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = choice_prev_thresh,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE", ##############################################
                                   rename_metabo = "TRUE", #########################################################$
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

name_fig_dataset = paste0("Fig_Heatmap_Metabo", paste(analysis[(length(analysis)-3):length(analysis)],collapse="_"))
k_Comparts = 3
```
```{r Heatmap all metabolites TOREMOVE, eval=FALSE}
 # data preparation ####
num_quantiles = 20

Metabo_selected_dataset <- Order_legends(choice_order, Metabo_selected_dataset)
#Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset[, setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), c("Pipecolic.acid,.2TMS.derivative"))]
GCMS_heat_mat <- Metabo_selected_dataset
rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) <- GCMS_heat_mat$Sample
Metabo_columns_Htmp <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), c("Varieties",
                                                                    "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                                    "t50germ",
                                                                    "t50tot",
                                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                                   "Sample",
                                                                   "Size",
                                                                   "Replicate",
                                                                   "Weight",
                                                                   "Compartment",
                                                                   "Compound.Name",
                                                                   "CompVar"
                                                                   ))
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[,Metabo_columns_Htmp]
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)

# "Linex_T2_C3", Estradiol 2TMS
# ""Facila_T2_C3", Chlorogenic acid

# color scale ####


quantile_breaks <- quantile(GCMS_heat_mat, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = num_quantiles), na.rm = TRUE) 

# Remove duplicate breaks (if any)
distinct_breaks <- unique(quantile_breaks)

# Adjust the length of the color palette to match the number of distinct breaks
#red_to_blue <- c("#800026", "#BD0026", "#E31A1C", "#FC4E2A", "#FD8D3C", "#FEB24C", "#FED976", "#FFEDA0", "#FFFFCC", "white" , "#F7FBFF", "#C6DBEF", "#9ECAE1", "#6BAED6", "#4292C6", "#2171B5", "#08519C", "#08306B", "#3F007D", "#54278F")
#yellow_red_blue <- c("white", "#FFFFCC", "#FFEDA0", "#FED976", "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#FC4E2A", "#E31A1C", "#BD0026", "#800026","#54278F", "#3F007D",     "#08306B", "#08519C", "#2171B5", "#4292C6", "#6BAED6", "#9ECAE1", "#C6DBEF", "#F7FBFF")
#red_white_blue <- c("#800000", "#B22222", "#DC143C", "#FF4500", "#FF6347", "#FF7F7F", "#FFB6B6", "#FFD5D5", "#FFEDED", "#FFFFFF",  "#E0ECF8", "#C6D8F0", "#9EC6E8", "#6CA6CD", "#4682B4", "#357ABD", "#2171B5", "#104E8B", "#08306B", "#000080")
#heatmap_colors <-rev(c("#4575B4","#5984BC","#6E93C4","#83A3CD","#97B2D5","#ACC1DD","#C1D1E6","#D5E0EE","#EAEFF6","#FFFFFF","#FAE8E7","#F6D1CF","#F1BAB7","#EDA39F","#E88C87","#E4756F","#DF5E57","#DB473F","#D73027"))
heatmap_colors <- #c("white", "#D3D3D3", "#A9A9A9", "#808080",  "#6B6B8A", "#4B4B6B", "#2D1B69", "#1A0A3B")
                  #c("white", "#C0C0C0", "#7B6B8A", "#5B4B7B",  "#4B3B6B", "#3B2B5B", "#2D1B69", "#1A0A3B")
                  c("yellow", "#FFF9C4", "#FFFDE7", "#FFFEF5", "#F8F5FF", "#F5F0FF", "#E8E0F0", "#C9B8E0", "#AA90D0", "#8B68C0", "#6C40B0", "#4D1890",  "#2D0070")

custom_colors <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = distinct_breaks,
  colors = colorRampPalette(
    heatmap_colors)(length(distinct_breaks))
)
# Test : cap display at ±6 so that extreme values do not dominate the color scale
custom_colors <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = seq(-5, 6, length.out = length(distinct_breaks)),
  colors = colorRampPalette(
    heatmap_colors
  )(length(distinct_breaks))
)

# clustering without information ####
partitionning <- pam(GCMS_heat_mat, k=k_Comparts)

# Define colors for each levels of qualitative variables ####
# Define gradient color for continuous variable (mpg)
col = list(Compartment = c("Plumule" = "green", "Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Exudate" = "lightblue"),
           Varieties = color_by_emergence)

# Create the heatmap annotation ####
heatmap_annotations <- rowAnnotation(
  Varieties = Metabo_selected_dataset$Varieties,
  Compartment = Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment,
  col = col,
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),  # Adjust font size for annotation names
  annotation_name_rot = 45  # Rotate the annotation names 45 degrees
)

# Manually create a legend object to show all colors
custom_legend <- Legend(
  col_fun = custom_colors, 
  at = distinct_breaks,  # Specify breaks for the legend
  labels = round(distinct_breaks, 2),  # Format the labels to two decimal places
  title = "Scaled relative abundance", # Legend title
  title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),  # Title font size
  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)   # Labels font size
)
# Plot ####
Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar <- Heatmap(GCMS_heat_mat,
        name = "Scaled relative abundance", # legend title
        column_title = "Globally centered-scaled metabolite relative abundance",
        row_title = "Samples",
        show_row_names = TRUE, show_column_names = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3), # text size for row names
        #show_row_hclust = FALSE, 
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        clustering_method_columns = "complete", 
        clustering_distance_columns = "euclidean",
        #split = GCMS_df$Compartment
        split = paste0("pam", partitionning$clustering),
        left_annotation = heatmap_annotations,
        col = custom_colors,  # Apply custom color scale
        na_col = "grey90",  # Color for NA values
        heatmap_legend_param = list(legend = custom_legend))
Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar
draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

#rm(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar)
```
```{r Heatmap all metabolites, eval=TRUE}
# data preparation ####
num_quantiles = 20

Metabo_selected_dataset <- Order_legends(choice_order, Metabo_selected_dataset)
#Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_dataset[, setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), c("Pipecolic.acid,.2TMS.derivative"))]
GCMS_heat_mat <- Metabo_selected_dataset
rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) <- GCMS_heat_mat$Sample
Metabo_columns_Htmp <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), c("Varieties",
                                                                    "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                                    "t50germ",
                                                                    "t50tot",
                                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                                   "Sample",
                                                                   "Size",
                                                                   "Replicate",
                                                                   "Weight",
                                                                   "Compartment",
                                                                   "Compound.Name",
                                                                   "CompVar"
                                                                   ))
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[,Metabo_columns_Htmp]
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)

# "Linex_T2_C3", Estradiol 2TMS
# ""Facila_T2_C3", Chlorogenic acid

# color scale ####


quantile_breaks <- quantile(GCMS_heat_mat, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = num_quantiles), na.rm = TRUE) 

# Remove duplicate breaks (if any)
distinct_breaks <- unique(quantile_breaks)

# Adjust the length of the color palette to match the number of distinct breaks
manual_breaks <- c(-5, -3, -2, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 11, 15)
color_vec <- colorRampPalette(
  c("yellow", "#FFF9C4", "#FFFDE7", "#FFFEF5", "#F8F5FF",
    "#F5F0FF", "#E8E0F0", "#C9B8E0", "#AA90D0", "#8B68C0",
    "#6C40B0", "#4D1890", "#2D0070")
)(length(manual_breaks))

custom_colors <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = manual_breaks,
  colors = color_vec
)

custom_legend <- Legend(
  col_fun = custom_colors,
  at = c(-5, -2, 0, 2, 5, 10, 15),
  labels = c("-5", "-2", "0", "2", "5", "10", "15"),
  title = "Scaled relative abundance",
  title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)
)

# clustering without information ####
partitionning <- pam(GCMS_heat_mat, k=k_Comparts)

# Define colors for each levels of qualitative variables ####
# Define gradient color for continuous variable (mpg)
col = list(Compartment = c("Plumule" = "green", "Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Exudate" = "lightblue"),
           Varieties = color_by_emergence)

# Create the heatmap annotation ####
heatmap_annotations <- rowAnnotation(
  Varieties = Metabo_selected_dataset$Varieties,
  Compartment = Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment,
  col = col,
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),  # Adjust font size for annotation names
  annotation_name_rot = 45  # Rotate the annotation names 45 degrees
)

# Plot ####
Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar <- Heatmap(GCMS_heat_mat,
        name = "Scaled relative abundance", # legend title
        column_title = "Globally centered-scaled metabolite relative abundance",
        row_title = "Samples",
        show_row_names = TRUE, show_column_names = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3), # text size for row names
        #show_row_hclust = FALSE, 
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        clustering_method_columns = "complete", 
        clustering_distance_columns = "euclidean",
        #split = GCMS_df$Compartment
        split = paste0("pam", partitionning$clustering),
        left_annotation = heatmap_annotations,
        col = custom_colors,  # Apply custom color scale
        na_col = "grey90",  # Color for NA values
        heatmap_legend_param = list(legend = custom_legend))
Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar
draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

#rm(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar)
```

png(filename = paste0(choice_path_fig_article,

global_heatmap_grob <- grid.grabExpr(
  draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar,
       heatmap_legend_side = "right",
       annotation_legend_side = "right",
