```{r use heatmap as panel, eval=FALSE}
)

# Then use it in patchwork or cowplot
panel_heatmap <- wrap_elements(full = global_heatmap_grob)

panel_heatmap
```
### 3.3.3_Seed compartments_differentially abundant metabolites in each compartment
```{r differentially abundant metabolites between compartments, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
Metabo_columns_Htmp <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset), c("Varieties",
                                                                    "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                                    "t50germ",
                                                                    "t50tot",
                                                                   "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                                   "Sample",
                                                                   "Size",
                                                                   "Replicate",
                                                                   "Weight",
                                                                   "Compartment",
                                                                   "Compound.Name",
                                                                   "CompVar"
                                                                   ))
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[,Metabo_columns_Htmp]
GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
GCMS_heat_mat <- apply(GCMS_heat_mat, 2, as.numeric)
GCMS_meta <- Metabo_selected_dataset[, c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Em_Percentage","Sample","Size","Replicate","Compartment")]


# Assuming GCMS_heat_mat (samples x metabolites), GCMS_meta$Compartment (factor)
pvals <- apply(GCMS_heat_mat, 2, function(met) {
  kruskal.test(met ~ GCMS_meta$Compartment)$p.value  # non-parametric
  # Or: aov(met ~ GCMS_meta$Compartment)$p.value for ANOVA
})

# Adjust for multiple testing
padj <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "BH")

# Metabolites significant in at least one compartment (padj < 0.05)
sig_metabs <- names(padj)[padj < 0.05]

# For each sig metabolite, check which compartment has highest median
diff_abundant <- sapply(sig_metabs, function(met) {
  meds <- tapply(GCMS_heat_mat[, met], GCMS_meta$Compartment, median)
  highest_comp <- names(meds)[which.max(meds)]
  # Confirm it's significantly higher than others (pairwise Dunn test)
  dunn_res <- dunnTest(GCMS_heat_mat[, met] ~ GCMS_meta$Compartment,
                       method = "bh")$res
  p_vs_others <- min(dunn_res$P.adj[dunn_res$Comparison != highest_comp])
  c(Compartment = highest_comp, p_vs_others = p_vs_others)
})

# List: metabolites enriched in each compartment
enriched_by_comp <- as.data.frame(t(diff_abundant))
enriched_by_comp <- subset(enriched_by_comp, p_vs_others < 0.05) %>% arrange(Compartment)
enriched_by_comp$Metabolites <- rownames(enriched_by_comp)

writexl::write_xlsx(enriched_by_comp, path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/EnrichedMetabo_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"), ".xlsx"))

# enriched lists
enriched_by_comp[enriched_by_comp$Compartment == "Cotyledon",]$Metabolites
enriched_by_comp[enriched_by_comp$Compartment == "HRaxis",]$Metabolites
enriched_by_comp[enriched_by_comp$Compartment == "Plumule",]$Metabolites
```
p_vs_others values from dunnTest are adjusted p-values for pairwise comparisons between the highest compartment and each of the other compartments.
*Cotyledon*
2,6-Dimethylaniline, 3-Hydroxybenzoic acid, D-Erythrose-4-phosphate, D-Fructose6-phosphate,, D-Galactose D2, D-Ribose5-phosphate D2, Malic acid, N-Acetyl-L-alanine D2, Pyruvic acid, Ribulose-5-Phosphate D2, Saccharic acid, Shikimic acid
*HR-axis*
Allantoin, D-Ribose5-phosphate, Dicyclohexylamine, L-Methionine, Ribulose-5-Phosphate, Sinapinic acid
*Plumule*
2,3-Diaminopropanoic acid, 4-Aminobutanoic acid, Adenine, Allocholic acid, Citrulline, D-Citramalic acid, Heptadecanoic acid, L-Cysteine, L-MethionineSulfone, Maleamate, Sucrose, Urocanic acid
```{r clean heatmap, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
rm(col, diff_abundant, enriched_by_comp, GCMS_heat_mat, GCMS_meta, heatmap_annotations, partitionning,distinct_breaks, heatmap_colors, k_Comparts, kVarieties, num_quantiles, quantile_breaks, white_to_blue)
```
## 3.4_By compartments analysis on prev_thresh = 0.2_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
### 3.4.1_filtered dataset evaluation (prev_thresh)
```{r check sample balance btw varieties and compartments, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# All Comparts ####
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "allComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = 0.3,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                   rename_metabo = "FALSE",
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

Metabo_nb_sample_Var_Comp <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>%
  group_by(Varieties, Compartment) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(num = n())

Metabo_nb_sample_Var_Comp <- pivot_wider(Metabo_nb_sample_Var_Comp, names_from = Compartment, values_from = num)
Metabo_nb_sample_Var_Comp

writexl::write_xlsx(Metabo_nb_sample_Var_Comp, path = paste0(choice_path_data,  "Metabo/prev0.3_Nb_samples_", paste(analysis,collapse="_"), ".xlsx"))

#Metabo_selected_dataset_prevthresh0 <- Metabo_selected_dataset
```
```{r summarize metabolites kept per compartment, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
#' Create summary of metabolites kept per compartment after filtering
#' 
#' @param df Filtered dataframe with Compartment column
#' @param metadata_columns Vector of metadata column names
#' @param filtering_type Character: "prevalence", "abundance", or "both"
#' @param save_excel Logical: save to Excel file?
#' @param output_path Path for Excel output (if save_excel = TRUE)
#' 
#' @return Dataframe with summary statistics per compartment
Summarize_Metabolites_By_Compartment <- function(
    df,
    metadata_columns = c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage",
                        "Final_Germ_Percentage", "Sample", "Size", "Replicate",
                        "Compartment", "Weight", "Labels"),
    filtering_type = "both",
    save_excel = TRUE,
    output_path = NULL
) {
  
  # Check if Compartment column exists
  if(!"Compartment" %in% colnames(df)) {
    stop("Column 'Compartment' not found in dataframe")
  }
  
  # Identify metabolite columns
  metadata_columns <- metadata_columns[metadata_columns %in% colnames(df)]
  metabolite_columns <- setdiff(colnames(df), metadata_columns)
  
  
  cat("SUMMARY OF METABOLITES PER COMPARTMENT\n")
  
  
  # Get unique compartments
  compartments <- unique(df$Compartment)
  
  # Initialize summary dataframe
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    Compartment = character(),
    N_samples = integer(),
    N_metabolites_total = integer(),
    N_metabolites_with_data = integer(),
    N_metabolites_completely_zero = integer(),
    Percent_with_data = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Loop through compartments
  for(comp in compartments) {
    
    # Filter data for this compartment
    df_comp <- df %>% filter(Compartment == comp)
    
    # Count samples
    n_samples <- nrow(df_comp)
    
    # Total metabolites
    n_total <- length(metabolite_columns)
    
    # Metabolites with at least one non-zero value in this compartment
    n_with_data <- sum(colSums(df_comp[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
    
    # Metabolites completely zero in this compartment
    n_zero <- n_total - n_with_data
    
    # Percentage
    percent_with_data <- round((n_with_data / n_total) * 100, 2)
    
    # Add to summary
    summary_df <- rbind(summary_df, data.frame(
      Compartment = comp,
      N_samples = n_samples,
      N_metabolites_total = n_total,
      N_metabolites_with_data = n_with_data,
      N_metabolites_completely_zero = n_zero,
      Percent_with_data = percent_with_data
    ))
    
    # Print compartment info
    cat(paste0(comp, ":\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Samples: ", n_samples, "\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Total metabolites: ", n_total, "\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Metabolites with data: ", n_with_data, " (", percent_with_data, "%)\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Metabolites zeroed: ", n_zero, "\n\n"))
  }
  
  # Overall summary
  cat(" OVERALL SUMMARY \n")
  cat(paste0("Total metabolites in dataset: ", n_total, "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Metabolites with data in at least 1 compartment: ", 
             sum(colSums(df[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Metabolites completely zero in all compartments: ",
             sum(colSums(df[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) == 0), "\n\n"))
  
  # Save to Excel if requested
  if(save_excel) {
    
    # Create detailed metabolite list per compartment
    metabolite_details_list <- list()
    
    for(comp in compartments) {
      df_comp <- df %>% filter(Compartment == comp)
      
      metabolite_status <- data.frame(
        Metabolite = metabolite_columns,
        Has_data = colSums(df_comp[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
        N_non_zero_samples = colSums(df_comp[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE),
        Prevalence = colMeans(df_comp[, metabolite_columns] != 0, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean_value = colMeans(df_comp[, metabolite_columns], na.rm = TRUE),
        SD_value = apply(df_comp[, metabolite_columns], 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
        Min_value = apply(df_comp[, metabolite_columns], 2, min, na.rm = TRUE),
        Max_value = apply(df_comp[, metabolite_columns], 2, max, na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
        mutate(
          Status = ifelse(Has_data, "Kept", "Zeroed"),
          Compartment = comp
        ) %>%
        select(Compartment, Metabolite, Status, N_non_zero_samples, Prevalence, 
               Mean_value, SD_value, Min_value, Max_value)
      
      metabolite_details_list[[comp]] <- metabolite_status
    }
    
    # Combine all compartments
    all_metabolite_details <- bind_rows(metabolite_details_list)
    
    # Create comparison matrix (metabolite x compartment)
    comparison_matrix <- all_metabolite_details %>%
      select(Compartment, Metabolite, Status) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Compartment, values_from = Status, values_fill = "NA")
    
    # Create prevalence matrix
    prevalence_matrix <- all_metabolite_details %>%
      select(Compartment, Metabolite, Prevalence) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Compartment, values_from = Prevalence, values_fill = 0)
    
    # Default output path
    if(is.null(output_path)) {
      output_path <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/Metabolites_Summary_ByCompartment_",
                           format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d"), ".xlsx")
    }
    
    # Save to Excel
    write_xlsx(list(
      Summary = summary_df,
      Details_by_compartment = all_metabolite_details,
      Status_matrix = comparison_matrix,
      Prevalence_matrix = prevalence_matrix
    ), path = output_path)
    
    cat(paste0("Detailed summary saved to:\n  ", output_path, "\n\n"))
  }
  
  return(summary_df)
}

# HELPER FUNCTION: Compare before/after filtering

#' Compare metabolite counts before and after filtering
#' 
#' @param df_before Dataframe before filtering
#' @param df_after Dataframe after filtering
#' @param metadata_columns Vector of metadata column names
#' 
#' @return Comparison dataframe
Compare_Before_After_Filtering <- function(df_before, df_after,
                                           metadata_columns = c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot",
                                                               "Final_Em_Percentage","Sample",
                                                               "Size","Replicate","Compartment",
                                                               "Weight","Labels")) {
  meta_before <- metadata_columns[metadata_columns %in% colnames(df_before)]
  meta_after  <- metadata_columns[metadata_columns %in% colnames(df_after)]
  
  metab_before <- setdiff(colnames(df_before), meta_before)
  metab_after  <- setdiff(colnames(df_after),  meta_after)
  
  compartments <- unique(df_before$Compartment)
  
  comparison_df <- data.frame(
    Compartment = character(),
    N_metabolites_before = integer(),
    N_metabolites_after = integer(),
    N_metabolites_lost = integer(),
    Percent_retained = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  
  cat("BEFORE/AFTER FILTERING COMPARISON\n")
  
  
  for(comp in compartments){
    df_comp_before <- df_before[df_before$Compartment == comp, ]
    df_comp_after  <- df_after[df_after$Compartment == comp, ]
    
    n_before <- sum(colSums(df_comp_before[, metab_before] != 0,
                            na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
    n_after  <- sum(colSums(df_comp_after[,  metab_after]  != 0,
                            na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
    n_lost   <- n_before - n_after
    pct      <- round((n_after / n_before) * 100, 2)
    
    comparison_df <- rbind(comparison_df, data.frame(
      Compartment = comp,
      N_metabolites_before = n_before,
      N_metabolites_after = n_after,
      N_metabolites_lost = n_lost,
      Percent_retained = pct
    ))
    
    cat(paste0(comp, ":\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Before: ", n_before, " metabolites\n"))
    cat(paste0("  After:  ", n_after,  " metabolites\n"))
    cat(paste0("  Lost:   ", n_lost,   " metabolites (",
               round(100 - pct, 2), "%)\n\n"))
  }
  
  cat(paste0("Average retention: ",
             round(mean(comparison_df$Percent_retained), 2), "%\n\n"))
  
  return(comparison_df)
}
```
```{r check number of metabolites before and after filtering, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
df_after <- readxl::read_xlsx(
  paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_RemoveAlcans_RemoveQC_filterSamplebySeedWeight_RemovePCAOutliers_CentScaledperComp_PrevThresh0.2.xlsx"))

df_before <- readxl::read_xlsx(
  
  paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/GCMS_df_allComp_RemovedXylOutliers_NormIS_SortandTranspose_RemoveCheckedFragments_JoinedallComp_RemoveAlcans_RemoveQC_filterSamplebySeedWeight_RemovePCAOutliers_notCentScaled.xlsx")
)

# Compare
comparison <- Compare_Before_After_Filtering(
  df_before = df_before,
  df_after = df_after
)
```
tests whether the 8 varieties have homogeneous dispersion within each compartment
```{r PERMANOVA within compartments for Variety and phenotype effects, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::var)

# Load per-compartment scaled dataset
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
  allComp = TRUE,
  removemachinesignal = FALSE,
  RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
  NormIS = TRUE,
  SortandTranspose = TRUE,
  RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
  JoinedallComp = TRUE,
  RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
  RemoveQC = TRUE,
  filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
  norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
  CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
  RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
  prev_thresh_ = choice_prev_thresh,
  RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
  Size = "All",
  mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
  rename_metabo = "TRUE",
  verbose = FALSE
)
analysis_perm        <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_perComp_data  <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

metadata_cols_perm <- c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Germ_Percentage",
                        "Final_Em_Percentage","Size","Replicate","Compartment",
                        "Weight","Sample","Labels")

permanova_results <- list()

for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "HRaxis", "Plumule")){
  
  
  cat(paste0("PERMANOVA within: ", comp, "\n"))
  
  
  # Filter to compartment
  df_comp <- Metabo_perComp_data[Metabo_perComp_data$Compartment == comp, ]
  
  # Build metabolite matrix
  metab_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_comp), metadata_cols_perm)
  mat <- as.matrix(df_comp[, metab_cols])
  mat[is.na(mat)] <- 0
  rownames(mat)   <- df_comp$Sample
  
  # Metadata
  meta_comp <- df_comp[, c("Varieties","t50germ","Final_Em_Percentage",
                            "Size","Replicate","Sample")]
  
  # Distance matrix
  dist_comp <- stats::dist(mat, method = "euclidean")
  
  # PERMANOVA: Variety effect
  perm_variety <- adonis2(dist_comp ~ Varieties, data = meta_comp,
                          permutations = 999)
  cat("Variety effect:\n")
  print(perm_variety)
  
  # PERMANOVA: t50germ effect
  perm_t50 <- adonis2(dist_comp ~ t50germ, data = meta_comp,
                      permutations = 999)
  cat("\nt50germ effect:\n")
  print(perm_t50)
  
  # PERMANOVA: FEP effect
  perm_fep <- adonis2(dist_comp ~ Final_Em_Percentage, data = meta_comp,
                      permutations = 999)
  cat("\nFinal_Em_Percentage effect:\n")
  print(perm_fep)
  
  # PERMANOVA: Variety + t50germ + FEP combined
  perm_combined <- adonis2(dist_comp ~ Varieties + t50germ + Final_Em_Percentage,
                           data = meta_comp, permutations = 999)
  cat("\nCombined (Varieties + t50germ + FEP):\n")
  print(perm_combined)
  
  # Betadisper for Variety
  bd_variety <- betadisper(dist_comp, meta_comp$Varieties)
  bd_test    <- permutest(bd_variety, permutations = 999)
  cat("\nBetadisper (Variety dispersion):\n")
  print(bd_test)
  
  # Store results
  permanova_results[[comp]] <- list(
    variety = perm_variety,
    t50germ = perm_t50,
    fep = perm_fep,
    combined = perm_combined,
    betadisper_variety = bd_test
  )
}

# Summary table
summary_permanova <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(permanova_results), function(comp){
  res <- permanova_results[[comp]]
  data.frame(
    Compartment = comp,
    Effect = c("Varieties", "t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage"),
    R2 = c(res$variety$R2[1],
              res$t50germ$R2[1],
              res$fep$R2[1]),
    F = c(res$variety$F[1],
              res$t50germ$F[1],
              res$fep$F[1]),
    p = c(res$variety$`Pr(>F)`[1],
              res$t50germ$`Pr(>F)`[1],
              res$fep$`Pr(>F)`[1])
  )
}))

cat("\n SUMMARY TABLE \n")
print(summary_permanova)

write_xlsx(summary_permanova,
           path = paste0(choice_path_data,
                         "Metabo/PERMANOVA_perCompartment_summary.xlsx"))
```
 - the effect of variety on metabolome composition (how much genotype drives metabolomic variation),
 - the effect of t50germ and FEP as continuous predictors,
 - and the combined model partitioning variance among all three
The betadisper test for Variety checks whether the significant Variety effect reflects true centroid differences rather than dispersion differences.

### 3.4.2_all metabolites Heatmaps by Compartments on dataset centered-scaled per Compartments
```{r load dataset centered-scaled per seed compartment and filtered by prevalence, eval=FALSE}
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = prev_thresh,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE", ##############################################
                                   rename_metabo = "TRUE", #########################################################$
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

name_fig_dataset = paste0("Fig_Heatmap_Metabo", paste(analysis[(length(analysis)-3):length(analysis)],collapse="_"))
```
```{r Heatmap all metabolites by Compart forced Varieties, eval=FALSE}
Metab <- "Metabo"
ChosenCompartsVect <- c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis") # , "Exudate"

Metabo_selected_dataset <- Order_legends(choice_order, Metabo_selected_dataset)
num_quantiles = 20
# Define colors for each levels of qualitative variables ####
# Define gradient color for continuous variable (mpg)
col = list(Compartment = c("Plumule" = "green", "Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Exudate" = "lightblue"),
           Varieties = color_by_emergence)

for (chosen_comparts in ChosenCompartsVect){
  # data preparation ####
  if(Metab == "Metabo"){
    Metabo_selected_htmp <- Metabo_selected_dataset[
      Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment == chosen_comparts, ]
  }

  GCMS_heat_mat <- Metabo_selected_htmp
  rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) <- GCMS_heat_mat$Sample
  
  Metabo_columns_Htmp <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_htmp),
                                  c("Varieties", "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                    "t50germ", "t50tot", "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                    "Sample", "Size", "Replicate", "Weight",
                                    "Compartment", "Compound.Name", "CompVar"))
  
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[, Metabo_columns_Htmp]
  # Save rownames before apply strips them
  sample_names  <- rownames(GCMS_heat_mat)

  # Convert to numeric matrix
  GCMS_heat_mat <- apply(GCMS_heat_mat, 2, as.numeric)
  if (!is.matrix(GCMS_heat_mat)) {
    GCMS_heat_mat <- matrix(GCMS_heat_mat, nrow = length(sample_names))
  }
  rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) <- sample_names
  
  # replace both NA and NaN
  GCMS_heat_mat[is.na(GCMS_heat_mat)] <- 0
  GCMS_heat_mat[is.nan(GCMS_heat_mat)] <- 0
  
  # use na.rm = TRUE in colSums to handle any residual issues
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[, colSums(GCMS_heat_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0]
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[, colSums(abs(GCMS_heat_mat), na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  
  # Diagnostic check
  cat(chosen_comparts, "- matrix:", nrow(GCMS_heat_mat), "×",
      ncol(GCMS_heat_mat), "\n")
  cat("  Remaining NA:", sum(is.na(GCMS_heat_mat)),
      "| NaN:", sum(is.nan(GCMS_heat_mat)), "\n")
  cat("  Value range: [", round(min(GCMS_heat_mat), 3), ",",
      round(max(GCMS_heat_mat), 3), "]\n")
  
  # Color scale - must be computed after cleaning
  custom_colors <- colorRamp2(
    c(min(GCMS_heat_mat, na.rm = TRUE), 0,
      max(GCMS_heat_mat, na.rm = TRUE)),
    c("#3F007D", "white", "#800026")
  )
  
  # pass the matrix directly, ensure annotations align
  # Check rowname alignment between matrix and annotation source
  stopifnot(all(rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) == Metabo_selected_htmp$Sample))
  
  heatmap_annotations <- rowAnnotation(
    Varieties = Metabo_selected_htmp$Varieties,
    Compartment = Metabo_selected_htmp$Compartment,
    col = col,
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    annotation_name_rot = 45
  )

  # Plot - GCMS_heat_mat is now a proper numeric matrix
  Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap <- Heatmap(
    GCMS_heat_mat,                        # matrix, not data frame
    name = "Scaled relative abundance",
    column_title = "Centered-scaled metabolite relative abundance",
    row_title = "Samples",
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
    show_column_dend = FALSE,
    clustering_method_columns = "complete",
    clustering_distance_columns = "euclidean",
    clustering_method_rows = "complete",
    clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
    split = Metabo_selected_htmp$Compartment,
    cluster_row_slices = FALSE,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    left_annotation = heatmap_annotations,
    col = custom_colors,
    na_col = "grey90"
  )
  
  draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
  
  # Save
  png(filename = paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                        "Metabo/Fig_GCMS_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_",
                        chosen_comparts, name_fig_dataset, ".png"),
      width = 4000, height = 2500, units = "px", res = 300)
  draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap,
       heatmap_legend_side = "right",
       annotation_legend_side = "right",
       padding = unit(c(2, 2, 2, 10), "mm"),
       merge_legends = TRUE,
       ht_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
       legend_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
       column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12))
  dev.off()
}
```
```{r Heatmap all metabolites by Compart cluster Varieties test, eval=FALSE}
kVarieties = 8

ChosenCompartsVect <- c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis")

Metabo_selected_dataset <- Order_legends(choice_order, Metabo_selected_dataset)
num_quantiles = 20
# Define colors for each levels of qualitative variables ####
# Define gradient color for continuous variable (mpg)
col = list(Compartment = c("Plumule" = "green", "Cotyledon" = "brown", "HRaxis" = "orange", "Exudate" = "lightblue"),
           Varieties = color_by_emergence)



for (chosen_comparts in ChosenCompartsVect){
 # data preparation ####
    Metabo_selected_htmp <- Metabo_selected_dataset[Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment == chosen_comparts,]
  

  GCMS_heat_mat <- Metabo_selected_htmp
  rownames(GCMS_heat_mat) <- GCMS_heat_mat$Sample
  Metabo_columns_Htmp <- setdiff(colnames(Metabo_selected_htmp), c("Varieties",
                                                                      "Final_Germ_Percentage",
                                                                      "t50germ",
                                                                      "t50tot",
                                                                     "Final_Em_Percentage",
                                                                     "Sample",
                                                                     "Size",
                                                                     "Replicate",
                                                                     "Weight",
                                                                     "Compartment",
                                                                     "Compound.Name",
                                                                     "CompVar"
                                                                     ))
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[,Metabo_columns_Htmp]
  
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat %>% replace(is.na(.), 0)
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[, colSums(GCMS_heat_mat != 0) > 0]
  GCMS_heat_mat <- GCMS_heat_mat[, colSums(GCMS_heat_mat) != 0]
  # "Linex_T2_C3", Estradiol 2TMS
  # ""Facila_T2_C3", Chlorogenic acid

  
quantile_breaks <- quantile(GCMS_heat_mat, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = num_quantiles), na.rm = TRUE) 
# Remove duplicate breaks (if any)
distinct_breaks <- unique(quantile_breaks)
heatmap_colors <-rev(c("#4575B4","#5984BC","#6E93C4","#83A3CD","#97B2D5","#ACC1DD","#C1D1E6","#D5E0EE","#EAEFF6","#FFFFFF","#FAE8E7","#F6D1CF","#F1BAB7","#EDA39F","#E88C87","#E4756F","#DF5E57","#DB473F","#D73027"))
custom_colors <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = distinct_breaks,
  colors = colorRampPalette(
    rev(heatmap_colors))(length(distinct_breaks))
)
    
  #c("white", "#FFFFCC", "#FFEDA0", "#FED976", "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#FC4E2A", "#E31A1C", "#BD0026", "#800026","#54278F", "#3F007D",     "#08306B", "#08519C", "#2171B5", "#4292C6", "#6BAED6", "#9ECAE1", "#C6DBEF", "#F7FBFF")
# clustering without information ####
partitionning <- pam(GCMS_heat_mat, k=kVarieties)


  # Create the heatmap annotation ####
  heatmap_annotations <- rowAnnotation(
    Varieties = Metabo_selected_htmp$Varieties,
    Compartment = Metabo_selected_htmp$Compartment,
    col = col,
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),  # Adjust font size for annotation names
    annotation_name_rot = 45  # Rotate the annotation names 45 degrees
  )

# Manually create a legend object to show all colors
custom_legend <- Legend(
  col_fun = custom_colors, 
  at = distinct_breaks,  # Specify breaks for the legend
  labels = round(distinct_breaks, 2),  # Format the labels to two decimal places
  title = "Scaled relative abundance", # Legend title
  title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),  # Title font size
  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)   # Labels font size
)
# Plot ####
  Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar <- Heatmap(
    GCMS_heat_mat,
    name = "Scaled relative abundance",
    column_title = "Centered-scaled metabolite relative abundance",
    row_title = "Samples",
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
    show_column_dend = FALSE,
    
    # Clustering settings
    #clustering_method_columns = "complete",
    #clustering_distance_columns = "euclidean",
    #clustering_method_rows = "complete",  # Explicitly set row clustering
    #clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
    #split = paste0("pam", partitionning$clustering),
    
    # Split rows by Compartment AFTER clustering
    #split = Metabo_selected_htmp$Compartment,  # Replace with your compartment variable
    #cluster_row_slices = FALSE,   # Disable reordering of compartments ################$
    #cluster_rows = FALSE,  # Cluster within each compartment group
  
    # Visual settings
    left_annotation = heatmap_annotations,
    col = custom_colors,
    na_col = "grey90",
    heatmap_legend_param = list(legend = custom_legend)
  )
  Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar
  draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

  # Save image ####
  png(filename = paste0(choice_path_fig_article, 
                        "Metabo/Fig_GCMS_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_",
                        chosen_comparts,
                        name_fig_dataset,
                        ".png"),
      width = 4000, height = 2500, units = "px", res=300)
  draw(Metabo_Fig_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_CompartCompar,
       heatmap_legend_side = "right",  # or "bottom" to place the legend below
       annotation_legend_side = "right",  # Keep both legends on the right
       padding = unit(c(2, 2, 2, 10), "mm"),  # Add more padding around the plot
       merge_legends = TRUE,  # Merge all legends into one if possible
       ht_gap = unit(2, "mm"),  # Adjust the gap between heatmaps
       legend_gap = unit(1, "mm"),  # Adjust the gap between legends
       column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12)  # Adjust the title size
  )
  #draw(Fig_GCMS_CompHeatmap_samples_GRAINES_pam)
  dev.off()
  # clean
  #rm(col, GCMS_heat_mat, heatmap_annotations, partitionning)
}

```
```{r clean heatmaps, eval=FALSE}
rm(col, diff_abundant, enriched_by_comp, GCMS_heat_mat, GCMS_meta, heatmap_annotations, partitionning,distinct_breaks, heatmap_colors, k_Comparts, kVarieties, num_quantiles, quantile_breaks, white_to_blue)
```

### 3.4.3_PCA & OPLS by Compartments on dataset centered-scaled by compartment
#### PCA
```{r PCA per compartment on center-scale on each compartment-dataset, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# load seed compartments only dataset ####
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = 0.2,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                   rename_metabo = "TRUE",
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

# PCA ####
# per_comp: per compartment, if chosen_compart is selected (among "Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HR_axis")
# per_size: per seed size, if chosen_size is selected (among "1","2","3")
# color_plot: color graph according to Compartments ("byComp") or Varieties ("byVar")
# choice_color: color scale to be attributed to Varieties according to "FEP", "FGP" or other seed attribute. see setup Color choice.
# per compartment ####
name_fig_dataset <- paste(analysis,collapse="_")
Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment <- as.character(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment)

for (chosen_compart in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule","HRaxis")){
  
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart <- PCA_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor(per_comp = TRUE,
                                   chosen_compart, 
                                   per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                   shape_per = "", # Size
                                   color_plot = "byVar",
                                   choice_color = "FEP", 
                                   Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset, 
                                   to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
                                   save_fig = TRUE,
                                   name_fig = paste0("Metabo/","PerCompColor_", chosen_compart, name_fig_dataset)
                                   )
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
  # save PCA for ggarrange  #####
  if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  if( chosen_compart == "HRaxis"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_HRaxis_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  if(chosen_compart == "Plumule"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Plumule_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  if(chosen_compart == "Exudate"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Exudate_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
  rm(Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart, chosen_comparts_paste)
}

Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Cotyledon_allSize
Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_HRaxis_allSize
Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Plumule_allSize

Fig4_PCA <- ggarrange(
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Cotyledon_allSize + ggtitle("Cotyledon") + guides(shape = "none"),
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_HRaxis_allSize + ggtitle("HR axis") + guides(shape = "none"),
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Plumule_allSize + ggtitle("Plumule") + guides(shape = "none"),
  nrow = 1, ncol = 3,
  align = "hv", common.legend = TRUE, legend = "right"
  
)
```

```{r Seed compartments weight, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
Metabo_Seed_weight <- read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Metabo/Metabo_seed_weight_ReplComparts.xlsx"),
                         sheet = 1,
                         colNames = TRUE,
                         rowNames = FALSE)
names(Metabo_Seed_weight)[names(Metabo_Seed_weight) == "ReplCompart"] <- "Sample"

 # Create compartments names for Metabo_seed_weight ####
Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_Seed_weight %>% 
  mutate(Compartment = ifelse(str_detect(Sample, 
                                         "Gr"),
                              "Whole_seed",
                              ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                "T[:digit:]E[:digit:]"),
                                     "HRaxis",
                                     ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                       "T[:digit:]C[:digit:]"),
                                            "Cotyledon",
                                            ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                       "T[:digit:]F[:digit:]"),
                                                   "Plumule",
                                                   ifelse(str_detect(Sample,
                                                       "T[:digit:]T[:digit:]"),
                                                       "Tegument",
                                                       "na"
                                                       )
                                                   )
                                            )
                                     )
                              ))

Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_Seed_weight[, colnames(Metabo_Seed_weight) != "Sample"]
Metabo_Seed_weight <- pivot_wider(Metabo_Seed_weight, names_from = c(Compartment),
                                  values_from = c(Weight))

Metabo_Seed_weight[, c("Whole_seed","Cotyledon","HRaxis","Plumule","Tegument")] <- Metabo_Seed_weight[, c("Whole_seed","Cotyledon","HRaxis","Plumule","Tegument")] %>% 
  mutate_all(.funs = as.double)

Metabo_Seed_weight <- Metabo_Seed_weight[,c("Varieties","Size","Replicate","Whole_seed","Cotyledon","HRaxis","Plumule")]
colnames(Metabo_Seed_weight) <- c("Varieties","Size","Replicate","weight_Whole_seed","weight_Cotyledon","weight_HRaxis","weight_Plumule")
Metabo_Seed_weight$Size <- as.factor(Metabo_Seed_weight$Size)

Metabo_Seed_weight <- left_join(Metabo_selected_dataset[, c("Varieties","Size","Replicate")], Metabo_Seed_weight, by = c("Varieties","Size","Replicate"))
Metabo_selected_dataset_ <- cbind(Metabo_Seed_weight, select(Metabo_selected_dataset, -all_of(c("Varieties","Size","Replicate"))))
```
```{r PCA per compartment on center-scale on each compartment-dataset, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# build permanova annotations from summary_permanova ####
format_p <- function(p) {
  if (p < 0.001) return("< 0.001")
  if (p < 0.05)  return(paste0("= ", round(p, 3), " *"))
  return(paste0("= ", round(p, 3)))
}

perm_annot <- lapply(split(summary_permanova, summary_permanova$Compartment), function(df) {
  rows <- df[match(c("Varieties", "t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage"), df$Effect), ]
  paste0(
    "Varieties: R²=", round(rows$R2[1], 3), ", p ", format_p(rows$p[1]), "\n",
    "t50germ: R²=",   round(rows$R2[2], 3), ", p ", format_p(rows$p[2]), "\n",
    "FEP: R²=",       round(rows$R2[3], 3), ", p ", format_p(rows$p[3])
  )
})

# load seed compartments only dataset ####
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(Metabo_selected_dataset = data.frame(),
                                    allComp = TRUE,
                                    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
                                    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
                                    NormIS = TRUE,
                                    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
                                    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
                                    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
                                    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
                                    RemoveQC = TRUE,
                                    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp", # allComp OR perComp
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                   prev_thresh_ = choice_prev_thresh,
                                   RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
                                   Size = "All",
                                   mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
                                   rename_metabo = "TRUE",
                                   verbose = TRUE)
analysis = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

# PCA ####
# per_comp: per compartment, if chosen_compart is selected (among "Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HR_axis")
# per_size: per seed size, if chosen_size is selected (among "1","2","3")
# color_plot: color graph according to Compartments ("byComp") or Varieties ("byVar")
# choice_color: color scale to be attributed to Varieties according to "FEP", "FGP" or other seed attribute. see setup Color choice.
# per compartment ####
name_fig_dataset <- paste(analysis,collapse="_")
Metabo_selected_dataset_$Compartment <- as.character(Metabo_selected_dataset_$Compartment)

# Calculer les corrélations entre les PCs et les métadonnées
additional_metadata = c("weight_Whole_seed", "weight_Cotyledon", "weight_HRaxis", "weight_Plumule")

for (chosen_compart in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule","HRaxis")){
  metadata_vars <- c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage", "weight_Whole_seed", paste0("weight_", chosen_compart))
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart <- PCA_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor(per_comp = TRUE,
                                   chosen_compart, 
                                   per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                   shape_per = "", # Size
                                   color_plot = "byVar",
                                   choice_color = "FEP", 
                                   Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset_, 
                                   to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
                                   vectors = TRUE, metadata_vars = metadata_vars, ###TEST
                                   additional_metadata = additional_metadata,
                                   save_fig = TRUE,
                                   name_fig = paste0("Metabo/","PerCompColor_", chosen_compart, name_fig_dataset)
                                   )
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart +
    annotate("text",
             x = -Inf, y = -Inf,              # bottom-left corner
             label = perm_annot[[chosen_compart]],
             hjust = -0.05, vjust = -0.2,
             size = 3, fontface = "italic",
             color = "grey30")
  
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
  # save PCA for ggarrange  #####
  if(chosen_compart == "Cotyledon"){    
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Cotyledon_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
  print(chosen_compart)}
  if( chosen_compart == "HRaxis"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_HRaxis_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  if(chosen_compart == "Plumule"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Plumule_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  if(chosen_compart == "Exudate"){
    Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Exudate_allSize <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
    print(chosen_compart)}
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
  rm(Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart, chosen_comparts_paste)
}
```

### 3.4.4_PERMANOVAs
```{r PERMANOVAs, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# PERMANOVA with seed weight as covariate
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::dist)

# Store results
permanova_weight_results <- list()

for(chosen_compart in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis")){
  
  cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
  cat("Compartment:", chosen_compart, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
  
  # Filter dataset to compartment
  df_comp <- Metabo_selected_dataset_ %>%
    dplyr::filter(Compartment == chosen_compart)
  
  cat("Samples:", nrow(df_comp), "\n")
  
  # Separate metabolite matrix and metadata
  metadata_cols <- c("Varieties", "t50germ", "t50tot",
                     "Final_Germ_Percentage", "Final_Em_Percentage",
                     "Size", "Replicate", "Compartment", "Weight",
                     "Labels",
                     "weight_Whole_seed", "weight_Cotyledon",
                     "weight_HRaxis", "weight_Plumule",
                     "meant50germ", "meanFEP")
  
  metabo_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_comp), metadata_cols)
  
  # Metabolite matrix — replace NA with 0
  metabo_mat <- df_comp[, metabo_cols] %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
    replace(is.na(.), 0)
  
  # Remove empty columns
  metabo_mat <- metabo_mat[, colSums(metabo_mat != 0) > 0]
  
  cat("Metabolites retained:", ncol(metabo_mat), "\n")
  
  # Build metadata frame for this compartment
  # Use the compartment-specific weight if available, else whole seed weight
  weight_col <- paste0("weight_", chosen_compart)
  
  meta_comp <- data.frame(
    Varieties = df_comp$Varieties,
    t50germ = df_comp$t50germ,
    FEP = df_comp$Final_Em_Percentage,
    weight = if(weight_col %in% colnames(df_comp)){
                  df_comp[[weight_col]]
                } else {
                  df_comp$Weight
                }
  )
  
  # Remove rows with missing metadata
  complete_rows <- complete.cases(meta_comp)
  if(sum(!complete_rows) > 0){
    cat("Removing", sum(!complete_rows),
        "rows with missing metadata\n")
  }
  meta_comp  <- meta_comp[complete_rows, ]
  metabo_mat <- metabo_mat[complete_rows, ]
  
  cat("Samples after NA removal:", nrow(meta_comp), "\n")
  
  # Compute Euclidean distance matrix
  # Consistent with the per-compartment centered-scaled data used in PCA
  dist_matrix <- dist(metabo_mat, method = "euclidean")
  
  # PERMANOVA — sequential (Type I)
  # Tests: variety first, then weight, t50germ, FEP
  # Sequential order matters — earlier terms are fitted first
  cat("\n--- PERMANOVA sequential (by = 'terms') ---\n")
  perm_seq <- adonis2(
    dist_matrix ~ Varieties + weight + t50germ + FEP,
    data = meta_comp,
    permutations = 999,
    by = "terms"
  )
  print(perm_seq)
  
  # PERMANOVA — marginal (Type III)
  # Tests each variable after controlling for all others
  # This is the key test: t50germ after weight and variety
  cat("\n--- PERMANOVA marginal (by = 'margin') ---\n")
  perm_mar <- adonis2(
    dist_matrix ~ Varieties + weight + t50germ + FEP,
    data = meta_comp,
    permutations = 999,
    by = "margin"
  )
  print(perm_mar)
  
  # Partial PERMANOVA — t50germ after weight
  # Most focused test: does t50germ explain metabolomic variance
  # beyond what is explained by seed weight alone?
  cat("\n--- Partial PERMANOVA: t50germ after weight ---\n")
  perm_partial_t50 <- adonis2(
    dist_matrix ~ weight + t50germ,
    data = meta_comp,
    permutations = 999,
    by = "terms"
  )
  print(perm_partial_t50)
  
  cat("\n--- Partial PERMANOVA: FEP after weight ---\n")
  perm_partial_FEP <- adonis2(
    dist_matrix ~ weight + FEP,
    data = meta_comp,
    permutations = 999,
    by = "terms"
  )
  print(perm_partial_FEP)
  
  # Betadisper — check homogeneity of dispersions
  cat("\n--- Betadisper by Variety ---\n")
  bd <- betadisper(dist_matrix, meta_comp$Varieties)
  bd_test <- permutest(bd, permutations = 999)
  print(bd_test)
  
  # Store results
  permanova_weight_results[[chosen_compart]] <- list(
    n_samples = nrow(meta_comp),
    n_metabolites = ncol(metabo_mat),
    sequential = perm_seq,
    marginal = perm_mar,
    partial_t50 = perm_partial_t50,
    partial_FEP = perm_partial_FEP,
    betadisper = bd_test
  )
}

# Summary table
cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat(" SUMMARY: marginal PERMANOVA R² and p-values \n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n\n")

summary_rows <- lapply(names(permanova_weight_results), function(comp){
  mar <- permanova_weight_results[[comp]]$marginal
  
  # Extract rows for each variable
  vars <- c("Varieties", "weight", "t50germ", "FEP")
  rows <- lapply(vars, function(v){
    if(v %in% rownames(mar)){
      data.frame(
        Compartment = comp,
        Variable = v,
        R2 = round(mar[v, "R2"], 4),
        F = round(mar[v, "F"], 3),
        p_value = mar[v, "Pr(>F)"],
        sig = dplyr::case_when(
          mar[v, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.001 ~ "***",
          mar[v, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.01  ~ "**",
          mar[v, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05  ~ "*",
          mar[v, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.10  ~ ".",
          TRUE                      ~ "ns"
        )
      )
    }
  })
  dplyr::bind_rows(rows)
}) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

print(summary_rows, width = Inf)

# Save summary 
write_xlsx(
  list(
    "README" = data.frame(Description = c(
      "Sequential PERMANOVA (by='terms'): tests variety, then weight, then t50germ, then FEP in that order.",
      "Marginal PERMANOVA (by='margin'): tests each variable after controlling for all others — key test for unique contributions.",
      "Partial t50germ: tests t50germ after weight only — answers whether germination speed explains metabolomic variance beyond seed size.",
      "Partial FEP: tests FEP after weight only.",
      "Betadisper: tests homogeneity of multivariate dispersions across varieties."
    )),
    "Marginal_summary" = summary_rows
  ),
  path = paste0(choice_path,
                "/2_Analyses_results/Metabo/",
                "PERMANOVA_with_weight_covariate.xlsx")
)
cat("Saved.\n")
```
 - Sequential (by = "terms")  — how much variance does each variable explain when fitted in order, so variety is fitted first and t50germ sees only the residual variance after variety is removed.
 *After controlling for weight, t50germ and FEP simultaneously, variety remains highly significant in all three compartments (all p = 0.001), explaining 24–41% of metabolomic variance marginally.*
 - Marginal (by = "margin") — how much variance does each variable explain uniquely after all other variables are in the model. This is the key test for your question: is t50germ associated with the metabolome independently of both variety and seed weight?
 *. Weight does NOT explain metabolomic variance after controlling for variety. t50germ and FEP are non-significant after controlling for variety and weight*
 - Partial (weight + t50germ) — the most focused test: does germination speed explain additional metabolomic variance beyond seed weight alone, ignoring variety? This directly addresses the confounding between size and speed.
 *when variety is removed from the model and only weight and germination traits compete, t50germ explains metabolomic variance in all three compartments after controlling for seed weight // FEP explains metabolomic variance in plumule and HRaxis after controlling for weight*
 
### 3.4.5_OPLS
##### optimal number of permutations
run just once!
```{r Find number of permutations for p-value stability_test on Cotyledon-t50germ, eval=FALSE}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::var)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(purrr::reduce)
verbose = TRUE

stability_test <- Test_Pvalue_Stability(
    chosen_compart = "Cotyledon",
    chosen_response = "t50germ",
    Metab = "Metabo",
    
    # Test parameters
    use_frequency = TRUE,
    n_tests = 3, # 3 répétitions par nombre de permutations
    perm_numbers = c(5, 10, 20, 50), # remettre 20, 50,100, 150, 200
    n_metabolites_test = 10,
    max_trials = 200,
    
    # Analysis parameters
    color_plot_ = "byVar",
    choice_color_ = "FEP",
    pq1_threshold_ = 0.05,
    log_p_threshold_ = -log10(0.05),
    vip_threshold_ = 1,
    univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = 0.05,
    
    # Dataset selection parameters
    allCompandExudats = FALSE,
    allComp = TRUE,
    removemachinesignal = FALSE,
    RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
    NormIS = TRUE,
    SortandTranspose = TRUE,
    RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
    JoinedallComp = TRUE,
    RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
    RemoveQC = TRUE,
    filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp", # allComp OR perComp
    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
    prev_thresh_ = 0.2,
    RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
    Size = "All",
    mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
    rename_metabo = "TRUE",
    allCompandExudats_RenameMetab = FALSE,
    allCompandExudats_CenteredAndScaledBy = FALSE,
    chosen_gene = "",
    
    # Tests
    Error_OP = FALSE,
    check_path = FALSE
)

# Utilisation
save_stability_report(
  stability_test,
  output_dir = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/StabilityTests/"),
  prefix = "Cotyledon_t50germ"
)
```
Interpretation:
 - n_perm : number of tested permutations.
 - mean_cv_pval: good if <0.5. The lesser the more stable
 - median_cv_pval: good if <0.5. 
 - mean_cv_pq1: good if < 0.5. Tests stability of direction/magnitude
 - mean_direction_consistency: pos/neg coherence. good if > 0.8 (80%). gives the % of tests with same direction
 - n_stable_metabolites: number of metabolites with CV < 0.5. The more the better. gives how many metabolites are stable.


Plots:
 - stability_test$plots$cv_pval: stability of p-values according to permutation number (the lower the better)
 - stability_test$plots$cv_pq1: stability of fold-change (change magnitude): if CV pq1<0.5, direction is stable
 /if CV pval stable but CV pq1 instable, the metabolite is significant but of varying amplitude./
 - stability_test$plots$direction: % of time where pq1 sign is the same (direction consistency). better if higher (near 100%)
 - stability_test$plots$by_metabolite: for each tested metabolite, shows problematic metabolites (dots > 0.5).

```{r comprehensive test of number of permutation, eval=FALSE}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::var)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(purrr::reduce)

comprehensive_results <- Test_Pvalue_Stability_Comprehensive(
  # Conditions à tester
  chosen_comparts = c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis"),
  chosen_responses = c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage"),
  
  # Paramètres de test
  n_tests = 5,  # Plus de répétitions pour plus de robustesse
  perm_numbers = c(50, 100, 150),
  n_metabolites_test = 15,
  max_trials = 250,
  
  # Paramètres dataset
  CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
  RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
  filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
  
  # Options de sortie
  save_individual_results = TRUE,
  output_dir = "Results/Stability_Analysis_Complete"
)
```

```{r see previous tests results, eval=FALSE}
# Accéder aux résultats
results$optimal_summary
results$plots$overview
results$plots$heatmap_optimal
```

```{r chose nb_permutations, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
chosen_nb_perm = 100
```
Run
```{r run OPLS and Univariate tests PerComp, eval=FALSE}
verbose = TRUE
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::rename)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::mutate)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::arrange)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarise)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarize)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::var)


for (response in c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage")){
Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts <- Plot_OPLS_and_Volcano_for_n_permutations(
                                    # analysis parameters
                                    Metab = "Metabo",
                                    Comparison = "perCompart",
                                    chosen_response = response, #______________________________________________
                                    nb_permutations =  chosen_nb_perm, #_______________________________________chosen_nb_perm 
                                    use_frequency = TRUE,
                                    # display parameters
                                    color_plot_ = "byVar",
                                    choice_color_ = "FEP",
                                    save_fig_indiv = choice_save_fig_all,
                                    save_fig_final = choice_save_fig_article,
                                    # significance parameters
                                    pq1_threshold_ = 0.05,
                                    log_p_threshold_ = -log10(0.05),
                                    vip_threshold_ = 1,
                                    label_plot = FALSE,
                                    univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = 0.05,
                                    max_trials = 300, # 300
                                    # dataset parameters
                                    allComp = TRUE, removemachinesignal = FALSE, RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE, NormIS = TRUE, SortandTranspose = TRUE, RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE, JoinedallComp = TRUE, RemoveAlcans = TRUE, RemoveQC = TRUE, filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                    prev_thresh = choice_prev_thresh, #if Metab=="Metabar", select only taxa with prevalence > threshold
                                    RelAb_thresh = 0,
                                    ChosenCompartsVect = c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis"), # <-- Exudate excluded ##############################################################################
                                    
                                    # parameters for tests
                                    OPLS_UnivTest = TRUE, #################### if FALSE, Bypass OPLS step for tests
                                    just_plot_from_VolSign = FALSE, ########## if TRUE, bypass OPLS and UnivTest steps
                                    Error_OP = TRUE ###########################
                                    )
    Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts
    if(response == "t50germ"){Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts_t50germ <- Fig_Volcano_ggarrange}
    if(response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts_FEP <- Fig_Volcano_ggarrange}
}
```
```{r if already done - run OPLS-Univ tests only to get volcano plots, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
verbose = TRUE
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::rename)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::mutate)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::arrange)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarise)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarize)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(stats::var)


for (response in c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage")){
Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts <- Plot_OPLS_and_Volcano_for_n_permutations(
                                    # analysis parameters
                                    Metab = "Metabo",
                                    Comparison = "perCompart",
                                    chosen_response = response, #______________________________________________
                                    nb_permutations =  chosen_nb_perm, #_______________________________________chosen_nb_perm 
                                    use_frequency = TRUE,
                                    # display parameters
                                    color_plot_ = "byVar",
                                    choice_color_ = "FEP",
                                    save_fig_indiv = choice_save_fig_all,
                                    save_fig_final = choice_save_fig_article,
                                    # significance parameters
                                    pq1_threshold_ = 0.05,
                                    log_p_threshold_ = -log10(0.05),
                                    vip_threshold_ = 1,
                                    label_plot = FALSE,
                                    univ_test_normality_pvalthresh = 0.05,
                                    max_trials = 300, # 300
                                    # dataset parameters
                                    allComp = TRUE, removemachinesignal = FALSE, RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE, NormIS = TRUE, SortandTranspose = TRUE, RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE, JoinedallComp = TRUE, RemoveAlcans = TRUE, RemoveQC = TRUE, filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
                                    norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
                                    CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
                                    RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
                                    prev_thresh = choice_prev_thresh, #if Metab=="Metabar", select only taxa with prevalence > threshold
                                    RelAb_thresh = 0,
                                    ChosenCompartsVect = c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis"), # <-- Exudate excluded ##############################################################################
                                    
                                    # parameters for tests
                                    OPLS_UnivTest = FALSE, #################### if FALSE, Bypass OPLS step for tests
                                    just_plot_from_VolSign = TRUE, ########## if TRUE, bypass OPLS and UnivTest steps
                                    Error_OP = TRUE ###########################
                                    )
    Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts
    if(response == "t50germ"){Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts_t50germ <- Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts}
    if(response == "Final_Em_Percentage"){Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts_FEP <- Metabo_Fig_OPLSVolc_Comparts}
}
```
```{r all conditions, eval=FALSE}

chosen_comparts = c("Cotyledon", "Plumule", "HRaxis")
chosen_responses = c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage")

list_conditions <- list('Compartment'= chosen_comparts, 'Response' = chosen_responses)
conditions <- expand.grid(list_conditions, KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE)
```
```{r list all significant metabolites, eval=FALSE}
all_significant_metabolites <- list()

for(i in 1:nrow(conditions)) {

  comp <- conditions$Compartment[i]
  resp <- conditions$Response[i]
  combo_key <- paste0(comp, "_", resp)
  optimal_nperm <- chosen_nb_perm
  print(combo_key)
  
  # Catégories pour nom de fichier
  if(resp == "Final_Em_Percentage") {
    Cat <- c("LowFEP", "HighFEP")
  } else if(resp == "t50germ") {
    Cat <- c("Lowt50germ", "Hight50germ")
  }
  
  # Charger le fichier volcano
  volcano_file <- paste0(
    choice_path_data, "Metabo/VolSignMetabolites_per",
    Cat[1], "vs", Cat[2], "_",
    "RemovePCAOutliers_CentScaledperComp_PrevThresh", choice_prev_thresh,
    "_allSizes_", comp, "_", optimal_nperm,
    "_FreqBased.xlsx"
  )
  
  if(file.exists(volcano_file)) {
    volcano_data <- read_xlsx(volcano_file)
    
    # Forcer Label en character AVANT filtrage
    if("Label" %in% colnames(volcano_data)) {
      volcano_data$Label <- as.character(volcano_data$Label)
    }
    
    # Extraire les significatifs
    significant <- volcano_data %>%
      filter(diffexpressed != "Not significant", is_stable == TRUE) %>%
      mutate(
        Compartment = comp,
        Response = resp,
        N_permutations = optimal_nperm
      )
    
    # érifier que Label existe et est character
    if("Label" %in% colnames(significant)) {
      significant$Label <- as.character(significant$Label)
    }
    
    # Ne stocker QUE si des métabolites significatifs
    if(nrow(significant) > 0) {
      all_significant_metabolites[[combo_key]] <- significant
      cat(paste0("done", comp, " x ", resp, " : ", nrow(significant), " métabolites significatifs\n"))
    } else {
      cat(paste0("/!\  ", comp, " x ", resp, " : 0 métabolites significatifs (non ajouté à la liste)\n"))
    }
    
  } else {
    cat(paste0("✗ Fichier introuvable : ", basename(volcano_file), "\n"))
  }
}

# vérifier qu'il y a des données avant bind_rows
if(length(all_significant_metabolites) == 0) {
  cat("\n ATTENTION : Aucun métabolite significatif trouvé dans aucune condition !\n")
  final_results <- data.frame()  # DataFrame vide
} else {
  # Combiner tous les résultats
  final_results <- bind_rows(all_significant_metabolites, .id = "Condition")
  
  cat(paste0("\n", length(all_significant_metabolites), " condition(s) avec métabolites significatifs combinées\n"))
  cat(paste0("Total : ", nrow(final_results), " lignes dans final_results\n"))
}

final_results
write_xlsx(final_results, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/All_Significant_Metabolites_Combined.xlsx"))
```

```{r extract values, eval=FALSE}
df_cot <- variety_cor_all[["Cotyledon_t50germ"]]
opls_cot <- all_significant_metabolites[["Cotyledon_t50germ"]]$Metabs
df_cot_cands <- df_cot[df_cot$Metabolite %in% opls_cot,
                        c("Metabolite","rho","p_value","p_adj","Method")]
df_cot_cands <- left_join(df_cot_cands,
                           all_significant_metabolites[["Cotyledon_t50germ"]][,
                             c("Metabs","meanpq1","freq_both_signif",
                               "direction_consistency","diffexpressed")],
                           by = c("Metabolite" = "Metabs"))

  sign(df_cot_cands$meanpq1) == sign(df_cot_cands$rho),
  "Consistent", "Discordant")
cat("Cotyledon x t50germ candidates:\n")
print(df_cot_cands[order(df_cot_cands$p_value),])

opls_plu <- all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]]$Metabs
opls_plu <- opls_plu[opls_plu != "Picolinic acid, TMS D2"]  # remove duplicate
df_plu_cands <- df_plu[df_plu$Metabolite %in% opls_plu,
                        c("Metabolite","rho","p_value","p_adj","Method")]
df_plu_cands <- left_join(df_plu_cands,
                           all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]][,
                             c("Metabs","meanpq1","freq_both_signif",
                               "direction_consistency","diffexpressed")],
                           by = c("Metabolite" = "Metabs"))
df_plu_cands$Direction_agreement <- ifelse(
  sign(df_plu_cands$meanpq1) == sign(df_plu_cands$rho),
  "Consistent", "Discordant")
cat("\nPlumule x t50germ candidates:\n")
print(df_plu_cands[order(df_plu_cands$p_value),])
```

```{r check absence of FEP candidates, eval=FALSE}
for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "HRaxis", "Plumule")){
  
  vol_file <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/VolSignMetabolites_per",
                     "LowFEPvsHighFEP_",
                     "RemovePCAOutliers_CentScaledperComp_PrevThresh",
                     choice_prev_thresh, "_",
                     "allSizes_", comp, "_",
                     chosen_nb_perm, "_FreqBased.xlsx")
  
  cat("\nLooking for:", basename(vol_file), "\n")
  cat("File exists:", file.exists(vol_file), "\n")
  
  if(file.exists(vol_file)){
    vol_df <- read_xlsx(vol_file)
    
    cat("Total metabolites:", nrow(vol_df), "\n")
    cat("Columns:", paste(colnames(vol_df), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    
    apparent_sig <- vol_df %>%
      filter(diffexpressed != "Not significant") %>%
      arrange(desc(freq_both_signif)) %>%
      select(Metabs, meanpq1, freq_both_signif,
             direction_consistency, diffexpressed, is_stable)
    
    cat(comp, "x FEP — coloured in volcano:", nrow(apparent_sig), "metabolites\n")
    if(nrow(apparent_sig) > 0) print(apparent_sig)
    cat("Of which stable (freq ≥ 0.70):", 
        sum(apparent_sig$is_stable == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  }
}
```
### 3.4.6_correlation variety-median scaled metabolite abundances / variety meanFEP and meant50germ
```{r correlation on variety-median scaled metabolites with variety-mean variable, eval=FALSE}
# Load dataset ####

Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
  allComp = TRUE,
  removemachinesignal = FALSE,
  RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
  NormIS = TRUE,
  SortandTranspose = TRUE,
  RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
  JoinedallComp = TRUE,
  RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
  RemoveQC = TRUE,
  filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
  norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
  CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
  RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
  prev_thresh_ = 0.3,
  RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
  Size = "All",
  mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
  rename_metabo = "FALSE",
  verbose = FALSE
)

analysis                <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[1]]
Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

cat("Dataset loaded:", nrow(Metabo_selected_dataset), "samples ×",
    ncol(Metabo_selected_dataset), "columns\n")
cat("Compartments:", paste(unique(Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment),
                           collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Varieties:", paste(unique(Metabo_selected_dataset$Varieties),
                        collapse = ", "), "\n\n")


# variety-level correlations functions ####
Variety_Level_Correlation <- function(
    Metab_dataset,
    chosen_compart,
    chosen_response,
    pheno_data,          # dataframe with columns: Varieties, Phenotype
    metadata_columns = c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot",
                         "Final_Germ_Percentage","Final_Em_Percentage",
                         "Size","Replicate","Compartment",
                         "Weight","Sample","Labels"),
    p_threshold = 0.05,
    rho_threshold = 0.5,
    save_output = TRUE,
    output_prefix = ""
){
  
  cat(paste0("VARIETY-LEVEL CORRELATION: ", chosen_compart,
             " x ", chosen_response, "\n"))
  
  
  # Filter to compartment
  df_comp   <- Metab_dataset %>% filter(Compartment == chosen_compart)
  meta_cols <- metadata_columns[metadata_columns %in% colnames(df_comp)]
  metab_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_comp), meta_cols)
  
  # Compute variety-median metabolite abundance
  variety_medians <- df_comp %>%
    group_by(Varieties) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(across(all_of(metab_cols), ~ median(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
              .groups = "drop")
  
  # Join with phenotype
  variety_data <- left_join(variety_medians, pheno_data, by = "Varieties")
  n_varieties  <- nrow(variety_data)
  cat(paste0("Varieties with complete data: ", n_varieties, "\n"))
  
  # Correlate each metabolite with phenotype
  cor_results <- lapply(metab_cols, function(met){
    x <- variety_data[[met]]
    y <- variety_data$Phenotype
    
    complete <- complete.cases(x, y)
    x <- x[complete]; y <- y[complete]
    
    if(length(x) < 4)                  return(NULL)
    if(stats::var(x, na.rm = TRUE) == 0)      return(NULL)
    if(stats::var(y, na.rm = TRUE) == 0)      return(NULL)
    
    if(length(unique(x)) < 4){
      test        <- cor.test(x, y, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
      method_used <- "Spearman"
    } else {
      sw_x <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(x)$p.value, error = function(e) 0)
      sw_y <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(y)$p.value, error = function(e) 0)
      if(sw_x > 0.05 && sw_y > 0.05){
        test        <- cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson")
        method_used <- "Pearson"
      } else {
        test        <- cor.test(x, y, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
        method_used <- "Spearman"
      }
    }
    
    data.frame(
      Metabolite = met,
      rho = as.numeric(test$estimate),
      p_value = test$p.value,
      Method = method_used,
      n = length(x),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  
  cor_df <- bind_rows(cor_results)
  cor_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(cor_df$p_value, method = "BH")
  
  cor_df <- cor_df %>%
    mutate(
      Significant = p_adj < p_threshold,
      Strong_effect = abs(rho) >= rho_threshold,
      Candidate = Significant & Strong_effect,
      Direction = ifelse(rho > 0, "Positive", "Negative")
    ) %>%
    arrange(p_adj)
  
  cat(paste0("Metabolites tested: ", nrow(cor_df), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Significant (BH p < ", p_threshold, "): ",
             sum(cor_df$Significant, na.rm = TRUE), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("With |rho| >= ", rho_threshold, ": ",
             sum(cor_df$Candidate, na.rm = TRUE), " candidates\n\n"))
  
  if(save_output){
    write_xlsx(cor_df,
               path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/",
                             "VarietyLevel_Correlation_",
                             chosen_compart, "_", chosen_response,
                             output_prefix, ".xlsx"))
  }
  
  return(cor_df)
}

# cross-validation with OPLS candidates
Validate_OPLS_with_VarietyLevel <- function(
    opls_candidates,        # dataframe from VolSign file (freq-based)
    variety_cor_results,    # output of Variety_Level_Correlation()
    rho_threshold = 0.5,
    p_threshold = 0.05
) {
  # Join OPLS candidates with variety-level results
  validated <- opls_candidates %>%
    left_join(variety_cor_results %>%
                select(Metabolite, rho, p_adj, Method, Candidate),
              by = c("Metabs" = "Metabolite")) %>%
    mutate(
      # Direction agreement between OPLS pq1 and variety-level rho
      Direction_agreement = case_when(
        is.na(rho) ~ "Not tested",
        sign(meanpq1) == sign(rho) ~ "Consistent",
        TRUE ~ "Discordant"
      ),
      # Final validation status
      Validated = (freq_both_signif >= 0.7) &
                  (is_stable == TRUE) &
                  (!is.na(p_adj) & p_adj < p_threshold) &
                  (abs(rho) >= rho_threshold) &
                  (Direction_agreement == "Consistent")
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(Validated), desc(freq_both_signif))
  
  cat("\n VALIDATION SUMMARY \n")
  cat(paste0("OPLS candidates: ", nrow(opls_candidates), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Validated (OPLS + variety-level): ",
             sum(validated$Validated, na.rm = TRUE), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Direction discordant: ",
             sum(validated$Direction_agreement == "Discordant",
                 na.rm = TRUE), "\n"))
  cat(paste0("Not testable (NA rho): ",
             sum(validated$Direction_agreement == "Not tested",
                 na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n"))
  
  return(validated)
}

# Run for all conditions ####

# Load your per-compartment centered-scaled dataset first
# (the prev_thresh = 0.2, CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp" version)
variety_cor_all <- list()

for (comp in c("Cotyledon", "HRaxis", "Plumule")) {
  for (resp in c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage")) {
    key <- paste0(comp, "_", resp)
    
    if(resp == "t50germ"){
      germ_stat  <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat
      # rename to match what function expects
      germ_stat_ <- germ_stat %>%
        select(Varieties, Phenotype = t50.Germinated)
    } else {
      germ_stat  <- GermEmerg_Emerg_stat
      germ_stat_ <- germ_stat %>%
        select(Varieties, Phenotype = Final_Em_Percentage)
    }
    
    variety_cor_all[[key]] <- Variety_Level_Correlation(
      Metab_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset,
      chosen_compart = comp,
      chosen_response = resp,
      pheno_data = germ_stat_,   # pass pre-joined phenotype data
      rho_threshold = 0.5,
      p_threshold = 0.05,
      save_output = TRUE,
      output_prefix = paste0("_", chosen_nb_perm, "perms")
    )
  }
}


# For each condition, look at the distribution of raw p-values and rho values
# Since variety names = OPLS names exactly, just match directly
for(key in names(variety_cor_all)){
  df <- variety_cor_all[[key]]
  cat("\n", key, "\n")
  cat("Raw p < 0.05:", sum(df$p_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "metabolites\n")
  cat("|rho| > 0.5: ", sum(abs(df$rho) > 0.5,  na.rm = TRUE), "metabolites\n")
  cat("|rho| > 0.6: ", sum(abs(df$rho) > 0.6,  na.rm = TRUE), "metabolites\n")
  cat("|rho| > 0.7: ", sum(abs(df$rho) > 0.7,  na.rm = TRUE), "metabolites\n")
  
  if(key %in% names(all_significant_metabolites)){
    opls_cands <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]]$Metabs
    
    # Direct match — names are identical between datasets
    cat("Direct matches:", sum(opls_cands %in% df$Metabolite),
        "out of", length(opls_cands), "\n")
    
    df_cands <- df[df$Metabolite %in% opls_cands,
                   c("Metabolite", "rho", "p_value", "p_adj", "Method")]
    
    # Add OPLS stats for comparison
    opls_stats <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]][,
      c("Metabs", "meanpq1", "freq_both_signif", "direction_consistency")]
    df_cands <- left_join(df_cands, opls_stats,
                          by = c("Metabolite" = "Metabs"))
    
    # Direction agreement
    df_cands$Direction_agreement <- ifelse(
      sign(df_cands$meanpq1) == sign(df_cands$rho),
      "Consistent", "Discordant")
    
    cat("OPLS candidates at variety level:\n")
    print(df_cands[order(df_cands$p_value), ])
  }
}
# Then for each condition, validate OPLS candidates
# (load your VolSign files as opls_candidates first)
# validated_candidates <- Validate_OPLS_with_VarietyLevel(
#   opls_candidates = opls_candidates,
#   variety_cor_results = variety_cor_all[["Cotyledon_t50germ"]],
#   rho_threshold = 0.5,
#   p_threshold = 0.05
# )
```

```{r write the final table, eval=FALSE}
           path = paste0(choice_path_data,
                         "Metabo/all_significant_metabolites.xlsx"))
```
