### 3.4.7_three complementary methods
```{r open all_significant_metabo, eval=FALSE}
file_path <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/all_significant_metabolites.xlsx")

# Get all sheet names
sheet_names <- excel_sheets(file_path)

# Re-import as a named list of dataframes (mirrors the original structure)
all_significant_metabolites <- lapply(sheet_names, function(sheet) {
  read_xlsx(file_path, sheet = sheet)
}) 
names(all_significant_metabolites) <- sheet_names
```

```{r Linear Mixed Models for candidate metabolites, eval=FALSE}
# Load dataset
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
  allComp = TRUE,
  removemachinesignal = FALSE,
  RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
  NormIS = TRUE,
  SortandTranspose = TRUE,
  RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
  JoinedallComp = TRUE,
  RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
  RemoveQC = TRUE,
  filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
  norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
  CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
  RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
  prev_thresh_ = choice_prev_thresh,
  RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
  Size = "All",
  mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
  rename_metabo = "FALSE",
  verbose = FALSE
)
Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

metadata_cols <- c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Germ_Percentage",
                   "Final_Em_Percentage","Size","Replicate","Compartment",
                   "Weight","Sample","Labels")

# Run LMM for each compartment x response combination 
lmm_results_all <- list()

for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule")){
  for(resp in c("t50germ")){  # extend to "Final_Em_Percentage" if needed
    
    key <- paste0(comp, "_", resp)
    if(!key %in% names(all_significant_metabolites)) next
    
    
    cat(paste0("LMM: ", comp, " x ", resp, "\n"))
    
    
    candidate_metabs <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]]$Metabs
    candidate_metabs <- candidate_metabs[
      candidate_metabs %in% colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset)]
    
    df_comp <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>%
      filter(Compartment == comp)
    
    lmm_results <- data.frame()
    
    for(met in candidate_metabs){
      
      df_met <- data.frame(
        metab = df_comp[[met]],
        resp = df_comp[[resp]],
        Variety = df_comp$Varieties
      ) %>% filter(complete.cases(.))
      
      # Skip if insufficient variance
      if(var(df_met$metab, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) next
      if(nrow(df_met) < 10) next
      
      # Fit LMM: metabolite ~ response + (1|Variety)
      # This tests whether response predicts metabolite
      # after accounting for variety-level differences
      tryCatch({
        df_met <- df_met %>% rename(response_var = resp)  # rename to fixed name
        m_full <- lmer(metab ~ response_var + (1|Variety),
                       data = df_met, REML = FALSE)
        m_null <- lmer(metab ~ 1            + (1|Variety),
                       data = df_met, REML = FALSE)
        # Likelihood ratio test
        lrt <- anova(m_null, m_full)
        # Extract fixed effect estimate and p-value from lmerTest
        coefs <- summary(m_full)$coefficients
        # Variance partitioning
        var_components <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(m_full))
  
        var_variety    <- var_components$vcov[1]  # Variety random effect
        var_residual   <- var_components$vcov[2]  # Residual
        var_total      <- var_variety + var_residual
        icc            <- var_variety / var_total  # Intraclass correlation
        
        new_row <- data.frame(
          Metabolite = met,
          Compartment = comp,
          Response = resp,
          Estimate = coefs["response_var", "Estimate"],
          Std_Error = coefs["response_var", "Std. Error"],
          t_value = coefs["response_var", "t value"],
          p_value_lmer = coefs["response_var", "Pr(>|t|)"],
          p_value_LRT = lrt$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2],
          ICC_variety = round(icc, 3),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        lmm_results <- rbind(lmm_results, new_row)
        
      }, error = function(e){
        cat("LMM failed for", met, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
      })
    }
    
    if(nrow(lmm_results) > 0){
      # BH correction
      lmm_results$p_adj_BH <- p.adjust(lmm_results$p_value_LRT,
                                        method = "BH")
      lmm_results$Significant_LMM <- lmm_results$p_adj_BH < 0.05
      lmm_results$Significant_LMM_raw <- lmm_results$p_value_LRT < 0.05
      
      # Direction from estimate
      lmm_results$Direction_LMM <- ifelse(
        lmm_results$Estimate > 0, "Hight50germ", "Lowt50germ")
      
      # Add OPLS direction for comparison
      opls_dir <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]] %>%
        select(Metabs, diffexpressed, meanpq1, freq_both_signif)
      lmm_results <- left_join(lmm_results, opls_dir,
                               by = c("Metabolite" = "Metabs"))
      
      # Direction agreement
      lmm_results$Direction_agreement_LMM <- ifelse(
        lmm_results$Direction_LMM == lmm_results$diffexpressed,
        "Consistent", "Discordant")
      
      lmm_results <- lmm_results %>% arrange(p_value_LRT)
      
      cat("Results:\n")
      print(lmm_results[, c("Metabolite", "Estimate", "p_value_LRT",
                             "p_adj_BH", "ICC_variety",
                             "Direction_agreement_LMM")])
      cat("\nSignificant (raw p < 0.05):",
          sum(lmm_results$Significant_LMM_raw), "\n")
      cat("Significant (BH p < 0.05):",
          sum(lmm_results$Significant_LMM), "\n")
      cat("Direction consistent with OPLS:",
          sum(lmm_results$Direction_agreement_LMM == "Consistent"), "\n")
      
      lmm_results_all[[key]] <- lmm_results
      
      write_xlsx(lmm_results,
                 path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/",
                               "LMM_results_", comp, "_", resp, ".xlsx"))
    }
  }
}
```
```{r Elastic Net for candidate metabolites, eval=FALSE}
elasticnet_results_all <- list()

for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule")){
  for(resp in c("t50germ")){
    
    key <- paste0(comp, "_", resp)
    
    
    cat(paste0("Elastic Net: ", comp, " x ", resp, "\n"))
    
    
    df_comp <- Metabo_selected_dataset %>%
      filter(Compartment == comp)
    
    # Use ALL metabolites as predictors (not just candidates)
    # so elastic net selects independently of OPLS
    metab_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_comp), metadata_cols)
    metab_cols <- metab_cols[metab_cols %in% colnames(df_comp)]
    
    # Remove zero-variance columns
    var_check  <- apply(df_comp[, metab_cols], 2,
                        stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)
    metab_cols <- metab_cols[var_check > 0]
    
    X <- as.matrix(df_comp[, metab_cols])
    Y <- df_comp[[resp]]
    
    # Remove rows with NA in Y
    complete <- complete.cases(X, Y)
    X <- X[complete, ]
    Y <- Y[complete]
    
    cat("Input:", nrow(X), "samples ×", ncol(X), "metabolites\n")
    
    set.seed(42)  # for reproducibility
    
    # Run elastic net with multiple alpha values to find best
    # alpha = 0: ridge, alpha = 1: LASSO, alpha = 0.5: elastic net
    best_cvm  <- Inf
    best_alpha <- 0.5
    best_cv    <- NULL
    
    for(alpha in c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1)){
      cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
        X, Y,
        alpha = alpha,
        nfolds = 10,
        type.measure = "mse",
        standardize = FALSE  # already centered-scaled
      )
      if(min(cv_fit$cvm) < best_cvm){
        best_cvm   <- min(cv_fit$cvm)
        best_alpha <- alpha
        best_cv    <- cv_fit
      }
    }
    
    cat("Best alpha:", best_alpha,
        "| Best CV-MSE:", round(best_cvm, 4), "\n")
    
    # Extract coefficients at lambda.min and lambda.1se
    coefs_min <- coef(best_cv, s = "lambda.min")
    coefs_1se <- coef(best_cv, s = "lambda.1se")
    
    selected_min <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = rownames(coefs_min),
      Coef_min = as.numeric(coefs_min),
      Coef_1se = as.numeric(coefs_1se)
    ) %>%
      filter(Metabolite != "(Intercept)",
             Coef_min != 0) %>%
      mutate(
        Selected_1se = Coef_1se != 0,
        Direction_EN = ifelse(Coef_min > 0,
                                 "Hight50germ", "Lowt50germ"),
        Is_OPLS_cand = Metabolite %in%
          all_significant_metabolites[[key]]$Metabs
      ) %>%
      arrange(desc(abs(Coef_min)))
    
    cat("\nMetabolites selected at lambda.min:",
        nrow(selected_min), "\n")
    cat("Of which also OPLS candidates:",
        sum(selected_min$Is_OPLS_cand), "\n")
    cat("Selected at lambda.1se (more conservative):",
        sum(selected_min$Selected_1se), "\n")
    
    # Check direction agreement for OPLS candidates
    if(key %in% names(all_significant_metabolites)){
      opls_cands <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]] %>%
        select(Metabs, diffexpressed, meanpq1, freq_both_signif)
      
      overlap <- selected_min %>%
        filter(Is_OPLS_cand) %>%
        left_join(opls_cands, by = c("Metabolite" = "Metabs")) %>%
        mutate(Direction_agreement_EN = ifelse(
          Direction_EN == diffexpressed,
          "Consistent", "Discordant"))
      
      cat("\nOPLS candidates confirmed by Elastic Net:\n")
      print(overlap[, c("Metabolite", "Coef_min", "Selected_1se",
                        "Direction_EN", "diffexpressed",
                        "Direction_agreement_EN")])
    }
    
    elasticnet_results_all[[key]] <- list(
      cv_fit = best_cv,
      best_alpha = best_alpha,
      selected_min = selected_min,
      overlap_OPLS = if(exists("overlap")) overlap else NULL
    )
    
    write_xlsx(selected_min,
               path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/",
                             "ElasticNet_selected_", comp,
                             "_", resp, ".xlsx"))
  }
}
```
```{r Confirmation score across all methods, eval=FALSE}
confirmation_all <- list()

for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule")){
  
  key <- paste0(comp, "_t50germ")
  if(!key %in% names(all_significant_metabolites)) next
  
  
  cat(paste0("Confirmation score: ", comp, "\n"))
  
  
  # Base: OPLS candidates
  score_df <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]] %>%
    select(Metabs, meanpq1, freq_both_signif,
           direction_consistency, diffexpressed) %>%
    rename(Metabolite = Metabs)
  
  # Add variety-level correlation
  var_cor <- variety_cor_all[[key]]
  score_df <- left_join(score_df,
    var_cor %>% select(Metabolite, rho, p_value) %>%
      rename(VarLevel_rho = rho, VarLevel_p = p_value),
    by = "Metabolite")
  
  # Add LMM results
  if(!is.null(lmm_results_all[[key]])){
    score_df <- left_join(score_df,
      lmm_results_all[[key]] %>%
        select(Metabolite, p_value_LRT, p_adj_BH,
               Direction_agreement_LMM) %>%
        rename(LMM_p = p_value_LRT,
               LMM_padj = p_adj_BH,
               LMM_direction = Direction_agreement_LMM),
      by = "Metabolite")
  }
  
  # Add elastic net
  if(!is.null(elasticnet_results_all[[key]])){
    en_res <- elasticnet_results_all[[key]]$selected_min
    score_df <- left_join(score_df,
      en_res %>%
        filter(Is_OPLS_cand) %>%
        select(Metabolite, Coef_min, Selected_1se,
               Direction_EN) %>%
        rename(EN_coef = Coef_min,
               EN_selected_1se = Selected_1se,
               EN_direction = Direction_EN),
      by = "Metabolite")
  }
  
  # Compute confirmation score (1 point per method confirmed)
  score_df <- score_df %>%
    mutate(
      # Method 1: OPLS (all candidates here score 1 by definition)
      Score_OPLS = 1,
      
      # Method 2: Variety-level correlation
      # direction consistent + |rho| > 0.5
      Score_VarLevel = ifelse(
        !is.na(VarLevel_rho) &
        abs(VarLevel_rho) >= 0.5 &
        sign(VarLevel_rho) == sign(meanpq1),
        1, 0),
      
      # Method 3: LMM raw p < 0.05 + direction consistent
      Score_LMM = ifelse(
        !is.na(LMM_p) &
        LMM_p < 0.05 &
        LMM_direction == "Consistent",
        1, 0),
      
      # Method 4: Elastic net selected at lambda.min
      # + direction consistent
      Score_EN = ifelse(
        !is.na(EN_coef) &
        EN_direction == diffexpressed,
        1, 0),
      
      # Total
      N_methods = Score_OPLS + Score_VarLevel +
                  Score_LMM + Score_EN
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(N_methods), desc(abs(VarLevel_rho)))
  
  cat("Confirmation summary:\n")
  print(score_df[, c("Metabolite", "freq_both_signif",
                      "VarLevel_rho", "LMM_p",
                      "EN_coef", "N_methods")])
  
  cat("\nConfirmed by all 4 methods:",
      sum(score_df$N_methods == 4, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Confirmed by ≥ 3 methods:",
      sum(score_df$N_methods >= 3, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Confirmed by ≥ 2 methods:",
      sum(score_df$N_methods >= 2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  
  confirmation_all[[key]] <- score_df
  
  write_xlsx(score_df,
             path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/",
                           "ConfirmationScore_", comp,
                           "_t50germ.xlsx"))
}

# Save full confirmation results
saveRDS(confirmation_all,
        file = paste0(choice_path_data,
                      "Metabo/confirmation_all.rds"))
```

```{r save all information table, eval=FALSE}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::recode)
# Extract and combine subsets from each list element
confirmation_table <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(confirmation_all), function(key){
    
    conf_df <- confirmation_all[[key]]
    comp    <- gsub("_t50germ|_Final_Em_Percentage", "", key)
    resp    <- ifelse(grepl("t50germ", key), "t50germ", "FEP")
    
    # Get additional columns from all_significant_metabolites
    opls_df <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]] %>%
      select(Metabs, freq_pq1_signif, freq_pval_signif, freq_VIP_signif,
             sd_pq1, cv_pq1, cv_pval, meanVIP, meanPvalBH, sd_PvalBH,
             log_meanPval_BH) %>%
      rename(Metabolite = Metabs)
    
    conf_df %>%
      select(diffexpressed, Metabolite, meanpq1, freq_both_signif,
             VarLevel_rho, VarLevel_p, LMM_p, LMM_direction,
             EN_selected_1se, N_methods) %>%
      left_join(opls_df, by = "Metabolite") %>%
      mutate(Compartment = comp,
             Variable = resp) %>%
      select(Compartment, Variable, diffexpressed, Metabolite,
             # OPLS metrics
             meanpq1, sd_pq1, cv_pq1,
             freq_pq1_signif, freq_pval_signif, freq_VIP_signif,
             freq_both_signif,
             meanVIP,
             meanPvalBH, sd_PvalBH, log_meanPval_BH, cv_pval,
             # Variety level
             VarLevel_rho, VarLevel_p,
             # LMM
             LMM_p, LMM_direction,
             # Elastic net
             EN_selected_1se,
             # Summary
             N_methods)
  })
)

# Recode diffexpressed
confirmation_table <- confirmation_table %>%
  mutate(diffexpressed = case_when(
    diffexpressed == "Lowt50germ"  ~ "Faster",
    diffexpressed == "Hight50germ" ~ "Slower",
    diffexpressed == "LowFEP"      ~ "Faster",
    diffexpressed == "HighFEP"     ~ "Slower",
    TRUE                           ~ diffexpressed
  ))

# Convert EN_selected_1se
confirmation_table$EN_selected_1se <- ifelse(
  !is.na(confirmation_table$EN_selected_1se) &
  as.logical(confirmation_table$EN_selected_1se) == TRUE,
  "Yes", "No")

# Clean metabolite names
confirmation_table <- confirmation_table %>%
  mutate(Metabolite = Newnames_metabolites(Metabolite)$New_name)

# Rename columns
confirmation_table_full <- confirmation_table %>%
  rename(
    Association = diffexpressed,
    `OPLS pq1` = meanpq1,
    `OPLS pq1 SD` = sd_pq1,
    `OPLS pq1 CV` = cv_pq1,
    `Freq pq1` = freq_pq1_signif,
    `Freq p-value` = freq_pval_signif,
    `Freq VIP` = freq_VIP_signif,
    `OPLS freq` = freq_both_signif,
    `Mean VIP` = meanVIP,
    `Mean BH p` = meanPvalBH,
    `SD BH p` = sd_PvalBH,
    `log10 BH p` = log_meanPval_BH,
    `CV p-value` = cv_pval,
    `Variety ρ` = VarLevel_rho,
    `Variety p` = VarLevel_p,
    `LMM p` = LMM_p,
    `LMM direction` = LMM_direction,
    `EN λ1se` = EN_selected_1se,
    `N methods` = N_methods
  )

# Save full table as Excel
write_xlsx(confirmation_table_full,
           path = paste0(choice_path_data,
                         "Metabo/Table_confirmation_candidates_full.xlsx"))

cat("Full confirmation table saved:",
    nrow(confirmation_table_full), "rows ×",
    ncol(confirmation_table_full), "columns\n")
```

### 3.4.8_significant metabolite heatmap
```{r reload all_significant_metabolites if needed, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# Read back — one sheet per condition
all_significant_metabolites <- lapply(
  getSheetNames(paste0(choice_path_data,
                       "Metabo/all_significant_metabolites.xlsx")),
  function(sheet){
    read.xlsx(xlsxFile = paste0(choice_path_data,
                                "Metabo/all_significant_metabolites.xlsx"),
              sheet = sheet,
              colNames = TRUE,
              rowNames = FALSE)
  }
)

# Restore the names from sheet names
names(all_significant_metabolites) <- getSheetNames(
  paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/all_significant_metabolites.xlsx"))

# Restore factor columns that may have been read as character
all_significant_metabolites <- lapply(all_significant_metabolites, function(df){
  if("Compartment" %in% colnames(df)){
    df$Compartment <- as.factor(df$Compartment)}
  if("Response" %in% colnames(df)){
    df$Response <- as.factor(df$Response)}
  if("is_stable" %in% colnames(df)){
    df$is_stable <- as.logical(df$is_stable)}
  df
})

cat("Loaded conditions:", paste(names(all_significant_metabolites),
                                 collapse = ", "), "\n")
```
```{r reload variety_cor_all from saved files, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
variety_cor_all <- list()

for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "HRaxis", "Plumule")){
  for(resp in c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage")){
    key <- paste0(comp, "_", resp)
    
    var_file <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/",
                       "VarietyLevel_Correlation_",
                       comp, "_", resp,
                       "_", chosen_nb_perm, "perms.xlsx")
    
    if(file.exists(var_file)){
      variety_cor_all[[key]] <- read_xlsx(var_file)
      cat("Loaded:", key, "\n")
    } else {
      cat("File not found:", basename(var_file), "\n")
    }
  }
}
```
```{r rebuild confirmation_all from saved files, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
confirmation_all <- list()

for(comp in c("Cotyledon", "Plumule")){
  
  key <- paste0(comp, "_t50germ")
  
  # Check all needed files exist
  lmm_file <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/LMM_results_", comp, "_t50germ.xlsx")
  en_file  <- paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabo/ElasticNet_selected_", comp, "_t50germ.xlsx")
  
  cat(key, "- LMM file exists:", file.exists(lmm_file), "\n")
  cat(key, "- EN file exists:", file.exists(en_file), "\n")
  
  if(!key %in% names(all_significant_metabolites)) next
  
  # Base: OPLS candidates
  score_df <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]] %>%
    select(Metabs, meanpq1, freq_both_signif,
           direction_consistency, diffexpressed) %>%
    rename(Metabolite = Metabs)
  
  # Add variety-level correlation
  if(!is.null(variety_cor_all[[key]])){
    score_df <- left_join(score_df,
      variety_cor_all[[key]] %>%
        select(Metabolite, rho, p_value) %>%
        rename(VarLevel_rho = rho, VarLevel_p = p_value),
      by = "Metabolite")
  }
  
  # Add LMM results
  if(file.exists(lmm_file)){
    lmm_df <- read_xlsx(lmm_file)
    score_df <- left_join(score_df,
      lmm_df %>%
        select(Metabolite, p_value_LRT, p_adj_BH,
               Direction_agreement_LMM) %>%
        rename(LMM_p = p_value_LRT,
               LMM_padj = p_adj_BH,
               LMM_direction = Direction_agreement_LMM),
      by = "Metabolite")
  }
  
  # Add elastic net
  if(file.exists(en_file)){
    en_df <- read_xlsx(en_file)
    score_df <- left_join(score_df,
      en_df %>%
        filter(Is_OPLS_cand == TRUE) %>%
        select(Metabolite, Coef_min, Selected_1se, Direction_EN) %>%
        rename(EN_coef = Coef_min,
               EN_selected_1se = Selected_1se,
               EN_direction = Direction_EN),
      by = "Metabolite")
  }
  
  # Compute confirmation scores
  score_df <- score_df %>%
    mutate(
      Score_OPLS = 1,
      Score_VarLevel = ifelse(
        !is.na(VarLevel_rho) &
        abs(VarLevel_rho) >= 0.5 &
        sign(VarLevel_rho) == sign(meanpq1), 1, 0),
      Score_LMM = ifelse(
        !is.na(LMM_p) &
        LMM_p < 0.05 &
        LMM_direction == "Consistent", 1, 0),
      Score_EN = ifelse(
        !is.na(EN_coef) &
        EN_direction == diffexpressed, 1, 0),
      N_methods = Score_OPLS + Score_VarLevel +
                       Score_LMM + Score_EN
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(N_methods), desc(abs(VarLevel_rho)))
  
  cat("\n", key, "- Confirmation summary:\n")
  cat("Confirmed by 4 methods:", sum(score_df$N_methods == 4, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
  cat("Confirmed by ≥3 methods:", sum(score_df$N_methods >= 3, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
  
  confirmation_all[[key]] <- score_df
}
```

Heatmap significant metabolites by Compart & by response
```{r load data and prepare panels, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# Load per-compartment centered-scaled dataset
Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset <- Select_Metabo_dataframe(
  allComp = TRUE,
  removemachinesignal = FALSE,
  RemovedXylOutliers = TRUE,
  NormIS = TRUE,
  SortandTranspose = TRUE,
  RemoveCheckedFragments = TRUE,
  JoinedallComp = TRUE,
  RemoveAlcans = TRUE,
  RemoveQC = TRUE,
  filterSamplebySeedWeight = TRUE,
  norm_seed_weight_ = FALSE,
  CenteredAndScaledBy = "perComp",
  RemovePCAOutliers = TRUE,
  prev_thresh_ = choice_prev_thresh,
  RelAb_thresh_ = 0,
  Size = "All",
  mean_duplicate = "FALSE",
  rename_metabo = "FALSE",
  verbose = FALSE
)
Metabo_selected_dataset <- Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset[[2]]
rm(Metabo_selected_analysis_dataset)

Metabo_selected_dataset <- Order_legends(choice_order, Metabo_selected_dataset)

metadata_cols <- c("Varieties","t50germ","t50tot","Final_Germ_Percentage",
                   "Final_Em_Percentage","Size","Replicate","Compartment",
                   "Weight","Sample","Labels")

# Remove Picolinic acid D2 from Plumule candidates
all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]] <-
  all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]] %>%
  filter(Metabs != "Picolinic acid, TMS D2")

cat("Plumule candidates after removing duplicate:",
    nrow(all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]]), "\n")

variety_colors <- color_by_germination_kin

# Helper
mm_to_px <- function(mm) round(mm * 300 / 25.4)

annot_height_mm <- 30
row_height_mm   <- 7

# build_panel function 
build_panel <- function(comp, show_legend = TRUE){
  
  key        <- paste0(comp, "_t50germ")
  sig_metabs <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]]$Metabs
  sig_metabs <- sig_metabs[sig_metabs %in% colnames(Metabo_selected_dataset)]
  n_rows     <- length(sig_metabs)
  
  df_comp <- Metabo_selected_dataset[
    Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment == comp, ] %>%
    arrange(factor(Varieties, levels = names(variety_colors)), t50germ)
  
  mat             <- t(as.matrix(df_comp[, sig_metabs]))
  mat[is.na(mat)] <- 0
  colnames(mat)   <- df_comp$Sample
  rownames(mat)   <- Newnames_metabolites(sig_metabs)$New_name
  
  max_abs <- quantile(abs(mat), 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  col_fun <- colorRamp2(
    c(-max_abs, 0, max_abs),
    c("#3F007D", "white", "#800026")
  )
  
  # Top annotation 
  col_ann <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    Varieties = df_comp$Varieties,
    t50germ = anno_barplot(
      df_comp$t50germ,
      bar_width = 0.8,
      gp = gpar(fill = "grey50", col = NA),
      height = unit(1.5, "cm")
    ),
    col = list(Varieties = color),
    annotation_label = c(Varieties = "Variety",
                            t50germ = "t50germ"),
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    annotation_name_rot = 0,
    annotation_name_side = "left",
    show_legend = c(Varieties = show_legend, t50germ = FALSE),
    show_annotation_name = c(Varieties = TRUE,
                           t50germ = TRUE)
  )
  
  # Direction left annotation 
  direction <- all_significant_metabolites[[key]] %>%
    filter(Metabs %in% sig_metabs) %>%
    mutate(clean_name = Newnames_metabolites(Metabs)$New_name) %>%
    arrange(match(clean_name, rownames(mat)))
  
  dir_ann <- rowAnnotation(
    Association = direction$diffexpressed,
    col = list(
      Association = c(
        "Lowt50germ" = "#009E73",   # blue  — low t50germ (faster)
        "Hight50germ" = "#E69F00")    # red   — high t50germ (slower)
    ),
    width = unit(3, "mm"),
    show_legend = show_legend,
    show_annotation_name = FALSE
  )
  
  # Method confirmation matrix 
  clean_names <- rownames(mat)
  conf_key    <- paste0(comp, "_t50germ")
  conf_df     <- confirmation_all[[conf_key]]
  
  name_col <- intersect(c("Metabolite", "Metabs"), colnames(conf_df))[1]
  conf_df  <- conf_df %>%
    mutate(clean_name = Newnames_metabolites(.data[[name_col]])$New_name)
  
  method_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = n_rows, ncol = 4,
                       dimnames = list(clean_names,
                                       c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman",
                                         "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")))
  for(i in seq_along(clean_names)){
    nm  <- clean_names[i]
    row <- conf_df[conf_df$clean_name == nm, ]
    if(nrow(row) == 0) next
    method_mat[i, "OPLS"]              <- row$Score_OPLS[1]
    method_mat[i, "Variety\nSpearman"] <- row$Score_VarLevel[1]
    method_mat[i, "LMM"]              <- row$Score_LMM[1]
    method_mat[i, "Elastic\nNet"]     <- row$Score_EN[1]
  }
  
  # UpSet horizontal line style right annotation 
  upset_ann <- rowAnnotation(
  upset = anno_customize(
    as.character(seq_len(nrow(method_mat))),  # "1", "2", "3"...
    graphics = setNames(
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(method_mat)), function(i){
        # Capture method_mat row i at definition time
        vals_i <- method_mat[i, ]
        function(x, y, w, h){
          # Horizontal grey line
          grid.lines(
            x = unit(c(0.05, 0.95), "npc"),
            y = unit(c(0.5,  0.5),  "npc"),
            gp = gpar(col = "grey80", lwd = 1)
          )
          # Four dots evenly spaced
          xs <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
          for(j in seq_len(4)){
            grid.points(
              x = unit(xs[j], "npc"),
              y = unit(0.5,   "npc"),
              pch = ifelse(vals_i[j] == 1, 16, 1),
              gp = gpar(
                col = ifelse(vals_i[j] == 1, "black", "grey70"),
                fill = ifelse(vals_i[j] == 1, "black", NA)
              ),
              size = unit(2, "mm")
            )
          }
        }
      }),
      as.character(seq_len(nrow(method_mat)))  # names = "1", "2", "3"...
    ),
    width = unit(3, "cm")
  ),
  `N methods` = anno_barplot(
    rowSums(method_mat),
    bar_width = 0.8,
    gp = gpar(fill = "grey40", col = NA),
    width = unit(1.2, "cm"),
    axis_param = list(side = "top",
                      at = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4),
                      labels_rot = 0,
                      gp = gpar(fontsize = 6))
  ),
  gap = unit(1, "mm"),
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
  annotation_name_rot = 0,
  annotation_name_side = "top",
  show_annotation_name = c(upset = FALSE, `N methods` = TRUE),
  show_legend = FALSE
)
  
  # Heatmap 
  Heatmap(
    mat,
    name = "Centered-scaled\nabundance",
    col = col_fun,
    na_col = "grey90",
    top_annotation = col_ann,
    left_annotation = dir_ann,
    right_annotation = upset_ann,
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
    row_names_side = "left",
    row_names_max_width = unit(5, "cm"),
    column_title = comp,
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
    height = unit(n_rows * row_height_mm, "mm"),
    show_heatmap_legend = show_legend,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      title = "Centered-scaled\nabundance",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)
    )
  )
}
```
```{r panels and annotation preparation, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
# Build both panels without legends 
ht_cot <- build_panel("Cotyledon", show_legend = FALSE)
ht_plu <- build_panel("Plumule",   show_legend = FALSE)

# Heights 
n_cot <- nrow(all_significant_metabolites[["Cotyledon_t50germ"]])
n_plu <- nrow(all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]])

height_cot_mm   <- n_cot * row_height_mm + annot_height_mm + 5
height_plu_mm   <- n_plu * row_height_mm + annot_height_mm
total_height_mm <- height_cot_mm + height_plu_mm + 10

# Widths 
width_heatmaps_mm <- 300
width_legend_mm   <- 30
total_width_mm    <- width_heatmaps_mm + width_legend_mm

# Build legends manually 
df_plu_leg  <- Metabo_selected_dataset[
  Metabo_selected_dataset$Compartment == "Plumule", ]
sig_plu     <- all_significant_metabolites[["Plumule_t50germ"]]$Metabs
sig_plu     <- sig_plu[sig_plu %in% colnames(df_plu_leg)]
mat_plu_leg <- as.matrix(df_plu_leg[, sig_plu])
max_abs_plu <- quantile(abs(mat_plu_leg), 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)

col_fun_legend <- colorRamp2(
  c(-max_abs_plu, 0, max_abs_plu),
  c("#3F007D", "white", "#800026")
)

lgd_list <- packLegend(
  Legend(
    col_fun = col_fun_legend,
    title = "Centered-scaled\nabundance",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  Legend(
    labels = names(variety_colors),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = color),
    title = "Varieties",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  Legend(
    labels = c("Faster germination", "Slower germination"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = c( "#009E73",  "#E69F00")),
    title = "Association\nwith t50germ",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  Legend(
    labels = c("Confirmed", "Not confirmed"),
    type = "points",
    pch = c(16, 1),
    legend_gp = gpar(col = c("black", "grey70")),
    title = "Method status",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)
```
```{r drawing combined heatmap function, eval=MetaboAnalysis}
draw_combined_heatmap <- function(){
  
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 1,
    ncol = 2,
    widths = unit(c(width_heatmaps_mm, width_legend_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Left column: stacked heatmaps
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit(c(height_cot_mm, height_plu_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Cotyledon
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_cot,
       newpage = FALSE,
       padding = unit(c(2, 4, 5, 40), "mm"))
  
  # Add method labels above upset for Cotyledon
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
    labels <- c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman", "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")
    for(j in seq_len(4)){
      grid.text(
        label = labels[j],
        x = unit(xs[j], "npc"),
        y = unit(1, "npc"),
        just = c("left", "bottom"),
        rot = 45,
        gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
      )
    }
  })
  popViewport()
  
  # Plumule
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_plu,
       newpage = FALSE,
       padding = unit(c(2, 4, 2, 40), "mm"))
  
  # Add method labels above upset for Plumule
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
    labels <- c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman", "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")
    for(j in seq_len(4)){
      grid.text(
        label = labels[j],
        x = unit(xs[j], "npc"),
        y = unit(1, "npc"),
        just = c("left", "bottom"),
        rot = 45,
        gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
      )
    }
  })
  popViewport()
  
  popViewport()  # inner layout
  popViewport()  # left column
  
  # Right column: legends with inner margin
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 2))
  pushViewport(viewport(
    x = unit(1, "mm"), # left margin
    y = unit(1, "npc"),
    width = unit(width_legend_mm - 1, "mm"),
    height = unit(1, "npc"),
    just = c("left", "top")
  ))
  draw(lgd_list,
       x = unit(0, "npc"),
       y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(20, "mm"),  # <-- 10mm blank space above
       just = c("left", "top"))
  popViewport()  # inner margin viewport
  popViewport()  # right column viewport
}
```
```{r save Heatmap significant metabolites by compartment panels, eval=FALSE}
outfile <- paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                  "Metabo/Fig_Heatmap_SignificantMetabolites_t50germ_",
                  "PrevThresh", choice_prev_thresh, ".png")

png(filename = outfile,
    width = mm_to_px(total_width_mm),
    height = mm_to_px(total_height_mm),
    units = "px",
    res = 300)
draw_combined_heatmap()
dev.off()

# Display in notebook
grid.newpage()
draw_combined_heatmap()
```
## 3.5_Figures 3 & 4
```{r Figure 4 metabolome preparation, eval=FALSE}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(cowplot::get_legend)
# Panel C: volcano plots with matching axis text size 
volcano_theme <- theme(
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
  plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
)

C_t50_cot <- Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Cotyledon_allSize +
  ggtitle("Cotyledon") + volcano_theme + labs(tag = "A") + theme(legend.position = "none")
C_t50_hr  <- Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_HRaxis_allSize +
  ggtitle("HRaxis") + volcano_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")
C_t50_plu <- Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Plumule_allSize +
  ggtitle("Plumule") + volcano_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")

C_fep_cot <- Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Cotyledon_allSize +
  ggtitle("Cotyledon") + volcano_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")
C_fep_hr  <- Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_HRaxis_allSize +
  ggtitle("HRaxis") + volcano_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")
C_fep_plu <- Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Plumule_allSize +
  ggtitle("Plumule") + volcano_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")


# Extract one legend per response type 
legend_t50 <- get_legend(
  Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_t50_compart_Cotyledon_allSize +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.direction = "horizontal",
          legend.box = "horizontal",
          legend.key.size = unit(4, "mm"),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
)

legend_fep <- get_legend(
  Metabo_Fig_meanVolc_FEP_compart_Plumule_allSize +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.direction = "horizontal",
          legend.box = "horizontal",
          legend.key.size = unit(4, "mm"),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
)

# Combine both legends side by side into one row 
combined_legend <- plot_grid(legend_t50, legend_fep,
                             ncol = 2,
                             align = "h")

# Assemble plots without legends 
C_plots <- (C_t50_cot + C_t50_hr + C_t50_plu) /
           (C_fep_cot + C_fep_hr + C_fep_plu) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1))

# Stack plots + legend row 
C <- plot_grid(
  C_plots,
  combined_legend,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.08)   # adjust 0.08 to give more/less space to legend
)

if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  outfile <- paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                    "Figure4_Metabolome.png")
  
  png(filename = outfile,
      width = mm_to_px(total_width_mm),
      height = mm_to_px(total_height_mm),
      units = "px",
      res = 300)
  draw_combined_heatmap()
  dev.off()
}
```
```{r Figure 4 with volcano plots}
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  
  # Dimensions 
  C_height_mm       <- 160   # height for the 2-row volcano panel C
  heatmap_height_mm <- total_height_mm
  legend_width_mm   <- 50    # wider than before for bigger legends
  total_height_final_mm <- C_height_mm + heatmap_height_mm + 10  # 10mm gap
  
  outfile <- paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Figure4_Metabolome.png")
  
  png(filename = outfile,
      width = mm_to_px(total_width_mm),
      height = mm_to_px(total_height_final_mm),
      units = "px",
      res = 300)
  
  # Root layout: 2 rows (volcano / heatmap) 
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit(c(C_height_mm, heatmap_height_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Row 1: Panel A (Volcano plots) 
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  print(C, vp = current.viewport())
  popViewport()
  
  # Row 2: heatmap + legend 
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 1,
    ncol = 2,
    widths = unit(c(total_width_mm - legend_width_mm, legend_width_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Heatmaps (Cotyledon + Plumule stacked)
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit(c(height_cot_mm, height_plu_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  
  draw(ht_cot, newpage = FALSE, padding = unit(c(2, 4, 5, 40), "mm"))
  
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
    labels <- c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman", "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")
    for(j in seq_len(4)){
      grid.text(labels[j], x = unit(xs[j], "npc"), y = unit(1, "npc"),
                just = c("left", "bottom"), rot = 45, gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
    }
  })
  
  popViewport()
  
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_plu, newpage = FALSE, padding = unit(c(2, 4, 2, 40), "mm"))
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
    labels <- c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman", "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")
    for(j in seq_len(4)){
      grid.text(labels[j], x = unit(xs[j], "npc"), y = unit(1, "npc"),
                just = c("left", "bottom"), rot = 45, gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
    }
  })
  popViewport()
  
  popViewport()  # inner heatmap stack
  popViewport()  # heatmap column
  
  # Bigger legends 
  lgd_list_big <- packLegend(
    Legend(
      col_fun = col_fun_legend,
      title = "Centered-scaled\nabundance",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      legend_height = unit(3, "cm")
    ),
    Legend(
      labels = names(variety_colors),
      legend_gp = gpar(fill = color),
      title = "Varieties",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      grid_height = unit(5, "mm"),
      grid_width = unit(5, "mm")
    ),
    Legend(
      labels = c("Faster germination", "Slower germination"),
      legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("#009E73", "#E69F00")),
      title = "Association\nwith t50germ",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      grid_height = unit(5, "mm"),
      grid_width = unit(5, "mm")
    ),
    Legend(
      labels = c("Confirmed", "Not confirmed"),
      type = "points",
      pch = c(16, 1),
      legend_gp = gpar(col = c("black", "grey70")),
      title = "Method status",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      grid_height = unit(5, "mm"),
      grid_width = unit(5, "mm")
    ),
    direction = "vertical",
    gap = unit(6, "mm")
  )
  
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 2))
  pushViewport(viewport(
    x = unit(2, "mm"),
    y = unit(1, "npc"),
    width = unit(legend_width_mm - 2, "mm"),
    height = unit(1, "npc"),
    just = c("left", "top")
  ))
  draw(lgd_list_big, x = unit(0, "npc"),
       y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(20, "mm"),
       just = c("left", "top"))
  popViewport()
  popViewport()
  
  popViewport()  # heatmap row inner layout
  popViewport()  # row 2
  popViewport()  # root layout
  
  dev.off()
  cat("Figure 4 saved to:", outfile, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  
  # Dimensions 
  C_height_mm       <- 160
  heatmap_height_mm <- total_height_mm
  legend_width_mm   <- 50
  total_height_final_mm <- C_height_mm + heatmap_height_mm + 10

  outfile <- paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Figure4_Metabolome.png")
  
  png(filename = outfile,
      width = mm_to_px(total_width_mm),
      height = mm_to_px(total_height_final_mm),
      units = "px",
      res = 300)
  
  # Root layout: 2 rows (volcano / heatmap)
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit(c(C_height_mm, heatmap_height_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Row 1: Panel A — Volcano plots
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  print(C, vp = current.viewport())
  popViewport()
  
  # Row 2: Panel B — Heatmap + legend
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
  
  # "B" label in top-left of this row
  grid.text("B", x = unit(2, "mm"), y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(2, "mm"),
            just = c("left", "top"),
            gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"))
  
  # Inner layout for row 2: heatmaps | legend
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 1,
    ncol = 2,
    widths = unit(c(total_width_mm - legend_width_mm, legend_width_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Heatmaps column (col 1)
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit(c(height_cot_mm, height_plu_mm), "mm")
  )))
  
  # Cotyledon heatmap
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_cot, newpage = FALSE, padding = unit(c(2, 4, 5, 40), "mm"))
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
    labels <- c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman", "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")
    for(j in seq_len(4)){
      grid.text(labels[j], x = unit(xs[j], "npc"), y = unit(1, "npc"),
                just = c("left", "bottom"), rot = 45, gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
    }
  })
  popViewport()
  
  # Plumule heatmap
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_plu, newpage = FALSE, padding = unit(c(2, 4, 2, 40), "mm"))
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 4)
    labels <- c("OPLS", "Variety\nSpearman", "LMM", "Elastic\nNet")
    for(j in seq_len(4)){
      grid.text(labels[j], x = unit(xs[j], "npc"), y = unit(1, "npc"),
                just = c("left", "bottom"), rot = 45, gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
    }
  })
  popViewport()
  
  popViewport()  # inner heatmap stack (2-row layout)
  popViewport()  # heatmap column (col 1)
  
  # Legend column (col 2)
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 2))
  pushViewport(viewport(
    x = unit(2, "mm"),
    y = unit(1, "npc"),
    width = unit(legend_width_mm - 2, "mm"),
    height = unit(1, "npc"),
    just = c("left", "top")
  ))
  
  lgd_list_big <- packLegend(
    Legend(
      col_fun = col_fun_legend,
      title = "Centered-scaled\nabundance",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      legend_height = unit(3, "cm")
    ),
    Legend(
      labels = names(variety_colors),
      legend_gp = gpar(fill = color),
      title = "Varieties",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      grid_height = unit(5, "mm"),
      grid_width = unit(5, "mm")
    ),
    Legend(
      labels = c("Faster germination", "Slower germination"),
      legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("#009E73", "#E69F00")),
      title = "Association\nwith t50germ",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      grid_height = unit(5, "mm"),
      grid_width = unit(5, "mm")
    ),
    Legend(
      labels = c("Confirmed", "Not confirmed"),
      type = "points",
      pch = c(16, 1),
      legend_gp = gpar(col = c("black", "grey70")),
      title = "Method status",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
      grid_height = unit(5, "mm"),
      grid_width = unit(5, "mm")
    ),
    direction = "vertical",
    gap = unit(6, "mm")
  )
  
  draw(lgd_list_big, x = unit(0, "npc"),
       y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(20, "mm"),
       just = c("left", "top"))
  
  popViewport()  # legend inner viewport
  popViewport()  # legend column (col 2)
  
  popViewport()  # inner 1x2 layout (row 2)
  popViewport()  # row 2
  popViewport()  # root layout
  
  dev.off()
  cat("Figure 4 saved to:", outfile, "\n")
}
```
