```{r Figure 3 metabolome, eval=FALSE}
# Extract legends 
A_leg <- cowplot::get_legend(
  Fig3A + 
    guides(color = guide_legend(), fill = "none") +
    labs(color = "Organs") +  
    theme(legend.position = "right")
)


metadata_vars <- c("t50germ", "Final_Em_Percentage", additional_metadata)
Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart <- PCA_byCompart_bySizes_chosencolor(per_comp = TRUE,
                                   chosen_compart = "Cotyledon", 
                                   per_size = FALSE, chosen_size = 0,
                                   shape_per = "", # Size
                                   color_plot = "byVar",
                                   choice_color = "FEP", 
                                   Metabo_selected_dataset = Metabo_selected_dataset_, 
                                   to_detect_outliers = FALSE,
                                   vectors = TRUE, metadata_vars = metadata_vars, ###TEST
                                   additional_metadata = additional_metadata,
                                   save_fig = TRUE,
                                   name_fig = paste0("Metabo/","PerCompColor_", chosen_compart, name_fig_dataset)
                                   )
Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart
meta_leg <- cowplot::get_legend(
  Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
)

# Convert legends to patchwork-compatible objects
A_leg <- wrap_elements(A_leg)
meta_leg <- wrap_elements(meta_leg)

# Panels without legends 
A <- Fig3A +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  labs(title = "Global PCA", tag = "A") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

B_cot <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Cotyledon_allSize +
  labs(title = "Cotyledon", tag = "B") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

B_hr <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_HRaxis_allSize +
  labs(title = "HR-axis", tag = "C") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

B_plu <- Metabo_Fig_PCA_compart_Plumule_allSize +
  labs(title = "Plumule", tag = "D") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

# Assemble 
Fig3 <- (A | B_cot | A_leg) / (B_hr | B_plu | meta_leg) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 0.25))  # narrow legend column


Fig3

# Save 
if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Fig3top_Metabolome.png"),
    plot = Fig3,
    width = 320,
    height = 250,
    units = "mm",
    limitsize = FALSE,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```

# ______________________________________________________________________________
# 4_Microbiota analyses (metabarcoding)
## 4.0_Preprocessing
### fastq files treatment
install qiime from https://library.qiime2.org/quickstart/amplicon
```{bash Qiime import & quality check, eval=FALSE}
source activate qiime2-2019.7

#### Verify if some of the fastq.gz files are corrupted
gzip -t *.gz


#For splitting combined gyrB and gyrB or ITS - Code à tester de Martial
## or use command below if sample names contains "R"
ls *.gz | awk -F"_" {'print $1"_"$2"_"$3"_"'} | sort | uniq > group

#Trim primers and separe the reads with cutadapt 2.7
mkdir gyrB_trimmed 

for i in `cat group`; do ~/.local/bin/cutadapt --discard-untrimmed -o gyrB_trimmed/$i"R1_001.fastq.gz" -p gyrB_trimmed/$i"R2_001.fastq.gz" -g MGNCCNGSNATGTAYATHGG -G ACNCCRTGNARDCCDCCNGA -e 0 -O 20 $i"R1_001.fastq.gz" $i"R2_001.fastq.gz"; done


## Importing raw sequences in qiime2 - quality check
source activate qiime2-2019.7
export PATH=/Users/msimonin/miniconda3/envs/qiime2-2019.7/bin:$PATH

###Importing data with Casava format (ex: eDNA1012_S50_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz) 
###  afterwards all files are saved under qza : contains .fastq and incrementing metadata of all transformations
qiime tools import \
  --type 'SampleData[PairedEndSequencesWithQuality]' \
  --input-path 'gyrB_trimmed' \
  --input-format CasavaOneEightSingleLanePerSampleDirFmt \
  --output-path Osmose_bean_gyrB.qza


### Quality Check (v for visualization - open html plots)
qiime demux summarize \
 --i-data Osmose_bean_gyrB.qza \
 --o-visualization Osmose_bean_gyrB.qzv
qiime tools view Osmose_bean_gyrB.qzv
# number of reads per sample, and interactive quality graph - used for threshold decision
# check for Qiime2 view for quality and verify length, and confirm that pair-ending worked.





## Export Representative sequences for unrarefied and rarefied datasets
qiime tools export \
   --input-path Osmose_bean_gyrB.qza \
   --output-path gyrB_Final_output_files 
 
## Export ASV tables for unrarefied and rarefied datasets 
qiime tools export \
  --input-path Osmose_bean_gyrB_table.qza \
  --output-path gyrB_Final_output_files 

cd gyrB_Final_output_files/
biom convert \
   -i Osmose_bean_gyrB_table.biom \
   -o Osmose_bean_gyrB_table.txt \
   --to-tsv

```

 -> données : 
 - Osmose_bean_gyrB-rep-seqs.fasta
 - Osmose_bean_gyrB-table.txt
 - Osmose_bean_ITS_Forward-rep-seqs.fasta
 - Osmose_bean_ITS_Forward-table.txt

### taxonomic affiliation
 - train_set_gyrB_v6.fasta
 - Unite v.10
 
```{r assign taxonomy_gyrB, echo=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
# import fasta file
asvgyrB_GRAINES <- readDNAStringSet(paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Métabar/", "Osmose_bean_gyrB-rep-seqs.fasta"))

# <- readLines(file.path(paste0(choice_path_raw_data,"Métabar/", "Osmose_bean_gyrB-rep-seqs.fasta")))

#Taxonomic affiliation
taxa.g_GRAINES <- assignTaxonomy(asvgyrB_GRAINES, paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Métabar/", "train_set_gyrB_v6.fasta"), multithread=TRUE)
taxa.print.g_GRAINES <- taxa.g_GRAINES # Removing sequence rownames for display only
rownames(taxa.print.g_GRAINES) <- NULL
head(taxa.print.g_GRAINES)
saveRDS(taxa.g_GRAINES, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/gyrB_taxo_GRAINES.rds"))
```
```{r assign taxonomy_ITS, echo=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
# import FASTA
asvITS_GRAINES <- readDNAStringSet(paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Métabar/", "Osmose_bean_ITS_Forward-rep-seqs.fasta"))

#Taxonomic affiliation
taxa.g_GRAINES_ITS <- assignTaxonomy(asvITS_GRAINES, paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Métabar/", "Unite10AllEukaryotes_sh_general_release_dynamic_all_19.02.2025.fasta"), multithread=TRUE)
taxa.print.g_GRAINES_ITS <- taxa.g_GRAINES_ITS # Removing sequence rownames for display only
rownames(taxa.print.g_GRAINES_ITS) <- NULL
head(taxa.print.g_GRAINES_ITS)
saveRDS(taxa.g_GRAINES_ITS, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ITS_taxo_GRAINES.rds"))
```

### create phyloseq files
```{r gyrB create phyloseq file, eval=FALSE}
# read taxonomy data
GRAINES_gyrB_tax <- readRDS(file.path(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/gyrB_taxo_GRAINES.rds")))

# Load ASV table from Qiime (.txt file)
asv_table_gyrB <- read.table(paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Métabar/Osmose_bean_gyrB-table.txt"), 
                              header = TRUE,  row.names = 1, sep = "\t")

# convert to matrix and transpose for phyloseq (samples in line, ASVs in column)
asv_mat_gyrB <- as.matrix(t(asv_table_gyrB))

# Check sequence name similarity
#ie rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax) == colnames(asv_mat_gyrB)
# else match them
#rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax) == colnames(asv_mat_gyrB)
head(rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax)) #sequences
head(colnames(asv_mat_gyrB))
sum(rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax) %in% colnames(asv_mat_gyrB))
sum(colnames(asv_mat_gyrB) %in% rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax))
# taxonomy rownames are full sequences, ASV table colnames are hash MD5: create sequences/hash correspondance
rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax) <- names(rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax))
head(rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax))
#rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax) == colnames(asv_mat_gyrB)
common_asvs <- intersect(rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax), colnames(asv_mat_gyrB))

# Reorder
GRAINES_gyrB_tax_matched <- GRAINES_gyrB_tax[common_asvs, ]
asv_mat_gyrB_matched <- asv_mat_gyrB[, common_asvs]

# Vérification finale
all(rownames(GRAINES_gyrB_tax_matched) == colnames(asv_mat_gyrB_matched))
# Devrait retourner TRUE

# Créer l'objet phyloseq
ps_gyrB <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(asv_mat_gyrB_matched, taxa_are_rows = FALSE),
  tax_table(GRAINES_gyrB_tax_matched)
)

ps_gyrB
```
```{r ITS create phyloseq file, eval=FALSE}
# read taxonomy data
GRAINES_ITS_tax <- readRDS(file.path(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ITS_taxo_GRAINES.rds")))
rownames(GRAINES_ITS_tax) <- names(rownames(GRAINES_ITS_tax))

asv_table_ITS <- read.table(paste0(str_replace(choice_path_data, "Preprocessed/", ""), "Métabar/Osmose_bean_ITS_Forward-table.txt"), 
                             header = TRUE, row.names = 1, sep = "\t")
asv_mat_ITS <- as.matrix(t(asv_table_ITS))


sum(rownames(GRAINES_ITS_tax) %in% colnames(asv_mat_ITS))
common_asvs <- intersect(rownames(GRAINES_ITS_tax), colnames(asv_mat_ITS))
GRAINES_ITS_tax_matched <- GRAINES_ITS_tax[common_asvs, ]
asv_mat_ITS_matched <- asv_mat_ITS[, common_asvs]

# Check
all(rownames(GRAINES_ITS_tax_matched) == colnames(asv_mat_ITS_matched))

ps_ITS <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(asv_mat_ITS, taxa_are_rows = FALSE),
  tax_table(GRAINES_ITS_tax)
)
```
### add metadata
```{r add metadata, eval=FALSE}
# load metadata table
env_table <- as.data.frame(read.table(paste0(choice_path_raw_data, "Métabar/Osmose_bean_metadata.txt"), 
                                      header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE, sep = "\t", colClasses = "factor"))

# add controls
env_table <- env_table %>% 
  add_row(SampleID = "TnegEXT-P01-A01", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "NegativeControl", Replicate = "1",
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA) %>%
  add_row(SampleID = "TnegEXT-P01-E12", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "NegativeControl", Replicate = "2", 
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA) %>%
  add_row(SampleID = "TnegEXT-P01-F12", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "NegativeControl", Replicate = "3",
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA) %>%
  add_row(SampleID = "TnegEXT-P02-A01", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "NegativeControl", Replicate = "4",
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA) %>%
  add_row(SampleID = "TnegEXT-P02-F07", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "NegativeControl", Replicate = "5",
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA) %>%
  add_row(SampleID = "TposPCR-P01", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "PositiveControl", Replicate = "1",
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA) %>%
  add_row(SampleID = "TposPCR-P02", Project = "OSMOSE", Condition = "PositiveControl", Replicate = "2",
          Genotypes = "NC", Production = NA)

names(env_table)[names(env_table) == 'Genotypes'] <- 'Varieties'

# change variety names
env_table$Varieties <- as.character(env_table$Varieties)
env_table$Varieties[env_table$Varieties == "Bea Vezer"] <- "Vezer"
env_table$Varieties <- factor(env_table$Varieties,
                              levels = c("Caprice", "Contender", "Deezer", "Facila", 
                                        "Flavert", "Linex", "Vanilla", "Vezer", "NC"))

env_table$SampleID <- gsub("-", ".", env_table$SampleID)
rownames(env_table) <- env_table$SampleID

# check samples
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(phyloseq::nsamples)
cat("Samples in env_table:", nrow(env_table), "\n")
cat("Samples in ps_gyrB:", phyloseq::nsamples(ps_gyrB), "\n")
cat("Samples in ps_ITS:", nsamples(ps_ITS), "\n")

common_samples_gyrB <- intersect(rownames(env_table), sample_names(ps_gyrB))
common_samples_ITS <- intersect(rownames(env_table), sample_names(ps_ITS))

cat("Samples gyrB:", length(common_samples_gyrB), "\n")
cat("Samples ITS:", length(common_samples_ITS), "\n")

# filter metadata
env_table_gyrB <- env_table[common_samples_gyrB, ]
env_table_ITS <- env_table[common_samples_ITS, ]

# add metadata to ps
sample_data(ps_gyrB) <- env_table_gyrB
sample_data(ps_ITS) <- env_table_ITS

ps_gyrB
ps_ITS

summary(sample_data(ps_gyrB))
summary(sample_data(ps_ITS))
```
### save ASV table for manual decontamination
```{r gyrB save ASV table for manual decontamination, eval=FALSE}
# taxonomy
#tax_df_gyrB <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_gyrB))


# ASV table
asv_df_gyrB <- as.data.frame(t(otu_table(ps_gyrB)))

# add columns
asv_df_gyrB <- asv_df_gyrB %>%
  mutate(
    # Nb samples with ASV (reads > 0)
    Nb_samples = rowSums(select(., everything()) > 0),
    
    # Nb reads
    Total_reads = rowSums(select(., everything())),
    
    # Nb TnegExt with ASV
    Nb_TnegExt = rowSums(select(., contains("TnegExt")) > 0)
  ) %>%
  select(Nb_TnegExt, Nb_samples, Total_reads, everything()) %>%
  arrange(desc(Nb_TnegExt))

# cols of each group
new_metric_cols <- c("Nb_TnegExt", "Nb_samples", "Total_reads")
tneg_cols <- grep("Tneg", colnames(asv_df_gyrB), value = TRUE)
tpos_cols <- grep("Tpos", colnames(asv_df_gyrB), value = TRUE)

# ASVs found in at least one Tneg
asvs_in_tneg <- rowSums(asv_df_gyrB[, tneg_cols] > 0) > 0

# filter samples
all_special_cols <- c(new_metric_cols, tneg_cols, tpos_cols)
sample_cols <- setdiff(colnames(asv_df_gyrB), all_special_cols)

# count ASVs shared with Tneg
shared_with_tneg <- sapply(sample_cols, function(col) {
  sum(asv_df_gyrB[asvs_in_tneg, col] > 0)
})

# total ASV number
total_asvs <- sapply(sample_cols, function(col) {
  sum(asv_df_gyrB[, col] > 0)
})

# sort by shared_with_tneg then total_asvs (tous deux décroissants)
sample_order <- order(-shared_with_tneg, -total_asvs)
sample_cols_sorted <- sample_cols[sample_order]

# reorganise
final_col_order <- c(new_metric_cols, tneg_cols, tpos_cols, sample_cols_sorted)
asv_df_gyrB <- asv_df_gyrB[, final_col_order]

asv_df_gyrB <- asv_df_gyrB %>%
  arrange(desc(Nb_TnegExt), desc(Nb_samples))
# save files
write.xlsx(asv_df_gyrB, 
           file = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/table_asv_gyrB.xlsx"),
           rowNames = TRUE)

rm(new_metric_cols, tneg_cols, tpos_cols, asvs_in_tneg, all_special_cols, sample_cols, sample_order, sample_cols_sorted, final_col_order)
```
```{r ITS save ASV table for manual decontamination, eval=FALSE}
# taxonomy
#tax_df_ITS <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_ITS))


# ASV table
asv_df_ITS <- as.data.frame(t(otu_table(ps_ITS)))

# add columns
asv_df_ITS <- asv_df_ITS %>%
  mutate(
    Nb_samples = rowSums(select(., everything()) > 0),
    Total_reads = rowSums(select(., everything())),
    Nb_TnegExt = rowSums(select(., contains("TnegExt")) > 0)
  ) %>%
  select(Nb_TnegExt, Nb_samples, Total_reads, everything()) %>%
  arrange(desc(Nb_TnegExt))
new_metric_cols <- c("Nb_TnegExt", "Nb_samples", "Total_reads")
tneg_cols <- grep("Tneg", colnames(asv_df_ITS), value = TRUE)
tpos_cols <- grep("Tpos", colnames(asv_df_ITS), value = TRUE)

asvs_in_tneg <- rowSums(asv_df_ITS[, tneg_cols] > 0) > 0

all_special_cols <- c(new_metric_cols, tneg_cols, tpos_cols)
sample_cols <- setdiff(colnames(asv_df_ITS), all_special_cols)

shared_with_tneg <- sapply(sample_cols, function(col) {
  sum(asv_df_ITS[asvs_in_tneg, col] > 0)
})

total_asvs <- sapply(sample_cols, function(col) {
  sum(asv_df_ITS[, col] > 0)
})

sample_order <- order(-shared_with_tneg, -total_asvs)
sample_cols_sorted <- sample_cols[sample_order]

final_col_order <- c(new_metric_cols, tneg_cols, tpos_cols, sample_cols_sorted)
asv_df_ITS <- asv_df_ITS[, final_col_order]

asv_df_ITS <- asv_df_ITS %>%
  arrange(desc(Nb_TnegExt), desc(Nb_samples))
write.xlsx(asv_df_ITS, 
           file = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/table_asv_ITS.xlsx"),
           rowNames = TRUE)

rm(new_metric_cols, tneg_cols, tpos_cols, asvs_in_tneg, all_special_cols, sample_cols, sample_order, sample_cols_sorted, final_col_order)
```
### manual and automatized decontamination


#### manual decontamination
 - Sequences present in the two positive control
 - Sequences present in less than 3 samples
 - ASVs present in 3 or more Tneg
```{r gyrB hand-checked decontamination, eval=FALSE}
# Identify columns Tneg et Tpos
tneg_samples <- grep("Tneg", sample_names(ps_gyrB), value = TRUE)
tpos_samples <- grep("Tpos", sample_names(ps_gyrB), value = TRUE)

# Identify samples (not Tneg nor Tpos)
normal_samples <- setdiff(sample_names(ps_gyrB), c(tneg_samples, tpos_samples))

# Extract ASV table
otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_table(ps_gyrB))

# Nb of Tpos in which the ASV is found
nb_tpos <- colSums(otu_mat[tpos_samples, , drop = FALSE] > 0)

# Nb of samples in which the ASV is found
nb_normal <- colSums(otu_mat[normal_samples, , drop = FALSE] > 0)

# Nb of samples in which the ASV is found
nb_tneg <- colSums(otu_mat[tneg_samples, , drop = FALSE] > 0)

asvs_to_keep <-(nb_tpos < 2) &                        # not in the 2 Tpos
               (nb_tneg < 4) &                        # not in the 4 Tneg
               ((nb_tneg <= 2) | (nb_normal >= 2))    # if present in 3+ Tneg, then in at least 2 samples


# Filter phyloseq
ps_gyrB_filtered <- prune_taxa(asvs_to_keep, ps_gyrB)

# Summary
cat("gyrB - Avant filtrage:", ntaxa(ps_gyrB), "ASVs\n")
cat("gyrB - Après filtrage:", ntaxa(ps_gyrB_filtered), "ASVs\n")
cat("ASVs retirés:", sum(!asvs_to_keep), "\n")
cat("Détail des raisons de retrait:\n")
cat("  - Présents dans 2 Tpos:", sum(nb_tpos == 2), "\n")
cat("  - Présents dans 4+ Tneg:", sum(nb_tneg >= 4), "\n")
cat("  - Présents dans 3 Tneg ET < 2 échantillons normaux:", 
    sum(nb_tneg == 3 & nb_normal < 2), "\n")

# gyrB
removed_asvs_gyrB <- data.frame(
  ASV = taxa_names(ps_gyrB)[!asvs_to_keep],
  Nb_Tpos = nb_tpos[!asvs_to_keep],
  Nb_Normal = nb_normal[!asvs_to_keep],
  Nb_Tneg = nb_tneg[!asvs_to_keep],
  Total_reads = taxa_sums(ps_gyrB)[!asvs_to_keep],
  Raison = ifelse(nb_tpos[!asvs_to_keep] == 2, "Dans_2_Tpos",
            ifelse(nb_normal[!asvs_to_keep] < 2, "Moins_2_echantillons",
            ifelse(nb_tneg[!asvs_to_keep] >= 3, "3+_Tneg", "Combinaison"))),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# add taxonomy
tax_removed <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_gyrB)[!asvs_to_keep, ])
removed_asvs_gyrB <- cbind(removed_asvs_gyrB, tax_removed)

# Save
write.csv(removed_asvs_gyrB, 
          paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/gyrB_ASVs_removed_manual.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

```
gyrB - Before filtering: 17406 ASVs
gyrB - After filtering: 17386 ASVs
removed ASVs: 20 
Explaination:
  - Presents in 2 Tpos: 7 
  - Presents in 4+ Tneg: 13 
  - Presents in 3 Tneg and < 2 samples: 0 
  
```{r ITS hand-checked decontamination, eval=FALSE}
tneg_samples_its <- grep("Tneg", sample_names(ps_ITS), value = TRUE)
tpos_samples_its <- grep("Tpos", sample_names(ps_ITS), value = TRUE)
normal_samples_its <- setdiff(sample_names(ps_ITS), c(tneg_samples_its, tpos_samples_its))
otu_mat_its <- as.matrix(otu_table(ps_ITS))
nb_tpos_its <- colSums(otu_mat_its[tpos_samples_its, , drop = FALSE] > 0)
nb_normal_its <- colSums(otu_mat_its[normal_samples_its, , drop = FALSE] > 0)
nb_tneg_its <- colSums(otu_mat_its[tneg_samples_its, , drop = FALSE] > 0)
asvs_to_keep_its <-(nb_tneg_its < 4)
ps_ITS_filtered <- prune_taxa(asvs_to_keep_its, ps_ITS)
cat("\nITS - Avant filtrage:", ntaxa(ps_ITS), "ASVs\n")
cat("ITS - Après filtrage:", ntaxa(ps_ITS_filtered), "ASVs\n")
cat("ASVs retirés:", sum(!asvs_to_keep_its), "\n")
cat("  - Présents dans 2 Tpos:", sum(nb_tpos_its == 2), "\n")
cat("  - Présents dans 4+ Tneg:", sum(nb_tneg_its >= 4), "\n")
cat("  - Présents dans 3 Tneg ET < 2 échantillons normaux:", 
    sum(nb_tneg_its == 3 & nb_normal_its < 2), "\n")
saveRDS(ps_gyrB_filtered, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_filtered.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_ITS_filtered, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_filtered.rds"))

removed_asvs_ITS <- data.frame(
  ASV = taxa_names(ps_ITS)[!asvs_to_keep_its],
  Nb_Tpos = nb_tpos_its[!asvs_to_keep_its],
  Nb_Normal = nb_normal_its[!asvs_to_keep_its],
  Nb_Tneg = nb_tneg_its[!asvs_to_keep_its],
  Total_reads = taxa_sums(ps_ITS)[!asvs_to_keep_its],
  Raison = ifelse(nb_tpos_its[!asvs_to_keep_its] == 2, "Dans_2_Tpos",
            ifelse(nb_normal_its[!asvs_to_keep_its] < 2, "Moins_2_echantillons",
            ifelse(nb_tneg_its[!asvs_to_keep_its] >= 3, "3+_Tneg", "Combinaison"))),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

tax_removed_its <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_ITS)[!asvs_to_keep_its, ])
removed_asvs_ITS <- cbind(removed_asvs_ITS, tax_removed_its)

write.csv(removed_asvs_ITS, 
          paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ITS_ASVs_removed_manual.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```
ITS - Before filtering: 2029 ASVs
ITS - After filtering: 2018 ASVs
ASVs retirés: 11 
  - Presents in 2 Tpos: 2 
  - Presents in 4+ Tneg: 11 
  - Presents in 3 Tneg and < 2 samples 0 

#### decontam
```{r install package, eval=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("decontam")

library(decontam)
```

```{r gyrB decontam, eval=FALSE}
# find Tneg
sample_data(ps_gyrB)$is_neg_control <- grepl("Tneg", sample_names(ps_gyrB))

contamdf_prev_gyrB <- isContaminant(ps_gyrB, 
                                     method = "prevalence", 
                                     neg = "is_neg_control",
                                     threshold = 0.5)  # Ajuster selon besoin
cat("gyrB - Nb of contaminants:\n")
cat("prevalence", sum(contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant), "\n")

# Save
decontam_results_gyrB <- data.frame(
  ASV = taxa_names(ps_gyrB),
  contaminant_prev = contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant,
  p_prev = contamdf_prev_gyrB$p,
  Total_reads = taxa_sums(ps_gyrB),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add taxo
decontam_results_gyrB <- cbind(decontam_results_gyrB, 
                               as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_gyrB)))

write.csv(decontam_results_gyrB, 
          paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/gyrB_decontam_results.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```
```{r ITS decontam, eval=FALSE}
sample_data(ps_ITS)$is_neg_control <- grepl("Tneg", sample_names(ps_ITS))

contamdf_prev_ITS <- isContaminant(ps_ITS, 
                                     method = "prevalence", 
                                     neg = "is_neg_control",
                                     threshold = 0.5)

cat("ITS - Contaminants identifiés par decontam:\n")
cat("  Méthode prévalence:", sum(contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant), "\n")

decontam_results_ITS <- data.frame(
  ASV = taxa_names(ps_ITS),
  contaminant_prev = contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant,
  p_prev = contamdf_prev_ITS$p,
  Total_reads = taxa_sums(ps_ITS),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

decontam_results_ITS <- cbind(decontam_results_ITS, 
                               as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_ITS)))

write.csv(decontam_results_ITS, 
          paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ITS_decontam_results.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#### compare decontamination methods
```{r gyrB compare decontamination methods, eval=FALSE}
# ASVs removed manually
manual_removed <- taxa_names(ps_gyrB)[!asvs_to_keep]

# ASVs removed with decontam
decontam_removed <- taxa_names(ps_gyrB)[contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant]

# comparison table
comparison_gyrB <- data.frame(
  ASV = taxa_names(ps_gyrB),
  Removed_manual = taxa_names(ps_gyrB) %in% manual_removed,
  Removed_decontam_prev = contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant,
  Both_methods = (taxa_names(ps_gyrB) %in% manual_removed) & contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant,
  Total_reads = taxa_sums(ps_gyrB),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

comparison_gyrB <- cbind(comparison_gyrB, as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_gyrB)))

write.csv(comparison_gyrB, 
          paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/gyrB_comparison_methods.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

comparison_summary <- data.frame(
  Category = c("Manuel uniquement", "Decontam uniquement", "Les deux méthodes", "Aucune méthode"),
  Count = c(
    length(setdiff(manual_removed, decontam_removed)),
    length(setdiff(decontam_removed, manual_removed)),
    length(intersect(manual_removed, decontam_removed)),
    sum(!comparison_gyrB$Removed_manual & !comparison_gyrB$Removed_decontam_prev)
  )
)

ggplot(comparison_summary, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5) +
  labs(title = "Comparaison des méthodes de filtrage (gyrB)",
       y = "Nombre d'ASVs") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/gyrB_comparison_plot.png"),
       width = 8, height = 6)
```
```{r ITS compare decontamination methods, eval=FALSE}
manual_removed <- taxa_names(ps_ITS)[!asvs_to_keep_its]

decontam_removed <- taxa_names(ps_ITS)[contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant]

cat("\n Comparaison ITS \n")
cat("ASVs retirés par méthode manuelle:", length(manual_removed), "\n")
cat("ASVs retirés par decontam (prev):", length(decontam_removed), "\n")
cat("ASVs en commun:", length(intersect(manual_removed, decontam_removed)), "\n")
cat("Uniquement manuel:", length(setdiff(manual_removed, decontam_removed)), "\n")
cat("Uniquement decontam:", length(setdiff(decontam_removed, manual_removed)), "\n")

comparison_ITS <- data.frame(
  ASV = taxa_names(ps_ITS),
  Removed_manual = taxa_names(ps_ITS) %in% manual_removed,
  Removed_decontam_prev = contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant,
  Both_methods = (taxa_names(ps_ITS) %in% manual_removed) & contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant,
  Total_reads = taxa_sums(ps_ITS),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

comparison_ITS <- cbind(comparison_ITS, as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_ITS)))

write.csv(comparison_ITS, 
          paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ITS_comparison_methods.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

comparison_summary <- data.frame(
  Category = c("Manuel uniquement", "Decontam uniquement", "Les deux méthodes", "Aucune méthode"),
  Count = c(
    length(setdiff(manual_removed, decontam_removed)),
    length(setdiff(decontam_removed, manual_removed)),
    length(intersect(manual_removed, decontam_removed)),
    sum(!comparison_ITS$Removed_manual & !comparison_ITS$Removed_decontam_prev)
  )
)

ggplot(comparison_summary, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5) +
  labs(title = "Comparaison des méthodes de filtrage (ITS)",
       y = "Nombre d'ASVs") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ITS_comparison_plot.png"),
       width = 8, height = 6)
```
#### decontaminated phyloseqs
```{r remove controls, eval=FALSE}
ps_gyrB <- subset_samples(ps_gyrB, 
                                      !grepl("Tneg|Tpos", sample_names(ps_gyrB)))
ps_ITS <- subset_samples(ps_ITS, 
                                      !grepl("Tneg|Tpos", sample_names(ps_ITS)))

saveRDS(ps_gyrB, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_ITS, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS.rds"))
```
```{r gyrB decontaminated phyloseqs, eval=FALSE}
# Créer l'objet phyloseq filtré avec decontam (méthode prevalence)
ps_gyrB_pkdecontam <- prune_taxa(!contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant, ps_gyrB)

cat("gyrB - Décontamination avec decontam:\n")
cat("  Avant:", ntaxa(ps_gyrB), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Après:", ntaxa(ps_gyrB_pkdecontam), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Retirés:", sum(contamdf_prev_gyrB$contaminant), "ASVs\n\n")

# Créer l'objet phyloseq filtré avec méthode manuelle
ps_gyrB_handdecontam <- prune_taxa(asvs_to_keep, ps_gyrB)

cat("gyrB - Décontamination manuelle:\n")
cat("  Avant:", ntaxa(ps_gyrB), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Après:", ntaxa(ps_gyrB_handdecontam), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Retirés:", sum(!asvs_to_keep), "ASVs\n\n")

```
```{r ITS  decontaminated phyloseqs, eval=FALSE}

ps_ITS_pkdecontam <- prune_taxa(!contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant, ps_ITS)

cat("ITS - Décontamination avec decontam:\n")
cat("  Avant:", ntaxa(ps_ITS), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Après:", ntaxa(ps_ITS_pkdecontam), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Retirés:", sum(contamdf_prev_ITS$contaminant), "ASVs\n\n")

ps_ITS_handdecontam <- prune_taxa(asvs_to_keep_its, ps_ITS)

cat("ITS - Décontamination manuelle:\n")
cat("  Avant:", ntaxa(ps_ITS), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Après:", ntaxa(ps_ITS_handdecontam), "ASVs\n")
cat("  Retirés:", sum(!asvs_to_keep_its), "ASVs\n\n")

```
```{r save all phyloseqs, eval=FALSE}
saveRDS(ps_gyrB_pkdecontam, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_pkdecontam.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_gyrB_handdecontam, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_handdecontam.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_ITS_pkdecontam, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_pkdecontam.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_ITS_handdecontam, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_handdecontam.rds"))

```

### Filters: -parE, -unassigned, -ASVs<20reads, -ASVs<2samples, -samples<1000reads
```{r open phyloseqs, eval=FALSE}
# Charger tous les objets phyloseq
ps_gyrB_pkdecontam <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_pkdecontam.rds"))
ps_gyrB_handdecontam <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_handdecontam.rds"))
ps_ITS_pkdecontam <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_pkdecontam.rds"))
ps_ITS_handdecontam <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_handdecontam.rds"))
```
```{r sequencing  depth, eval=FALSE}
sample_sums(ps_gyrB_handdecontam)
summary(sample_sums(ps_gyrB_handdecontam))

# Médiane des reads par échantillon
median(sample_sums(ps_gyrB_handdecontam))
```

```{r gyrB filter, eval=FALSE}
for (analysis in c("handdecontam", "pkdecontam")){
  if(analysis == "handdecontam"){ps_gyrB <- ps_gyrB_handdecontam} else {ps_gyrB <- ps_gyrB_pkdecontam}
  
  n_initial <- ntaxa(ps_gyrB)
  # Retirer les séquences non assignées (NA au niveau Kingdom ou Phylum)
  ps_gyrB_filtered <- subset_taxa(ps_gyrB, Kingdom == "gyrB")
  # Filtrer : ASVs avec moins de 20 reads au total
  ps_gyrB_filtered <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_gyrB_filtered) >= 20, ps_gyrB_filtered)
  # Filtrer : ASVs présents dans moins de 2 échantillons
  ps_gyrB_filtered <- filter_taxa(ps_gyrB_filtered, function(x) sum(x > 0) >= 2, prune = TRUE)
  # Filtrer : ASVs avec moins de 1000 reads au total
  ps_gyrB_filtered <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps_gyrB_filtered) >= 1000, ps_gyrB_filtered)
  n_final <- ntaxa(ps_gyrB_filtered)
  # Vérifier les résultats
  ps_gyrB_filtered
  
  cat("  ASVs initiaux:", n_initial, "\n")
  cat("  ASVs finaux:", n_final, "\n")
  # Save
  if(analysis == "handdecontam"){ps_gyrB_handdecontam_filtered <- ps_gyrB_filtered} else {ps_gyrB_pkdecontam_filtered <- ps_gyrB_filtered}
  rm(ps_gyrB, ps_gyrB_filtered)
}


ps_gyrB_handdecontam
ps_gyrB_handdecontam_filtered
ps_gyrB_pkdecontam
ps_gyrB_pkdecontam_filtered

#tax_table_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_gyrB_handdecontam_filtered))
```
```{r ITS filter, eval=FALSE}
for (analysis in c("handdecontam", "pkdecontam")){
  if(analysis == "handdecontam"){ps_ITS <- ps_ITS_handdecontam} else {ps_ITS <- ps_ITS_pkdecontam}
  
  n_initial <- ntaxa(ps_ITS)
  # Retirer les séquences non assignées (NA au niveau Kingdom ou Phylum)
  ps_ITS_filtered <- subset_taxa(ps_ITS, Kingdom == "k__Fungi")
  # Filtrer : ASVs avec moins de 20 reads au total
  ps_ITS_filtered <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_ITS_filtered) >= 20, ps_ITS_filtered)
  # Filtrer : ASVs présents dans moins de 2 échantillons
  ps_ITS_filtered <- filter_taxa(ps_ITS_filtered, function(x) sum(x > 0) >= 2, prune = TRUE)
  # Filtrer : ASVs avec moins de 1000 reads au total
  ps_ITS_filtered <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps_ITS_filtered) >= 1000, ps_ITS_filtered)
  n_final <- ntaxa(ps_ITS_filtered)
  # Vérifier les résultats
  ps_ITS_filtered
  
  cat("  ASVs initiaux:", n_initial, "\n")
  cat("  ASVs finaux:", n_final, "\n")
  # Save
  if(analysis == "handdecontam"){ps_ITS_handdecontam_filtered <- ps_ITS_filtered} else {ps_ITS_pkdecontam_filtered <- ps_ITS_filtered}
  rm(ps_ITS, ps_ITS_filtered)
}


ps_ITS_handdecontam
ps_ITS_handdecontam_filtered
ps_ITS_pkdecontam
ps_ITS_pkdecontam_filtered
```
```{r save RDS, eval=FALSE}
saveRDS(ps_gyrB_handdecontam_filtered, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_handdecontam_filtered.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_gyrB_pkdecontam_filtered, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_gyrB_pkdecontam_filtered.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_ITS_handdecontam_filtered, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_handdecontam_filtered.rds"))
saveRDS(ps_ITS_pkdecontam_filtered, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_ITS_pkdecontam_filtered.rds"))
```

### Subset to remove sterilized seeds or Seedling, only for Gers lot; and low-abundance counts
```{r subset env_table, eval=FALSE}
env_table=subset(env_table, Condition !="Seed Sterilized")
env_table=subset(env_table, Condition !="Seedling")
env_table=subset(env_table, Production !="Maine et Loire")

rownames(env_table) <- env_table$SampleID
```
```{r subset phyloseqs, eval=FALSE}
for (gene in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  for (analysis in c("handdecontam", "pkdecontam", "handdecontam_filtered", "pkdecontam_filtered")){
    ps <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_", gene, "_", analysis, ".rds"))
    common_samples <- intersect(sample_names(ps), rownames(env_table))
    # Filtrer le phyloseq pour ne garder que les échantillons communs
    ps_gyrB <- prune_samples(common_samples, ps)
    # Mettre à jour les métadonnées avec le env_table filtré
    sample_data(ps) <- env_table[common_samples, ]
    # Retirer les ASVs qui deviennent vides (0 reads) après retrait d'échantillons
    ps_gyrB <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps) > 0, ps)
    
    saveRDS(ps, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_", gene, "_", analysis, "_subSamples.rds"))
    
    # Filtrer pour garder seulement les ASVs présents dans au moins 2 échantillons
    ps <- filter_taxa(ps, function(x) sum(x > 0) >= 2, prune = TRUE)
    saveRDS(ps, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_", gene, "_", analysis, "_subSamples_subASVs.rds"))

  }
}
```
### clean preprocessing
```{r clean, eval=FALSE}
rm(ps,
   ps_gyrB, ps_gyrB_filtered, ps_gyrB_handdecontam, ps_gyrB_pkdecontam, ps_gyrB_handdecontam_filtered, ps_gyrB_pkdecontam_filtered,
   ps_ITS, ps_ITS_filtered, ps_ITS_handdecontam, ps_ITS_pkdecontam, ps_ITS_handdecontam_filtered, ps_ITS_pkdecontam_filtered,
   asv_df_gyrB, asv_mat_gyrB, asv_mat_gyrB_matched, asv_table_gyrB, asvgyrB_GRAINES, comparison_gyrB, contamdf_prev_gyrB, decontam_results_gyrB, env_table_gyrB, GRAINES_gyrB_tax, GRAINES_gyrB_tax_matched, removed_asvs_gyrB, tax_df_gyrB, tax_removed, asvs_to_keep, common_samples_gyrB, nb_normal, nb_tneg, nb_tpos, normal_samples, otu_mat, tneg_samples, tpos_samples,
   
   asv_df_ITS, asv_mat_ITS, asv_mat_ITS_matched, asv_table_ITS, asvITS_GRAINES, comparison_ITS, contamdf_prev_ITS, decontam_results_ITS, env_table_ITS, GRAINES_ITS_tax, GRAINES_ITS_tax_matched, removed_asvs_ITS, tax_df_ITS, tax_removed_its, asvs_to_keep_its, common_samples_ITS, nb_normal_its, nb_tneg_its, nb_tpos_its, normal_samples_its, otu_mat_its, tneg_samples_its, tpos_samples_its,
   
   comparison_summary, env_table, lignes_differentes, sample_stats, taxa.g_GRAINES, taxa.print.g_GRAINES, asvs_in_tneg, common_asvs, common_samples, decontam_removed, manual_removed, total_asvs)

```

## 4.1_Function to open metabar phyloseq data and add variable values TO RUN
```{r METABAR function to load pre-processed gene dataset and add permuted t50germ and t50tot and FEP values, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Select_Metabar_data <- function(gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                                decontaminated, #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                                filtered, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                                subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                                subset_lowPrevASVs = TRUE, #remove ASVs present in only 1 sample
                                rarefied = FALSE, # rarefied
                                add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                                add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                                RemoveFLAoutlier = FALSE, #remove all samples from variety "Flavert"
                                verbose = FALSE,
                                datatyp = "raw", # "raw" or "rarefied"
                                filt_prev_relAb = 0
                                ){
  # Open phyloseq
  analysis <- paste0(gene_choice,
                       ifelse(decontaminated != "", paste0("_", decontaminated), ""),
                       ifelse(filtered,"_filtered", ""),
                       ifelse(subset_samplesGRAINES,"_subSamples", ""),
                       ifelse(subset_lowPrevASVs,"_subASVs", ""),
                       ifelse(rarefied, "_rarefied", ""))
  if(verbose){print(analysis)}
  ps <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/", "ps_", analysis, ".rds"))
  
  # filter by prevalence for differential abundance analyses
  if(filt_prev_relAb != 0){
    ps <- filter_taxa(ps, function(x) sum(x > 0) >= (filt_prev_relAb * length(x)), TRUE)
  }
  
  # Extract phyloseq metadata
  env_table <- sample_data(ps) %>%
    data.frame() %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  # Extract ASV table
  ASV_df <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps))
  if(!taxa_are_rows(ps)) {
    ASV_df <- t(ASV_df)
  }
  ASV_df <- as.data.frame(t(ASV_df))  # Samples in rows, ASVs in columns
  
  # Extract taxonomy
  taxonomy_ASV <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps))
  
  # add mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight
  if(add_meanVar & !"meanFEP" %in% colnames(env_table)){
    env_table <- env_table %>%
      left_join(GermEmerg_Emerg_stat %>% 
                  select(Varieties, Final_Em_Percentage) %>%
                  rename(meanFEP = Final_Em_Percentage),
                by = "Varieties") %>%
      left_join(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat %>% 
                  select(Varieties, t50.Germinated) %>%
                  rename(meant50germ = t50.Germinated),
                by = "Varieties") %>%
      left_join(GermEmerg_KinGerm_stat %>% 
                  select(Varieties, t50.total) %>%
                  rename(meant50tot = t50.total),
                by = "Varieties") %>%
      left_join(Morpho_weight_stat %>% 
                  select(Varieties, weight) %>%
                  rename(meanweight = weight),
                by = "Varieties")
  }
  
  # Remove Flavert outlier samples ####
  if(RemoveFLAoutlier){
    if(verbose){
      n_before <- nrow(env_table)
      n_flavert <- sum(env_table$Varieties == "Flavert", na.rm = TRUE)
      cat(paste0("Removing Flavert samples: ", n_flavert, " samples removed out of ", n_before, "\n"))
    }
    # Store rownames before filtering
    samples_to_remove <- rownames(env_table)[env_table$Varieties == "Flavert"]
    # Filter env_table
    env_table <- env_table %>%
      filter(Varieties != "Flavert")
    # Filter ASV_df (keep only samples that are NOT in samples_to_remove)
    ASV_df <- ASV_df[!rownames(ASV_df) %in% samples_to_remove, ]
    if(verbose){
      cat(paste0("After filtering: ", nrow(env_table), " samples remaining\n"))
    }
  }
  
  # add permutations of t50germ, t50tot and FEP
  if(add_permVar){
    # Add metadata PERMUTATION - Final Emergence Percentage #####
    GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_ <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl %>%
      rename(Varieties_GermEmerg = Varieties)
    
    # If RemoveFLAoutlier, also remove Flavert from germination data
    if(RemoveFLAoutlier){
      GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_ <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_ %>%
        filter(Varieties_GermEmerg != "Flavert")
    }
    
    GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_grouped <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_ %>%
      group_by(Varieties_GermEmerg) %>%
      mutate(FEP_shuffled = sample(Final_Em_Percentage, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
      ungroup()
    
    env_table_permuted <- env_table %>%
      group_by(Varieties) %>%
      mutate(Final_Em_Percentage = {
        FEP_values <- GermEmerg_Emerg_Repl_grouped %>%
          filter(Varieties_GermEmerg == dplyr::first(Varieties)) %>%
          pull(FEP_shuffled)
        sample(FEP_values, size = n(), replace = ifelse(length(FEP_values) >= n(), FALSE, TRUE))
      }) %>%
      ungroup()
    env_table <- env_table_permuted
  
    # Add metadata PERMUTATION - t50germ #####
    GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl %>%
      rename(Varieties_GermEmerg = Varieties)
    
    # If RemoveFLAoutlier, also remove Flavert from germination data
    if(RemoveFLAoutlier){
      GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ %>%
        filter(Varieties_GermEmerg != "Flavert")
    }
    
    GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ %>%
      group_by(Varieties_GermEmerg) %>%
      mutate(t50germ_shuffled = sample(t50.Germinated, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
      ungroup()
    
    env_table_permuted <- env_table %>%
      group_by(Varieties) %>%
      mutate(t50germ = {
        t50germ_values <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped %>%
          filter(Varieties_GermEmerg == dplyr::first(Varieties)) %>%
          pull(t50germ_shuffled)
        sample(t50germ_values, size = n(), replace = ifelse(length(t50germ_values) >= n(), FALSE, TRUE))
      }) %>%
      ungroup()
    env_table <- env_table_permuted
    
    # Add metadata PERMUTATION - t50tot #####
    GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_ %>%
      group_by(Varieties_GermEmerg) %>%
      mutate(t50tot_shuffled = sample(t50.total, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
      ungroup()
    
    env_table_permuted <- env_table %>%
      group_by(Varieties) %>%
      mutate(t50tot = {
        t50tot_values <- GermEmerg_KinGerm_Repl_grouped %>%
          filter(Varieties_GermEmerg == dplyr::first(Varieties)) %>%
          pull(t50tot_shuffled)
        sample(t50tot_values, size = n(), replace = ifelse(length(t50tot_values) >= n(), FALSE, TRUE))
      }) %>%
      ungroup()
    env_table <- env_table_permuted
  }
  
  # Return list with all components
  return(list(
    analysis = analysis,
    ASV_df = ASV_df,
    env_table = env_table,
    taxonomy_ASV = taxonomy_ASV,
    ps = ps
  ))
}
```
```{r select marker, eval=FALSE}
#gene_choice = "gyrB"
#
#gene_choice = "ITS"

```
## 4.2_Rarefy for alpha-diversity analyses _ If not yet done
```{r open phyloseq object - raw, eval=FALSE}
Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = FALSE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )


analysis <- Metabar$analysis
ps <- Metabar$ps
env_table <- Metabar$env_table
ASV_df <- Metabar$ASV_df

rm(Metabar)
```
### 4.2.1_Rarefaction curves
```{r plot rarecurves, eval=FALSE}
# Tracer les courbes de raréfaction
rarecurve(
  ASV_df,
  step = 100,
  col = rainbow(nrow(ASV_df)),
  label = TRUE,
  main = "Courbes de raréfaction"
)
abline(v = min(rowSums(ASV_df)), lty = 2, col = "red")  # ligne au seuil choisi
```
### 4.2.2_Rarefy dataset to the lowest number of sequences observed in a sample (raremax) or replace "raremax" by the level you want to use
Using the rarefaction curves, we determine `10000` as a reasonable "Sample Size" to rarefy by for gyrB.
We rarefy the samples without replacement. Rarefaction is used to simulate even number of reads per sample.
```{r rarefaction, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
raremax <- min(rowSums(ASV_df))
raremax 
#gyrB handdecontam: raremax = 1069 
#ITS  handdecontam: raremax = 7435
rarefaction_threshold <- raremax

#ASV_torarefy=ASV_df[rowSums(ASV_df) > rarefaction_threshold-1,]
#rarefied=rrarefy(ASV_torarefy, sample= rarefaction_threshold)

# Rarefy with phyloseq
set.seed(42)
physeq_rare <- rarefy_even_depth(
  ps,
  sample.size = min(sample_sums(ps)),
  rngseed = 42,
  replace = FALSE,
  trimOTUs = TRUE,   # remove abstent ASVs after rarefaction
  verbose = TRUE
)

```
 - gyrB handdecontam: raremax = 1069 
 - ITS  handdecontam: raremax = 7435
 - gyrB handdecontam: 695  ASVs were removed because they are no longer present in any sample after random subsampling
 - ITS  handdecontam: 1230 ASVs …
```{r check ASV_abundance_rarefied, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# Extract ASV table
ASV_abt_r <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_rare))
#ASV number
number_read_rarefied <- colSums(ASV_abt_r)
number_read_Seeds_samples <- rowSums(ASV_abt_r)
number_read_rar_df <- as.data.frame(number_read_rarefied)
number_read_rar_df
number_read_Seeds_samples #should be equal to the threshold
```

### 4.2.3_Save/Load rarefied data
```{r write, eval=FALSE}
saveRDS(physeq_rare, paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/ps_", analysis, "_rarefied.rds"))
```

### 4.2.4_Check number reads and ASVs
```{r number reads and ASVs before and after rarefaction, eval=FALSE}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  
  # Charger version NON raréfiée
  Metabar_brut <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice,decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = FALSE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE)
  physeq_brut <- Metabar_brut$ps
  
  # Charger version raréfiée
  Metabar_rare <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice,
                                       decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE)
  physeq_rare <- Metabar_rare$ps
  
  cat("\n---", gene_choice, "---\n")
  cat("Reads moyens (brut)     :", round(mean(sample_sums(physeq_brut))), "\n")
  cat("Reads moyens (rarefied) :", round(mean(sample_sums(physeq_rare))), "\n")
  cat("ASVs brut               :", ntaxa(physeq_brut), "\n")
  cat("ASVs raréfiés           :", ntaxa(physeq_rare), "\n")
}
```
## 4.3_Alpha-diversity analyses
```{r open phyloseq object - rarefied, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )

analysis <- Metabar$analysis
ps <- Metabar$ps
env_table <- Metabar$env_table
ASV_df <- Metabar$ASV_df

rm(Metabar)
```
else loss of information and adds artificial variance
```{r check sampling depth variation, eval=FALSE}
# Vérifier les profondeurs
sample_sums(ps)
min(sample_sums(ps))
# Si écart > 10x, considérer filtrage
#min_depth <- 5000
#ps_filtered <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps) >= min_depth, ps)
```
```{r Agglomerate at the genus level if too many taxa, eval=Metabaranalysis}
ps_genus <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = "Genus")

ASV_df <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_genus))
if(!taxa_are_rows(ps)) {
    ASV_df <- t(ASV_df)
  }
ASV_df <- as.data.frame(t(ASV_df))  # Samples in rows, ASVs in columns
```
### 4.3.1_Plot richness on rarefied datasets
```{r colors by Genus, eval=Metabaranalysis}
tax_colors_ITS <-  c('Alternaria'='#9089b7','Acremonium'='#ecdbd2' ,'Cylindrobasidium'='#fcc875', 'Cladosporium'='#d35c37','Hyphoderma'='#e99787','Hypholoma'='#ffbb94','Fusarium'='#805778','Gibberella'='#ab4f5f','Itersonilia'='#e58f66','Other'='black','Macrophomina'='#cf7773','Nigrospora'='#d4c8d1', "Penicillium"="#b76c3b", "Olpidium"="#b29e54", "Pyrenophora"="pink",'Solicoccozyma'='blue','Stemphylium'='darkorange' ,'Stagonospora'='#82e4de', "Trametes"="light green", "unidentified"="gray")

tax_colors_gyrB <-  c('Achromobacter'='#ffbb94','Agrobacterium'='yellow' ,'Aliihoeflea'='#cfa7da', 'Bacillus'='#547dae','Cutibacterium'='blue' ,'Enterobacter'='#acd0c0', 'Erwinia'='#4f6457','Herbaspirillum'='#b4b4b4' ,'Klebsiella'='#c05805','Kosakonia'='red', 'Duganella'= "#f4cc95", "Lelliottia"="#5fa8d3", "Massilia"="#d4e79c", "Pantoea"="orange", "Microbacterium"="#b29e54", "Pseudomonas"="#90639f",  "Sphingomonas"="#cf7773","Variovorax"="pink","Other"="black", "unclassified"="grey" )
```

```{r Plot alpha-div Chao1 and Shannon phyloseq, eval=Metabaranalysis}
for (gene_choice in c("ITS", "gyrB")) {
  # Create dataframes ####
  Metabar_all <- Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )

  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  Ps_object <- Metabar$ps
  # trim ASVs that are not found in any sample
  Ps_object <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(Ps_object) > 0, Ps_object)
  
  # plot richness indices
  print(gene_choice)
  Plotrichness <- plot_richness(Ps_object, measures=c("Chao1", "Shannon"), x= "Varieties", title = paste0("Richness - ", gene_choice))
  print(Plotrichness)}
```
```{r FigSupp3A_alpha-diversity_all 3 indices ggplot, eval=Metabaranalysis, echo=TRUE}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  # Select data ####
  Metabar_all <- Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )

  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  
  #if (gene_choice == "ITS"){physeq_ASV <- physeq_ITS_notrar}
  #if (gene_choice == "gyrB"){physeq_ASV <- physeq_gyrB_notrar}
  
  Alpha_diversity_rarefied <- plot_richness(physeq_ASV,
                                            x='Varieties',
                                            color='Varieties',
                                            measures = c('Observed',
                                                         'Shannon',
                                                         'Simpson'
                                                         )) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = unique(physeq_ASV@sam_data$Varieties)) +  # Set x-axis labels to unique genotype names
    scale_color_manual(values=color)+
    theme(axis.title = element_text(color="black", size=14, face="bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(color="black", size=12, face="bold"),
          legend.text = element_text(colour="black", size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.title = element_text(colour="black", size=14, face="bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
          strip.text.y = element_blank(),  # Remove y-axis left labels
          panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"),  # Reduce panel spacing
          strip.background = element_blank(),  # Remove panel background
          strip.placement = "outside", # Place strip text outside the plot symptoms
          axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
          plot.background = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      ) + geom_point( size = 2)
    
  Alpha_diversity_rarefied
  
  rich = estimate_richness(physeq_ASV)
  rich$Sample <- rownames(rich)
  rich <- rich %>% dplyr::mutate(Varieties = as.factor(str_extract(Sample,"V[:digit:]+(?=S)")))
  head(rich)
  
  if(gene_choice == "ITS"){
    Metabar_AlphaDivRar_ITS <- Alpha_diversity_rarefied
  } else if (gene_choice == "gyrB"){
    Metabar_AlphaDivRar_gyrB <- Alpha_diversity_rarefied
  }

  
  if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
    ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Metabar/Fig_Metabar_AlphaDiv_", gene_choice, ".png"),
           plot = Alpha_diversity_rarefied)
  }
}
```
```{r FigSupp3AB, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Metabar_AlphaDivRar_gyrB
Metabar_AlphaDivRar_ITS
```
```{r Compare diversity indices, eval=Metabaranalysis}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  # Select data ####
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  rm(Metabar)
  # Calculate observed ASV richness per sample ####
  richness_values <- estimate_richness(physeq_ASV, measures = "Observed")$Observed
  # Compute mean and standard deviation
  X <- mean(richness_values)
  Y <- stats::sd(richness_values)
  min_val <- min(richness_values)
  max_val <- max(richness_values)
  # Print results
  print(gene_choice)
  cat("Observed ASV richness averaging", round(X, 1), "±", round(Y, 1), "per sample,\n",
        "min value: ", round(min_val, 1), "  and max value: ", round(max_val, 1), "\n")
  rm(X, Y, min_val, max_val, richness_values)
  
    # Diversity metrics ####
  print("_______________________________________________________________/n")
  print(gene_choice)
    div_df <- estimate_richness(physeq_ASV, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon"))
    env_df <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_ASV))
    diversity_df <- cbind(env_df, div_df)
    print(head(diversity_df))
    
    # non-parametric kruskal test
    Shannon_test <- kruskal.test(Shannon ~ Varieties, data = diversity_df)
    print(Shannon_test)
    Chao_test <- kruskal.test(Chao1 ~ Varieties, data = diversity_df)
    print(Chao_test)
    
    # post-hoc
    print(FSA::dunnTest(Shannon ~ Varieties, data = diversity_df, method = "bh"))
    print(FSA::dunnTest(Chao1 ~ Varieties, data = diversity_df, method = "bh"))
}
```

## 4.4_choice thresholds for Relative Abundance barplots and indicative taxa analysis
```{r thresholds, eval=Metabaranalysis}
prevalence_threshold <- 0.05
min_maxRelAbthreshold <- 0.001 # the maximum abundance is at least 0.001
min_samples <- 2 # taxa present in at least 2 samples
minTotRelAbthreshold <- 50 # at least 50 counts across all samples
min_meanRelAbthreshold <- 0#.001 # at least 0 count in an individual sample
foldlimit <- 1 # VIP <1 to be considered significant (OPLS-method)
```
```{r help choice of prevalence threshold, eval=FALSE}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(phyloseq::nsamples)
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  # Select data ####
Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  rm(Metabar)
  # Combien d'ASVs sont présents dans moins de X% des échantillons ?
  n_samples <- nsamples(physeq_ASV)
  prevalence <- apply(otu_table(physeq_ASV), 1, function(x) sum(x > 0) / n_samples)
  
  taxa_are_rows(physeq_ASV)
  # Si taxa_are_rows = FALSE, transposer :
  prevalence <- apply(t(otu_table(physeq_ASV)), 1, function(x) sum(x > 0) / n_samples)
  
  hist(prevalence, breaks = 30, main = "Distribution de prévalence", xlab = "Prévalence")
  print(sum(prevalence < 0.05))  # nb d'ASVs sous le seuil de 5%
  print(sum(prevalence < 0.10))  # nb d'ASVs sous le seuil de 10%
}
```
## 4.5_Plot Class and Genus relative abundance graph on unrarefied filtered datasets
```{r plot Class and Genus Relative abundance graphs from raw import, eval=Metabaranalysis}
order_var = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer", "Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender") #FEP

for (gene_choice in c("ITS", "gyrB")){
  # Select data ####
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                              decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                              filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                              subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                              subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                              rarefied = FALSE, # rarefied
                              add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                              add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                              
                              filt_prev_relAb = 0.05, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                              verbose = TRUE
                              )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  ps <- Metabar$ps
  env_table <- Metabar$env_table
  ASV_df <- Metabar$ASV_df
  
  rm(Metabar)
  
  # Agglomerate at the genus level ####
  ps_genus <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = "Genus")
  
  ASV_df <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_genus))
  if(!taxa_are_rows(ps)) {
      ASV_df <- t(ASV_df)
    }
  ASV_df <- as.data.frame(t(ASV_df))  # Samples in rows, ASVs in columns
  
  # Plot Class and Genus Relative abundance graphs from raw import ####
  # Filter physeq ####
    #if necessary pre-process- remove rare ASVs: retains features that are at least present in two samples 
    # +/- and at least have at total count of 50 across all samples
    # microbiome::core removes the ASVs not passing the conditions,
    # DAtest::preDA regroups it at "Others"
    #pseq.preval10 <- microbiome::core(physeq_ASV, detection = 0, prevalence = prevalence_threshold)
    core_ps <- core(ps,
                  detection = min_meanRelAbthreshold,   # Min abundance (relative, e.g., 0.001)
                  prevalence = min_samples / phyloseq::nsamples(ps)) 
    #pseq.preval2samples.count50 <- preDA(physeq_ASV,#pseq.preval10, 
    #                               min.samples = min_samples, #min.reads = minTotRelAbthreshold,
    #                               min.abundance = min_meanRelAbthreshold) 
  
    # Prepare Taxonomy barplot at class level ####
    physeq_used <- core_ps
    
    #Turn all OTUs into class (or phylum or order level) counts
    glom_used <- tax_glom(physeq_used, taxrank = 'Class')
    glom_used # should list # taxa as # phyla
    glom_used_count = transform_sample_counts(glom_used, function(x) x / sum(x) )
    df_glom <- psmelt(glom_used_count) # create dataframe from phyloseq object
    
    #convert to character
    df_glom$Class <- as.character(df_glom$Class)
    
    #simple way to rename phyla with < 1% abundance
    df_glom_save=df_glom
    df_glom$Class[df_glom$Abundance < min_maxRelAbthreshold] <- "Other"
    
    #Count # phyla to set color palette
    Count = length(unique(df_glom$Class))
    
    # Plot at class level with condensed phyla into "unknown" category ####
    chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot <- ggplot(data=df_glom,
                     aes(x=Abundance, y=Sample, fill=Class)) + 
      geom_bar(aes(), stat="identity", position="stack") +
      theme(legend.position="bottom") + 
      custom_theme + 
      theme(axis.title = element_text(color="black", size=9, face="bold")) +
      theme(axis.text = element_text(color="black", size=7, face="bold")) + #y-axis text
      #theme(legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=8, face="bold"))+ #caption
      theme(legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=8, face="bold")) +
      theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#f0eeec"),
            strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"))+ 
      theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black",size = 0.5, linetype="solid"))+
      ggtitle(ifelse(gene_choice == "ITS", "Fungi - ITS", "Bacteria - gyrB"))+
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face="bold"))+
      theme(strip.text.y = element_text(size=8, angle=0, face = "bold")) +
      xlab("Relative Abundance")+ylab("Samples")+
      scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1))+
      theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
      facet_grid(Varieties #+Production
                 ~Condition, scales = "free_y", space = "free")+ 
      theme(panel.spacing.y = unit(0.01, "lines"))
    
    
    chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot
    # Save Class Taxonomy plots ####
    if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
      ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all,
                  "Metabar/Fig6_Metabar_Class",
                  gene_choice,
                  ".png"), plot = chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot)
    }
    if (gene_choice == "ITS") {
      Metabar_Fig_ClassRelAb_ITS <- chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot
    } else {
      Metabar_Fig_ClassRelAb_gyrB <- chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot
    }
    chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot
    rm(chosen_gene_by_Class_barplot)
    
    # Prepare Taxonomy barplot at Genus level ####
    # Turn all OTUs into class (or phylum or order level) counts
    physeq_used <- core_ps
    
    glom_used <- tax_glom(physeq_used, taxrank = 'Genus')
    glom_used # should list # taxa as # phyla
    glom_used_count = transform_sample_counts(glom_used, function(x) x / sum(x) )
    df_glom <- psmelt(glom_used_count) # create dataframe from phyloseq object
    
    #convert to character
    df_glom$Genus <- as.character(df_glom$Genus)
    
    #simple way to rename phyla with < 1% abundance
    df_glom_save=df_glom
    # Remove prefix "g__"
    df_glom$Genus <- gsub("^g__", "", df_glom$Genus)
    df_glom_save$Genus <- gsub("^g__", "", df_glom_save$Genus)
    df_glom_save$Genus[df_glom_save$Abundance < 0.1] <- "Other"
    Count = length(unique(df_glom_save$Genus))
    
    #Count # phyla to set color palette
    Count = length(unique(df_glom$Genus))
    # Plot at genus level ####
    if (gene_choice == "gyrB"){
      tax_colors_core <-  tax_colors_core_gyrB
    }
    if (gene_choice == "ITS"){
      tax_colors_core <-  tax_colors_core_ITS
    }
    
    
    genres_presents <- unique(df_glom_save$Genus)
    genres_manquants <- setdiff(genres_presents, names(tax_colors_core))
    print(genres_manquants)
    
    # Order varieties
    df_glom_save$Varieties <- factor(df_glom_save$Varieties, levels = order_var)
    
    # Order SampleID 
    df_glom_save <- df_glom_save %>%
      dplyr::arrange(Varieties) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(SampleID = factor(SampleID, levels = unique(SampleID)))
    
    # genera order to keep Other in last position
    genera_order <- c(
      setdiff(names(tax_colors_core), c("Other", "unclassified", "unidentified")),
      "unclassified", "unidentified", "Other")
    genera_order <- intersect(genera_order, unique(df_glom_save$Genus))
    df_glom_save$Genus <- factor(df_glom_save$Genus, levels = rev(genera_order))
    
    #plot with condensed phyla into "unknown" category
    chosen_gene_by_Genus_barplot <- ggplot(data=df_glom_save,
                                           aes(x=Abundance, y=SampleID, fill=Genus)) + 
      geom_bar(aes(), stat="identity", position="stack") +
      theme(legend.position="bottom") + 
      theme_classic() + 
      theme(axis.title = element_text(color="black", size=9, face="bold")) +
      theme(axis.text = element_text(color="black", size=7, face="bold")) + #y-axis text
      #theme(legend.text = element_text(color="black", size=8, face="bold"))+ #caption
      theme(legend.title = element_text(color="black", size=8, face="bold")) +
      theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#f0eeec"),
            strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"))+ 
      theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white",colour = "black",size = 0.5, linetype="solid"))+
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face="bold"))+ #0 to center text
      theme(strip.text.y = element_text(size=8, angle=0, face = "bold")) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Relative Abundance of ", ifelse(gene_choice=="ITS", "fungal", "bacterial"), " genus ", 
                     ifelse(gene_choice == "ITS", "(ITS1)", "(gyrB)"), " in bean varieties"))+
      scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1))+
      scale_fill_manual(values = tax_colors_core, breaks = genera_order) + 
      theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
      xlab(paste0())+
      ylab("Samples")+
      
        facet_nested(Varieties~., scales = "free_y", remove_labels = "y")+
        theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(), axis.text.y=element_blank(), axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
        theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F0EEEC"))+
        theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white",colour = "black",size = 0.5, linetype="solid"))+
        theme(strip.text.y = element_text(size=9, face = "bold", angle = 0))
      #OR
      #facet_grid(Varieties~Condition, scales = "free_y", space = "free")+ 
      #theme(panel.spacing.y = unit(0.01, "lines"))
    
    chosen_gene_by_Genus_barplot
    # Save Genus Taxonomy plot ####
    
    if(choice_save_fig_article == TRUE){
      ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                  "Metabar/Fig_Metabar_Genus",
                  gene_choice,
                  ".png"), plot = chosen_gene_by_Genus_barplot)
    }
    if (gene_choice == "ITS") {
      Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_ITS <- chosen_gene_by_Genus_barplot
    } else {
      Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_gyrB <- chosen_gene_by_Genus_barplot
    }
    rm(chosen_gene_by_Genus_barplot)
    
    # Clean ####
    rm(core_ps, ps_genus, ASV_df, df_glom, df_glom_save, 
   glom_used, glom_used_count, ps, env_table)
  }
```

```{r Fig Suppl4AB, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_ITS
Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_gyrB
```
```{r extract % of RelAb of most abundant taxa, eval=Metabaranalysis}
for (gene_choice in c("ITS", "gyrB")){
  # Select data ####
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                              decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                              filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                              subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                              subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                              rarefied = FALSE, # rarefied
                              add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                              add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                              
                              filt_prev_relAb = 0.05, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                              verbose = TRUE
                              )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  ps <- Metabar$ps
  env_table <- Metabar$env_table
  ASV_df <- Metabar$ASV_df
  
  rm(Metabar)

  # Cumulative mean relative abundance of top genera ####
  physeq_genus <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = "Genus")
  physeq_rel <- transform_sample_counts(physeq_genus, function(x) x / sum(x))

  otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_rel))
  # Corriger l'orientation si nécessaire
  if (!taxa_are_rows(physeq_rel)) { otu_df <- t(otu_df) }
  otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu_df)

  tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq_rel))

  # Nettoyer le préfixe g__
  tax_df$Genus <- gsub("^g__", "", tax_df$Genus)
  otu_df$Genus <- tax_df$Genus[match(rownames(otu_df), rownames(tax_df))]

  otu_genus <- otu_df %>%
    group_by(Genus) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(across(where(is.numeric), sum)) %>%
    column_to_rownames("Genus")

  genus_means <- rowMeans(otu_genus)
  genus_means_sorted <- sort(genus_means, decreasing = TRUE)
  cumulative_abundance <- cumsum(genus_means_sorted)

  top_x <- 10
  print(gene_choice)
  print(cumulative_abundance[1:top_x])

  plot_df <- data.frame(
    Genus = names(genus_means_sorted)[1:top_x],
    Mean = genus_means_sorted[1:top_x],
    Cumulative = cumulative_abundance[1:top_x]
  )

  Top10plot <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = reorder(Genus, Cumulative), y = Cumulative)) +
    geom_line(group = 1, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", alpha = 0.5) +  # repère 90%
    labs(
      x = "Top Genera (ordered by mean abundance)",
      y = "Cumulative Mean Relative Abundance",
      title = paste0("Cumulative Mean Abundance of Top ", top_x, " Genera — ", gene_choice)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  print(Top10plot)

  if (choice_save_fig_all == TRUE) {
    ggsave(paste0(choice_path_fig_all, "Metabar/Fig_Metabar_Top10taxa_CumulmeanRelAb",
                  gene_choice, ".png"), plot = Top10plot)
  }
  if (gene_choice == "ITS") {
      Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_ITS <- Top10plot
    } else {
      Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_gyrB <- Top10plot
    }
    rm(Top10plot)
}
```
