```{r Fig Suppl4CD, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_gyrB
Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_ITS
```

## 4.6_Community composition PCoA
```{r PCoA on rCLR+euclidian distance, eval=Metabaranalysis}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  # Select data ####
Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  rm(Metabar)
  
  # Seuil de prévalence à 5% ####
  prevalence_threshold <- 0.05
  
  physeq_filt <- filter_taxa(
    physeq_ASV,
    function(x) sum(x > 0) / length(x) >= prevalence_threshold,
    prune = TRUE
  )
  
  cat("ASVs avant filtrage :", ntaxa(physeq_ASV), "\n")
  cat("ASVs après filtrage :", ntaxa(physeq_filt), "\n")
  
  # CLR transform ####
  
  physeq_rclr <- microbiome::transform(physeq_filt, "rclr")
  otu_rclr <- as.matrix(otu_table(physeq_rclr)) # taxa_are_rows(physeq_ASV) == FALSE
  
  # NMDS on euclidian distance ####
  # Calcul de la distance euclidienne sur les données rCLR
  dist_rclr <- stats::dist(otu_rclr, method = "euclidean")
  
  # PCoA sur la distance euclidienne rCLR
pcoa_res <- ape::pcoa(dist_rclr)

# Variance expliquée par axe (en %)
variance_explained <- round(pcoa_res$values$Relative_eig * 100, 1)
cat("Axe 1 :", variance_explained[1], "%\n")
cat("Axe 2 :", variance_explained[2], "%\n")
cat("Axe 3 :", variance_explained[3], "%\n")

# Coordonnées des échantillons
pcoa_coords <- as.data.frame(pcoa_res$vectors[, 1:2])
colnames(pcoa_coords) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")
pcoa_coords$Sample <- rownames(pcoa_coords)

# Fusionner avec métadonnées et richesse
meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_filt))
meta_df$Sample <- rownames(meta_df)
richness_df <- data.frame(
  Sample = rownames(estimate_richness(physeq_filt, measures = "Observed")),
  Observed = estimate_richness(physeq_filt, measures = "Observed")$Observed
)
ASV_df_PCoA <- merge(pcoa_coords, meta_df, by = "Sample")
ASV_df_PCoA <- merge(ASV_df_PCoA, richness_df, by = "Sample")

# Plot
p1 <- ggplot(data = ASV_df_PCoA,
             aes(PCoA1, PCoA2, color = Varieties, size = Observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = Varieties), type = "t", linetype = 2,
               linewidth = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color, name = "Varieties") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = paste0("Richness (", gene_choice, ")"),
                        range = c(2, 8)) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(title = "Varieties", override.aes = list(size = 4)),
    size = guide_legend(title = paste0("Richness (", gene_choice, ")"))
  ) +
  # Axes avec % variance expliquée
  xlab(paste0("PCoA1 (", variance_explained[1], "%)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PCoA2 (", variance_explained[2], "%)")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12, face = "bold")
  )

p1

if (gene_choice == "ITS")  { Fig4_PCoA_ITS  <- p1 }
if (gene_choice == "gyrB") { Fig4_PCoA_gyrB <- p1 }
  
  # PERMANOVA ####
  
  # Récupérer les métadonnées dans le bon ordre
  meta_perm <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_filt))
  

  # PERMANOVA
  set.seed(42)
  perm_res <- adonis2(
    dist_rclr ~ Varieties,
    data = meta_perm,
    permutations = 999,
    by = "margin"   # teste chaque variable indépendamment
  )
  print(perm_res)
  
  # Tester l'homogénéité des dispersions (hypothèse de la PERMANOVA)
  disp_test <- permutest(disp_res, permutations = 999)
  print(disp_test)
  plot(disp_res, main = "Homogénéité des dispersions")
  
  # Post-Hoc tests ####
  set.seed(42)
  pairwise_res <- pairwise.adonis2(
    dist_rclr ~ Varieties,
    data = meta_perm,
    p.adjust.m = "BH",
    permutations = 999
  )
  
  print(pairwise_res)
  # Save stats for annotation 
  perm_R2 <- round(perm_res$R2[1], 3)
  perm_F  <- round(perm_res$F[1], 1)
  perm_p  <- perm_res$`Pr(>F)`[1]
  disp_F    <- round(disp_test$tab["Groups", "F"], 1)
  disp_p    <- round(disp_test$tab["Groups", "Pr(>F)"], 3)
  
  # Build annotation string
  pcoa_annot <- paste0(
    "PERMANOVA: R² = ", perm_R2,
    ", F = ", perm_F,
    ", p ", ifelse(perm_p <= 0.001, "< 0.001", paste0("= ", round(perm_p, 3))), "\n",
    "Betadisper: F = ", disp_F,
    ", p ", ifelse(disp_p <= 0.001, "< 0.001", paste0("= ", round(disp_p, 3)))
  )
  
  # add PERMANOVA annotations
  p1 <- p1 +
    annotate("text",
             x = min(ASV_df_PCoA$PCoA1),
             y = min(ASV_df_PCoA$PCoA2),
             label = pcoa_annot,
             hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
             size = 3.5, fontface = "italic", color = "grey30")

  p1

  if (gene_choice == "ITS")  { Fig4_PCoA_ITS  <- p1 }
  if (gene_choice == "gyrB") { Fig4_PCoA_gyrB <- p1 }
}
```
```{r Fig5A-B, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Fig4_PCoA_gyrB
Fig4_PCoA_ITS
```

## 4.7_dbRDA

prevalence threshold:
 we have between 3 and 4 replicate per variety, and don’t want to keep ASVs that are present in only one variety. 
 So 3 samples minimum out of the 21 samples = 1/7 = 14%. We’ll filter at 10 or 15%.
```{r relationship with germination and emergence, eval=Metabaranalysis}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  # Select data ####
Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0.15, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_ASV)) 
  rm(Metabar)
  
  print(paste0("chosen gene: ", gene_choice, "________________"))
  # CLR transform ####
  
  physeq_rclr <- microbiome::transform(physeq_ASV, "rclr")
  otu_rclr <- as.matrix(otu_table(physeq_rclr))
  
  # Calcul de la distance euclidienne sur les données rCLR ####
  dist_rclr <- stats::dist(otu_rclr, method = "euclidean")
  
  # Variable correlation ####
  print("variable correlation")
  print(cor(env_table$meanFEP, env_table$meant50germ, method = "spearman"))
  plot(meta_df$meant50germ, meta_df$meanFEP, 
       xlab = "meant50germ", ylab = "meanFEP")
  
  # evaluate models ####
  print("models evaluation")
  # Separate models
  set.seed(42)
  print(adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meant50germ, data = meta_df, permutations = 999))
  print(adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meanFEP,     data = meta_df, permutations = 999))
  # Joint model — by = "margin" tests each variable controlling for the other
  set.seed(42)
  print(adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meant50germ + meanFEP, data = meta_df, 
          permutations = 999, by = "margin"))
  
  # Variance inflation factors ###
  print("variable inflation factors")
  # Fit the db-RDA
  dbrda_both <- dbrda(dist_rclr ~ meant50germ + meanFEP, data = meta_df)
  print(dbrda_both)
  # Check VIF — values > 10 indicate problematic collinearity
  print(vif.cca(dbrda_both))
  
  # Variance partitionning ####
  print("variance partitionning")
  vp <- varpart(dist_rclr, ~ meant50germ, ~ meanFEP, data = meta_df)
  print(vp)
  plot(vp, 
       Xnames = c("meant50germ", "meanFEP"),
       bg = c("steelblue", "tomato"))
  
  # Separate PERMANOVA
  set.seed(42)
  print(adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meant50germ, data = meta_df, permutations = 999))
  set.seed(42)
  print(adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meanFEP, data = meta_df, permutations = 999))
  
}
  
```

Summary table			
Marker	Variable	R²	p-value
gyrB	meant50germ	7.3%	0.238
gyrB	meanFEP	14.3%	0.022 *
ITS	meant50germ	13.7%	0.049 *
ITS	meanFEP	15.9%	0.042 *
```{r function to assign more precise taxonomical information, eval=Metabaranalysis}
get_lowest_tax <- function(asv_ids, tax_df) {
  sapply(asv_ids, function(asv) {
    row <- tax_df[asv, ]
    ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
    found <- NA
    for (r in ranks) {
      if (r %in% colnames(tax_df) && !is.na(row[[r]]) && row[[r]] != "") {
        found <- row[[r]]
        break
      }
    }
    if (is.na(found)) asv else found
  })
}

tax_lookup <- setNames(
    apply(tax_df, 1, function(row) {
      ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
      found <- NA
      for (r in ranks) {
        if (r %in% names(row) && !is.na(row[r])) {
          # Strip prefix and whitespace
          cleaned <- trimws(gsub("^[a-z]__", "", row[r]))
          if (nchar(cleaned) > 0) {
            found <- cleaned
            break
          }
        }
      }
      found
    }),
    rownames(tax_df)
  )
```
```{r db-RDA for separate meant50germ and meanFEP, eval=Metabaranalysis}
top_taxa_all <- list()


for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  # Load data ####
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(gene_choice = gene_choice, #"gyrB", "ITS"
                            decontaminated = "handdecontam", #"", "handdecontam", "pkdecontam" #remove ASVs present in negative controls
                            filtered = TRUE, #TRUE, FALSE #removed unassigned ASVs, ASVs<20reads, ASVs<2samples, samples<1000reads
                            subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, #subset samples present in non-sterilized seeds from SUCSEED Gers project
                            subset_lowPrevASVs = FALSE, #subset ASVs present in only 1 sample
                            rarefied = TRUE, # rarefied
                            add_meanVar = TRUE, #if mean t50germ and mean FEP values and mean weight are not in the metadata table, add them
                            add_permVar = FALSE, #add a permutation of t50germ and FEP values per variety
                            
                            filt_prev_relAb = 0.15, ################ filter at [digit] % of prevalence, or not (filter_pre_relAb = 0)
                            verbose = TRUE
                            )
  
  analysis <- Metabar$analysis
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_ASV)) 
  rm(Metabar)
  
  print(paste0("chosen gene: ", gene_choice, "________________"))
  # CLR transform ####
  
  physeq_rclr <- microbiome::transform(physeq_ASV, "rclr")
  otu_rclr <- as.matrix(otu_table(physeq_rclr))
  
  # distance rCLR ####
  dist_rclr <- stats::dist(otu_rclr, method = "euclidean")
  
  # Compute PERMANOVA for both variables ####
  set.seed(42)
  perm_t50 <- adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meant50germ, data = meta_df, permutations = 999)
  perm_FEP <- adonis2(dist_rclr ~ meanFEP,     data = meta_df, permutations = 999)
  
  r2_t50 <- round(perm_t50["Model", "R2"], 3)
  p_t50  <- perm_t50["Model", "Pr(>F)"]
  r2_FEP <- round(perm_FEP["Model", "R2"], 3)
  p_FEP  <- perm_FEP["Model", "Pr(>F)"]
  
  # Define which models to plot based on significance ####
  # Build models_to_plot — always include both variables ####
  models_to_plot <- list()
  
  models_to_plot[["meant50germ"]] <- list(
    formula = as.formula("dist_rclr ~ meant50germ"),
    label = "Mean t50germ",
    r2 = r2_t50,
    p = p_t50,
    plot_it = p_t50 <= 0.05   # flag: should we plot it?
  )
  models_to_plot[["meanFEP"]] <- list(
    formula = as.formula("dist_rclr ~ meanFEP"),
    label = "Mean FEP",
    r2 = r2_FEP,
    p = p_FEP,
    plot_it = p_FEP <= 0.05
  )
  
  # One plot per variable ####
  plots_list <- list()
  
  for (var_name in names(models_to_plot)) {
    mod_info <- models_to_plot[[var_name]]
    
    # If not significant, insert blank placeholder
    if (!mod_info$plot_it) {
      plots_list[[var_name]] <- ggplot() + 
        theme_void() +
        annotate("text",
                 x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                 label = paste0(mod_info$label, "\nnot significant (p = ",
                                round(mod_info$p, 3), ")"),
                 hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5,
                 size = 4, color = "grey60", fontface = "italic")
      next  # skip to next iteration
    }

  for (var_name in names(models_to_plot)) {
    
    mod_info <- models_to_plot[[var_name]]
    
     # Run PERMANOVA for this specific variable ####
    set.seed(42)
    perm_res <- adonis2(mod_info$formula, data = meta_df, permutations = 999)
    r2_current <- round(perm_res["Model", "R2"], 3)
    p_current  <- perm_res["Model", "Pr(>F)"]
    
    # Annotation using current gene + variable specific values
    # Format p-values for display
  format_p <- function(p) {
    if (p < 0.001) return("< 0.001")
    if (p < 0.01)  return(paste0("= ", round(p, 3), " **"))
    if (p < 0.05)  return(paste0("= ", round(p, 3), " *"))
    return(paste0("= ", round(p, 3)))
  }
  
    annot <- paste0(
      "R² = ", r2_current, ",\np ", format_p(p_current)
    )
    
    # Fit db-RDA with single variable
    dbrda_res <- dbrda(mod_info$formula, data = meta_df)
    
    # Assign species scores
    sppscores(dbrda_res) <- otu_rclr
    
    # Site scores
    site_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res, display = "sites"))
    colnames(site_scores) <- c("dbRDA1", "MDS1")  # 1 constrained + 1 unconstrained axis
    site_scores$Sample <- rownames(site_scores)
    
    # Arrow scores
    arrow_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res, display = "bp"))
    colnames(arrow_scores) <- c("dbRDA1", "MDS1")
    arrow_scores$Variable <- rownames(arrow_scores)
    
    # Variance explained
    eig <- eigenvals(dbrda_res)
    total_inertia <- sum(abs(eig))
    pct_constrained <- round(100 * eig["dbRDA1"] / total_inertia, 1)
    pct_unconstrained <- round(100 * eig["MDS1"] / total_inertia, 1)
    
    # Taxa scores
    taxa_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res, display = "species"))
    colnames(taxa_scores) <- c("dbRDA1", "MDS1")
    taxa_scores$ASV <- rownames(taxa_scores)
    taxa_scores$dist_origin <- sqrt(taxa_scores$dbRDA1^2 + taxa_scores$MDS1^2)
    
    # Assign taxonomy
    tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq_ASV))
    tax_df <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2, function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
    tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
    
    taxa_scores$Taxa <- apply(tax_df[taxa_scores$ASV, ], 1, function(row) {
      ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
      found <- NA
      for (r in ranks) {
        if (r %in% names(row) && !is.na(row[r]) && nchar(row[r]) > 0) {
          found <- row[r]
          break
        }
      }
      found
    })
    taxa_scores$Taxa[is.na(taxa_scores$Taxa)] <- taxa_scores$ASV[is.na(taxa_scores$Taxa)]
    
    # Handle duplicates
    taxa_scores <- taxa_scores %>%
      dplyr::group_by(Taxa) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Taxa = ifelse(dplyr::n() > 1,
                                   paste0(Taxa, "_", dplyr::row_number()),
                                   Taxa)) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
    
    top_taxa <- taxa_scores %>%
      dplyr::arrange(desc(dist_origin)) %>%
      dplyr::slice(1:10)
    
    # save top taxa list
    top_taxa_full <- tax_df[top_taxa$ASV, ] %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("ASV_ID") %>%
    left_join(
      top_taxa %>% select(ASV, Taxa, dist_origin, dbRDA1, MDS1),
      by = c("ASV_ID" = "ASV")
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(dist_origin)) %>%
    select(ASV_ID, Taxa, dist_origin, dbRDA1, MDS1,
           any_of(c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order",
                    "Family", "Genus", "Species")))
    top_taxa_all[[paste0(gene_choice, "_", var_name)]] <- top_taxa_full
    
    # Merge site scores with metadata and richness
    meta_df$Sample <- rownames(meta_df)
    richness_df <- data.frame(
      Sample = rownames(estimate_richness(physeq_ASV, measures = "Observed")),
      Observed = estimate_richness(physeq_ASV, measures = "Observed")$Observed
    )
    plot_df <- merge(site_scores, meta_df, by = "Sample")
    plot_df <- merge(plot_df, richness_df, by = "Sample")
    
    # Scale arrows
    arrow_scale <- 0.8 * max(abs(plot_df[, c("dbRDA1", "MDS1")])) /
                         max(abs(arrow_scores[, c("dbRDA1", "MDS1")]))
    arrow_scores$dbRDA1_scaled <- arrow_scores$dbRDA1 * arrow_scale
    arrow_scores$MDS1_scaled   <- arrow_scores$MDS1   * arrow_scale
    
    # Plot
    p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = dbRDA1, y = MDS1)) +
      # Zero lines
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.3, linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.3, linetype = "dashed") +
      # Sample points
      geom_point(aes(color = Varieties, size = Observed), alpha = 0.85) +
      # Ellipses
      #stat_ellipse(aes(color = Varieties, group = Varieties),
      #             type = "t", linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.6,
      #             show.legend = FALSE) +
      # Constraint arrow
      geom_segment(data = arrow_scores,
                   aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = dbRDA1_scaled, yend = MDS1_scaled),
                   arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm"), type = "closed"),
                   color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.8,
                   inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      geom_text_repel(data = arrow_scores,         # ggrepel instead of geom_text
                      aes(x = dbRDA1_scaled, y = MDS1_scaled,
                          label = dplyr::recode(Variable,  # use Variable, not mod_info$label
                                                "meant50germ" = "Mean t50",
                                                "meanFEP" = "Mean FEP")),
                      size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "grey20",
                      box.padding = 0.5,
                      max.overlaps = 20,
                      inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      # Top 10 taxa crosses
      geom_point(data = top_taxa,
                 aes(x = dbRDA1, y = MDS1),
                 shape = 3, size = 3, color = "grey30",
                 inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(data = top_taxa,
                                aes(x = dbRDA1, y = MDS1, label = Taxa),
                                size = 3, fontface = "italic", color = "grey30",
                                max.overlaps = 20,
                                inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      # Annotation
      annotate("text",
               x = min(plot_df$dbRDA1),
               y = min(plot_df$MDS1),
               label = annot,
               hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
               size = 3.5, fontface = "italic", color = "grey30") +
      # Scales
      scale_color_manual(values = color, name = "Varieties") +
      scale_size_continuous(name = paste0("Richness \n (", gene_choice, ")"),
                            range = c(2, 8)) +
      guides(
        color = guide_legend(title = "Varieties", override.aes = list(size = 4)),
        size = guide_legend(title = paste0("Richness (", gene_choice, ")"))
      ) +
      xlab(paste0("dbRDA1 (", pct_constrained, "% of total variance)")) +
      ylab(paste0("MDS1 (", pct_unconstrained, "% of total variance)")) +
      ggtitle(paste0(ifelse(gene_choice == "ITS", "Fungi", "Bacteria"),
                     " - ", mod_info$label)) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12, face = "bold")
      )
    
    plots_list[[var_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # Assemble plots for this gene ####
  if (gene_choice == "ITS")  { 
    Fig_dbRDA_ITS_t50germ  <- plots_list[["meant50germ"]]
    Fig_dbRDA_ITS_FEP  <- plots_list[["meanFEP"]]
    }
  if (gene_choice == "gyrB") {
    Fig_dbRDA_gyrB_t50germ <- plots_list[["meant50germ"]]
    Fig_dbRDA_gyrB_FEP  <- plots_list[["meanFEP"]]
    }
    
  if (length(plots_list) == 2) {
    combined <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      plots_list[["meant50germ"]],
      plots_list[["meanFEP"]],
      plots_list[["meanFEP"]],
      ncol = 2,
      labels = c("A", "B")
    )
  } else {
    combined <- plots_list[[1]]
  }
  
  print(combined)
}}

top_taxa_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(names(top_taxa_all), function(nm) {
    kingdom  <- sub("_(meant50germ|meanFEP)$", "", nm)   # "gyrB" or "ITS"
    variable <- sub("^(gyrB|ITS)_", "",          nm)   # "meant50germ" or "meanFEP"
    top_taxa_all[[nm]] %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Kingdom  = kingdom,
        variable = gsub("mean", "", variable)   # "t50germ" or "FEP"
      )
  })
)
write_xlsx(top_taxa_table,
           path = paste0(choice_path_data, "Metabar/",
                         "dbRDA_top10_taxa_allModels.xlsx")) # save top taxa list

# Final 2x2 figure combining both markers ####
Fig_dbRDA_all <- cowplot::plot_grid(Fig_dbRDA_gyrB, Fig_dbRDA_ITS,
                                     nrow = 2,
                                     labels = c("gyrB", "ITS"),
                                     label_size = 14)
print(Fig_dbRDA_all)
Fig_dbRDA_all
```

## 4.8_Individual indicator taxa
### 4.8.1_exploratory Maaslin2 on raw counts
#### on intra-variety microbiota/variable permutations (// to metabo)
```{r Maaslin permutation function}
maaslin_permutation <- function(ps, meta_df, var_name,
                                n_perm = 100,
                                fdr_threshold = 0.25,
                                freq_threshold = 0.70,
                                sign_threshold = 0.80,
                                out_base = tempdir()) {
  
  otu_mat   <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps))
  varieties <- unique(meta_df$Varieties)
  
  perm_results <- vector("list", n_perm)
  
  set.seed(42)
  for (perm in seq_len(n_perm)) {
    
    # Build permuted metadata
    meta_perm <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(varieties, function(v) {
      rows       <- meta_df[meta_df$Varieties == v, ]
      trait_vals <- meta_df[[var_name]][meta_df$Varieties == v]
      n_micro    <- nrow(rows)
      n_trait    <- length(trait_vals)
      if (n_trait >= n_micro) {
        rows[[var_name]] <- sample(trait_vals, n_micro, replace = FALSE)
      } else {
        rows[[var_name]] <- sample(trait_vals, n_micro, replace = TRUE)
      }
      rows
    }))
    
    meta_maaslin <- meta_perm[, var_name, drop = FALSE]
    rownames(meta_maaslin) <- rownames(meta_perm)
    otu_input <- otu_mat[rownames(meta_maaslin), ]
    
    # Run MaAsLin2, suppressing output
    fit_obj <- NULL
    suppressMessages(
      capture.output(
        fit_obj <- Maaslin2::Maaslin2(
          input_data       = otu_input,
          input_metadata   = meta_maaslin,
          output           = file.path(out_base, paste0("perm_", perm)),
          fixed_effects    = var_name,
          normalization    = "TSS",
          transform        = "LOG",
          analysis_method  = "LM",
          correction       = "BH",
          min_prevalence   = 0.0,
          min_abundance    = 0.0,
          max_significance = 1.0,
          plot_heatmap     = FALSE,
          plot_scatter     = FALSE
        )
      )
    )
    
    perm_results[[perm]] <- fit_obj$results %>%
      dplyr::select(feature, coef, pval, qval) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        feature = sub("^X", "", feature),
        perm    = perm
      )
  }
  
  all_perms <- do.call(rbind, perm_results)
  
  summary_df <- all_perms %>%
    dplyr::group_by(feature) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      mean_coef       = mean(coef,  na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_coef         = sd(coef,    na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_qval       = mean(qval,  na.rm = TRUE),
      freq_sig        = mean(qval < fdr_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
      freq_positive   = mean(coef > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      freq_negative   = mean(coef < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      sign_consistent = pmax(freq_positive, freq_negative),
      .groups         = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sign = ifelse(freq_positive >= freq_negative, "Positive", "Negative")
    )
  
  robust <- summary_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      freq_sig        >= freq_threshold,
      sign_consistent >= sign_threshold
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(freq_sig), desc(abs(mean_coef)))
  
  list(robust = robust, all_perms = all_perms, summary = summary_df)
}
```
```{r run MaAsLin2}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(
    gene_choice = gene_choice, decontaminated = "handdecontam",
    filtered = TRUE, subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, rarefied = FALSE,
    add_meanVar = TRUE, add_permVar = FALSE,
    filt_prev_relAb = 0.15, verbose = FALSE
  )
  ps      <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
  tax_df  <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps))
  tax_df  <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2,
               function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
  tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
  rm(Metabar)
  
  for (var_name in c("meant50germ", "meanFEP")) {
    
    cat("\n---", gene_choice, "~", var_name,
        "(MaAsLin2 permutation) ---\n")
    
    result <- maaslin_permutation(ps, meta_df, var_name,
                                   n_perm = 100,
                                   fdr_threshold = 0.25,
                                   freq_threshold = 0.70,
                                   sign_threshold = 0.80)
    robust <- result$robust %>%
      dplyr::mutate(feature = sub("^X", "", feature))

    if (nrow(robust) > 0) {
      # add_taxonomy uses rownames — set them to feature IDs first
      rownames(robust) <- robust$feature
      robust <- add_taxonomy(robust, tax_df)
      print(robust[, intersect(c("feature", "Taxa", "mean_coef",
                                  "freq_sig", "sign_consistent"),
                                colnames(robust))])
    }
    
    var_short <- gsub("mean", "", var_name)
    assign(paste0("Maaslin2_", gene_choice, "_", var_short), robust)
  }
}
```
### 4.8.2_ALDEx2 test on raw counts

```{r ALDEx2 test, eval=FALSE}
library(ALDEx2)

# Helper function to add taxonomy ####
add_taxonomy <- function(res, tax_df) {
  res$Taxa <- apply(tax_df[rownames(res), ], 1, function(row) {
    ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
    found <- NA
    for (r in ranks) {
      if (r %in% names(row) && !is.na(row[r]) && nchar(row[r]) > 0) {
        found <- row[r]
        break
      }
    }
    found
  })
  res$Taxa[is.na(res$Taxa)] <- rownames(res)[is.na(res$Taxa)]
  res
}

for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  
  # Load non-rarefied data ####
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(
    gene_choice = gene_choice,
    decontaminated = "handdecontam",
    filtered = TRUE,
    subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE,
    rarefied = FALSE,
    add_meanVar = TRUE,
    add_permVar = FALSE,
    filt_prev_relAb = 0.15,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df    <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_ASV))
  rm(Metabar)
  
  # Prepare count matrix : taxa in rows, samples in columns ####
  otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_table(physeq_ASV))
  if (!taxa_are_rows(physeq_ASV)) otu_mat <- t(otu_mat)
  otu_mat <- round(otu_mat)  # ALDEx2 requires integer counts
  
  # Prepare taxonomy table ####
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq_ASV))
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2, function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
  tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
  
  # Loop over germination variables ####
  for (var_name in c("meant50germ", "meanFEP")) {
    
    cont_var <- meta_df[[var_name]]
    cat("\n---", gene_choice, "~", var_name, "(ALDEx2) ---\n")
    
    # generate CLR values via Monte Carlo Dirichlet sampling ####
    set.seed(42)
    clr <- aldex.clr(
      reads = otu_mat,
      conds = cont_var,
      mc.samples = 128,
      denom = "all",
      verbose = FALSE
    )
    
    # correlation test with continuous variable ####
    aldex_res <- suppressWarnings(aldex.corr(
      clr,
      cont.var = cont_var
    ))
    
    # Add taxonomy ####
    aldex_res <- add_taxonomy(aldex_res, tax_df)
    
    # Filter significant results (q ≤ 0.25) ####
    sig_res <- aldex_res %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
      dplyr::filter(spearman.eBH <= 0.25) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(spearman.eBH)
    
    cat("Significant ASVs (q ≤ 0.25):", nrow(sig_res), "\n")
    
    if (nrow(sig_res) > 0) {
      print(sig_res[, c("feature", "Taxa", "spearman.erho", 
                        "spearman.ep", "spearman.eBH")])
    } else {
      cat("No significant ASVs found\n")
    }
    
    # Save result object ####
    obj_name <- paste0("ALDEx2_", gene_choice, "_",
                       gsub("mean", "", var_name))
    assign(obj_name, sig_res)
    
    # Also save full results for cross-method comparison ####
    obj_name_full <- paste0("ALDEx2_full_", gene_choice, "_",
                            gsub("mean", "", var_name))
    aldex_res_full <- aldex_res %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(spearman.eBH)
    assign(obj_name_full, aldex_res_full)
  }
}
rm(physeq_ASV, meta_df, env_table, tax_df)
```

### 4.8.3_ANCOM-BC2 on raw counts
```{r ANCOMBC install, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# Désinstaller CVXR 1.8.2
remove.packages("CVXR")

# Installer CVXR 1.0-11 (dernière version avant le changement d'API)
install.packages(
  "https://cran.r-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/CVXR/CVXR_1.0-11.tar.gz",
  repos = NULL,
  type = "source"
)

# Vérifier la version
packageVersion("CVXR")  # doit afficher 1.0-11

# Puis réinstaller ANCOMBC
BiocManager::install("ANCOMBC", force = TRUE)
```
```{r ANCOMBC test, eval=FALSE}
library(ANCOMBC)

for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  
  # Load non-rarefied data ####
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(
    gene_choice = gene_choice,
    decontaminated = "handdecontam",
    filtered = TRUE,
    subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE,
    rarefied = FALSE,
    add_meanVar = TRUE,
    add_permVar = FALSE,
    filt_prev_relAb = 0.15,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  physeq_ASV <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df    <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_ASV))
  rm(Metabar)
  
  # Prepare taxonomy table ####
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq_ASV))
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2, function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
  tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
  
  # Loop over germination variables ####
  for (var_name in c("meant50germ", "meanFEP")) {
    
    cat("\n---", gene_choice, "~", var_name, "(ANCOM-BC2) ---\n")
    
    # Run ANCOM-BC2 ####
    # ANCOM-BC2 works directly on phyloseq objects
    set.seed(42)
    ancom_res <- tryCatch(
      ancombc2(
        data = physeq_ASV,
        fix_formula = var_name,   # continuous variable
        p_adj_method = "BH",
        prv_cut = 0.15,       # prevalence filter consistent with rest
        lib_cut = 0,
        s0_perc = 0.05,
        group = NULL,       # no grouping variable
        struc_zero = FALSE,
        neg_lb = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.25,       # relaxed threshold
        n_cl = 1,          # number of cores
        verbose = FALSE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        cat("ANCOM-BC2 error:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
        NULL
      }
    )
    
    if (is.null(ancom_res)) next
    
    # Extract results ####
    res_df <- ancom_res$res
    
    # Check column names
    cat("ANCOM-BC2 result columns:\n")
    print(colnames(res_df))
    
    # Build clean results table
    # Column names follow pattern: lfc_{var}, se_{var}, W_{var}, p_{var}, q_{var}, diff_{var}
    lfc_col  <- paste0("lfc_",  var_name)
    se_col   <- paste0("se_",   var_name)
    p_col    <- paste0("p_",    var_name)
    q_col    <- paste0("q_",    var_name)
    diff_col <- paste0("diff_", var_name)
    
    # Check which columns exist
    cols_exist <- c(lfc_col, se_col, p_col, q_col, diff_col) %in% colnames(res_df)
    cat("Expected columns found:", sum(cols_exist), "/5\n")
    
    sig_res <- res_df %>%
      dplyr::rename(
        feature = taxon,
        lfc = all_of(lfc_col),
        se = all_of(se_col),
        pval = all_of(p_col),
        qval = all_of(q_col),
        diff = all_of(diff_col)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::filter(qval <= 0.25) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(qval)
    
    # Add taxonomy ####
    sig_res$Taxa <- apply(
      tax_df[sig_res$feature, ], 1, function(row) {
        ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
        found <- NA
        for (r in ranks) {
          if (r %in% names(row) && !is.na(row[r]) && nchar(row[r]) > 0) {
            found <- row[r]; break
          }
        }
        found
      }
    )
    sig_res$Taxa[is.na(sig_res$Taxa)] <- sig_res$feature[is.na(sig_res$Taxa)]
    
    cat("Significant ASVs (q ≤ 0.25):", nrow(sig_res), "\n")
    
    if (nrow(sig_res) > 0) {
      print(sig_res[, c("feature", "Taxa", "lfc", "se", "pval", "qval")])
    } else {
      cat("No significant ASVs found\n")
    }
    
    # Save ####
    obj_name <- paste0("ANCOMBC2_", gene_choice, "_",
                       gsub("mean", "", var_name))
    assign(obj_name, sig_res)
    
    # Save full results ####
    full_res <- res_df %>%
      dplyr::rename(
        feature = taxon,
        lfc = all_of(lfc_col),
        se = all_of(se_col),
        pval = all_of(p_col),
        qval = all_of(q_col),
        diff = all_of(diff_col)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(qval)
    
    full_res$Taxa <- apply(
      tax_df[full_res$feature, ], 1, function(row) {
        ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
        found <- NA
        for (r in ranks) {
          if (r %in% names(row) && !is.na(row[r]) && nchar(row[r]) > 0) {
            found <- row[r]; break
          }
        }
        found
      }
    )
    full_res$Taxa[is.na(full_res$Taxa)] <- full_res$feature[is.na(full_res$Taxa)]
    
    assign(paste0("ANCOMBC2_full_", gene_choice, "_",
                  gsub("mean", "", var_name)), full_res)
  }
}


```

### 4.8.4_Spearman correlation
#### on variety means collapsed
- collapse removes the within-variety pseudoreplication
- the discrepency btw rCLR and TSS-transformed was due 
  to extreme outliers in gyrB library size (diluted when averaging)
  to correlation btw traits with rCLR’s geometric mean, removing the signal
- 
```{r}
spearman_asv_variety <- function(ps, meta_df, var_name, fdr_threshold = 0.25) {
  
  # TSS normalize at sample level
  otu_mat <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps))
  otu_tss <- otu_mat / rowSums(otu_mat)
  
  # Add variety column
  otu_tss$Variety <- meta_df$Varieties
  
  # Collapse to variety means — fixed across() syntax
  otu_variety <- otu_tss %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Variety) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     .groups = "drop") %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%                          # drop tibble class before rownames
    tibble::column_to_rownames("Variety")
  
  # Variety-level trait values
  trait_variety <- meta_df %>%
    dplyr::select(Varieties, all_of(var_name)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct() %>%
    dplyr::arrange(Varieties) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  rownames(trait_variety) <- trait_variety$Varieties
  trait_variety <- trait_variety[, var_name, drop = FALSE]
  
  # Align
  shared_varieties <- intersect(rownames(otu_variety), rownames(trait_variety))
  otu_variety <- otu_variety[shared_varieties, ]
  trait_vec   <- trait_variety[shared_varieties, var_name]
  
  cat("Effective n (varieties):", length(shared_varieties), "\n")
  
  # Spearman on variety means
  results <- lapply(colnames(otu_variety), function(asv) {
    test <- suppressWarnings(
      cor.test(otu_variety[[asv]], trait_vec,
               method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
    )
    data.frame(feature = asv, rho = as.numeric(test$estimate),
               pval = test$p.value)
  })
  
  res_df      <- do.call(rbind, results)
  res_df$qval <- p.adjust(res_df$pval, method = "BH")
  res_df      <- res_df[res_df$qval < fdr_threshold, ]
  res_df      <- res_df[order(abs(res_df$rho), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  res_df
}
```
```{r Spearman correlation, eval=FALSE}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(
    gene_choice = gene_choice,
    decontaminated = "handdecontam",
    filtered = TRUE,
    subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE,
    rarefied = FALSE,
    add_meanVar = TRUE,
    add_permVar = FALSE,
    filt_prev_relAb = 0.15,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  ps      <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
  tax_df  <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps))
  tax_df  <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2, function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
  tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
  rm(Metabar)
  
  for (var_name in c("meant50germ", "meanFEP")) {
    
    cat("\n---", gene_choice, "~", var_name, "(Spearman, variety-level) ---\n")
    
    res <- spearman_asv_variety(ps, meta_df, var_name, fdr_threshold = 0.25)
    res <- add_taxonomy(res, tax_df)
    
    cat("Significant ASVs (q < 0.25):", nrow(res), "\n")
    if (nrow(res) > 0) print(res[, c("feature", "Taxa", "rho", "pval", "qval")])
    
    var_short <- gsub("mean", "", var_name)
    assign(paste0("SpearmanVar_", gene_choice, "_", var_short), res)
  }
}

```

--- gyrB ~ meanFEP (Spearman, variety-level) ---

Significant ASVs (q < 0.25): 5 

--- ITS ~ meant50germ (Spearman, variety-level) ---

Effective n (varieties): 8 
Significant ASVs (q < 0.25): 0 

#### on intra-variety microbiota/variable permutations (// to metabo)
```{r Spearman permutation function}
spearman_permutation <- function(ps, meta_df, var_name,
                                 n_perm = 100,
                                 fdr_threshold = 0.25,
                                 freq_threshold = 0.70,
                                 sign_threshold = 0.80) {
  
  # TSS normalize
  otu_mat <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps))
  otu_tss <- otu_mat / rowSums(otu_mat)
  otu_tss$Variety  <- meta_df$Varieties
  otu_tss$SampleID <- rownames(meta_df)
  
  # Check we have per-replicate trait values
  stopifnot(var_name %in% colnames(meta_df))
  
  varieties <- unique(meta_df$Varieties)
  taxa      <- setdiff(colnames(otu_tss), c("Variety", "SampleID"))
  
  # Storage: one row per taxon per permutation
  perm_results <- vector("list", n_perm)
  
  set.seed(42)
  for (perm in seq_len(n_perm)) {
    
    # For each variety, randomly pair microbiota replicates with trait replicates
    paired_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(varieties, function(v) {
      
      # Microbiota replicates for this variety
      micro_rows <- otu_tss[otu_tss$Variety == v, ]
      n_micro    <- nrow(micro_rows)
      
      # Trait replicates for this variety
      trait_vals <- meta_df[[var_name]][meta_df$Varieties == v]
      n_trait    <- length(trait_vals)
      
      # Randomly sample n_micro trait values (with or without replacement
      # depending on relative n — here sampling without replacement
      # if n_trait >= n_micro, otherwise with replacement)
      if (n_trait >= n_micro) {
        sampled_trait <- sample(trait_vals, n_micro, replace = FALSE)
      } else {
        sampled_trait <- sample(trait_vals, n_micro, replace = TRUE)
      }
      
      micro_rows$trait_perm <- sampled_trait
      micro_rows
    }))
    
    # Spearman across all samples for each taxon
    res_perm <- lapply(taxa, function(asv) {
      test <- suppressWarnings(
        cor.test(paired_df[[asv]], paired_df$trait_perm,
                 method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
      )
      data.frame(feature = asv,
                 rho     = as.numeric(test$estimate),
                 pval    = test$p.value)
    })
    
    res_perm        <- do.call(rbind, res_perm)
    res_perm$qval   <- p.adjust(res_perm$pval, method = "BH")
    res_perm$perm   <- perm
    perm_results[[perm]] <- res_perm
  }
  
  all_perms <- do.call(rbind, perm_results)
  
  # Summarise across permutations per taxon
  summary_df <- all_perms %>%
    dplyr::group_by(feature) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      mean_rho      = mean(rho,  na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_rho        = sd(rho,    na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_qval     = mean(qval, na.rm = TRUE),
      freq_sig      = mean(qval < fdr_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
      freq_positive = mean(rho > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      freq_negative = mean(rho < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      sign_consistent = pmax(freq_positive, freq_negative),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sign = ifelse(freq_positive >= freq_negative, "Positive", "Negative")
    )
  
  # Apply thresholds
  robust <- summary_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      freq_sig        >= freq_threshold,
      sign_consistent >= sign_threshold
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(freq_sig), desc(abs(mean_rho)))
  
  list(robust = robust, all_perms = all_perms, summary = summary_df)
}
```
```{r Spearman permutation run}
for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(
    gene_choice = gene_choice, decontaminated = "handdecontam",
    filtered = TRUE, subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, rarefied = FALSE,
    add_meanVar = TRUE, add_permVar = FALSE,
    filt_prev_relAb = 0.15, verbose = FALSE
  )
  ps      <- Metabar$ps
  meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
  tax_df  <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps))
  tax_df  <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2,
               function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
  tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
  rm(Metabar)
  
  for (var_name in c("meant50germ", "meanFEP")) {
    
    cat("\n---", gene_choice, "~", var_name,
        "(Spearman permutation) ---\n")
    
    result <- spearman_permutation(ps, meta_df, var_name,
                                   n_perm = 100,
                                   fdr_threshold = 0.25,
                                   freq_threshold = 0.70,
                                   sign_threshold = 0.80)
    
    robust <- add_taxonomy(result$robust, tax_df)
    cat("Robust ASVs:", nrow(robust), "\n")
    if (nrow(robust) > 0)
      print(robust[, c("feature", "Taxa", "mean_rho",
                       "freq_sig", "sign_consistent")])
    
    var_short <- gsub("mean", "", var_name)
    assign(paste0("SpearmanPerm_", gene_choice, "_", var_short), robust)
  }
}
```

### 4.8.5_Cross-method comparison, taxa identification
```{r cross method comparison table}
safe_effect <- function(hits, obj, col) {
  if (is.null(obj) || nrow(obj) == 0 || !col %in% colnames(obj))
    return(rep(NA_real_, length(hits)))
  ifelse(
    hits %in% obj$feature,
    obj[[col]][match(hits, obj$feature)],
    NA_real_
  )
}

for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  for (var_name in c("meant50germ", "meanFEP")) {
    
    var_short <- gsub("mean", "", var_name)
    cat("\n---", gene_choice, "~", var_name, "---\n")
    
    # Retrieve hits from each method
    spearmanperm_obj <- tryCatch(get(paste0("SpearmanPerm_", gene_choice, "_", var_short)),
                              error = function(e) NULL)
    spearmanvar_obj  <- tryCatch(get(paste0("SpearmanVar_",  gene_choice, "_", var_short)),
                              error = function(e) NULL)

    maaslin_obj  <- tryCatch(get(paste0("Maaslin2_", gene_choice, "_", var_short)),
                             error = function(e) NULL)
    aldex_obj    <- tryCatch(get(paste0("ALDEx2_",   gene_choice, "_", var_short)),
                             error = function(e) NULL)
    ancombc_obj  <- tryCatch(get(paste0("ANCOMBC2_", gene_choice, "_", var_short)),
                             error = function(e) NULL)
    
    # Feature lists
    # Spearman permutation uses 'feature' column like before
    hits_spearmanperm <- if (!is.null(spearmanperm_obj) && nrow(spearmanperm_obj) > 0)
  spearmanperm_obj$feature else character(0)
    hits_spearmanvar  <- if (!is.null(spearmanvar_obj)  && nrow(spearmanvar_obj)  > 0)
      spearmanvar_obj$feature  else character(0)
    hits_maaslin  <- if (!is.null(maaslin_obj)  && nrow(maaslin_obj)  > 0)
      maaslin_obj$feature  else character(0)
    hits_aldex    <- if (!is.null(aldex_obj)    && nrow(aldex_obj)    > 0)
      aldex_obj$feature    else character(0)
    hits_ancombc  <- if (!is.null(ancombc_obj)  && nrow(ancombc_obj)  > 0)
      ancombc_obj$feature  else character(0)
    
    
    all_hits <- unique(c(hits_spearmanperm, hits_spearmanvar,
                         hits_maaslin, hits_aldex, hits_ancombc))
    
    if (length(all_hits) == 0) {
      cat("No significant hits in any method\n")
      next
    }
    
    # Build comparison table
    comparison <- data.frame(
      feature  = all_hits,
      SpearmanPerm  = all_hits %in% hits_spearmanperm,
      SpearmanVar   = all_hits %in% hits_spearmanvar,
      MaAsLin2 = all_hits %in% hits_maaslin,
      ALDEx2   = all_hits %in% hits_aldex,
      ANCOMBC2 = all_hits %in% hits_ancombc,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Taxonomy
    comparison <- add_taxonomy(comparison, tax_df)
    
    # Effect sizes
    comparison$rho_SpearmanPerm <- safe_effect(all_hits, spearmanperm_obj, "mean_rho")
    comparison$rho_SpearmanVar  <- safe_effect(all_hits, spearmanvar_obj,  "rho")
    comparison$lfc_MaAsLin2     <- safe_effect(all_hits, maaslin_obj,      "mean_coef")
    comparison$rho_ALDEx2       <- safe_effect(all_hits, aldex_obj,        "spearman.erho")
    comparison$lfc_ANCOMBC2     <- safe_effect(all_hits, ancombc_obj,      "lfc")
    
    
    # n_methods and direction
    comparison$n_methods <- rowSums(
      comparison[, c("SpearmanPerm", "SpearmanVar", "MaAsLin2", "ALDEx2", "ANCOMBC2")]
    )
    comparison <- dplyr::arrange(comparison, desc(n_methods), Taxa)
    
    # Print
    cols_to_print <- c("Taxa", "feature",
                       "SpearmanPerm", "SpearmanVar", "MaAsLin2", "ALDEx2", "ANCOMBC2",
                       "n_methods",
                       "rho_Spearman", "lfc_MaAsLin2",
                       "rho_ALDEx2",   "lfc_ANCOMBC2")
    print(comparison[, intersect(cols_to_print, colnames(comparison))])
    
    assign(paste0("Comparison_", gene_choice, "_", var_short), comparison)
  }
}
```
```{r build all_comparion, eval=FALSE}
all_comparison_objs <- ls()[grepl("^Comparison_", ls())]

all_comparison <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(all_comparison_objs, function(obj_name) {
  comp <- get(obj_name)
  comp$marker   <- ifelse(grepl("ITS",    obj_name), "ITS",    "gyrB")
  comp$variable <- ifelse(grepl("FEP",    obj_name), "FEP",    "t50germ")
  comp
}))
all_comparison$Taxa <- sub("^X", "", all_comparison$Taxa)
all_comparison$feature <- sub("^X", "", all_comparison$feature)
all_comparison_save <- all_comparison
```
```{r assign taxonomy to all_comparison}
# Load taxonomy tables for each marker
tax_list <- list()

for (gene_choice in c("gyrB", "ITS")) {
  Metabar <- Select_Metabar_data(
    gene_choice = gene_choice, decontaminated = "handdecontam",
    filtered = TRUE, subset_samplesGRAINES = TRUE, rarefied = FALSE,
    add_meanVar = TRUE, add_permVar = FALSE,
    filt_prev_relAb = 0.15, verbose = FALSE
  )
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(Metabar$ps))
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(apply(tax_df, 2,
              function(x) gsub("^[a-z]__", "", trimws(x))))
  tax_df[tax_df == ""] <- NA
  tax_df$feature <- rownames(tax_df)
  tax_df$marker  <- gene_choice
  tax_list[[gene_choice]] <- tax_df
  rm(Metabar)
}

tax_combined <- dplyr::bind_rows(tax_list)

# Join full taxonomy onto all_comparison
# Match on feature + marker; handle X prefix from MaAsLin2
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::mutate(feature_clean = sub("^X", "", feature)) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    tax_combined,
    by = c("feature_clean" = "feature", "marker" = "marker")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-feature_clean)

# Add lowest resolved label column
# Uses the taxonomy columns just joined, in order from finest to coarsest
ranks <- c("Species", "Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum", "Kingdom")

all_comparison$Taxa <- apply(all_comparison, 1, function(row) {
  found <- NA_character_
  for (rank in ranks) {
    if (rank %in% names(row)) {
      val <- trimws(as.character(row[[rank]]))
      if (!is.na(val) && nchar(val) > 0 && val != "NA") {
        # Only add "unassigned" prefix for ranks above Genus
        found <- if (rank == "Species") {
          marker_val <- trimws(as.character(row[["marker"]]))
          genus_val  <- trimws(as.character(row[["Genus"]]))
          genus_clean <- if (!is.na(genus_val) && nchar(genus_val) > 0 &&
                             genus_val != "NA") genus_val else NA_character_
          
          if (!is.na(marker_val) && marker_val == "ITS" && !is.na(genus_clean)) {
            paste0(genus_clean, "_", val)  # for fungi
          } else {
            val                             # bacteria: species name only
          }
          
        } else if (rank == "Genus") {
          val                               # just genus, no prefix
          
        } else {
          paste0("unassigned ", val)        # coarser ranks get prefix
        }
        break
      }
    }
  }
  found
})

all_comparison_save <- all_comparison
```
```{r assign association category to all_comparison}
# Assign trait direction per row
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Best available effect size in priority order
    effect_for_direction = dplyr::coalesce(
      rho_SpearmanVar,
      rho_SpearmanPerm,
      rho_ALDEx2,
      lfc_MaAsLin2,
      lfc_ANCOMBC2
    ),
    trait_direction = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "FEP"     & effect_for_direction > 0 ~ "high_FEP",
      variable == "FEP"     & effect_for_direction < 0 ~ "low_FEP",
      variable == "t50germ" & effect_for_direction > 0 ~ "high_t50germ",
      variable == "t50germ" & effect_for_direction < 0 ~ "low_t50germ",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    trait_label = dplyr::case_when(
      trait_direction == "high_FEP"     ~ "High emergence",
      trait_direction == "low_FEP"      ~ "Low emergence",
      trait_direction == "high_t50germ" ~ "Slow germination",
      trait_direction == "low_t50germ"  ~ "Fast germination",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Resolve across variables: flag taxa associated with multiple traits
# One row per ASV (collapsing FEP and t50germ rows)
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::group_by(marker, feature) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    all_directions  = list(unique(na.omit(trait_direction))),
    n_traits        = length(unique(na.omit(trait_direction))),
    node_category   = dplyr::case_when(
      n_traits > 1                              ~ "mixed",
      any(trait_direction == "high_FEP",     na.rm = TRUE) ~ "high_FEP",
      any(trait_direction == "low_FEP",      na.rm = TRUE) ~ "low_FEP",
      any(trait_direction == "high_t50germ", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "high_t50germ",
      any(trait_direction == "low_t50germ",  na.rm = TRUE) ~ "low_t50germ",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    node_label = dplyr::case_when(
      node_category == "high_FEP"     ~ "High emergence",
      node_category == "low_FEP"      ~ "Low emergence",
      node_category == "high_t50germ" ~ "Slow germination",
      node_category == "low_t50germ"  ~ "Fast germination",
      node_category == "mixed"        ~ "Mixed associations",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

cat("Category distribution:\n")
all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::distinct(marker, feature, node_category) %>%
  dplyr::count(marker, node_category) %>%
  print()
```

```{r save all_comparison}
write.xlsx(all_comparison, 
           file = paste0(choice_path, "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                       "CrossMethod_comparison_updated.xlsx"),
           rowNames = TRUE)
```

```{r write fasta for unresolved ASVs, eval=FALSE}
# Identify unresolved ASVs (Taxa == NA) per marker 
unresolved_gyrB <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(marker == "gyrB", is.na(Phylum)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(feature) %>%
  unique()

unresolved_ITS <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(marker == "ITS", is.na(Phylum)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(feature) %>%
  unique()

cat("Unresolved gyrB ASVs:", length(unresolved_gyrB), "\n")
cat("Unresolved ITS ASVs:",  length(unresolved_ITS),  "\n")

# Function to write fasta for a list of IDs (X-safe) 
write_fasta_Xsafe <- function(fasta_file, ids, output_file){
  
  if(length(ids) == 0){
    cat("No unresolved ASVs — skipping", output_file, "\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  cat("Reading FASTA:", fasta_file, "\n")
  
  # Parse FASTA
  fasta_lines  <- readLines(fasta_file)
  hash_fasta   <- list()
  current_name <- NULL
  current_seq  <- character(0)
  
  for(line in fasta_lines){
    if(startsWith(line, ">")){
      if(!is.null(current_name)){
        hash_fasta[[current_name]] <- paste(current_seq, collapse = "")
      }
      header       <- sub("^>", "", line)
      current_name <- strsplit(header, " ")[[1]][1]
      current_seq  <- character(0)
    } else {
      current_seq <- c(current_seq, trimws(line))
    }
  }
  if(!is.null(current_name)){
    hash_fasta[[current_name]] <- paste(current_seq, collapse = "")
  }
  cat("Sequences in FASTA:", length(hash_fasta), "\n")
  
  # Extract sequences with X-safe matching
  found        <- 0
  not_found    <- character(0)
  output_lines <- character(0)
  
  for(id in ids){
    
    # Try original, then without X, then with X
    id_noX   <- sub("^X", "", id)
    id_withX <- paste0("X", id)
    
    matched_id <- if(id %in% names(hash_fasta)){
      id
    } else if(id_noX %in% names(hash_fasta)){
      cat("Matched without X:", id, "->", id_noX, "\n")
      id_noX
    } else if(id_withX %in% names(hash_fasta)){
      cat("Matched with X:", id, "->", id_withX, "\n")
      id_withX
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }
    
    if(!is.na(matched_id)){
      output_lines <- c(output_lines,
                        paste0(">", matched_id),
                        hash_fasta[[matched_id]])
      found <- found + 1
    } else {
      not_found <- c(not_found, id)
    }
  }
  
  writeLines(output_lines, output_file)
  
  cat("Written:", found, "/", length(ids), "sequences to", output_file, "\n")
  if(length(not_found) > 0){
    cat("Not found (", length(not_found), "):\n")
    print(not_found)
  }
  
  invisible(list(found = found, not_found = not_found))
}

# Write fasta files 
path_results <- paste0(choice_path, "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/")
path_raw     <- paste0(choice_path, "/1_Raw_data/Métabar/")

# gyrB
write_fasta_Xsafe(
  fasta_file = paste0(path_raw,     "Osmose_bean_gyrB-rep-seqs.fasta"),
  ids = unresolved_gyrB,
  output_file = paste0(path_results, "ASVs_unresolved_gyrB.fasta")
)

# ITS
write_fasta_Xsafe(
  fasta_file = paste0(path_raw,     "Osmose_bean_ITS_Forward-rep-seqs.fasta"),
  ids = unresolved_ITS,
  output_file = paste0(path_results, "ASVs_unresolved_ITS.fasta")
)

# Verify output 
for(marker in c("gyrB", "ITS")){
  out_file <- paste0(path_results, "ASVs_unresolved_", marker, ".fasta")
  if(file.exists(out_file)){
    n_seqs <- length(grep("^>", readLines(out_file)))
    cat(marker, "output:", n_seqs, "sequences written to",
        basename(out_file), "\n")
  }
}
```

#### Assignation
 - Online BLAST
Go to https://blast.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Blast.cgi
Choose Nucleotide BLAST
Paste or upload your FASTA file
Select database :
gyrB to refseq_reference_genomes, for Bacteria (taxid:2), with query field gyrB[gene]
ITS to refseq_genomes for organism: Fungi (taxid:4751) with query field ITS[gene]

Run and download results as CSV, rename as "BLAST_[gyrB]_results.csv"

```{r BLAST results exploration_gyrB, eval=FALSE}
# Load with correct column names 
blast_gyrB_raw <- read_csv(
  paste0(choice_path, "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/BLAST_gyrB_results.csv"),
  col_names = c("qseqid", "sseqid", "pident", "length",
                "mismatch", "gapopen", "qstart", "qend",
                "sstart", "send", "evalue", "bitscore"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

cat("Dimensions:", dim(blast_gyrB_raw), "\n")
cat("ASVs queried:", length(unique(blast_gyrB_raw$qseqid)), "\n")
cat("% identity range:", range(blast_gyrB_raw$pident), "\n")

# Overview of identity distribution 
hist(blast_gyrB_raw$pident, breaks = 30,
     main = "Distribution of % identity — gyrB BLAST hits",
     xlab = "% identity", col = "steelblue")
abline(v = c(90, 95, 97, 99), col = c("orange", "gold", "green", "darkgreen"),
       lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
legend("topleft",
       legend = c("90% (family)", "95% (genus)", "97% (species)", "99% (species)"),
       col = c("orange", "gold", "green", "darkgreen"),
       lty = 2, bty = "n")

# Check identity distribution per ASV 
blast_gyrB_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(qseqid) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_pident = max(pident),
    best_evalue = min(evalue),
    n_hits = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(max_pident)) %>%
  print()

# What is the best achievable identity per ASV? 
cat("\nMax % identity per ASV:\n")
blast_gyrB_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(qseqid) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(bitscore, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(qseqid, sseqid, pident, length, evalue, bitscore) %>%
  print()
```
```{r BLAST assign best matches_gyrB, eval=FALSE}
# Best hit per ASV 
best_hits_gyrB <- blast_gyrB_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(qseqid) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(bitscore, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(pident))

# Assign taxonomy level 
best_hits_gyrB <- best_hits_gyrB %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    tax_level = dplyr::case_when(
      pident >= 99 ~ "Species",
      pident >= 97 ~ "Species (borderline)",
      pident >= 95 ~ "Genus",
      pident >= 90 ~ "Family",
      pident >= 85 ~ "Order (tentative)",
      TRUE         ~ "Unassignable"
    )
  )

cat(" Taxonomy resolution summary \n")
print(table(best_hits_gyrB$tax_level))

# Fetch organism names from NCBI accession numbers 
# Since we only have accession numbers (sseqid) and no organism name,
# we need to look up the taxonomy manually or via rentrez

library(rentrez)

get_organism_from_accession <- function(accession) {
  tryCatch({
    # Fetch GenBank record summary
    rec <- entrez_summary(db = "nucleotide", 
                          id = entrez_search(db = "nucleotide",
                                             term = accession)$ids[1])
    rec$organism
  }, error = function(e) NA_character_)
}

cat("\nFetching organism names from NCBI (may take a moment)...\n")
best_hits_gyrB$organism <- sapply(best_hits_gyrB$sseqid, 
                                   get_organism_from_accession)

cat("\n Best hits with organism names \n")
print(best_hits_gyrB[, c("qseqid", "sseqid", "organism", 
                           "pident", "length", "evalue", "tax_level")])

# Build blast_taxa label 
best_hits_gyrB <- best_hits_gyrB %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    blast_taxa = dplyr::case_when(
      pident >= 99  ~ paste0(organism, " (", round(pident, 1), "% — species)"),
      pident >= 97  ~ paste0(organism, " (", round(pident, 1), "% — species*)"),
      pident >= 95  ~ paste0(organism, " (", round(pident, 1), "% — genus)"),
      pident >= 90  ~ paste0(organism, " (", round(pident, 1), "% — family)"),
      pident >= 85  ~ paste0(organism, " (", round(pident, 1), "% — order)"),
      TRUE          ~ paste0("Unassignable (best: ", round(pident, 1), "%)")
    )
  )

cat("\n Final taxonomy assignments \n")
print(best_hits_gyrB[, c("qseqid", "blast_taxa", "tax_level")])

# Save 
write.table(
  best_hits_gyrB,
  paste0(choice_path, "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/BLAST_gyrB_best_hits.tsv"),
  sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE
)
```

```{r load UNITE fungi database, eval=FALSE}

# Expand paths properly 
tgz_file <- path.expand(paste0(choice_path, "/1_Raw_data/Métabar/",
                                "sh_general_release_s_19.02.2025.tgz"))

extract_dir <- path.expand(paste0(choice_path, "/1_Raw_data/Métabar/UNITE_10/"))

# Verify tgz exists
cat("TGZ file exists:", file.exists(tgz_file), "\n")
cat("TGZ path:", tgz_file, "\n")

# Create extraction directory
if(!dir.exists(extract_dir)){
  dir.create(extract_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = TRUE)
}
cat("Extract dir exists:", dir.exists(extract_dir), "\n")
cat("Extract dir:", extract_dir, "\n")

# Extract 
untar(tgz_file, exdir = extract_dir, verbose = TRUE)

# List extracted files 
cat("\nExtracted files:\n")
print(list.files(extract_dir, recursive = TRUE))

unite_db <- paste0(extract_dir,
                   "sh_general_release_dynamic_s_19.02.2025_dev.fasta")

cat("UNITE database path:", unite_db, "\n")
cat("File exists:", file.exists(unite_db), "\n")

# Check file size and first few headers to verify format
cat("File size:", round(file.size(unite_db) / 1e6, 1), "MB\n")

# Preview first few headers
first_lines <- readLines(unite_db, n = 20)
cat("First headers:\n")
print(grep("^>", first_lines, value = TRUE)[1:5])
```
```{r ITS assignation, eval=FALSE}

# Read unresolved ITS sequences 
fasta_in <- path.expand(paste0(choice_path,
                               "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                               "ASVs_unresolved_ITS.fasta"))

cat("Reading:", fasta_in, "\n")
cat("File exists:", file.exists(fasta_in), "\n")

fasta_lines  <- readLines(fasta_in)
seqs         <- list()
current_name <- NULL
current_seq  <- character(0)

for(line in fasta_lines){
  if(startsWith(line, ">")){
    if(!is.null(current_name)){
      seqs[[current_name]] <- paste(current_seq, collapse = "")
    }
    current_name <- sub("^>", "", line)
    current_seq  <- character(0)
  } else {
    current_seq <- c(current_seq, trimws(line))
  }
}
if(!is.null(current_name)){
  seqs[[current_name]] <- paste(current_seq, collapse = "")
}

seq_vec <- unlist(seqs)
cat("Sequences to classify:", length(seq_vec), "\n")

# Run assignTaxonomy 
set.seed(42)
tax_unite_withboot <- assignTaxonomy(
  seqs = seq_vec,
  refFasta = unite_db,
  minBoot = 30,
  tryRC = TRUE,
  multithread = TRUE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  outputBootstraps = TRUE,
  taxLevels = c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order",
                  "Family", "Genus", "Species")
)

cat("\nAssignment results:\n")
# $tax  — the taxonomy assignments (same as before)
# $boot — bootstrap confidence values (0-100) for each rank

tax_df_boot  <- as.data.frame(tax_unite_withboot$tax)
boot_df      <- as.data.frame(tax_unite_withboot$boot)
# Rename boot columns for clarity
colnames(boot_df) <- paste0(colnames(boot_df), "_boot")

# Combine
tax_combined <- cbind(
  tibble::rownames_to_column(tax_df_boot,  "ASV"),
  boot_df
) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Kingdom:Species),
                ~trimws(gsub("^[a-z]__", "", as.character(.)))))

cat("Bootstrap values per rank (mean across all ASVs):\n")
for(rank in c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")){
  boot_col <- paste0(rank, "_boot")
  if(boot_col %in% colnames(tax_combined)){
    vals <- tax_combined[[boot_col]]
    cat(sprintf("  %-10s: mean = %.1f, min = %.1f, max = %.1f\n",
                rank, mean(vals, na.rm=TRUE),
                min(vals, na.rm=TRUE), max(vals, na.rm=TRUE)))
  }
}
print(tax_combined %>%
        select(ASV, Genus, Species, Genus_boot, Species_boot,
               Family, Family_boot, Order, Order_boot),
      width = Inf)

write_xlsx(tax_combined,
           path = paste0(choice_path,
                         "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                         "UNITE_rerun_unresolved_ITS_withBootstrap.xlsx"))
cat("Saved with bootstrap values.\n")

# Apply bootstrap thresholds for reliable assignment 
# Thresholds analogous to BLAST identity thresholds used for gyrB:
# Species  >= 80  (analogous to >= 97% identity)
# Genus    >= 60  (analogous to >= 95% identity)
# Family   >= 40  (analogous to >= 90% identity)

boot_thresh <- c(
  Species = 80,
  Genus = 60,
  Family = 40,
  Order = 40,
  Class = 40,
  Phylum = 40
)

# Apply thresholds — set assignment to NA if bootstrap below threshold
tax_reliable <- tax_combined %>%
  mutate(
    Species = ifelse(!is.na(Species_boot) &
                     Species_boot >= boot_thresh["Species"],
                     Species, NA_character_),
    Genus = ifelse(!is.na(Genus_boot) &
                     Genus_boot >= boot_thresh["Genus"],
                     Genus, NA_character_),
    Family = ifelse(!is.na(Family_boot) &
                     Family_boot >= boot_thresh["Family"],
                     Family, NA_character_),
    Order = ifelse(!is.na(Order_boot) &
                     Order_boot >= boot_thresh["Order"],
                     Order, NA_character_),
    Class = ifelse(!is.na(Class_boot) &
                     Class_boot >= boot_thresh["Class"],
                     Class, NA_character_),
    Phylum = ifelse(!is.na(Phylum_boot) &
                     Phylum_boot >= boot_thresh["Phylum"],
                     Phylum, NA_character_)
  )

# Get lowest reliable rank for each ASV
tax_reliable$lowest_reliable_rank <- apply(
  tax_reliable,
  1,
  function(row){
    ranks <- c("Species", "Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
    found <- NA_character_
    for(r in ranks){
      val <- trimws(as.character(row[r]))
      if(!is.na(val) && nchar(val) > 0 && val != "NA"){
        found <- paste0(r, ": ", val)
        break
      }
    }
    found
  }
)

cat("Reliable assignments after bootstrap filtering:\n")
print(tax_reliable %>%
        select(ASV, lowest_reliable_rank,
               Species, Species_boot,
               Genus, Genus_boot,
               Family, Family_boot),
      width = Inf)

cat("\nAssigned per rank after threshold filtering:\n")
for(rank in c("Species","Genus","Family","Order","Class","Phylum")){
  n <- sum(!is.na(tax_reliable[[rank]]))
  cat(sprintf("  %-10s: %d / %d\n", rank, n, nrow(tax_reliable)))
}

# Save 
write_xlsx(tax_reliable,
           path = paste0(choice_path,
                         "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                         "UNITE_rerun_unresolved_ITS_reliable.xlsx"))
cat("Saved reliable assignments.\n")

# Update all_comparison with reliable new assignments 
# Build lookup: ASV sequence -> lowest reliable taxon name
reliable_lookup <- setNames(
  sapply(seq_len(nrow(tax_reliable)), function(i){
    row   <- tax_reliable[i, ]
    ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
    found <- NA_character_
    for(r in ranks){
      val <- trimws(as.character(row[[r]]))
      if(!is.na(val) && nchar(val) > 0 && val != "NA"){
        found <- val
        break
      }
    }
    found
  }),
  tax_reliable$ASV  # keyed by sequence
)

# Match sequences back to ASV IDs in all_comparison
# We need sequence -> ASV ID mapping from the fasta we read earlier
seq_to_id <- setNames(names(seq_vec), seq_vec)  # sequence -> ASV ID

# Update all_comparison
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  mutate(Taxa = ifelse(
    marker == "ITS" & is.na(Taxa),
    {
      # For each unresolved ITS feature, find its sequence then look up new assignment
      new_tax <- sapply(feature, function(feat){
        # Find sequence for this feature ID (X-safe)
        feat_clean <- sub("^X", "", feat)
        seq_match  <- seq_vec[names(seq_vec) %in% c(feat, feat_clean)]
        if(length(seq_match) == 0) return(NA_character_)
        new_val <- reliable_lookup[seq_match[1]]
        if(is.na(new_val)) NA_character_ else paste0("unassigned ", new_val)
      })
      new_tax
    },
    Taxa
  ))

cat("\nall_comparison updated.\n")
cat("Remaining NA Taxa in ITS:",
    sum(is.na(all_comparison$Taxa[all_comparison$marker == "ITS"])), "\n")
cat("Taxa now assigned:\n")
print(table(all_comparison$Taxa[all_comparison$marker == "ITS"],
            useNA = "ifany"))
```

```{r assign new taxonomic resolution, eval=FALSE}
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  arrange(marker, variable, feature)

# Build BLAST/UNITE lookup for gyrB 
# Already have best_hits_gyrB with blast_taxa column from your existing code

# Build UNITE bootstrap lookup for ITS 
# From tax_reliable built in the UNITE re-run chunk
# Build lookup: ASV ID -> reliable taxon name
unite_ITS_lookup <- setNames(
  sapply(seq_len(nrow(tax_reliable)), function(i){
    row   <- tax_reliable[i, ]
    ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
    found <- NA_character_
    for(r in ranks){
      val <- trimws(as.character(row[[r]]))
      if(!is.na(val) && nchar(val) > 0 && val != "NA"){
        found <- paste0("unassigned ", val)
        break
      }
    }
    found
  }),
  tax_reliable$ASV  # keyed by sequence — need to map back to ASV ID
)

# Map sequence -> ASV ID for ITS unresolved
# seq_vec was built when reading ASVs_unresolved_ITS.fasta
# names(seq_vec) = ASV IDs, seq_vec values = sequences
# tax_reliable$ASV = sequences (rownames of tax_unite)
# Build: ASV_ID -> reliable taxon
asv_id_to_taxon <- setNames(
  sapply(names(seq_vec), function(asv_id){
    seq_val <- seq_vec[asv_id]
    if(seq_val %in% names(unite_ITS_lookup)){
      unite_ITS_lookup[seq_val]
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }
  }),
  names(seq_vec)
)

#  Build unresolved fallback numbering 
# Features that are still MD5 (not yet assigned) get Unassigned_gyrB_N or Unassigned_ITS_N
unresolved_counter <- list(gyrB = 0L, ITS = 0L)

# Update Taxa column 
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  mutate(Taxa = mapply(
    function(taxa, feat, mark){
      
      # Priority 1: already has a proper "unassigned X" label — keep it
      if(!is.na(taxa) && grepl("^unassigned ", taxa, ignore.case = FALSE)){
        return(taxa)
      }
      
      # Priority 2: gyrB — check BLAST
      if(mark == "gyrB"){
        feat_clean <- sub("^X", "", feat)
        blast_idx  <- match(feat_clean, best_hits_gyrB$qseqid)
        if(is.na(blast_idx)) blast_idx <- match(feat, best_hits_gyrB$qseqid)
        if(!is.na(blast_idx)){
          blast_tax <- best_hits_gyrB$blast_taxa[blast_idx]
          if(!is.na(blast_tax)) return(blast_tax)
        }
        # No BLAST hit above threshold — assign Unassigned_gyrB_N
        unresolved_counter[["gyrB"]] <<- unresolved_counter[["gyrB"]] + 1L
        return(paste0("Unassigned_gyrB_", unresolved_counter[["gyrB"]]))
      }
      
      # Priority 2: ITS — check UNITE bootstrap result
      if(mark == "ITS"){
        feat_clean  <- sub("^X", "", feat)
        unite_tax   <- asv_id_to_taxon[feat_clean]
        if(is.na(unite_tax)) unite_tax <- asv_id_to_taxon[feat]
        if(!is.na(unite_tax)) return(unite_tax)
        
        # No reliable UNITE assignment — assign Unassigned_ITS_N
        unresolved_counter[["ITS"]] <<- unresolved_counter[["ITS"]] + 1L
        return(paste0("Unassigned_ITS_", unresolved_counter[["ITS"]]))
      }
      
      # Fallback — return original taxa
      taxa
    },
    Taxa, feature, marker,
    SIMPLIFY = TRUE, USE.NAMES = FALSE
  ))



write_xlsx(all_comparison %>%
    dplyr::arrange(marker, desc(n_methods)),
           path = paste0(choice_path,
                         "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                         "CrossMethod_comparison_updated.xlsx"))
```
#### assign lowest-level taxonomy
```{r assign taxonomy to all_comparison}
# Number duplicate labels within each marker
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label_n     = dplyr::row_number(),
    label_count = dplyr::n(),
    .by = c(marker, Taxa_label)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Taxa = ifelse(
      label_count > 1,
      paste0(Taxa_label, "_", label_n),
      Taxa_label
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-label_n, -label_count)

cat("Taxonomy columns added:", intersect(ranks, colnames(all_comparison)), "\n")
cat("Taxa_label — unique values:\n")
print(table(is.na(all_comparison$Taxa)))
cat("\nSample:\n")
print(head(all_comparison[, c("feature", "marker", "Phylum", "Class",
                               "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Taxa")]))
```
duplicates because of Maaslin "X…".
```{r rename taxa by highest taxonomical resolution, eval=FALSE}
get_lowest_tax_labeled <- function(asv_ids, tax_df) {
  
  # Get the lowest defined taxonomic rank for each ASV
  raw_labels <- sapply(asv_ids, function(asv) {
    
    # Handle X prefix — try with and without
    asv_clean <- sub("^X", "", asv)
    row <- if(asv_clean %in% rownames(tax_df)){
      tax_df[asv_clean, ]
    } else if(asv %in% rownames(tax_df)){
      tax_df[asv, ]
    } else {
      return(NA_character_)
    }
    
    ranks <- c("Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum")
    found <- NA_character_
    for(r in ranks){
      if(r %in% colnames(tax_df)){
        val <- trimws(gsub("^[a-z]__", "", as.character(row[[r]])))
        if(!is.na(val) && nchar(val) > 0 && val != "NA"){
          found <- val
          break
        }
      }
    }
    found
  })
  
  # Add "unassigned" prefix to all
  labeled <- ifelse(is.na(raw_labels),
                    NA_character_,  # truly unresolved: use ASV ID
                    paste0("unassigned ", raw_labels))
  
  # Number duplicates
  # Count occurrences of each label
  label_counts <- table(labeled)
  label_seen   <- setNames(rep(0, length(label_counts)), names(label_counts))
  
  numbered <- sapply(seq_along(labeled), function(i){
    lbl <- labeled[i]
    if(label_counts[lbl] > 1){
      label_seen[lbl] <<- label_seen[lbl] + 1
      paste0(lbl, "_", label_seen[lbl])
    } else {
      lbl
    }
  })
  
  # Return as named vector: ASV ID -> label
  setNames(numbered, asv_ids)
}

# Updated tax_lookup 
tax_lookup_labeled <- get_lowest_tax_labeled(rownames(tax_df), tax_df)

# Apply to all_comparison 
all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  mutate(Taxa = get_lowest_tax_labeled(feature, tax_df)[
    # match by feature, handling X prefix
    ifelse(feature %in% names(get_lowest_tax_labeled(feature, tax_df)),
           feature,
           paste0("X", feature))
  ])

# Simpler apply using the lookup directly 
# Build lookup for all features in the table
feature_ids <- unique(all_comparison$feature)
feature_tax_lookup <- get_lowest_tax_labeled(feature_ids, tax_df)

all_comparison <- all_comparison %>%
  mutate(Taxa = feature_tax_lookup[feature])


```
 - gyrB : 13/13
 - ITS :  7/7
 



## 4.9_Fig 6 metabarcoding heatmap
```{r read all_comparison, eval=Metabaranalysis}
all_comparison <- read.xlsx(paste0(choice_path,
                       "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                       "CrossMethod_comparison_updated.xlsx"))
```
```{r build robust results 2, eval=Metabaranalysis}
# Build ASV lookup and robust results 

robust_results <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    (marker == "ITS"  & n_methods >= 2) |
    (marker == "gyrB" & n_methods >= 2)
  )
```
```{r build microbial indicator heatmap TSS LOG10, eval=Metabaranalysis}
#order_var = c("Vezer", "Flavert", "Deezer","Facila", "Vanilla", "Caprice", "Linex", "Contender") # t50germ order
order_var = c("Vanilla", "Linex", "Caprice", "Vezer", "Deezer", "Facila", "Flavert", "Contender") # FEP order
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(base::unname)

# Parameters 
row_height_mm   <- 7
annot_height_mm <- 35
width_heatmap_mm <- 310
width_legend_mm  <- 15

mm_to_px <- function(mm) round(mm * 300 / 25.4)

# Color scheme consistent with other figures 
trait_colors <- c(
  "high_FEP" = "#0072B2",
  "low_FEP" = "#CC79A7",
  "high_t50" = "#E69F00",
  "low_t50" = "#009E73")

# build_microbiota_panel function 
build_microbiota_panel <- function(gene_choice,
                                   robust_results,
                                   show_legend = TRUE){

  # Filter robust candidates for this marker 
  candidates <- robust_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(marker == gene_choice) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(variable, desc(n_methods), Taxa)

  if(nrow(candidates) == 0){
    message("No candidates for ", gene_choice)
    return(NULL)
  }

  n_rows <- nrow(candidates)
  cat(gene_choice, ":", n_rows, "candidate taxa\n")

  # Load non-rarefied phyloseq and extract TSS-normalised matrix 
  ps      <- load_physeq_nonrarefied(gene_choice)
  meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
  meta_df$Sample <- rownames(meta_df)

  otu_mat <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps))
  if(taxa_are_rows(ps)) otu_mat <- as.data.frame(t(otu_mat))

  # TSS normalisation + log10 transform
  otu_tss <- otu_mat / rowSums(otu_mat)
  pseudocount <- min(otu_tss[otu_tss > 0], na.rm = TRUE) / 2
  otu_log <- log10(otu_tss + pseudocount)

  # Order samples by variety (by t50germ) then by t50germ 
  variety_fep_order <- meta_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Varieties) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_fep = mean(meanFEP, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(mean_fep) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Varieties)

  sample_order <- meta_df %>%
  dplyr::arrange(
    factor(Varieties, levels = order_var),
    meanFEP
  ) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Sample)
  # Keep only samples present in both otu and meta
  sample_order <- sample_order[sample_order %in% rownames(otu_log)]
  meta_ordered <- meta_df[sample_order, ]

  # Build abundance matrix (taxa in rows, samples in columns) 
  feat_ids <- candidates$feature
  # Handle X-prefix
  feat_ids_clean <- sub("^X", "", feat_ids)

  # Match to otu columns
  matched_cols <- sapply(feat_ids_clean, function(f){
    if(f %in% colnames(otu_log)) f
    else if(paste0("X", f) %in% colnames(otu_log)) paste0("X", f)
    else NA_character_
  })

  present <- !is.na(matched_cols)
  candidates <- candidates[present, ]
  matched_cols <- matched_cols[present]
  n_rows <- nrow(candidates)

  mat <- t(as.matrix(otu_log[sample_order, matched_cols]))
  rownames(mat) <- gsub("^unassigned ", "un. ", candidates$Taxa)
  colnames(mat) <- sample_order

  # Top annotation — Varieties colorbar + meanFEP barplot 
  top_ann <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    Varieties = meta_ordered$Varieties,
    meant50germ = anno_barplot(
      meta_ordered$meant50germ,
      bar_width = 0.8,
      gp = gpar(fill = "grey50", col = NA),
      height = unit(1.2, "cm")
    ),
    meanFEP = anno_barplot(
      meta_ordered$meanFEP,
      bar_width = 0.8,
      gp = gpar(fill = "grey50", col = NA),
      height = unit(1.2, "cm")
    ),
    col = list(Varieties = color),
    annotation_label = c(Varieties = "Variety",
                            meant50germ = "t50germ",
                            meanFEP = "FEP"),
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    annotation_name_rot = 0,
    annotation_name_side = "left",
    show_legend = c(Varieties = show_legend,
                             meant50germ = FALSE,
                             meanFEP = FALSE),
    show_annotation_name = c(Varieties = TRUE,
                             meant50germ = TRUE,
                             meanFEP = TRUE)
  )

  # Left annotation — trait + direction strip 
    direction_category <- dplyr::case_when(
    candidates$trait_direction == "high_FEP"     ~ "high_FEP",
    candidates$trait_direction == "low_FEP"      ~ "low_FEP",
    candidates$trait_direction == "high_t50germ" ~ "high_t50",
    candidates$trait_direction == "low_t50germ"  ~ "low_t50",
```
