```{r build microbial indicator heatmap TSS LOG10, eval=Metabaranalysis}
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  dir_ann <- rowAnnotation(
    Association = direction_category,
    col = list(
      Association = trait_colors
    ),
    width = unit(3, "mm"),
    show_legend = show_legend,
    show_annotation_name = FALSE
  )

  # Method confirmation matrix 
  method_mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = n_rows,
    ncol = 5,
    dimnames = list(
      rownames(mat),
      c("SpearmanVar", "SpearmanPerm", "MaAsLin2", "ALDEx2", "ANCOMBC2")
    )
  )

  for (i in seq_len(n_rows)) {
    method_mat[i, "SpearmanVar"]  <- as.integer(candidates$SpearmanVar[i])
    method_mat[i, "SpearmanPerm"] <- as.integer(candidates$SpearmanPerm[i])
    method_mat[i, "MaAsLin2"]     <- as.integer(candidates$MaAsLin2[i])
    method_mat[i, "ALDEx2"]       <- as.integer(candidates$ALDEx2[i])
    method_mat[i, "ANCOMBC2"]     <- as.integer(candidates$ANCOMBC2[i])
  }

  # UpSet right annotation 
  upset_ann <- rowAnnotation(
    upset = anno_customize(
      as.character(seq_len(n_rows)),
      graphics = setNames(
        lapply(seq_len(n_rows), function(i){
          vals_i <- method_mat[i, ]
          function(x, y, w, h){
            grid.lines(
              x = unit(c(0.05, 0.95), "npc"),
              y = unit(c(0.5,  0.5),  "npc"),
              gp = gpar(col = "grey80", lwd = 1)
            )
            xs <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 5)
            for(j in seq_len(5)){
              grid.points(
                x = unit(xs[j], "npc"),
                y = unit(0.5,   "npc"),
                pch = ifelse(vals_i[j] == 1, 16, 1),
                gp = gpar(
                  col = ifelse(vals_i[j] == 1, "black", "grey70"),
                  fill = ifelse(vals_i[j] == 1, "black", NA)
                ),
                size = unit(2, "mm")
              )
            }
          }
        }),
        as.character(seq_len(n_rows))
      ),
      width = unit(2.8, "cm")
    ),
    `N methods` = anno_barplot(
      rowSums(method_mat),
      bar_width = 0.8,
      gp = gpar(fill = "grey40", col = NA),
      width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
      ylim = c(0,5),
      axis_param = list(
        side = "top",
        at = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
        labels_rot = 0,
        gp = gpar(fontsize = 6)
      )
    ),
    gap = unit(1, "mm"),
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
    annotation_name_rot = 0,
    annotation_name_side = "top",
    show_annotation_name = c(upset = FALSE, `N methods` = TRUE),
    show_legend = FALSE
  )

  # Color scale for log10 relative abundance 
  max_abs <- quantile(abs(mat), 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  col_fun <- colorRamp2(
    c(min(mat, na.rm = TRUE), median(mat, na.rm = TRUE), max(mat, na.rm = TRUE)),
    c("#F7FBFF", "#6BAED6", "#08306B")
  )

  # Heatmap 
  Heatmap(
    mat,
    name = "log10(Relative\nabundance)",
    col = col_fun,
    na_col = "grey90",
    top_annotation = top_ann,
    left_annotation = dir_ann,
    right_annotation = upset_ann,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,   # keep order by variable + n_methods
    cluster_columns = FALSE,   # keep variety order
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "italic"),
    row_names_side = "left",
    row_names_max_width = unit(5, "cm"),
    column_title = ifelse(gene_choice == "ITS", "Fungi", "Bacteria"),
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),
    height = unit(n_rows * row_height_mm, "mm"),
    show_heatmap_legend = show_legend,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      title = "log10(Relative\nabundance)",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)
    ),
    # Add row split by variable (FEP vs t50germ)
    row_split = candidates$variable,
    row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 0, col = "transparent"), #gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "bold"),
    row_gap = unit(2, "mm")
  )
}

# Build panels 
ht_bact <- build_microbiota_panel("gyrB", robust_results, show_legend = FALSE)
ht_fung <- build_microbiota_panel("ITS",  robust_results, show_legend = FALSE)

# Heights 
n_bact <- sum(robust_results$marker == "gyrB")
n_fung <- sum(robust_results$marker == "ITS")

height_bact_mm   <- n_bact * row_height_mm + annot_height_mm + 10
height_fung_mm   <- n_fung * row_height_mm + annot_height_mm
total_height_mm  <- height_bact_mm + height_fung_mm + 15
total_width_mm   <- width_heatmap_mm + width_legend_mm

# Build legends 
lgd_microbiota <- packLegend(
  Legend(
    col_fun = colorRamp2(
      c(-3, -2, -1),
      c("#F7FBFF", "#6BAED6", "#08306B")
    ),
    title = "log10(Relative\nabundance)",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  Legend(
    labels = names(color),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = color),
    title = "Varieties",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  Legend(
    labels = c("High FEP", "Low FEP",
                "High t50germ (slow)",
               "Low t50germ (fast)"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = unname(trait_colors)),
    title = "Association",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  Legend(
    labels = c("Confirmed", "Not confirmed"),
    type = "points",
    pch = c(16, 1),
    legend_gp = gpar(col = c("black", "grey70")),
    title = "Method status",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
  ),
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

# Drawing function 
draw_microbiota_heatmap <- function(){

  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 1,
    ncol = 2,
    widths = unit(c(width_heatmap_mm, width_legend_mm), "mm")
  )))

  # Left column: stacked heatmaps
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit(c(height_bact_mm, height_fung_mm), "mm")
  )))

  # Bacteria panel
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_bact,
       newpage = FALSE,
       padding = unit(c(4, 0, 5, 45), "mm"))
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 5)
    labels <- c("SpearmanVar", "SpearmanPerm", "MaAsLin2", "ALDEx2", "ANCOMBC2")
    for(j in seq_len(5)){
      grid.text(
        label = labels[j],
        x = unit(xs[j], "npc"),
        y = unit(1, "npc") + unit(1, "mm"),
        just = c("left", "bottom"),
        rot = 90,
        gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
      )
    }
  })
  popViewport()

  # Fungi panel
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
  draw(ht_fung,
       newpage = FALSE,
       padding = unit(c(4, 0, 2, 45), "mm"))
  decorate_annotation("upset", slice = 1, {
    xs     <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 5)
    labels <- c("SpearmanVar", "SpearmanPerm", "MaAsLin2", "ALDEx2", "ANCOMBC2")
    for(j in seq_len(5)){
      grid.text(
        label = labels[j],
        x = unit(xs[j], "npc"),
        y = unit(1, "npc") + unit(1, "mm"),
        just = c("left", "bottom"),
        rot = 90,
        gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)
      )
    }
  })
  popViewport()

  popViewport()  # inner layout
  popViewport()  # left column

  # Right column: legend
  pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 2))
  pushViewport(viewport(
    x = unit(0, "mm"),
    y = unit(1, "npc"),
    width = unit(width_legend_mm, "mm"),
    height = unit(1, "npc"),
    just = c("left", "top")
  ))
  draw(lgd_microbiota,
       x = unit(-20, "mm"),
       y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(20, "mm"),
       just = c("left", "top"))
  popViewport()
  popViewport()
}
```
```{r save microbial indicator heatmap, eval=Metabaranalysis}
# Save 
outfile <- paste0(choice_path_fig_article,
                  "Metabar/Fig_Heatmap_MicrobialIndicators.png")

png(filename = outfile,
    width = 325,
    height = 185,
    units = "mm",
    res = 300)
draw_microbiota_heatmap()
dev.off()
cat("Saved to:", outfile, "\n")

# Display in notebook
grid.newpage()
draw_microbiota_heatmap()
```

## 4.10_Indicator clusters and assortativity
### 4.10.1_microbial network with SPIEC-EASI
```{r Open, eval=Easy}
net <- readRDS(paste0(choice_path, "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/network_objects.rds"))
list2env(net, envir = .GlobalEnv)   # unpacks all objects back into global env

# then call directly:
Fig_network_cross_unified <- build_network_plot(seed_val = 13)
```
```{r network preparation}
# ASV categories ####
category_lookup <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    prefixed_feature = dplyr::case_when(
      marker == "gyrB" ~ paste0("gyrB_", feature),
      marker == "ITS"  ~ paste0("ITS_",  feature),
      TRUE             ~ feature
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trait_direction)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(prefixed_feature) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    directions = list(unique(trait_direction)),
    n_methods  = max(n_methods),
    marker     = dplyr::first(marker),
    Taxa       = dplyr::first(Taxa),
    .groups    = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_directions  = lengths(directions),
    node_category = dplyr::case_when(
      n_directions > 1                                  ~ "mixed",
      sapply(directions, `[[`, 1) == "high_FEP"         ~ "high_FEP",
      sapply(directions, `[[`, 1) == "low_FEP"          ~ "low_FEP",
      sapply(directions, `[[`, 1) == "high_t50germ"     ~ "high_t50germ",
      sapply(directions, `[[`, 1) == "low_t50germ"      ~ "low_t50germ",
      TRUE                                               ~ "other"
    ),
    contour_color = dplyr::case_when(
      node_category == "high_FEP"     ~ "#0072B2",
      node_category == "low_FEP"      ~ "#CC79A7",
      node_category == "high_t50germ" ~ "#E6C619",
      node_category == "low_t50germ"  ~ "#2D7A4A",
      node_category == "mixed"        ~ "#252525",
      TRUE                            ~ NA_character_
    ),
    display_label = gsub("^unassigned ", "un. ", Taxa)
  )

cat("Indicator ASVs by category:\n")
print(table(category_lookup$node_category))

# Named vectors for fast lookup
cat_vec     <- setNames(category_lookup$node_category, category_lookup$prefixed_feature)
color_vec   <- setNames(category_lookup$contour_color,  category_lookup$prefixed_feature)
label_vec   <- setNames(category_lookup$display_label,  category_lookup$prefixed_feature)
methods_vec <- setNames(category_lookup$n_methods,       category_lookup$prefixed_feature)

# Node attributes ####
node_names   <- V(ig_cross)$name
node_modules <- as.character(V(ig_cross)$module)

V(ig_cross)$is_indicator   <- node_names %in% category_lookup$prefixed_feature
V(ig_cross)$node_category  <- dplyr::coalesce(cat_vec[node_names], "non_indicator")
V(ig_cross)$contour_color  <- dplyr::coalesce(color_vec[node_names], "grey30")
V(ig_cross)$display_label  <- ifelse(V(ig_cross)$is_indicator,
                                      label_vec[node_names], NA_character_)
V(ig_cross)$n_methods_node <- as.integer(
  ifelse(V(ig_cross)$is_indicator, methods_vec[node_names], NA_integer_)
)

# Module with indicators
modules_with_indicators      <- unique(node_modules[V(ig_cross)$is_indicator])
V(ig_cross)$module_has_indicator <- node_modules %in% modules_with_indicators

# Node size
V(ig_cross)$node_size_display <- dplyr::case_when(
  V(ig_cross)$is_indicator & V(ig_cross)$n_methods_node >= 2 ~ 18L,
  V(ig_cross)$is_indicator & V(ig_cross)$n_methods_node == 1 ~ 8L,
  V(ig_cross)$module_has_indicator                           ~ 3L,
  TRUE                                                        ~ 2L
)

# Module category ####
module_category_summary <- category_lookup %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    module = V(ig_cross)$module[match(prefixed_feature, V(ig_cross)$name)]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(module)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(module) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    has_high_FEP     = any(node_category == "high_FEP"),
    has_low_FEP      = any(node_category == "low_FEP"),
    has_high_t50germ = any(node_category == "high_t50germ"),
    has_low_t50germ  = any(node_category == "low_t50germ"),
    has_mixed        = any(node_category == "mixed"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    module_description = dplyr::case_when(
      has_high_FEP  & !has_low_FEP  & !has_high_t50germ & !has_low_t50germ ~ paste0(module, ": High FEP"),
      has_low_FEP   & !has_high_FEP & !has_high_t50germ & !has_low_t50germ ~ paste0(module, ": Low FEP"),
      has_high_t50germ & !has_low_t50germ & !has_high_FEP & !has_low_FEP   ~ paste0(module, ": Slow germination"),
      has_low_t50germ  & !has_high_t50germ & !has_high_FEP & !has_low_FEP  ~ paste0(module, ": Fast germination"),
      has_high_FEP  & has_low_FEP  & !has_high_t50germ & !has_low_t50germ  ~ paste0(module, ": Mixed FEP"),
      has_high_t50germ & has_low_t50germ & !has_high_FEP & !has_low_FEP    ~ paste0(module, ": Mixed t50germ"),
      TRUE ~ paste0(module, ": Mixed FEP + t50germ")
    ),
    category_key = sub("^M[0-9]+: ", "", module_description)
  )

cat("\nModule descriptions:\n")
print(module_category_summary[, c("module", "category_key", "module_description")])

module_description <- setNames(
  module_category_summary$module_description,
  module_category_summary$module
)

# Check network ####
cat("\nModules per category:\n")
n_per_category <- module_category_summary %>%
  dplyr::count(category_key, name = "n_modules") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n_modules))
print(n_per_category)
cat("Total indicator modules:", nrow(module_category_summary), "\n")
cat("Total non-indicator modules:", length(non_indicator_modules), "\n")

# color scales ####
cb_indicator_colors <- list(
  "High FEP"            = c("#002F5F", "#003F7F", "#0072B2", "#3D9FD4", "#80C4E8"),
  "Fast germination"    = c("#1B4D2E", "#2D7A4A", "#3DAA6A"),
  "Low FEP"             = c("#A0407A", "#CC79A7"),
  "Mixed FEP + t50germ" = c("#8B2500", "#D55E00"),
  "Mixed t50germ"       = c("#007A7A", "#00B4A6"),
  "Slow germination"    = c("#E6C619"),
  "Mixed FEP"           = c("#5C1F6A", "#7B2D8B", "#9B4DB0")
)

cb_palette_light <- c(
  "#D4E8F7", "#D4EDE4", "#FDF4CC", "#F5DFF0",
  "#E8E8E8", "#DAF5F0", "#FDE8D4", "#E8D4F5",
  "#D4F0F5", "#F5ECD4", "#DCF5D4", "#F5D4D4"
)

# assign colors ####
module_category_summary <- module_category_summary %>%
  dplyr::group_by(category_key) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    category_rank = dplyr::row_number(),
    color = {
      shades <- cb_indicator_colors[[category_key[1]]]
      if (is.null(shades)) rep("#999999", dplyr::n())
      else shades[pmin(category_rank, length(shades))]
    }
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

cat("\nFinal color assignments:\n")
print(module_category_summary[, c("module", "module_description", "color")])

# color lookup ####
indicator_color_lookup <- setNames(
  module_category_summary$color,
  module_category_summary$module
)

all_modules           <- sort(unique(node_modules[!is.na(node_modules)]))
indicator_modules     <- all_modules[all_modules %in% modules_with_indicators]
non_indicator_modules <- all_modules[!all_modules %in% modules_with_indicators]

non_indicator_colors <- setNames(
  rep(cb_palette_light, length.out = length(non_indicator_modules)),
  non_indicator_modules
)

module_color_lookup <- c(
  indicator_color_lookup[indicator_modules],
  non_indicator_colors
)

# nodes ####
V(ig_cross)$module_hex <- dplyr::coalesce(
  module_color_lookup[node_modules],
  "grey88"
)

V(ig_cross)$module_label <- dplyr::case_when(
  node_modules %in% names(module_description) ~ module_description[node_modules],
  !is.na(node_modules)                        ~ paste0("Module ", node_modules),
  TRUE                                         ~ "No module"
)

# legend tweaking
module_fill_values <- c(
  setNames(
    unname(module_color_lookup),
    sapply(names(module_color_lookup), function(m)
      if (m %in% names(module_description)) module_description[m]
      else paste0("Module ", m))
  ),
  "No module" = "grey88"
)

category_order <- c(
  "High FEP", "Low FEP",
  "Slow germination", "Fast germination",
  "Mixed FEP", "Mixed t50germ", "Mixed FEP + t50germ"
)

indicator_legend_breaks <- module_category_summary %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    category_order_idx = match(category_key, category_order),
    module_num         = as.integer(sub("M", "", module))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(category_order_idx, module_num) %>%
  dplyr::pull(module_description)

# Contour color scale
contour_unique <- category_lookup %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(contour_color)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(node_category, contour_color) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = dplyr::case_when(
      node_category == "high_FEP"     ~ "high FEP",
      node_category == "low_FEP"      ~ "low FEP",
      node_category == "high_t50germ" ~ "slow germination",
      node_category == "low_t50germ"  ~ "fast germination",
      node_category == "mixed"        ~ "mixed traits",
      TRUE                            ~ node_category
    )
  )

contour_color_values <- setNames(contour_unique$contour_color,
                                  contour_unique$contour_color)
contour_color_labels <- setNames(contour_unique$label,
                                  contour_unique$contour_color)
contour_color_breaks <- contour_unique$contour_color

# edges ####
w <- abs(E(ig_cross)$weight)
E(ig_cross)$width_scaled <- 0.5 + 3.5 * (w - min(w)) / (max(w) - min(w) + 1e-10)
E(ig_cross)$abs_weight   <- w

# Module node counts (for ellipse sizing)
module_node_counts <- table(node_modules)

cat("\nNode attribute summary:\n")
print(table(V(ig_cross)$node_category))
print(table(V(ig_cross)$node_size_display))
```
```{r network properties}
# Network properties
print(module_category_summary[, c("module", "category_key", "module_description")])

n_per_category <- module_category_summary %>%
  dplyr::count(category_key, name = "n_modules") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n_modules))
print(n_per_category)

cat("\nTotal indicator modules:", nrow(module_category_summary), "\n")
cat("Total non-indicator modules:", length(non_indicator_modules), "\n")
```
```{r network representation function}
build_network_plot <- function(seed_val = 13) {
  
  set.seed(seed_val)
  layout_coords <- create_layout(ig_cross, layout = "fr",
                                  weights = E(ig_cross)$abs_weight)
  
  ellipse_modules <- names(module_description)
  ellipse_highlight <- c("M3", "M8", "M12") # custom from barplot
  
  ellipse_df <- layout_coords %>%
    dplyr::filter(module %in% ellipse_modules) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(ellipse_color = module_color_lookup[as.character(module)])
  
  network_cx <- mean(layout_coords$x, na.rm = TRUE)
  network_cy <- mean(layout_coords$y, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  ellipse_centroids <- ellipse_df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(module) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      x = mean(x), y = mean(y),
      ellipse_color = dplyr::first(ellipse_color),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dx      = x - network_cx, dy = y - network_cy,
      dist    = sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2),
      nudge_x = (dx / dist) * 3.0,
      nudge_y = (dy / dist) * 3.0,
      label_x = x + nudge_x, label_y = y + nudge_y,
      hjust   = ifelse(dx > 0, 0, ifelse(dx < 0, 1, 0.5)),
      vjust   = ifelse(dy > 0, 0, ifelse(dy < 0, 1, 0.5))
    )
  
  ggraph(layout_coords) +
    
    # Ellipses only for selected modules
    ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(
      data = dplyr::filter(ellipse_df,
                            module %in% ellipse_highlight &
                            module_node_counts[as.character(module)] >= 3),
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = module, fill = ellipse_color),
      color = NA, alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0,
      expand = unit(4, "mm"), show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(
      data = dplyr::filter(ellipse_df,
                            module %in% ellipse_highlight &
                            module_node_counts[as.character(module)] < 3),
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = module, fill = ellipse_color),
      color = NA, alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0,
      expand = unit(8, "mm"), show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_identity(guide = "none") +

    # Labels for ALL indicator modules (ellipse or not)
    geom_label(
      data = ellipse_centroids,
      aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = module,
          hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
      size = 3.5, fontface = "bold",
      color = ellipse_centroids$ellipse_color,
      fill = "white", linewidth = 0, alpha = 0.85, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    
    geom_edge_link(
      aes(linetype = type, width = width_scaled, color = sign),
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    scale_edge_color_manual(
      values = c(Positive = "steelblue", Negative = "tomato"),
      name   = "Association type",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 1,
                            override.aes = list(linetype = "solid", linewidth = 2))
    ) +
    scale_edge_linetype_manual(
      values = c("Inter-kingdom" = "13", "Within-domain" = "solid"),
      name   = "Edge type",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 1,
                            override.aes = list(color = "grey40", linewidth = 2))
    ) +
    scale_edge_width_continuous(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
    
    geom_node_point(
      aes(shape = Marker, size = node_size_display,
          fill = module_label, color = "grey30"),
      alpha  = ifelse(V(ig_cross)$module_has_indicator, 0.9, 0.6),
      stroke = 0.8
    ) +
    
    geom_node_point(
      data   = function(x) dplyr::filter(x, is_indicator),
      aes(shape = Marker, size = node_size_display,
          fill = module_label, color = contour_color),
      alpha  = 1.0, stroke = 3.0
    ) +
    
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c(Bacteria = 21, Fungi = 24), name = "Kingdom",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 2,
                            override.aes = list(size = 4, color = "grey30",
                                                fill = "grey70", stroke = 0.3))
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 20), guide = "none") +
    
    scale_fill_manual(
      values   = module_fill_values,
      name     = "Module with indicator",
      na.value = "grey88",
      breaks   = indicator_legend_breaks,
      guide    = guide_legend(order = 4, ncol = 1,
                              override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 4,
                                                  color = "grey30", stroke = 0.5))
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(
      values = contour_color_values,
      labels = contour_color_labels,
      breaks = contour_color_breaks,
      name   = "Indicator taxa (contour)",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 3,
                            override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 5,
                                                fill = "grey70", stroke = 2.0))
    ) +
    
    geom_node_text(
      aes(label = display_label),
      size = 3, repel = TRUE, fontface = "italic",
      color = "grey10", na.rm = TRUE, max.overlaps = 20
    ) +
    
    labs(
      title    = "Inter-kingdom co-occurrence network",
      subtitle = paste0(
        vcount(ig_cross), " taxa  |  ", ecount(ig_cross), " edges  |  ",
        n_cross, " inter-kingdom  |  ", n_modules_cross, " modules  |  ",
        "modularity = ", round(modularity(communities_cross), 3)
      )
    ) +
    theme_graph(base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text            = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.box      = "vertical",
      legend.spacing  = unit(0.5, "cm")
    )
}
```

```{r network representation function less margin}
build_network_plot <- function(seed_val = 13) {
  
  set.seed(seed_val)
  layout_coords <- create_layout(ig_cross, layout = "fr",
                                  weights = E(ig_cross)$abs_weight)
  
  # Compute tight coordinate limits from node positions ─────────────────────
  x_range  <- range(layout_coords$x, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_range  <- range(layout_coords$y, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_pad    <- diff(x_range) * 0.08   # 8% padding
  y_pad    <- diff(y_range) * 0.08
  x_limits <- c(x_range[1] - x_pad, x_range[2] + x_pad)
  y_limits <- c(y_range[1] - y_pad, y_range[2] + y_pad)
  
  ellipse_modules  <- names(module_description)
  ellipse_highlight <- c("M3", "M8", "M12")
  
  ellipse_df <- layout_coords %>%
    dplyr::filter(module %in% ellipse_modules) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(ellipse_color = module_color_lookup[as.character(module)])
  
  network_cx <- mean(layout_coords$x, na.rm = TRUE)
  network_cy <- mean(layout_coords$y, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  ellipse_centroids <- ellipse_df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(module) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      x = mean(x), y = mean(y),
      ellipse_color = dplyr::first(ellipse_color),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dx      = x - network_cx, dy = y - network_cy,
      dist    = sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2),
      nudge_x = (dx / dist) * 3.0,
      nudge_y = (dy / dist) * 3.0,
      label_x = x + nudge_x, label_y = y + nudge_y,
      hjust   = ifelse(dx > 0, 0, ifelse(dx < 0, 1, 0.5)),
      vjust   = ifelse(dy > 0, 0, ifelse(dy < 0, 1, 0.5))
    )
  
  ggraph(layout_coords) +
    
    ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(
      data = dplyr::filter(ellipse_df,
                            module %in% ellipse_highlight &
                            module_node_counts[as.character(module)] >= 3),
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = module, fill = ellipse_color),
      color = NA, alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0,
      expand = unit(4, "mm"), show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(
      data = dplyr::filter(ellipse_df,
                            module %in% ellipse_highlight &
                            module_node_counts[as.character(module)] < 3),
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = module, fill = ellipse_color),
      color = NA, alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0,
      expand = unit(8, "mm"), show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_identity(guide = "none") +
    
    geom_label(
      data = ellipse_centroids,
      aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = module,
          hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
      size = 3.5, fontface = "bold",
      color = ellipse_centroids$ellipse_color,
      fill = "white", linewidth = 0, alpha = 0.85, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    
    geom_edge_link(
      aes(linetype = type, width = width_scaled, color = sign),
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    scale_edge_color_manual(
      values = c(Positive = "steelblue", Negative = "tomato"),
      name   = "Association type",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 1,
                            override.aes = list(linetype = "solid", linewidth = 2))
    ) +
    scale_edge_linetype_manual(
      values = c("Inter-kingdom" = "13", "Within-domain" = "solid"),
      name   = "Edge type",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 1,
                            override.aes = list(color = "grey40", linewidth = 2))
    ) +
    scale_edge_width_continuous(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
    
    geom_node_point(
      aes(shape = Marker, size = node_size_display,
          fill = module_label, color = "grey30"),
      alpha  = ifelse(V(ig_cross)$module_has_indicator, 0.9, 0.6),
      stroke = 0.8
    ) +
    
    geom_node_point(
      data   = function(x) dplyr::filter(x, is_indicator),
      aes(shape = Marker, size = node_size_display,
          fill = module_label, color = contour_color),
      alpha  = 1.0, stroke = 3.0
    ) +
    
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c(Bacteria = 21, Fungi = 24), name = "Kingdom",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 2,
                            override.aes = list(size = 4, color = "grey30",
                                                fill = "grey70", stroke = 0.3))
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 20), guide = "none") +
    
    scale_fill_manual(
      values   = module_fill_values,
      name     = "Module with indicator",
      na.value = "grey88",
      breaks   = indicator_legend_breaks,
      guide    = guide_legend(order = 4, ncol = 1,
                              override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 4,
                                                  color = "grey30", stroke = 0.5))
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(
      values = contour_color_values,
      labels = contour_color_labels,
      breaks = contour_color_breaks,
      name   = "Indicator taxa (contour)",
      guide  = guide_legend(order = 3,
                            override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 5,
                                                fill = "grey70", stroke = 2.0))
    ) +
    
    geom_node_text(
      aes(label = display_label),
      size = 3, repel = TRUE, fontface = "italic",
      color = "grey10", na.rm = TRUE, max.overlaps = 20
    ) +
    
    # Tight coordinate limits ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits, clip = "off") +
    
    labs(
      title    = "Inter-kingdom co-occurrence network",
      subtitle = paste0(
        vcount(ig_cross), " taxa  |  ", ecount(ig_cross), " edges  |  ",
        n_cross, " inter-kingdom  |  ", n_modules_cross, " modules  |  ",
        "modularity = ", round(modularity(communities_cross), 3)
      )
    ) +
    theme_graph(base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text            = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.box      = "vertical",
      legend.spacing  = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      # Reduce margins — especially left
      plot.margin     = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 2, unit = "mm")
    )
}
```

```{r network representation run}
Fig_network_cross_unified <- build_network_plot(seed_val = 13)

ggsave(
  paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Metabar/Fig_network_cross_domain_test.png"),
  plot = Fig_network_cross_unified,
  width = 24, height = 18, dpi = 300, units = "cm"
)

Fig_network_cross_unified
```
```{r save module composition}
# Module composition table
module_composition <- data.frame(
  node           = V(ig_cross)$name,
  Taxa           = V(ig_cross)$Taxa,
  Marker         = V(ig_cross)$Marker,
  module         = as.character(V(ig_cross)$module),
  degree         = igraph::degree(ig_cross),
  is_indicator   = V(ig_cross)$is_indicator,
  node_category  = V(ig_cross)$node_category,
  n_methods      = V(ig_cross)$n_methods_node,
  
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    module_category_summary %>%
      dplyr::select(module, category_key, module_description,
                    has_high_FEP, has_low_FEP,
                    has_high_t50germ, has_low_t50germ),
    by = "module"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(module, desc(is_indicator), desc(degree))

write_xlsx(
  module_composition,
  path = paste0(choice_path,
                "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                "Network_module_composition.xlsx")
)
```
 
```{r Save, eval=FALSE}
network_objects <- list(
  
  # Network itself — all node/edge attributes attached
  ig_cross                = ig_cross,
  
  # Subtitle stats — not stored in ig_cross
  n_cross                 = n_cross,
  n_modules_cross         = n_modules_cross,
  communities_cross       = communities_cross,
  
  # Legend vectors — not derivable from ig_cross alone
  module_description      = module_description,
  module_color_lookup     = module_color_lookup,
  indicator_legend_breaks = indicator_legend_breaks,
  module_fill_values      = module_fill_values,
  contour_color_values    = contour_color_values,
  contour_color_labels    = contour_color_labels,
  contour_color_breaks    = contour_color_breaks,
  module_node_counts      = module_node_counts
)

saveRDS(
  network_objects,
  file = paste0(choice_path, "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/network_objects.rds")
)
```


### 4.10.2_Network statistics
```{r network statistics, eval=Metabaranalysis}
library(pulsar)
# Network summary statistics 

n_nodes_total <- vcount(ig_cross) + sum(igraph::degree(
  graph_from_adjacency_matrix(se_matrix_cross, mode = "undirected", diag = FALSE)
) == 0)  # includes isolated nodes removed earlier

n_nodes_connected <- vcount(ig_cross)
n_edges           <- ecount(ig_cross)
n_nodes_possible  <- n_nodes_connected * (n_nodes_connected - 1) / 2
density_val       <- n_edges / n_nodes_possible
sparsity_val      <- 1 - density_val

cat(" Network summary \n")
cat("Total nodes (before isolate removal):", length(all_taxa), "\n")
cat("Connected nodes (after isolate removal):", n_nodes_connected, "\n")
cat("Edges:", n_edges, "\n")
cat("Density:", round(density_val, 4), "\n")
cat("Sparsity:", round(sparsity_val, 4), "\n")

# Stability and lambda
cat("\nStability (StARS):", round(se_cross$select$stars$summary, 4), "\n")
cat("Optimal lambda index:", se_cross$select$stars$opt.index, "\n")
cat("Optimal lambda value:", round(
  se_cross$select$est$lambda[se_cross$select$stars$opt.index], 3), "\n")
cat("Total lambdas tested:", length(se_cross$select$est$lambda), "\n")
cat("Rank from most regularized (largest lambda):",
    length(se_cross$select$est$lambda) - se_cross$select$stars$opt.index + 1, "\n")

# Module sizes
module_sizes <- table(membership(communities_cross))
cat("\nNumber of modules:", n_modules_cross, "\n")
cat("Module size range:", min(module_sizes), "to", max(module_sizes), "taxa\n")
cat("Modularity:", round(modularity(communities_cross), 3), "\n")

# Edge weights
cat("\nEdge weight range:", round(min(E(ig_cross)$weight), 4),
    "to", round(max(E(ig_cross)$weight), 4), "\n")
cat("Positive edges:", sum(E(ig_cross)$weight > 0), "\n")
cat("Negative edges:", sum(E(ig_cross)$weight < 0), "\n")

# Per-marker node counts
cat("\nBacteria nodes:", sum(V(ig_cross)$Marker == "Bacteria"), "\n")
cat("Fungi nodes:",     sum(V(ig_cross)$Marker == "Fungi"),    "\n")
```
#### Metrics
```{r node-level topological metrics}
topo_df <- data.frame(
  node          = V(ig_cross)$name,
  marker        = V(ig_cross)$Marker,
  module        = as.character(V(ig_cross)$module),
  node_category = V(ig_cross)$node_category,
  is_indicator  = V(ig_cross)$is_indicator,
  n_methods     = V(ig_cross)$n_methods_node,
  
  # Connectivity
  degree        = igraph::degree(ig_cross),
  strength      = igraph::strength(ig_cross, weights = abs(E(ig_cross)$weight)),
  
  # Centrality
  betweenness   = igraph::betweenness(ig_cross, weights = abs(E(ig_cross)$weight), normalized = TRUE),
  closeness     = igraph::closeness(ig_cross, weights = abs(E(ig_cross)$weight), normalized = TRUE),
  eigenvector   = igraph::eigen_centrality(ig_cross, weights = abs(E(ig_cross)$weight))$vector,
  
  # Module position
  # Within-module degree z-score: how connected within own module vs other nodes in same module
  # Cross-module connectivity (participation coefficient): how connections are spread across modules
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Within-module degree z-score
# For each node: (degree_within_module - mean_degree_within_module) / sd_degree_within_module
topo_df$within_module_degree <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(topo_df)), function(i) {
  mod   <- topo_df$module[i]
  nm    <- topo_df$node[i]
  mod_nodes <- topo_df$node[topo_df$module == mod]
  sub_g <- igraph::induced_subgraph(ig_cross, vids = mod_nodes)
  igraph::degree(sub_g)[nm]
})

topo_df <- topo_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(module) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    z_within = (within_module_degree - mean(within_module_degree)) /
                (sd(within_module_degree) + 1e-10)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# Participation coefficient
# P_i = 1 - sum_s( (k_is / k_i)^2 )
# where k_is = edges from node i to module s, k_i = total degree of node i
participation_coef <- sapply(V(ig_cross)$name, function(nm) {
  ki    <- igraph::degree(ig_cross, v = nm)
  if (ki == 0) return(0)
  nbrs  <- names(igraph::neighbors(ig_cross, v = nm))
  mod_i <- as.character(V(ig_cross)$module[V(ig_cross)$name == nm])
  nbr_modules <- as.character(V(ig_cross)$module[V(ig_cross)$name %in% nbrs])
  mod_counts  <- table(nbr_modules)
  1 - sum((mod_counts / ki)^2)
})

topo_df$participation_coef <- participation_coef[topo_df$node]

cat("Topological metrics computed for", nrow(topo_df), "nodes\n")
print(summary(topo_df[, c("degree", "strength", "betweenness",
                            "closeness", "z_within", "participation_coef")]))
```
```{r stats}
# ── Test 1: indicator vs non-indicator ───────────────────────────────────────
metrics <- c("degree", "strength", "betweenness",
             "closeness", "z_within", "participation_coef")

cat("=== Indicator vs Non-indicator (Wilcoxon) ===\n")
indicator_tests <- lapply(metrics, function(m) {
  ind     <- topo_df[[m]][topo_df$is_indicator]
  non_ind <- topo_df[[m]][!topo_df$is_indicator]
  test    <- wilcox.test(ind, non_ind, exact = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    metric   = m,
    median_indicator     = round(median(ind,     na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    median_non_indicator = round(median(non_ind, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    W        = test$statistic,
    p_value  = round(test$p.value, 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
indicator_test_df <- do.call(rbind, indicator_tests)
indicator_test_df$q_value <- round(p.adjust(indicator_test_df$p_value, "BH"), 4)
print(indicator_test_df)

# ── Test 2: differences among indicator categories ────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== Among indicator categories (Kruskal-Wallis + pairwise) ===\n")
ind_only <- topo_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(is_indicator, node_category != "mixed")

category_tests <- lapply(metrics, function(m) {
  kt <- kruskal.test(as.formula(paste(m, "~ node_category")), data = ind_only)
  data.frame(
    metric  = m,
    KW_H    = round(kt$statistic, 3),
    df      = kt$parameter,
    p_value = round(kt$p.value,   4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
category_test_df <- do.call(rbind, category_tests)
category_test_df$q_value <- round(p.adjust(category_test_df$p_value, "BH"), 4)
print(category_test_df)

# Pairwise for significant metrics
sig_metrics <- category_test_df$metric[category_test_df$q_value < 0.25]
if (length(sig_metrics) > 0) {
  cat("\nPairwise Wilcoxon for significant metrics (q < 0.25):\n")
  for (m in sig_metrics) {
    cat("\n--", m, "--\n")
    pw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
      ind_only[[m]], ind_only$node_category,
      p.adjust.method = "BH", exact = FALSE
    )
    print(pw$p.value)
  }
}

# ── Test 3: FEP indicators vs t50germ indicators ──────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== FEP vs t50germ indicators (Wilcoxon) ===\n")
fep_nodes  <- topo_df$node_category %in% c("high_FEP", "low_FEP")
t50_nodes  <- topo_df$node_category %in% c("high_t50germ", "low_t50germ")

trait_tests <- lapply(metrics, function(m) {
  test <- wilcox.test(topo_df[[m]][fep_nodes],
                      topo_df[[m]][t50_nodes], exact = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    metric          = m,
    median_FEP      = round(median(topo_df[[m]][fep_nodes],  na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    median_t50germ  = round(median(topo_df[[m]][t50_nodes],  na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    p_value         = round(test$p.value, 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
trait_test_df <- do.call(rbind, trait_tests)
trait_test_df$q_value <- round(p.adjust(trait_test_df$p_value, "BH"), 4)
print(trait_test_df)

# ── Test 4: cross-domain vs within-domain edges for indicator nodes ───────────
cat("\n=== Cross-domain edge proportion for indicator vs non-indicator ===\n")
edge_ends   <- igraph::ends(ig_cross, E(ig_cross), names = TRUE)
from_marker <- V(ig_cross)$Marker[match(edge_ends[, 1], V(ig_cross)$name)]
to_marker   <- V(ig_cross)$Marker[match(edge_ends[, 2], V(ig_cross)$name)]
is_cross    <- from_marker != to_marker

cross_prop <- sapply(V(ig_cross)$name, function(nm) {
  adj_edges  <- igraph::incident(ig_cross, v = nm)
  if (length(adj_edges) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  mean(is_cross[adj_edges])
})

topo_df$cross_domain_prop <- cross_prop[topo_df$node]

test_cross <- wilcox.test(
  topo_df$cross_domain_prop[topo_df$is_indicator],
  topo_df$cross_domain_prop[!topo_df$is_indicator],
  exact = FALSE
)
cat("Median cross-domain proportion — indicator:",
    round(median(topo_df$cross_domain_prop[topo_df$is_indicator],  na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("Median cross-domain proportion — non-indicator:",
    round(median(topo_df$cross_domain_prop[!topo_df$is_indicator], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("Wilcoxon p =", round(test_cross$p.value, 4), "\n")
```
```{r fig}
# ── Boxplots of topological metrics by category ───────────────────────────────
topo_plot_df <- topo_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    category_display = dplyr::case_when(
      node_category == "high_FEP"     ~ "High FEP",
      node_category == "low_FEP"      ~ "Low FEP",
      node_category == "high_t50germ" ~ "Slow germination",
      node_category == "low_t50germ"  ~ "Fast germination",
      node_category == "mixed"        ~ "Mixed",
      TRUE                            ~ "Non-indicator"
    ),
    category_display = factor(category_display, levels = c(
      "High FEP", "Low FEP",
      "Slow germination", "Fast germination",
      "Mixed", "Non-indicator"
    ))
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(degree, strength, betweenness,
             closeness, z_within, participation_coef, cross_domain_prop),
    names_to  = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c(
      "degree", "strength", "betweenness", "closeness",
      "z_within", "participation_coef", "cross_domain_prop"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "Degree", "Strength", "Betweenness", "Closeness",
      "Within-module z", "Participation coef.", "Cross-domain prop."
    ))
  )

category_palette <- c(
  "High FEP"         = "#0072B2",
  "Low FEP"          = "#CC79A7",
  "Slow germination" = "#E6C619",
  "Fast germination" = "#2D7A4A",
  "Mixed"            = "#D55E00",
  "Non-indicator"    = "#D9D9D9"
)

Fig_topo <- ggplot(topo_plot_df,
                   aes(x = category_display, y = value,
                       fill = category_display)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1, alpha = 0.5, color = "grey30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = category_palette, guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       title = "Network topology by indicator category") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

Fig_topo
```

#### Assortativity
```{r assortativity, eval=Metabaranalysis}
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(igraph::ends)
# Nominal assortativity on indicator category 
# Convert category to integer factor (required by assortativity_nominal)
category_factor <- as.integer(factor(
  V(ig_cross)$node_category,
  levels = unique(V(ig_cross)$node_category)
))

# Per-category assortativity
# For each category, recode nodes as:
#   1 = in category
#   2 = other indicator category  
#   3 = non-indicator

compute_assort_category <- function(graph, focal_category) {
  
  cats <- V(graph)$node_category
  
  # Need at least 2 nodes of the focal category
  if (sum(cats == focal_category, na.rm = TRUE) < 2) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  
  types <- dplyr::case_when(
    cats == focal_category                          ~ 1L,  # focal
    cats %in% c("non_indicator", NA_character_)    ~ 3L,  # non-indicator
    TRUE                                            ~ 2L   # other indicator
  )
  
  tryCatch(
    igraph::assortativity_nominal(graph, types = types, directed = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

# Subgraphs
ig_within_bact <- subgraph.edges(ig_cross,
  E(ig_cross)[E(ig_cross)$type == "Within-domain" &
              from_marker == "Bacteria" & to_marker == "Bacteria"])
ig_within_fung <- subgraph.edges(ig_cross,
  E(ig_cross)[E(ig_cross)$type == "Within-domain" &
              from_marker == "Fungi"    & to_marker == "Fungi"])
ig_cross_sub   <- subgraph.edges(ig_cross,
  E(ig_cross)[E(ig_cross)$type == "Cross-domain"])

subgraphs <- list(
  "Global"            = ig_cross,
  "Bacteria-Bacteria" = ig_within_bact,
  "Fungi-Fungi"       = ig_within_fung,
  "Inter-kingdom"     = ig_cross_sub
)

focal_categories <- c("high_FEP", "low_FEP", "high_t50germ", "low_t50germ", "mixed")

# Compute all combinations
assort_per_category <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(focal_categories, function(cat) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(subgraphs), function(sg_name) {
    
    sg  <- subgraphs[[sg_name]]
    val <- compute_assort_category(sg, cat)
    
    # Count focal nodes in this subgraph
    n_focal <- sum(V(sg)$node_category == cat, na.rm = TRUE)
    n_edges <- ecount(sg)
    
    data.frame(
      category    = cat,
      edge_subset = sg_name,
      assortativity = round(val, 3),
      n_focal_nodes = n_focal,
      n_edges       = n_edges,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
}))

print(assort_per_category)
```
```{r plot assortativity}
# ── Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
category_palette <- c(
  "high_FEP"     = "#0072B2",
  "low_FEP"      = "#CC79A7",
  "high_t50germ" = "#E6C619",
  "low_t50germ"  = "#2D7A4A",
  "mixed"        = "#D55E00"
)

category_labels <- c(
  "high_FEP"     = "High FEP",
  "low_FEP"      = "Low FEP",
  "high_t50germ" = "Slow germination",
  "low_t50germ"  = "Fast germination",
  "mixed"        = "Mixed"
)


```


```{r plot assortativity}
assort_plot_df <- assort_per_category %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(assortativity)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    edge_subset = factor(edge_subset,
                         levels = c("Global", "Bacteria-Bacteria",
                                    "Fungi-Fungi", "Inter-kingdom")),
    category    = factor(category, levels = names(category_palette)),
    direction   = ifelse(assortativity >= 0, "Assortative", "Disassortative"),
    # Label: assortativity value + n focal nodes
    point_label = paste0(" ", assortativity,
                         " (n=", n_focal_nodes, ")")
  )

Fig_assort_category <- ggplot(assort_plot_df,
                              aes(x = assortativity,
                                  y = edge_subset,
                                  color = category)) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  
  # Segment from 0 to value — no dodge needed since faceted
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = assortativity,
                   y = edge_subset, yend = edge_subset),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = point_label),
            hjust = ifelse(assort_plot_df$assortativity >= 0, -0.15, 1.15),
            size = 2.5, lineheight = 0.9) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = category_palette,
    labels = category_labels,
    name   = "Indicator category",
    guide  = "none"   # legend replaced by facet labels
  ) +
  
  # One row per category — gives vertical space between categories
  facet_wrap(~ category, ncol = 1,
             labeller = labeller(category = category_labels)) +
  
  xlim(-0.05, 0.5) +
  
  labs(
    x        = "Assortativity coefficient",
    y        = NULL,
    title    = "Network assortativity by indicator category",
    subtitle = "Positive = focal taxa co-occur with each other | Negative = focal taxa co-occur with others"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text          = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing      = unit(0.2, "cm")   # vertical space between facets
  )

# By kingdom ####
assort_plot_df <- assort_plot_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    edge_subset = factor(edge_subset,
                         levels = c("Global", "Fungi-Fungi",
                                    "Bacteria-Bacteria", "Inter-kingdom")),
    category    = factor(category,
                         levels = rev(names(category_palette)))  # bottom-to-top order
  )
Fig_assort_kingdom <- ggplot(assort_plot_df,
                              aes(x = assortativity,
                                  y = category,
                                  color = category)) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = assortativity,
                   y = category, yend = category),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = point_label),
            hjust = ifelse(assort_plot_df$assortativity >= 0, -0.15, 1.15),
            size = 2.5, lineheight = 0.9) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = category_palette,
    labels = category_labels,
    guide  = "none"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_discrete(labels = category_labels) +
  
  # Facet by edge subset in desired order
  facet_wrap(~ edge_subset, ncol = 1) +
  
  xlim(-0.05, 0.5) +
  
  labs(
    x        = "Assortativity coefficient",
    y        = NULL,
    title    = "Network assortativity by indicator category",
    subtitle = "Positive = focal taxa co-occur with each other | Negative = focal taxa co-occur with others"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text               = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing      = unit(0.2, "cm")
  )

Fig_assort_category
Fig_assort_kingdom
```

### 4.10.3_Module composition plot
```{r Fig preparation, eval=Metabaranalysis}
node_table <- module_composition %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Kingdom = dplyr::case_when(
      Marker == "gyrB" ~ "Bacteria",
      Marker == "ITS"  ~ "Fungi",
      TRUE             ~ Marker
    ),
    # Map node_category to human-readable fill group
    category_label = dplyr::case_when(
      node_category == "high_FEP"     ~ "High FEP",
      node_category == "low_FEP"      ~ "Low FEP",
      node_category == "high_t50germ" ~ "Slow germination",
      node_category == "low_t50germ"  ~ "Fast germination",
      node_category == "mixed"        ~ "Mixed",
      TRUE                            ~ "Non-indicator"
    ),
    fill_group = paste(category_label, "-", Kingdom),
    # Numeric module ordering
    module = factor(module,
                    levels = paste0("M", sort(as.integer(
                      sub("M", "", unique(module))
                    ))))
  )

# Color palette — kingdom x category, colorblind-friendly
category_colors <- c(
  "High FEP - Fungi"            = "#0072B2",
  "High FEP - Bacteria"         = "#80C4E8",
  "Low FEP - Fungi"             = "#CC79A7",
  "Low FEP - Bacteria"          = "#E8C4DF",
  "Slow germination - Fungi"    = "#E6C619",
  "Slow germination - Bacteria" = "#F5E88A",
  "Fast germination - Fungi"    = "#2D7A4A",
  "Fast germination - Bacteria" = "#8DC9A4",
  "Mixed - Fungi"               = "#D55E00",
  "Mixed - Bacteria"            = "#F0B080",
  "Non-indicator - Fungi"       = "#737373",
  "Non-indicator - Bacteria"    = "#D9D9D9"
)

node_table <- node_table %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    fill_group = factor(fill_group, levels = rev(names(category_colors)))
  )

```
```{r Fig8B_Module composition, eval=Metabaranalysis}
# Summarise counts per module x fill_group
bar_data <- node_table %>%
  dplyr::group_by(module, fill_group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # Drop combinations with 0 (already handled by summarise)
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(fill_group))

Fig_moduleCompo <- ggplot(bar_data,
                          aes(x = module, y = n, fill = fill_group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", colour = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = category_colors,
    name   = "Indicator status-Kingdom",
    drop   = TRUE,
    # Reverse legend to match stacking order
    guide  = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)
  ) +
  labs(
    x     = "Module",
    y     = "Number of ASVs",
    title = "Module composition"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text          = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

Fig_moduleCompo
```
3*, 5: mix t50 - eg 3 right side, dark cyan
6, 8 : mix all - eg 8 orange bottom centered
9: slow germination = high t50 (yellow)
10, 12, 23: high FEP - eg 12 (& 23) light blue left bottom
7, 11: low FEP (pink)
17: fast germination = low t50 (bright green)
ellipses: 3, 8, 12.

```{r indicators in network}
all_comparison_ <- all_comparison %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_methods   = factor(n_methods,
                         levels = sort(unique(n_methods))),
    marker      = factor(marker,
                         levels = c("gyrB", "ITS")),
    variable    = factor(variable,
                         levels = c("t50germ", "FEP")),
    node_label  = factor(node_label,
                         levels = c("High emergence", "Low emergence",
                                    "Slow germination", "Fast germination",
                                    "Mixed associations")),
    trait_label = factor(trait_label,
                         levels = c("High emergence", "Low emergence",
                                    "Slow germination", "Fast germination"))
  )

module_comp_ <- module_comp %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_methods     = factor(n_methods,
                           levels = sort(unique(n_methods,
                                                na.rm = TRUE))),
    Marker        = factor(Marker,
                           levels = c("Bacteria", "Fungi")),
    node_category = factor(node_category,
                           levels = c("high_FEP", "low_FEP",
                                      "high_t50germ", "low_t50germ",
                                      "mixed", "non_indicator"))
  )

summary(all_comparison_[, c("n_methods", "marker", "variable", "node_label", "trait_label")])
summary(module_comp_[, c("n_methods", "Marker", "node_category")])
```


## 4.11_Link between db-RDA and candidate taxa
```{r load dbRDA and module data, eval=FALSE}
# Load tables
top_taxa_table <- read_xlsx(paste0(choice_path,
                                    "/1_Raw_data/Preprocessed/Metabar/",
                                    "dbRDA_top10_taxa_allModels.xlsx"))
module_comp <- read_xlsx(paste0(choice_path,
                                 "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                                 "Network_module_composition.xlsx"))
```
```{r cross-reference dbRDA top taxa with candidates and network, eval=FALSE}
variable_col <- "variable"   # replace with actual column name if different
kingdom_col  <- "Kingdom"    # replace with actual column name if different

# top 10 taxa in all dbRDA models
top_taxa_enriched <- top_taxa_table %>%
  
  # Ensure kingdom and variable columns exist and are clean
  dplyr::rename(
    dbRDA_kingdom  = all_of(kingdom_col),
    dbRDA_variable = all_of(variable_col)
  ) %>%
  
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Prefix for network lookup
    prefixed_ID = paste0(
      dplyr::case_when(
        dbRDA_kingdom %in% c("Bacteria", "gyrB") ~ "gyrB",
        dbRDA_kingdom %in% c("Fungi",    "ITS")  ~ "ITS",
        TRUE ~ dbRDA_kingdom
      ),
      "_", ASV_ID
    ),
    
    # check if candidate
    in_candidates = ASV_ID %in% all_comparison$feature,
    
    # Candidate summary (may appear in multiple traits)
    candidate_info = sapply(ASV_ID, function(id) {
      rows <- all_comparison[all_comparison$feature == id, ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      paste0(
        rows$Taxa, " (",
        rows$variable, ", ",
        "rho=", round(dplyr::coalesce(
          rows$rho_SpearmanVar, rows$rho_SpearmanPerm,
          rows$rho_ALDEx2), 2), ", ",
        "n_methods=", rows$n_methods, ")",
        collapse = " | "
      )
    }),
    
    # Network attributes from module_comp
    in_network = prefixed_ID %in% module_comp$node,
    
    network_module = sapply(prefixed_ID, function(id) {
      rows <- module_comp[module_comp$node == id, ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      rows$module[1]
    }),
    
    network_module_description = sapply(prefixed_ID, function(id) {
      rows <- module_comp[module_comp$node == id, ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      rows$module_description[1]
    }),
    
    network_node_category = sapply(prefixed_ID, function(id) {
      rows <- module_comp[module_comp$node == id, ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      rows$node_category[1]
    }),
    
    network_degree = sapply(prefixed_ID, function(id) {
      rows <- module_comp[module_comp$node == id, ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NA_integer_)
      as.integer(rows$degree[1])
    }),
    
    network_is_indicator = sapply(prefixed_ID, function(id) {
      rows <- module_comp[module_comp$node == id, ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NA)
      rows$is_indicator[1]
    })
  )

cat("\nRows per dbRDA model:\n")
print(table(top_taxa_enriched$dbRDA_kingdom,
            top_taxa_enriched$dbRDA_variable))

cat("\nIn network per model:\n")
print(top_taxa_enriched %>%
        dplyr::group_by(dbRDA_kingdom, dbRDA_variable) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(
          n_total      = dplyr::n(),
          n_in_network = sum(in_network),
          n_candidate  = sum(in_candidates),
          n_indicator  = sum(network_is_indicator, na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ))

# ── Summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nFull enriched table:\n")
print(top_taxa_enriched %>%
        dplyr::select(all_of(c(
          "dbRDA_kingdom", "dbRDA_variable",
          "ASV_ID", "Taxa", "dist_origin",
          "in_network", "network_module", "network_module_description",
          "network_node_category", "network_degree",
          "network_is_indicator",
          "in_candidates", "candidate_info"
        ))),
      width = Inf)

# ── Module sharing with indicator taxa ────────────────────────────────────────
indicator_node_modules <- module_comp %>%
  dplyr::filter(is_indicator == TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(node, Taxa, module, node_category) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    indicator_node     = node,
    indicator_taxa     = Taxa,
    indicator_module   = module,
    indicator_category = node_category
  )

top_taxa_module_sharing <- top_taxa_enriched %>%
  dplyr::filter(in_network) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    shared_module_indicators = sapply(network_module, function(mod) {
      if (is.na(mod) || nchar(mod) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      shared <- indicator_node_modules %>%
        dplyr::filter(indicator_module == mod)
      if (nrow(shared) == 0) NA_character_
      else paste0(shared$indicator_taxa,
                  " (", shared$indicator_category, ")",
                  collapse = " | ")
    }),
    n_shared_indicators = sapply(network_module, function(mod) {
      if (is.na(mod) || nchar(mod) == 0) return(0L)
      sum(indicator_node_modules$indicator_module == mod)
    })
  )

cat("\ndbRDA top taxa sharing modules with indicator taxa:\n")
print(top_taxa_module_sharing %>%
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(shared_module_indicators)) %>%
        dplyr::select(all_of(c(
          "dbRDA_kingdom", "dbRDA_variable",
          "ASV_ID", "Taxa", "dist_origin",
          "network_module", "network_module_description",
          "network_degree", "network_node_category",
          "n_shared_indicators", "shared_module_indicators",
          "in_candidates", "candidate_info"
        ))) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(dbRDA_kingdom, dbRDA_variable, desc(dist_origin)),
      width = Inf)

# ── Taxonomic overlap ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_genus <- function(taxa_string) {
  taxa_string <- gsub("^unassigned ", "", taxa_string)
  taxa_string <- gsub(" \\(.*\\)", "", taxa_string)
  strsplit(taxa_string, " ")[[1]][1]
}

candidate_genera <- unique(sapply(all_comparison$Taxa, get_genus))
candidate_genera <- candidate_genera[!is.na(candidate_genera)]

top_taxa_genera  <- unique(sapply(top_taxa_table$Taxa, get_genus))
top_taxa_genera  <- top_taxa_genera[!is.na(top_taxa_genera)]

shared_genera <- intersect(candidate_genera, top_taxa_genera)

cat("\nShared genera between candidates and dbRDA top taxa:\n")
if (length(shared_genera) == 0) {
  cat("None — no genus-level overlap\n")
} else {
  print(shared_genera)
  for (g in shared_genera) {
    cat("\nGenus:", g, "\n")
    cat("  In candidates:\n")
    print(all_comparison %>%
            dplyr::filter(grepl(g, Taxa)) %>%
            dplyr::select(marker, variable, Taxa,
                          n_methods, rho_SpearmanVar, node_category))
    cat("  In dbRDA top taxa:\n")
    print(top_taxa_table %>%
            dplyr::filter(grepl(g, Taxa)) %>%
            dplyr::select(all_of(c(kingdom_col, variable_col,
                                   "Taxa", "dist_origin"))))
  }
}

# ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write_xlsx(
  top_taxa_enriched %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(
      "dbRDA_kingdom", "dbRDA_variable",
      "ASV_ID", "Taxa", "dist_origin",
      "in_network", "network_module", "network_module_description",
      "network_node_category", "network_degree",
      "network_is_indicator",
      "in_candidates", "candidate_info"
    ))) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dbRDA_kingdom, dbRDA_variable, desc(dist_origin)),
  path = paste0(choice_path,
                "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                "dbRDA_top10_enriched_crossref.xlsx")
)

write_xlsx(
  top_taxa_module_sharing %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(shared_module_indicators)) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(
      "dbRDA_kingdom", "dbRDA_variable",
      "ASV_ID", "Taxa", "dist_origin",
      "network_module", "network_module_description",
      "network_degree", "network_node_category",
      "n_shared_indicators", "shared_module_indicators",
      "in_candidates", "candidate_info"
    ))) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dbRDA_kingdom, dbRDA_variable, desc(dist_origin)),
  path = paste0(choice_path,
                "/2_Analyses_results/Metabar/",
                "dbRDA_top10_module_sharing.xlsx")
)

cat("\nTables saved.\n")
```

```{r individual panels}
Fig4_PCoA_ITS          #+ title("Fungi -- PCoA")

Fig_dbRDA_gyrB_FEP    
Fig_dbRDA_ITS_t50germ 
Fig_dbRDA_ITS_FEP     
Fig_scatter_all         # individual taxa associated…
Fig_robust_heat_gyrB     # enlever "heatmap"
Fig_robust_heat_ITS  
Fig_network_cross_meanFEP
Fig_network_cross_meant50germ
Fig_network_cross_unified
Fig_moduleCompo
```
```{r Figure 5 final layout}
base_text_theme <- theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
  plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
  plot.tag = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
)

# Panel A: Bacteria PCoA 
A <- Fig4_PCoA_gyrB +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  labs(title = "Bacteria - PCoA", tag = "A") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  base_text_theme

# Panel B: Fungi PCoA 
B <- Fig4_PCoA_ITS +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  labs(title = "Fungi - PCoA", tag = "B") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  base_text_theme

# Panels C & D: gyrB dbRDA 
C <- Fig_dbRDA_gyrB_t50germ +
  labs(tag = "C") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  base_text_theme

E <- Fig_dbRDA_gyrB_FEP +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  labs(tag = "E") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  base_text_theme

# Panels E & F: ITS dbRDA 
D <- Fig_dbRDA_ITS_t50germ +
  labs(tag = "D") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  base_text_theme

F_plot <- Fig_dbRDA_ITS_FEP +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  labs(tag = "F") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  base_text_theme

# Extract horizontal variety legend from one panel
variety_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(
  Fig4_PCoA_gyrB +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(title = "Varieties", nrow = 1,
                           override.aes = list(size = 4)),
      size = "none"
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 13)
    )
)

# Convert to ggplot for patchwork compatibility
legend_row <- as_ggplot(variety_legend)


# Assemble _____________
Fig5 <- (A + B) / (C + D) / (E + F_plot) / legend_row +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1, 0.1))

Fig5

if (choice_save_fig_article == TRUE) {
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Metabar/Fig5_PCoA_dbRDA.png"),
    plot = Fig5,
    width = 450,
    height = 450,
    units = "mm",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
}
```

```{r Figure 7 final layout}
# Panel A — network without legend ####
A <- Fig_network_cross_unified +
  labs(tag = "A") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

# Panel A_bis — legend only ####
A_bis_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(
  Fig_network_cross_unified +
    theme(legend.position  = "right",
          legend.box       = "vertical",
          legend.spacing   = unit(0.5, "cm"),
          legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          legend.text      = element_text(size = 11))
)
# wrap_elements() accepts grobs directly — no as_ggplot() needed
D <- wrap_elements(A_bis_grob)

# Panel B ####
B <- Fig_moduleCompo +
  labs(tag = "B") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

# Panel C ####
C <- Fig_assort_category +
  labs(tag = "C") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.tag   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

# Assemble ####
Fig7_GRAINES <- A + B + C + D +
  plot_layout(
    design  = "
    AAD
    BCD
    ",
    heights = c(2, 1),
    widths = c(1.2,2.2,0.8)
  )

if (choice_save_fig_article == TRUE) {
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Metabar/Fig7_network.png"),
    plot      = Fig7_GRAINES,
    width     = 430,
    height    = 300,
    units     = "mm",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
}
```

## 4.13_Supplementary Figure
```{r individual panels, eval=Metabaranalysis}
Metabar_AlphaDivRar_gyrB
Metabar_AlphaDivRar_ITS
Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_gyrB
Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_ITS
Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_gyrB
Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_ITS

Fig_network_cross
```
```{r Figure final layout, eval=Metabaranalysis}
A  <- Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_gyrB
B  <- Metabar_Fig_GenusRelAb_ITS
C  <- Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_gyrB
D  <- Metabar_Fig_Top10plot_ITS
E  <- Metabar_AlphaDivRar_gyrB
F  <- Metabar_AlphaDivRar_ITS


layoutAF <- "
AAAC
BBBD
EEFF
"
FigSupp4 <- A + B + C + D + E + F +
  plot_layout(
    design = layoutAF,
    widths = c(1.2, 1, 1, 1),
    heights = c(1.2, 1, 1)
  ) + 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c("A","B","C","D","E","F")))
#FigSupp4

if (choice_save_fig_article == TRUE) {
  ggsave(
    paste0(choice_path_fig_article, "Metabar/FigSupp4.png"),
    plot = FigSupp4,
    width = 425, #A4 170 #450
    height = 450, #A4 240 #750
    units = "mm",
    limitsize = FALSE,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```

## 4.14_Supplementary Tables
- db-RDA results
- Individual ASV associations with seed germination and emergence traits across four statistical methods
- Modules-traits associations between co-occurence network modules and seed germination or emergence traits
- Hub taxa identified within each co-occurence network module
- cross-domain network data
